text: Sarah is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Orlando to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 13 x 6 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 44 x 22 x 20 inches, 69 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 18 x 12 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 22 x 16 inches, 84 lbs; 5. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 11 inches, 90 lbs; Sarah's flight ticket is $180.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Rules from the statutes that are relevant  ---------- */

/* carry-on limits */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).

/* domestic checked-bag fees for Main Cabin */
checked_fee(1, 40).   /* 1st checked bag          */
checked_fee(2, 45).   /* 2nd checked bag          */
checked_fee(3,150).   /* 3rd checked bag          */
checked_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.   /* 4th bag and beyond */

/* oversize fees – within U.S. / Canada / PR / USVI */
oversize_fee(Dim,30) :- Dim>62, Dim=<65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim>65, Dim=<115.
oversize_fee(Dim,0) :- Dim=<62.             /* not oversize */

/* overweight fees – within U.S. / Canada / PR / USVI */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.

/* extra fee for a bag that is both oversize and/or overweight      */
/* “the higher fee … applies, in addition to the checked-bag fee.”  */
extra_fee(Dim,W,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Dim,OS),
    overweight_fee(W,OW),
    (OS>=OW -> Fee=OS ; Fee=OW).

/* ----------  Facts describing Sarah’s flight and bags  ---------- */

flight_ticket(180).
cabin(main_cabin).
route(domestic).           /* Orlando-Philadelphia inside U.S. */

/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(1,22,13, 6, 10).    /* backpack – will be carry-on        */
bag(2,44,22,20, 69).
bag(3,34,18,12, 51).
bag(4,38,22,16, 84).
bag(5,38,14,11, 90).

/* ----------  Helper predicates  ---------- */

/* sum of the three dimensions */
dim_sum(Id,Sum) :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), Sum is L+W+H.

/* does the bag fit the carry-on limits?  */
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L=<MaxL, W=<MaxW, H=<MaxH.

/* checked bag ordering (exclude the single carry-on) */
checked_bag_number(Id,N) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Bs),
    nth1(N,Bs,Id).

/* fee for one checked bag (includes base checked fee plus extra) */
bag_total_fee(Id,Total) :-
    checked_bag_number(Id,N),
    checked_fee(N,Base),
    dim_sum(Id,Dim),
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W),
    extra_fee(Dim,W,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* sum of all checked-bag fees */
total_checked_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, (bag_total_fee(_,F)), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs,Sum).

/* ----------  Grand total (ticket + all luggage charges) ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Tix),
    total_checked_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

/* ----------  Query and output ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Thomas is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Washington D.C. with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 14 x 6 inches, 5 lbs; 2. A backpack: 48 x 27 x 24 inches, 95 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 35 x 20 x 16 inches, 63 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 35 x 21 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 46 x 29 x 19 inches, 52 lbs; Thomas's flight ticket is $196.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Statutory rules (relevant extract) ------------- */

:- use_module(library(lists)).

/* Base checked-bag fees for a Main Cabin customer travelling
   within the U.S. (Charlotte ↔ Washington, D.C.)               */
base_fee(1,  40).   /* 1st checked bag */
base_fee(2,  45).   /* 2nd checked bag */
base_fee(3, 150).   /* 3rd checked bag */
base_fee(4, 200).   /* 4th checked bag and every bag thereafter */

/* Oversize fees (within U.S.) – linear dimension in inches */
oversize_fee(Size, 0  ) :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size, 30 ) :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size, 200) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.
/* (>115 in not accepted – not needed for this case)            */

/* Over-weight fees (within U.S.) – weight in pounds */
overweight_fee(W, 0  ) :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30 ) :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.
/* (>100 lb not accepted – not needed for this case)            */

/* For any checked bag the “extra” charge is
   the HIGHER of the over-size and over-weight fees.           */
bag_extra(Size, W, Extra) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, OS),
    overweight_fee(W,  OW),
    Extra is max(OS, OW).

/* -------------  Case-specific facts ------------- */

/* One carry-on (22×14×6, 5 lb) is free and therefore omitted.
   The 4 remaining items are checked.  We number them 1-4.      */
bag(1, 99, 95).   /* Backpack 48×27×24 in, 95 lb  */
bag(2, 71, 63).   /* Luggage box 35×20×16 in, 63 lb */
bag(3, 65, 51).   /* Luggage box 35×21×9  in, 51 lb */
bag(4, 94, 52).   /* Backpack 46×29×19 in, 52 lb  */

ticket_price(196).

/* -------------  Fee calculations ------------- */

bag_fee(Index, TotalFee) :-
    bag(Index, Size, W),
    base_fee(Index, Base),
    bag_extra(Size, W, Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

total_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(Fee, bag_fee(_, Fee), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Sum).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

/* -------------  Query ------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 41 x 26 x 16 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 17 x 9 inches, 55 lbs; 5. A backpack: 41 x 23 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $291.

reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1421"]).
/* =====================  Statutory rules ===================== */

oversize_fee(Dim,30)  :- Dim>62, Dim=<65.

overweight_fee(W,200) :- W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.

extra_fee(Dim,W,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Dim,OS),

    (OS>=OW -> Fee=OS ; Fee=OW).


/* =====================  Trip facts (Emily) ===================== */

/* =====================  Helper predicates ===================== */

    carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),

/* find the N-th checked bag (after removing the one carry-on) */
checked_bag_number(Id,N) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Bs),
    nth1(N,Bs,Id).

/* total fee for one checked bag: base + extra (oversize / overweight) */
bag_total_fee(Id,Total) :-
    checked_bag_number(Id,N),
    checked_fee(N,Base),
    dim_sum(Id,Dim),
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W),

/* grand total (ticket + all luggage charges) */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Tix),
    total_checked_bag_fees(Bags),

/* =====================  Query & output ===================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).

text: Patricia is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Salt Lake City to Boston with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 14 x 6 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 39 x 15 x 13 inches, 66 lbs; 3. A backpack: 49 x 29 x 21 inches, 88 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 15 x 11 inches, 98 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 38 x 16 x 9 inches, 55 lbs; Patricia's flight ticket is $144.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* --------------  Statutory rules that apply to this case -------------- */

/* Base checked-bag fees for a Basic-Economy customer on a journey
   “within / between the U.S., Puerto Rico and U.S. Virgin Islands”.      */
bag_base_fee(1,40).
bag_base_fee(2,45).
bag_base_fee(3,150).
bag_base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* Oversize fees for travel within the U.S.                                */
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size > 65, Size =< 115.

/* Over-weight fees for travel within the U.S.                             */
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W > 53,  W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200)  :- W > 70,  W =< 100.

/* The extra charge for a bag that is both over-size and over-weight is
   the higher of the two individual surcharges.                           */
extra_fee(W,Size,Extra) :-
        overweight_fee(W,OW), oversize_fee(Size,OS),
        (OW >= OS -> Extra = OW ; Extra = OS).

/* --------------  Facts for Patricia’s journey -------------- */

/* unchecked (free) personal item is not represented – it has no cost.    */
/* Four chargeable checked bags, already in the order they will be paid.   */
bag(1, 39,15,13, 66).   /* luggage box   */
bag(2, 49,29,21, 88).   /* large backpack*/
bag(3, 38,15,11, 98).   /* large backpack*/
bag(4, 38,16, 9, 55).   /* luggage box   */

/* Flight ticket price                                                     */
flight_ticket(144).

/* --------------  Derived calculations -------------- */

/* Size of a bag (L+W+H)                                                   */
bag_size(Index,Size) :-
        bag(Index,L,W,H,_),
        Size is L+W+H.

/* Total fee for a single checked bag                                      */
bag_total_fee(Index,Fee) :-
        bag(Index,_,_,_,Weight),
        bag_size(Index,Size),
        bag_base_fee(Index,Base),
        extra_fee(Weight,Size,Extra),
        Fee is Base + Extra.

/* Sum fees for all checked bags                                           */
checked_bags_total(Total) :-
        findall(F, bag_total_fee(_,F), List),
        sumlist(List,Total).

/* Overall amount Patricia must pay                                        */
total_cost(Total) :-
        checked_bags_total(Bags),
        flight_ticket(Ticket),
        Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* --------------  Query to show the answer -------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 38 x 22 x 13 inches, 74 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 42 x 21 x 15 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 36 x 22 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $178.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1203"]).
/* =========================================================
   Statutory rules and facts for Robert’s itinerary
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------------  Carry-on limits  ---------------------- */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).          % length, width, height (inches)

/* ----------------  Checked-bag fees (Main Plus) ---------- */
/* Main Plus = Main Cabin allowance + 1 complimentary bag
   (domestic U.S. route; max 2 checked-bag allowance).       */
checked_fee(1, 0).              % 1st checked bag is free
checked_fee(2, 45).             % 2nd checked bag
checked_fee(3,150).             % 3rd checked bag
checked_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.     % 4th bag and beyond

/* ----------------  Extra fees – size --------------------- */
/* Route: within / between U.S. & Canada / PR / USVI         */
oversize_fee(Dim,30)  :- Dim>62 , Dim=<65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim>65 , Dim=<115.
oversize_fee(Dim,0)   :- Dim=<62.

/* ----------------  Extra fees – weight ------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200)  :- W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W=<50.

/* ----------------  Extra fee chooser --------------------- */
/* “The higher fee between oversize and overweight applies,
   in addition to the checked-bag fee.”                      */
extra_fee(Dim,W,Fee) :-
        oversize_fee(Dim,OS),
        overweight_fee(W,OW),
        (OS>=OW -> Fee = OS ; Fee = OW).

/* ----------------  Trip facts ---------------------------- */
flight_ticket(178).
route(domestic).                % Minneapolis → New York inside U.S.

/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(1,18,11, 8,  7).     % personal item / carry-on
bag(2,36,16,11, 53).
bag(3,38,22,13, 74).
bag(4,42,21,15, 51).
bag(5,36,22,11, 52).

/* ----------------  Helper predicates --------------------- */

/* sum of the three dimensions */
dim_sum(Id,S) :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), S is L+W+H.

/* true if a bag fits the carry-on size limits               */
carry_on(Id) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
        carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
        L=<MaxL, W=<MaxW, H=<MaxH.

/* Determine ordinal number (N) of a checked bag, skipping
   the single carry-on / personal item                       */
checked_bag_number(Id,N) :-
        findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), List),
        nth1(N,List,Id).

/* Cost for one checked bag (base fee + highest extra fee)   */
bag_total_fee(Id,Total) :-
        checked_bag_number(Id,N),
        checked_fee(N,Base),
        dim_sum(Id,Dim),

        extra_fee(Dim,W,Extra),

/* Sum of all checked-bag fees                               */
total_checked_bag_fees(Sum) :-

        sum_list(Fs,Sum).

/* ----------------  Grand total --------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
        flight_ticket(Tix),
        total_checked_bag_fees(Bags),
        Total is Tix + Bags.

/* ----------------  Query & output ------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: Michael is a Business Class passenger flying from Toronto to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 14 x 7 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 48 x 36 x 24 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 21 x 9 inches, 68 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 14 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $352.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 992"]).
/* =========================================================
   Michael – Business Class
   Toronto (Canada)  →  Philadelphia (U.S.)
   Route category: Within / between U.S. and Canada
   ========================================================= */

/* ---------------  Ticket price  ------------------------- */
flight_cost(352).

/* ---------------  Carry-on item (free) ------------------ */
/* Bag #1 (21×14×7, 10 lbs) fits the carry-on limits, so it
   is NOT included in the checked-bag list.                 */

/* ---------------  Checked bags  ------------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)                      */
bag(2,34,20,11,51).
bag(3,48,36,24,51).
bag(4,34,21, 9,68).
bag(5,35,14,14,52).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (in no particular order)    */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ---------------  Statutory rules  ---------------------- */

/* total (L+W+H) */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* Oversize fees – within / between U.S. & Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200).

/* Overweight fees – threshold depends on whether
   the bag’s BASE fee is complimentary (70 lbs) or charged (50 lbs). */
overweight_fee(Weight,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (  Weight =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ;  Weight =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ;  Weight =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;  Weight =< 100    -> Fee = 200).

/* Penalty = higher of the oversize vs. overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-           % complimentary bag
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
        oversize_fee(S,OS),
        overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-        % charged bag
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
        oversize_fee(S,OS),
        overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Base checked-bag fees for Business Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ---------------  Helper predicates  -------------------- */

/* choose two different elements (F1 < F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
        append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
        member(F2,Tail).

/* build the ordered list of bags: freebies first          */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,R1),
        select(F2,R1,R2),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|R2].

/* cost for one concrete choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Tix),
        Total is Tix + BagCost + Penalties.

/* walk through the ordered list accumulating base fees
   (BagCost) and penalties (Penalties)                     */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,BagSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Base),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        Next is Idx+1,
        cost_bags(Bs,Next,BagRest,PenRest),
        BagSum is Base + BagRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* ---------------  Overall minimal total cost ------------ */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(List),
        findall(T,
                ( choose_two(List,F1,F2),
                  cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
                Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ---------------  Query & result ------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Karen is a Business Class passenger flying from Dallas to Phoenix with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 14 x 8 inches, 5 lbs; 2. A backpack: 53 x 29 x 30 inches, 77 lbs; 3. A backpack: 35 x 18 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 18 x 13 inches, 65 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 50 x 23 x 26 inches, 98 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $287.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1097"]).
/* -------------  Facts describing Karen’s trip ------------------ */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(287).

/* list of checked bags: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).        */
/* (Bag 1 – 19x14x8, 5 lbs – is a carry-on and is therefore omitted) */
bag(2,53,29,30,77).
bag(3,35,18,10,51).
bag(4,34,18,13,65).
bag(5,50,23,26,98).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (for easy iteration) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* -------------  Statutory rules for this itinerary -------------- */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – within / between U.S. and Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees – domestic U.S. / Canada                         */
/* Threshold is 70 lbs for complimentary Business bags,             */
/* 50 lbs for charged bags                                          */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),          % complimentary → 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),          % charged bag → 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fees for Business Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* -------------  Helper predicates --------------------------------*/

/* pick 2 different elements (F1 appears before F2 in the list) */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* build an ordered list putting the 2 free bags first */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* compute cost for a particular choice of free bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered bag list, accumulating fees & penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of choosing the 2 complimentary bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* -------------  Query and output --------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Jessica is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Seattle to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 12 x 7 inches, 5 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 51 x 29 x 24 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 46 x 25 x 21 inches, 63 lbs; 4. A backpack: 47 x 35 x 24 inches, 75 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 34 x 22 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $292.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1317"]).
/*-----------------------------------------------------------
   American Airlines – baggage and ticket cost calculator
   Case:  Jessica – Seattle (SEA) ➔ Miami (MIA), Main Plus
-----------------------------------------------------------*/

/* ----------  ticket -------------------------------------- */
flight_cost(292).


/* ----------  list of checked bags  ----------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).                      */
/* (Jessica’s backpack that is 22x12x7, 5 lbs is her carry-on,
   therefore it is NOT listed here.)                        */
bag(2,51,29,24,51).
bag(3,46,25,21,63).
bag(4,47,35,24,75).
bag(5,34,22, 9,53).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids (order given) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------  Statutory rules (domestic, Main Plus)  ------- */

/* sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – Within / between U.S., Canada, PR, USVI */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee – domestic
   Threshold is 70 lbs for COMPLIMENTARY bags, 50 lbs for CHARGED */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for one bag: higher of over-size vs over-weight */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),   % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),   % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee by ordinal position – Main Plus (domestic) */
bag_fee(1,0).                  % extra free bag that Main Plus includes
bag_fee(2,45).                 % 2nd checked bag
bag_fee(3,150).                % 3rd
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.        % 4th and beyond

/* ----------  Helper predicates --------------------------- */

/* choose exactly 1 element Free from the list */
choose_one([X|_],X).
choose_one([_|T],X) :- choose_one(T,X).

/* build ordered list putting Free first, others keep order */
ordered_list(Free,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Free,All,Rest),
       Ordered = [Free|Rest].

/* compute cost for a particular choice of complimentary bag */
cost_for_choice(Free,Total) :-
       ordered_list(Free,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =:= 1 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of choosing the free bag */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_one(L,F),
                 cost_for_choice(F,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------  Query and report ---------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: David is a Business Class passenger flying from Portland to Orlando with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 14 x 8 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 36 x 16 x 13 inches, 58 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 36 x 16 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 45 x 30 x 20 inches, 98 lbs; 5. A backpack: 34 x 18 x 12 inches, 88 lbs; David's flight ticket is $207.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1017"]).
/* ===================================================================
   American Airlines bag-fee calculator
   Case: David – Business Class – Portland (PDX) ↔ Orlando (MCO)
   =================================================================== */


/* ----------  Ticket ------------------------------------------------ */

flight_cost(207).                 /* price of David’s ticket in $ */


/* ----------  Checked bags ----------------------------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */

bag(2,36,16,13,58).
bag(3,36,16,13,51).
bag(4,45,30,20,98).
bag(5,34,18,12,88).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids                             */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------  Statutory rules for this itinerary ------------------- */

/* sum of outside dimensions                                          */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ----------------------------------------------------  Oversize fee */
/* Route: within / between U.S. and Canada (includes PDX–MCO)         */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------  Overweight fee */
/* Different thresholds for complimentary vs. charged bags            */
/* (Business cabin: 70-lb allowance for complimentary bags)           */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* --------------------------------------------------  Penalty (extra) */
/* “Higher of oversize vs. overweight”                                 */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-                    /* complimentary bag   */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),          /* 70-lb threshold     */
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-                 /* excess-fee bag      */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),          /* 50-lb threshold     */
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------------------------------------------  Checked-bag fees   */
/* Business Class – travel within U.S.                                 */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ----------  Helper predicates ------------------------------------ */

/* choose two different elements (Id1<Id2) from a list                */
choose_two(List,Id1,Id2) :-
       append(_,[Id1|Tail],List),
       member(Id2,Tail).

/* build an ordered list whose first 2 positions are the freebies     */
ordered_list(Free1,Free2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Free1,All,R1),
       select(Free2,R1,R2),
       Ordered = [Free1,Free2|R2].

/* walk through ordered list accumulating bag fees & penalties        */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,FRest,PRest),
       FeeSum is Fee + FRest,
       PenSum is Pen + PRest.

/* compute total for a particular selection of the 2 complimentary bags */
choice_total(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,Fees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + Fees + Penalties.

/* minimal total over all ways of choosing the 2 freebies              */
total_cost(Min) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T, (choose_two(L,F1,F2), choice_total(F1,F2,T)), Ts),
       min_list(Ts,Min).

/* ----------  Query & output --------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Daniel is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Montreal with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 14 x 7 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 40 x 16 x 17 inches, 85 lbs; 3. A backpack: 41 x 20 x 20 inches, 59 lbs; 4. A backpack: 33 x 21 x 11 inches, 77 lbs; 5. A backpack: 40 x 26 x 20 inches, 52 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $105.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* =========================================================
   Statutory rules needed for the present case
   ========================================================= */

/* ----- route classification (Charlotte – Montreal) */
route(charlotte, montreal, us_canada).

/* ----- passenger and fare type */
passenger(daniel).
fare_class(daniel, main_plus).

/* ----- “Main Plus” gives 1 extra free checked bag          */
/*     (treated as the 1st checked bag)                      */
extra_free_bags(main_plus, 1).

/* ----- base checked-bag fees for the route U.S.–Canada ----- */
base_checked_fee(us_canada, 1, 35).
base_checked_fee(us_canada, 2, 45).
base_checked_fee(us_canada, 3, 150).
base_checked_fee(us_canada, N, 200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----- overweight fees (lbs) – U.S./Canada route ---------- */
overweight_fee(us_canada, W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(us_canada, W, 30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(us_canada, W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(us_canada, W, 200) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* ----- oversize fees (total inches) – U.S./Canada route ---- */
oversize_fee(us_canada, S, 0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(us_canada, S, 30)  :- S  > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(us_canada, S, 200) :- S  > 65, S =< 115.

/* for each bag, the greater of the oversize / overweight fee applies */
extra_bag_fee(Route, W, S, Fee) :-
        overweight_fee(Route, W, OW),
        oversize_fee(Route, S, OS),
        (OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS).

/* =========================================================
   Facts describing Daniel’s items
   ========================================================= */

item(1, personal_item,   18,14,7,   9).          /* free – personal item */
item(2, checked,         40,16,17, 85).
item(3, checked,         41,20,20, 59).
item(4, checked,         33,21,11, 77).
item(5, checked,         40,26,20, 52).

/* =========================================================
   Utility predicates
   ========================================================= */

/* total outside dimension of a bag */
size_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* list of all checked bags (order as given) */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
        findall(ID, (item(ID, checked,_,_,_,_)), List).

/* base fee for bag number N, taking free-bag entitlement into account */
effective_base_fee(Passenger, Route, N, Fee) :-
        fare_class(Passenger, Class),
        extra_free_bags(Class, FreeN),
        (N =< FreeN
          -> Fee = 0                       /* waived */
          ;  (base_checked_fee(Route, N, Fee))).

/* fee for one checked bag in position N */
bag_total_fee(Passenger, Route, N, BagID, TotalFee) :-
        item(BagID, checked, L,W,H, WT),
        size_sum(L,W,H, S),
        effective_base_fee(Passenger, Route, N, Base),
        extra_bag_fee(Route, WT, S, Extra),
        TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* sum fees for all checked bags */
checked_bags_cost(Passenger, Route, Total) :-
        checked_bag_list(List),
        checked_bags_cost(Passenger, Route, List, 1, Total).

checked_bags_cost(_, _, [], _, 0).
checked_bags_cost(P, R, [B|Bs], N, Total) :-
        bag_total_fee(P, R, N, B, FeeB),
        N1 is N+1,
        checked_bags_cost(P, R, Bs, N1, Rest),
        Total is FeeB + Rest.

/* flight ticket price */
ticket_price(daniel, 105).

/* Daniel’s complete total */
total_cost(Total) :-
        passenger(daniel),
        route(charlotte, montreal, Route),
        checked_bags_cost(daniel, Route, BagsCost),
        ticket_price(daniel, Ticket),
        Total is Ticket + BagsCost.

/* =========================================================
   Query
   ========================================================= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 38 x 15 x 10 inches, 56 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $286.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

% -------------------------------
%  Statutory rules  (abridged)
% -------------------------------
:- use_module(library(lists)).

% carry-on / personal–item limits
carry_on_limits(22,14,9).          % L, W, H  (inches)
personal_limits(18,14,8).

dims_fit(L,W,H,MaxL,MaxW,MaxH) :- L=<MaxL, W=<MaxW, H=<MaxH.

% checked-bag base fees (Basic-Economy, wholly within U.S.)
bag_base_fee(1,40).
bag_base_fee(2,45).
bag_base_fee(3,150).
bag_base_fee(4,200).
bag_base_fee(N,200) :- N>=5.

% overweight fees (within U.S.)
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50, W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53, W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W>70, W=<100.

% oversize fees (within U.S.)
oversize_fee(L,W,H,Fee) :-
    S is L+W+H,
    (   S =< 62            -> Fee = 0
    ;   S =< 65            -> Fee = 30
    ;   S =< 115           -> Fee = 200
    ).

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Case facts – Robert (Basic-Economy LAS→CLT)
% -------------------------------------------------
item(item1,22,12, 8, 12).   % backpack (carry-on size)
item(item2,33,18,12, 57).   % luggage box
item(item3,35,19,10, 99).   % luggage box
item(item4,33,22,10, 82).   % luggage box
item(item5,38,15,10, 56).   % backpack (too large for carry-on)

item_order([item1,item2,item3,item4,item5]).  % order presented at airport

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Derived facts
% -------------------------------------------------
eligible_carry(ID) :-
    item(ID,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limits(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    dims_fit(L,W,H,MaxL,MaxW,MaxH).

% first eligible item in presentation order is taken as the free carry-on
carry_on_selected(ID) :-
    item_order(List),
    member(ID,List),
    eligible_carry(ID),
    !.

checked_items(Checked) :-
    item_order(List),
    (   carry_on_selected(Carry)
    ->  exclude(=(Carry),List,Checked)
    ;   Checked = List).

additional_fee(BagID,Add) :-
    item(BagID,L,W,H,Wt),
    oversize_fee(L,W,H,OS),
    overweight_fee(Wt,OW),
    max_list([OS,OW],Add).   % only the higher of over-size / over-weight

bag_fee(BagID,Idx,Fee) :-
    bag_base_fee(Idx,Base),
    additional_fee(BagID,Add),
    Fee is Base + Add.

total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_items(List),
    findall(F,(nth1(I,List,B),bag_fee(B,I,F)),Fees),
    sumlist(Fees,Total).

flight_ticket_cost(286).

total_cost(Total) :-
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    flight_ticket_cost(Ticket),
    Total is Bags + Ticket.

% -------------------------------------------------
%  Query
% -------------------------------------------------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Thomas is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Phoenix to Brussels with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 12 x 6 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 39 x 21 x 12 inches, 59 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 38 x 15 x 12 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 50 x 33 x 28 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 49 x 35 x 25 inches, 51 lbs; Thomas's flight ticket is $322.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* --------------------------
   Statutory rules (excerpt)
   -------------------------- */

/* route classification for the case */
route(europe_us).    /* Phoenix – Brussels */

/* passenger class */
class(basic_economy).

/* ---- Checked-bag base fees for BASIC ECONOMY on the Europe↔US route ---- */
checked_bag_base_fee(1, basic_economy, europe_us, 75).
checked_bag_base_fee(2, basic_economy, europe_us, 100).
checked_bag_base_fee(3, basic_economy, europe_us, 200).
checked_bag_base_fee(N, basic_economy, europe_us, 200) :- N>=4.

/* ---- Oversize fees on the Europe↔US route ----
   Size = L+W+H inches                                             */
oversize_fee(europe_us, Size, 0)   :- Size =< 62.                       % within allowance
oversize_fee(europe_us, Size, 30)  :- Size > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(europe_us, Size, 150) :- Size > 65, Size =< 115.

/* ---- Over-weight fees -------------------------------------------- */
% 50 < wt =< 53  (applies to all routes / classes)
overweight_fee(_,       Wt, 30)  :- Wt > 50, Wt =< 53.

% 53 < wt =< 70 for BASIC ECONOMY on Europe↔US route = $100
overweight_fee(europe_us, Wt, 100) :- Wt > 53, Wt =< 70, class(basic_economy).

% ≤50 lb is free
overweight_fee(_,       Wt, 0)   :- Wt =< 50.

/* For this case we won’t exceed 70 lb, so higher brackets are omitted. */


/* ---------------
   Case facts
   --------------- */

/* Flight ticket price */
ticket_price(322).

/* Personal item – free (not listed as a checked bag) */
personal_item(backpack).

/* Checked bags: bag(ID, L, W, H, Weight_lbs) ------------------------ */
bag(1, 39, 21, 12, 59).
bag(2, 38, 15, 12, 52).
bag(3, 50, 33, 28, 51).
bag(4, 49, 35, 25, 51).

/* -----------------
   Derived measures
   ----------------- */

/* Sum of outside dimensions = size inches */
bag_size(ID, Size) :-
    bag(ID, L, W, H, _),
    Size is L+W+H.

/* Weight */
bag_weight(ID, Wt) :-
    bag(ID, _, _, _, Wt).

/* Highest of oversize / overweight fee */
highest_extra_fee(ID, ExtraFee) :-
    bag_size(ID, Size),
    bag_weight(ID, Wt),
    route(Route),
    oversize_fee(Route, Size, OverSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Route, Wt, OverWtFee),
    ExtraFee is max(OverSizeFee, OverWtFee).

/* Checked-bag base fee by sequence number */
checked_bag_fee(ID, BaseFee) :-
    class(Class), route(Route),
    bag_index(ID, N),
    checked_bag_base_fee(N, Class, Route, BaseFee).

/* Establish ordinal position of each bag (1-based)                   */
bag_index(ID, N) :-
    findall(B, bag(B,_,_,_,_), List),
    sort(List, Sorted),      % IDs already 1..4, keeps order
    nth1(N, Sorted, ID).

/* Total fee per bag */
bag_total_fee(ID, TotalFee) :-
    checked_bag_fee(ID, Base),
    highest_extra_fee(ID, Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* Sum of all bag fees */
all_bags_total(Total) :-
    findall(F, (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), bag_total_fee(ID,F)), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

/* -------------------------
   Grand total for Thomas
   ------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    all_bags_total(BagFees),
    Total is Tix + BagFees.

/* -------------------------
   Query & output
   ------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?

/* ---------------  Statutory rules we need for this case --------------- */

/* price of the ticket */
ticket_price(824).

/* --------------------------  ROUTE in the case ------------------------ */
route(to_from_china).        /* Salt Lake City (U.S.)  ->  Guangzhou (China) */

/* ----------------------  Checked-bag order fees ----------------------- */
/* Premium Economy – to / from China
      1st & 2nd bag free, 3rd bag $200, 4th+ bag $200                    */

base_checked_fee(BagNo,0)   :- BagNo =< 2.          /* 1st & 2nd        */
base_checked_fee(BagNo,200) :- BagNo  >= 3.         /* 3rd, 4th …       */

/* -------------------  Overweight fee (to / from China) ---------------- */
overweight_fee(W,450) :- W  > 70,  W =< 100.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W  > 53,  W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 30) :- W  > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,  0) :- W =< 50.

/* --------------------  Oversize fee (to / from China) ----------------- */
oversize_fee(D,200) :- D  > 65,  D =< 115.
oversize_fee(D, 30) :- D  > 62,  D =< 65.
oversize_fee(D,  0) :- D =< 62.

/* ---------------  The extra charge for any single bag ----------------- */
max_num(X,Y,X) :- X>=Y.
max_num(X,Y,Y) :- Y> X.

extra_charge(Weight,Dim,Fee) :-
        overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
        oversize_fee(Dim,OS),
        max_num(OW,OS,Fee).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* -------------------  Facts for Patricia’s baggage  ------------------- */
/* checkedbag(SequentialNumber, Length, Width, Height, Weight).          */

checkedbag(1,35,20,10,74).   /* “luggage box”   */
checkedbag(2,46,34,21,89).   /* backpack        */
checkedbag(3,44,25,22,64).   /* backpack        */
checkedbag(4,54,30,27,70).   /* luggage box     */

/* ------------------------  Helper predicates  ------------------------- */
dim_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

bag_fee(BagNo,TotalFee) :-
    checkedbag(BagNo,L,W,H,Weight),
    dim_sum(L,W,H,Dim),
    base_checked_fee(BagNo,Base),
    extra_charge(Weight,Dim,Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* ----------------------  Aggregate total cost  ------------------------ */
total_bags_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(F,bag_fee(_,F),Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Sum).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_bags_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* -----------------------  Produce the answer  ------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).

text: Susan is a Business Class passenger flying from Minneapolis to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 11 x 8 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 44 x 32 x 20 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 37 x 13 x 14 inches, 68 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 16 x 14 inches, 66 lbs; 5. A backpack: 49 x 32 x 23 inches, 96 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $162.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 972"]).
/* =========================================
   Susan – Minneapolis (MSP) ➔ Miami (MIA)
   Business Class – domestic itinerary
   ========================================= */

/* ---------- ticket price ---------------- */
flight_cost(162).

/* ---------- checked bags ---------------- */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)   */
bag(2, 44, 32, 20, 51).
bag(3, 37, 13, 14, 68).
bag(4, 34, 16, 14, 66).
bag(5, 49, 32, 23, 96).

/* list of *checked* bag Ids                */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ---------- statutory rules -------------- */

/* sum of the 3 outside dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between U.S. & Canada */
oversize_fee(S,Fee) :-
         (   S =< 62  -> Fee = 0
         ;   S =< 65  -> Fee = 30
         ;   S =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee – threshold = 70 lb for complimentary,
                      threshold = 50 lb for charged bags  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
         (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
         ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
         ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
         ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs. overweight ------------- */
penalty(BagId,complimentary,Pen) :-
         bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
         dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
         oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
         overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
         Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
         bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
         dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
         oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
         overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
         Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* base checked–bag fees for Business Class, domestic */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ---------- helper predicates ------------- */

/* choose two distinct elements (F1 < F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
         append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
         member(F2,Tail).

/* place freebies first, preserve order of the others */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
         checked_bag_ids(All),
         select(F1,All,R1),
         select(F2,R1,R2),
         Ordered = [F1,F2|R2].

/* cost for one specific choice of the two complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
         ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
         cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,Penalties),
         flight_cost(Flight),
         Total is Flight + BagCost + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees & penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
         (Idx =< 2 -> Class = complimentary ; Class = charged),
         bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
         penalty(Bag,Class,Pen),
         NextIdx is Idx+1,
         cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestCost,RestPen),
         CostSum is BaseFee + RestCost,
         PenSum  is Pen + RestPen.

/* compute minimal total over every way of picking 2 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
         checked_bag_ids(L),
         findall(T,
                 ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                   cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T) ),
                 Totals),
         min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ---------- query & output ---------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

/* ========= RULES FROM THE STATUTE (only the parts that are relevant
            to this concrete case were encoded) ===================== */

/* -------------------- general flight data ------------------------ */
flight(elizabeth, salt_lake_city, charlotte).
class(elizabeth, premium_economy).
ticket_price(elizabeth, 66).

within_us(salt_lake_city,charlotte).   /* the itinerary is totally inside U.S. */

/* -------------------- allowances --------------------------------- */
free_checked_bags(premium_economy, 2).

/* checked-bag fee that depends on the bag number
   (only for itineraries totally inside the U.S.)                   */
checked_bag_fee(_Class, BagNumber, 0)      :- BagNumber =< 2.            /* 1st – 2nd */
checked_bag_fee(_Class, 3,          150).                               /* 3rd        */
checked_bag_fee(_Class, N,          200) :- N >= 4.                     /* 4th +      */

/* -------------------- overweight fees (within U.S.) -------------- */
overweight_fee(Weight, 0)  :- Weight =< 50.
overweight_fee(Weight, 30) :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(Weight, 100):- Weight  > 53, Weight =< 70.
overweight_fee(Weight, 200):- Weight  > 70, Weight =< 100.

/* -------------------- oversize fees (within U.S.) ---------------- */
oversize_fee(Size, 0)   :- Size     =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size, 30)  :- Size     > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size, 200) :- Size     > 65, Size =< 115.

/* for one bag the higher amount between oversize and overweight
   applies (in addition to any checked-bag fee)                     */
extra_size_weight_fee(Weight,Size,Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW), oversize_fee(Size,OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS).

/* ========== FACTS THAT DESCRIBE ELIZABETH’S BAGS ================= */

/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  */
bag(1, 41,21,16, 57).
bag(2, 38,16, 9, 66).
bag(3, 37,14,12, 52).
bag(4, 38,12,13, 55).

/* turn the physical data of a bag into its fees ------------------- */
one_bag_total_cost(BagNumber, Weight, L,W,H, Cost) :-
    Size is L+W+H,
    checked_bag_fee(premium_economy, BagNumber, BagFee),
    extra_size_weight_fee(Weight, Size, ExtraFee),
    Cost is BagFee + ExtraFee.

/* ========== TOTAL COST FOR THE TRIP ============================== */
total_bag_cost(Total) :-
    findall(Cost,
            ( bag(Index,L,W,H,Weight),
              nth1(BagNumber,[1,2,3,4],Index),  % bag order as given
              one_bag_total_cost(BagNumber,Weight,L,W,H,Cost)
            ),
            Costs),
    sumlist(Costs, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(elizabeth,Ticket),
    total_bag_cost(BagCost),
    Total is Ticket + BagCost.

/* ======================= QUERY =================================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

/* ---------- Rules (statutes) -------------------------------------------- */

/* route category for the itinerary */
route_cat(new_orleans, ottawa, us_canada).

/* cabin of the passenger */
cabin(first_class).

/* ---------- Passenger’s bags (facts) ------------------------------------ */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  Length,Width,Height in inches, 
   Weight in pounds */

bag(2,49,26,23,52).
bag(3,51,33,29,51).
bag(4,35,20,10,52).
bag(5,36,15,12,52).

/* Bag 1 is used as the single free carry-on item */
carry_on(1).

checked_bag(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carry_on(BagId).

/* -----------------  FEES  ------------------------------------------------ */

/* ---- base checked-bag fee (depends on order) ---- */
base_fee(Index, first_class, us_canada, 0)  :- Index =< 2, !.
base_fee(3,      first_class, us_canada, 150) :- !.
base_fee(Index,  first_class, us_canada, 200) :- Index >= 4.

/* ---- oversize fees (U.S. <-> Canada) ---- */
oversize_fee(us_canada, Dim, 0)   :- Dim =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(us_canada, Dim, 30)  :- Dim =< 65, !.          /* 62-65 in */
oversize_fee(us_canada, Dim, 200) :- Dim =< 115, !.

/* ---- overweight fees (only ranges that occur in the case) ---- */
overweight_fee(_Route, W, 0)   :- W =< 50, !.
overweight_fee(_Route, W, 30)  :- W  =< 53, !.               /* 50-53 lb */
overweight_fee(us_canada, W,100):- W  =< 70, !.

/* for each checked bag compute its total fee */
checked_bag_fee(BagId, Fee) :-
    cabin(Cabin), route_cat(new_orleans, ottawa, Route),
    /* order of this checked bag */
    findall(Id, checked_bag(Id), List),
    sort(List, Sorted),               /* order by Id (1 … 5)               */
    nth1(Index, Sorted, BagId),       /* Index starts at 1                  */
    base_fee(Index, Cabin, Route, Base),

    /* size and weight */
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
    Dim is L+W+H,

    oversize_fee(Route, Dim, OSize),
    overweight_fee(Route, Weight, OWeight),
    Extra is max(OSize,OWeight),

    Fee is Base + Extra.

/* sum of all bag fees */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(F, (checked_bag(B), checked_bag_fee(B,F)), List),
    sum_list(List, Total).

/* overall cost = ticket + bag fees */
ticket_price(268).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

/* ---------------   query   ---------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A backpack: 33 x 22 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 36 x 21 x 10 inches, 59 lbs; 5. A backpack: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; William's flight ticket is $847.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  Statutory rules relevant to this case --------------- */

% passenger, class and journey region
passenger(william).
class(basic_economy).
region(australia_nz).                 % ‘To / from Australia and New Zealand’
ticket_price(847).                    % given in the case

/* --------------------  Bags the passenger is travelling with -------------------- */
% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight_lbs)
bag(1,20,14, 8,10).   % this will be the 1 allowed carry–on
bag(2,49,26,23,51).
bag(3,33,22, 9,51).
bag(4,36,21,10,59).
bag(5,33,16,14,52).

/* --------------------  Determining which bag is carry-on -------------------- */
% 1 personal item wasn’t supplied, so bag 1 is treated as the single carry-on
carry_on_bag(1).

checked_bag(Id) :- bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on_bag(Id).

/* ---------------- Oversize and overweight surcharges (Australia / NZ region) ---------------- */

% linear dimension of a bag
dimension(Id,D) :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), D is L+W+H.

% oversize fee for the Australia / NZ region
oversize_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    dimension(Id,D),
    (   D > 65 -> Fee = 200          % 65-115 in / $200
    ;   D > 62 -> Fee = 30           % 62-65 in  / $30
    ;   Fee = 0).

% overweight fee (all regions use same brackets / amounts for these weights)
overweight_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    bag(Id,_,_,_,Wt),
    (   Wt > 53 -> Fee = 100         % 53-70 lbs
    ;   Wt > 50 -> Fee = 30          % 50-53 lbs
    ;   Fee = 0).

% when both apply take only the higher one
surcharge(Id,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Id,O),
    overweight_fee(Id,W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

/* ---------------- Base checked-bag fee sequence for Basic-Economy, Australia/NZ ---------------- */
% base_fee(BagNumber, Fee)
base_fee(1,75).
base_fee(2,100).
base_fee(3,200).
base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ---------------- Cost of each checked bag ---------------- */
bag_cost(SeqNum, BagId, Cost) :-
    checked_bag(BagId),
    base_fee(SeqNum,Base),
    surcharge(BagId,S),
    Cost is Base + S.

/* ---------------- Total of all checked bags ---------------- */
total_checked_bag_fee(Total) :-
    findall(B,checked_bag(B),BsUnordered),
    sort(BsUnordered,Bs),                  % sequence them 2,3,4,5
    bag_costs(Bs,1,0,Total).

bag_costs([],_,Acc,Acc).
bag_costs([Bag|Rest],Seq,Acc0,Total) :-
    bag_cost(Seq,Bag,C),
    Acc1 is Acc0 + C,
    Seq1 is Seq + 1,
    bag_costs(Rest,Seq1,Acc1,Total).

/* ---------------- Grand total ---------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    total_checked_bag_fee(BagFee),
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagFee.

/* ---------------- Query and output ---------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

/*********************************************************************
   Rules derived from the statutes
*********************************************************************/

% route(+From,+To, -RouteType)
route(roma, 'salt_lake_city', europe_us).    % Rome (Italy, Europe) → U.S.

% base checked-bag fee for Main Cabin on a Europe↔U.S. itinerary
% bag_index is 1-based among the checked pieces

base_fee(main_cabin, europe_us, 2, 100).
base_fee(main_cabin, europe_us, N, 200) :- N >= 3.

% -------- Oversize rules (Europe ↔ U.S.) --------
oversize_fee(SizeIn, europe_us, 30)  :- SizeIn > 62, SizeIn =< 65.
oversize_fee(SizeIn, europe_us, 150) :- SizeIn > 65, SizeIn =< 115.
oversize_fee(SizeIn, europe_us, 0)   :- SizeIn =< 62.

% -------- Over-weight rules --------
% 50-53 lbs (all routes / all classes)
overweight_fee(W, 30)  :- W > 50, W =< 53.
% 53-70 lbs (Europe ↔ U.S.)
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W > 53, W =< 70.
% ≤50 lbs → no overweight fee
overweight_fee(W, 0)   :- W =< 50.

% choose the higher of the two extras
extra_fee(BagId, Fee) :-
    bag(BagId, _L,_W,_H,Weight),
    size_sum(BagId, Sum),
    route(roma,'salt_lake_city', Route),
    oversize_fee(Sum, Route, OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OWFee),
    Fee is max(OSFee, OWFee).

/*********************************************************************
   Facts describing the concrete case
*********************************************************************/
class(main_cabin).
ticket_price(608).

% bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)

bag(2, 38, 13, 12, 52).
bag(3, 38, 13, 14, 65).
bag(4, 38, 25, 14, 56).
bag(5, 39, 20, 12, 53).

% helper: total outside dimensions

    Sum is L+W+H.

% carry-on test (≤22×14×9 inches)
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

% checked_bag(+Id, -CheckedIndex)
% builds the list of checked bags in ascending Id order
checked_bag(Id, Index) :-
    findall(B, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Bs),
    nth1(Index, Bs, Id).

% fee for a particular checked bag
bag_total_fee(Id, Total) :-
    checked_bag(Id, Index),
    class(Class),
    route(roma,'salt_lake_city', Route),
    base_fee(Class, Route, Index, Base),
    extra_fee(Id, Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

% sum all bag fees
all_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, (bag_total_fee(_,F)), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Sum).

% overall total cost
total_cost(Total) :-
    all_bag_fees(BagCost),
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagCost.

/*********************************************************************
   Query – prints the total
*********************************************************************/
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

    oversize_fee(Size, OverSizeFee),

            ( bag(I,L,W,H,WT),
              bag_total_fee(I,L,W,H,WT,F)
            ),
            Fees),

   In First Class the 2nd and 3rd bags are also free.
*/
free_checked_bags(3).    /* total number of complimentary checked bags  */

/* --------  Size and weight limits for complimentary bags -------------- */
complimentary_weight_limit(first, 70).   /* lbs */
complimentary_size_limit(62).            /* in   */

/* --------  Over-size fees (Australia group) --------------------------- */
/* Size is the sum L+W+H in inches                                        */
oversize_fee(aus_usa, Size, 0   ) :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(aus_usa, Size, 30  ) :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(aus_usa, Size, 200 ) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/* --------  Over-weight fees (Australia group) ------------------------- */
/* Paid = yes  -> the bag is NOT complimentary (weight limit 50 lb)
   Paid = no   -> the bag IS complimentary   (weight limit 70 lb)
*/
overweight_fee(_Group, no,  Weight, 0  ) :- Weight =< 70.
overweight_fee(_Group, yes, Weight, 0  ) :- Weight =< 50.
overweight_fee(_Group, yes, Weight, 30 ) :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(aus_usa, yes, Weight,100) :- Weight  > 53, Weight =< 70.

/* --------  Base checked-bag fee (Australia group, First Class) -------- */
checked_bag_fee(aus_usa, first, Index, 0  ) :- Index =< 3.  /* 1st-3rd free */
checked_bag_fee(aus_usa, first, 4,     200).                /* 4th bag      */

/* =========  Case facts (Joseph)  ====================================== */

/* flight ticket price */
ticket_cost(787).

/* Each checked bag: bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight).  (carry-on is omitted) */
bag(b2,45,30,26,52).
bag(b3,35,16,13,69).
bag(b4,33,21,10,51).
bag(b5,34,15,14,53).

/* =========  Auxiliary computations  =================================== */

size(L,W,H,Sum) :- Sum is L+W+H.

/* extra_cost(Paid, BagId, Extra) : Extra is max(oversize, overweight) */
extra_cost(Paid, BagId, Extra) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
    size(L,W,H,Size),
    route(Route),
    oversize_fee(Route,Size,OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Route, Paid, Weight, OWFee),
    Extra is max(OSFee,OWFee).

/* cost_for_choice(PaidBag, TotalBagCost) ------------------------------- */
cost_for_choice(PaidBag, TotalCost) :-
    findall(B, bag(B,_,_,_,_), BagList),
    route(Route), cabin(first),

    /* split into paid bag and the others (free) */
    select(PaidBag, BagList, FreeBags),

    /* paid bag costs: base checked fee + extra */
    checked_bag_fee(Route, first, 4, BaseFee),  /* 4th bag fee = 200   */
    extra_cost(yes, PaidBag, ExtraPaid),
    PaidCost is BaseFee + ExtraPaid,

    /* free bags: only extra fees apply (weight limit 70) */
    findall(ExtraF,
            (member(BF, FreeBags), extra_cost(no, BF, ExtraF)),
            FreeExtras),
    sum_list(FreeExtras, FreeCost),

    TotalCost is PaidCost + FreeCost.

/* overall minimum bag cost ------------------------------------------------*/
minimum_bag_cost(MinCost) :-
    findall(Cost, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), cost_for_choice(B,Cost)), Costs),
    min_list(Costs, MinCost).

/* =========  Grand total  ============================================== */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    minimum_bag_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* =========  Query and output  ========================================= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 50 x 29 x 22 inches, 67 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 20 x 10 inches, 63 lbs; 5. A backpack: 35 x 16 x 13 inches, 53 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $410.

text: Jessica is a First Class passenger flying from Las Vegas to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 11 x 8 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A backpack: 35 x 15 x 14 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 35 x 22 x 10 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 41 x 19 x 18 inches, 86 lbs; 5. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 11 inches, 69 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $139.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 949"]).
/* =================  Facts describing Jessica’s trip  ================= */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(139).

/* list of checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,35,15,14,51).
bag(3,35,22,10,52).
bag(4,41,19,18,86).
bag(5,38,14,11,69).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).


/* =================  Statutory rules for this itinerary  =============== */

/* sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – within / between U.S. and Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (  Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
       ;  Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
       ;  Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees – complimentary bags use a 70-lb limit,
   charged bags use a 50-lb limit                                   */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (  W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
       ;  W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
       ;  W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
       ;  W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag: the higher of oversize vs. overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),       % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),       % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fees for First Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.


/* =================  Helper predicates  ================================ */

/* choose two different elements (F1<F2 with respect to the list order) */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* build an ordered list with the 2 complimentary bags first */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through the bag list accumulating fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting 2 complimentary bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* =================  Query and output  ================================ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: Emily is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Dallas with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 14 x 7 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 34 x 18 x 12 inches, 56 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 35 x 16 x 14 inches, 70 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 36 x 14 x 14 inches, 95 lbs; 5. A backpack: 51 x 31 x 29 inches, 52 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $265.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------  Statutory rules that matter for this case  ------- */

/* flight facts */
flight_region(domestic).          /* Charlotte – Dallas */
cabin(main_cabin).                /* Main Cabin ticket   */
ticket_cost(265).                 /* Price of the ticket */

/* passenger’s items: bag(ID,Length,Width,Height,Weight). */
bag(1,21,14,7,12).
bag(2,34,18,12,56).
bag(3,35,16,14,70).
bag(4,36,14,14,95).
bag(5,51,31,29,52).

/* ---------- helper predicates ---------- */
dimension_sum(L,W,H,S):- S is L+W+H.

personal_item(B):- bag(B,L,W,H,_), L=<18, W=<14, H=<8.
carry_on(B)    :- bag(B,L,W,H,_), L=<22, W=<14, H=<9, \+ personal_item(B).
checked(B)     :- bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ personal_item(B), \+ carry_on(B).

/* ---------- base checked-bag fees (Main Cabin, domestic) ---------- */
base_fee(Index,Fee):-
    cabin(main_cabin),
    flight_region(domestic),
    domestic_maincabin_base(Index,Fee).

domestic_maincabin_base(1,40).
domestic_maincabin_base(2,45).
domestic_maincabin_base(3,150).
domestic_maincabin_base(N,200):- N>=4.

/* ---------- overweight fees (domestic) ---------- */
overweight_fee(W,30) :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100):- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200):- W>70 , W=<100.

/* ---------- oversize fees (domestic) ---------- */
oversize_fee(L,W,H,30)  :- dimension_sum(L,W,H,S), S>62 , S=<65.
oversize_fee(L,W,H,200) :- dimension_sum(L,W,H,S), S>65 , S=<115.

/* choose the higher of the 2 surcharges (or 0 if none) */
extra_fee(BagID,Extra):-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Wt),
    (overweight_fee(Wt,OW) -> true ; OW=0),
    (oversize_fee(L,W,H,OS)-> true ; OS=0),
    Extra is max(OW,OS).

/* list of checked bags in the order they appear */
checked_bag_list(L):- findall(B,checked(B),L).

/* fee for each checked bag (base + extra) */
bag_total_fee(BagID,Idx,Fee):-
    base_fee(Idx,Base),
    extra_fee(BagID,Extra),
    Fee is Base+Extra.

/* sum of all checked-bag fees */
total_bag_fees(Total):-
    checked_bag_list(Bags),
    findall(F,
            (nth1(I,Bags,B), bag_total_fee(B,I,F)),
            Fs),
    sum_list(Fs,Total).

/* grand total = ticket + bags */
total_cost(Grand):-
    ticket_cost(T),
    total_bag_fees(BF),
    Grand is T+BF.

/* ----------- produce the answer ----------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: David is a First Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Mexico City with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 13 x 8 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A backpack: 50 x 27 x 24 inches, 74 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 48 x 27 x 25 inches, 70 lbs; 4. A backpack: 50 x 31 x 23 inches, 57 lbs; 5. A backpack: 54 x 32 x 28 inches, 84 lbs; David's flight ticket is $104.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Statutory rules that are relevant to this case ------------- */

/* Complimentary (base) bag fees for a First-Class customer travelling
   between the U.S. and Mexico                                     */
base_bag_fee(BagNumber, 0) :- BagNumber =< 3.     /* 1st – 3rd bag free  */
base_bag_fee(BagNumber, 200) :- BagNumber  > 3.   /* 4th bag +  $200    */

/* ---------------- Oversize surcharge (length+width+height) ----------------- */
oversize_surcharge(Dim, 0   ) :- Dim =< 62.                       /* standard */
oversize_surcharge(Dim, 30  ) :- Dim  > 62, Dim =< 65.            /* 62–65"  */
oversize_surcharge(Dim, 200 ) :- Dim  > 65, Dim =< 115.           /* 65–115" */

/* ---------------- Over-weight surcharge (pounds) --------------------------- */
overweight_surcharge(W, 0   ) :- W =< 50.                         /* ≤50 lbs */
overweight_surcharge(W, 30  ) :- W  > 50, W =< 53.                /* 50–53   */
overweight_surcharge(W, 100 ) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.                /* 53–70   */
overweight_surcharge(W, 200 ) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.               /* 70–100  */

/*  When both an over-size and an over-weight surcharge apply,
    only the HIGHER one is collected (per AA policy).              */
highest_surcharge(W,Dim,S) :-
        oversize_surcharge(Dim, SO),
        overweight_surcharge(W  , SW),
        S is max(SO,SW).

/* --------------------------  Case facts  ----------------------------------- */

/* Passenger, itinerary and ticket */
ticket_price(104).
class(first).                       /* first class */
route(us, mexico).                  /* U.S.  →  Mexico */

/* Carry-on (free, so it is NOT listed among checked bags) */

/* Checked bags: bag(ID,Length,Width,Height,WeightLbs) */
bag(1, 50,27,24, 74).   /* 1st checked bag  */
bag(2, 48,27,25, 70).   /* 2nd checked bag  */
bag(3, 50,31,23, 57).   /* 3rd checked bag  */
bag(4, 54,32,28, 84).   /* 4th checked bag  */

/* --------------------  Fee calculation for one bag  ------------------------ */
bag_total_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
        bag(BagNumber,L,W,H,Weight),
        Dim is L+W+H,
        base_bag_fee(BagNumber     , Base),
        highest_surcharge(Weight,Dim,Surcharge),
        Fee is Base + Surcharge.

/* --------------------  Aggregate all checked bag fees  --------------------- */
all_bag_fees(Total) :-
        findall(F, bag_total_fee(_,F), Fees),
        sum_list(Fees, Total).

/* ---------------------------  Grand total  --------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
        ticket_price(Ticket),
        all_bag_fees(BagFees),
        Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* ---------------------------  Query & output  ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Daniel is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Denver to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 11 x 7 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A backpack: 51 x 31 x 26 inches, 67 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 21 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 47 x 22 x 22 inches, 72 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 47 x 31 x 24 inches, 79 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $250.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/*********************************************************************
*  American Airlines – Bag-fee rules (subset needed for Daniel’s trip)
*********************************************************************/

% ---------- 1.  BASE FEE FOR A CHECKED BAG (Main Cabin, within U.S.) 
base_checked_fee(1, 40).
base_checked_fee(2, 45).
base_checked_fee(3,150).
base_checked_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.          % 4th bag and every bag after

% ---------- 2.  SURCHARGE FOR OVERWEIGHT (lbs)
overweight_surcharge(W, 30) :- W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_surcharge(W,100) :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_surcharge(W,200) :- W > 70, W =< 100.
overweight_surcharge(W,  0) :- W =< 50.

% ---------- 3.  SURCHARGE FOR OVERSIZE (total inches = L+W+H)
oversize_surcharge(D, 30) :- D > 62, D =< 65.
oversize_surcharge(D,200) :- D > 65, D =< 115.
oversize_surcharge(D,  0) :- D =< 62.

% ---------- 4.  CHOOSE THE HIGHER OF OVERSIZE vs OVERWEIGHT
bag_surcharge(Dim, Wt, S) :-
    oversize_surcharge(Dim, SO),
    overweight_surcharge(Wt , SW),
    (SO >= SW -> S = SO ; S = SW).

/*********************************************************************
*  Daniel’s facts
*********************************************************************/
% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight)
bag(bag1, 22,11, 7,  6).   % free carry-on
bag(bag2, 51,31,26, 67).
bag(bag3, 34,21, 9, 51).
bag(bag4, 47,22,22, 72).
bag(bag5, 47,31,24, 79).

% Order in which Daniel will check his bags
bag_order(1, bag2).
bag_order(2, bag4).
bag_order(3, bag5).
bag_order(4, bag3).

/*********************************************************************
*  Cost of every checked bag and of the whole trip
*********************************************************************/
bag_cost(Index, Cost) :-
    bag_order(Index, Id),
    bag(Id, L, W, H, Weight),
    Dim is L + W + H,
    bag_surcharge(Dim, Weight, Surcharge),
    base_checked_fee(Index, Base),
    Cost is Base + Surcharge.

total_checked_bag_fee(Total) :-
    findall(C, bag_cost(_, C), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs, Total).

% Flight ticket
ticket_price(250).

% Grand total Daniel must pay
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_checked_bag_fee(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

/* ----------  STATUTORY RULES (relevant excerpts only)  ---------- */

/* overweight fees for the route “To / from Japan” ----------------- */
overweight_fee(Weight, 450) :- Weight > 70,   Weight =< 100.   /* 70-100 lb */
overweight_fee(Weight, 100) :- Weight > 53,   Weight =< 70.    /* 53-70  lb */
overweight_fee(Weight,  30) :- Weight > 50,   Weight =< 53.    /* 50-53  lb */
overweight_fee(Weight,   0) :- Weight =< 50.                   /* ≤50   lb */

/* oversize fees for the same route --------------------------------*/
oversize_fee(Dim, 200) :- Dim >  65, Dim =< 115.               /* >65-115 in */
oversize_fee(Dim,  30) :- Dim >  62, Dim =<  65.               /* >62-65  in */
oversize_fee(Dim,   0) :- Dim =< 62.                           /* ≤62    in */

extra_fee(BagNo, Fee) :-
    bag(BagNo, Weight, Dim),
    overweight_fee(Weight, F1),
    oversize_fee(Dim,     F2),
    Fee is max(F1, F2).

base_bag_fee(BagNo, 200) :- BagNo  > 2.

    sum_list(Cs, Total).

    total_bag_cost(Bags),

    Total is Bags + Ticket.

text: Joseph is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Austin to Denver with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 13 x 8 inches, 5 lbs; 2. A backpack: 35 x 18 x 12 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 37 x 16 x 12 inches, 69 lbs; 4. A backpack: 33 x 21 x 11 inches, 100 lbs; 5. A backpack: 40 x 27 x 17 inches, 52 lbs; Joseph's flight ticket is $173.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  RULES FROM THE STATUTE (only what’s needed for this case) --------------- */

/* flight region for Joseph’s trip */
region(domestic).      /* Austin – Denver is within the U.S. */

/* Joseph’s ticket class */
class(main_plus).

/* Main Plus baggage privilege : 1 extra free checked bag (beyond Main-Cabin’s 0) */
free_checked_bags(main_plus,1).

/* ---------- BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES (domestic – Main-Cabin^ rows) ---------- */
base_checked_fee(domestic,1,Fee) :- Fee = 40.
base_checked_fee(domestic,2,Fee) :- Fee = 45.
base_checked_fee(domestic,Index,Fee) :-
    Index>=3,
    ( Index=3 -> Fee = 150
    ; Index>=4 -> Fee = 200).

/* ---------- OVERSIZE SURCHARGE (domestic) ---------- */
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,S) :-
    DimSum =< 62, !, S = 0.
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,S) :-
    DimSum =< 65, !, S = 30.
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,S) :-
    DimSum =< 115, !, S = 200.

/* ---------- OVERWEIGHT SURCHARGE (domestic) ---------- */
overweight_surcharge(W,S) :-     W =< 50 , !, S = 0.
overweight_surcharge(W,S) :-     W =< 53 , !, S = 30.
overweight_surcharge(W,S) :-     W =< 70 , !, S = 100.
overweight_surcharge(W,S) :-     W =< 100, !, S = 200.

/* For a bag, surcharge is the HIGHER of oversize vs overweight */
bag_surcharge(Weight,DimSum,S) :-
    overweight_surcharge(Weight,OW),
    oversize_surcharge(DimSum,OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> S = OW ; S = OS ).


/* -----------------------  FACTS FOR JOSEPH’S CASE ----------------------- */

/* Flight ticket price */
ticket_price(173).

/* Item 1 (20×13×8, 5 lbs) is carried on – no fee, so not listed among checked bags */

/* Checked bags: id, DimSum(in), Weight(lbs) */
checked_bag(1,65,52).
checked_bag(2,65,69).
checked_bag(3,65,100).
checked_bag(4,84,52).


/* -----------------------  COST CALCULATION ----------------------- */

/* Determine the base fee for the N-th checked bag, after Main Plus free allowance */
bag_base_fee(Index,Fee) :-
    class(Class), region(domestic),
    free_checked_bags(Class,Free),
    ( Index =< Free ->                /* falls inside free allowance */
        Fee = 0
    ;   base_checked_fee(domestic,Index,Fee)
    ).

/* Fee for one checked bag = base fee + surcharge */
one_bag_total(Index,Total) :-
    checked_bag(Index,Dim,Wt),
    bag_base_fee(Index,BF),
    bag_surcharge(Wt,Dim,SF),
    Total is BF + SF.

/* Sum all checked-bag fees */
total_checked_bags_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(Cost, (checked_bag(I,_,_), one_bag_total(I,Cost)), List),
    sum_list(List,Sum).

/* Overall cost = ticket + all bag costs  (no special-needs costs in this case) */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(P),
    total_checked_bags_cost(Bags),
    Total is P + Bags.



/* -----------------------  QUERY TO PRINT RESULT ----------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```
