A backpack: 38 x 18 x 9 inches, 55 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $312.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Statutory rules that apply to this case ------------- */

flight_ticket_cost(312).

% Passenger data
class(premium_economy).
region(to_from_japan).          % ‘Japan <--> U.S.’ bracket

/* ------------  Items Elizabeth is travelling with  ----------------- */
/* item(Id, Length, Width, Height, WeightInLbs) */

item(1, 19, 14,  7,  6).   % cabin bag – will be treated as carry-on
item(2, 38, 12, 14, 52).
item(3, 36, 18, 10, 86).
item(4, 49, 30, 21, 90).
item(5, 38, 18,  9, 55).

/* --------------------  Helper predicates  --------------------------- */

dims_sum(L, W, H, S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* Carry-on test (22 x 14 x 9 in. or smaller) */
carry_on(L, W, H) :- L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* A checked item is any piece that is NOT a carry-on */
checked_item_id(Id) :-
    item(Id, L, W, H, _),
    \+ carry_on(L, W, H).

checked_items(Ids) :-
    findall(Id, checked_item_id(Id), Ids).   % [2,3,4,5] in this case

/* -----------------  Base fee for checked bags  ---------------------- */

base_bag_fee(N, premium_economy, to_from_japan, 0)   :- N =< 2.   % 1st & 2nd free
base_bag_fee(3, premium_economy, to_from_japan, 200).
base_bag_fee(N, premium_economy, to_from_japan, 200) :- N >= 4.   % 4th +  $200

/* ------------------  Over-WEIGHT surcharges  ------------------------ */

overweight_fee(W, _,                0)  :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, _,               30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, to_from_japan,  100)  :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, to_from_japan,  450)  :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* ------------------  Over-SIZE surcharges  -------------------------- */

oversize_fee(S, _,                0)  :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S, to_from_japan,   30)  :- S  > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(S, to_from_japan,  200)  :- S  > 65, S =< 115.

/* -------- Highest of over-weight vs over-size (only one applies) ---- */

bag_extra_fee(W, S, Region, Extra) :-
    overweight_fee(W, Region, OW),
    oversize_fee( S, Region, OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> Extra = OW ; Extra = OS ).

/* -------------------------  Bag cost  ------------------------------- */

bag_cost(Index, Cost) :-
    checked_items(Ids),
    nth1(Index, Ids, Id),                    % keeps bag order 1,2,3,4
    item(Id, L, W, H, Weight),
    dims_sum(L, W, H, SizeSum),
    class(Class),
    region(Region),
    base_bag_fee(Index, Class, Region, Base),
    bag_extra_fee(Weight, SizeSum, Region, Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* ------------  Aggregate costs for all checked bags  ---------------- */

total_bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, bag_cost(_, C), Cs),
    sumlist(Cs, Total).

/* -----------------------  Grand total  ------------------------------ */

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket_cost(Ticket),
    total_bags_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* -------------------------  Query  ---------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------  Statutory rules needed for this case  --------- */

:- use_module(library(lists)).

/*  Oversize fees on a route “to / from India …” (Jennifer’s route)  */
oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-                    % Size is L+W+H in inches
    Size =< 62  ,          Fee = 0  , !.
oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-
    Size  =< 65 ,          Fee = 30 , !.      % 62  < size ≤ 65
oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-
    Size  =< 115,          Fee = 200, !.      % 65  < size ≤ 115

/*  Over-weight fees on a route “to / from India …” (Premium Economy)  */
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-                     % W is weight in lbs
    W =< 50 ,            Fee = 0  , !.
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W  =< 53 ,           Fee = 30 , !.        % 50 < W ≤ 53
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W  =< 70 ,           Fee = 100, !.        % 53 < W ≤ 70
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W  =< 100,           Fee = 450.           % 70 < W ≤ 100

/*  For a bag that is both oversize and overweight,
    the higher of the 2 surcharges applies              */
surcharge(Size, Weight, Charge) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, OF),
    overweight_fee(Weight, WF),
    ( OF >= WF -> Charge = OF ; Charge = WF ).

/*  Checked-bag base fees for a PREMIUM-ECONOMY customer
    flying to / from India                               */
base_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
    ( BagNumber = 1 ; BagNumber = 2 ) ->  Fee = 0 ;
    ( BagNumber = 3 ; BagNumber = 4 ) ->  Fee = 200.

/* ---------  Facts for Jennifer’s trip  --------- */

/* The 4 checked bags (personal item is free and omitted)           */
/* bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).                          */
bag(b2, 43, 23, 18, 52).   % backpack
bag(b3, 33, 22, 10, 79).   % backpack
bag(b4, 38, 16, 11, 61).   % luggage box
bag(b5, 34, 19, 12, 52).   % backpack

/* Ticket price */
ticket_price(677).

/* ---------  Helper predicates  --------- */

bag_size(ID, S)  :- bag(ID,L,W,H,_), S is L+W+H.
bag_weight(ID,W) :- bag(ID,_,_,_,W).

bag_surcharge(ID, Charge) :-
    bag_size(ID,S),
    bag_weight(ID,W),
    surcharge(S, W, Charge).

/* Number the 4 checked bags in any fixed order.
   Here we keep the declaration order.                       */
bag_order([b2,b3,b4,b5]).

base_fees_total(BaseTotal) :-
    bag_order(Bs),
    findall(F,
            ( nth1(N,Bs,_), base_fee(N,F) ),
            Fs),
    sumlist(Fs, BaseTotal).

surcharges_total(SurchTot) :-
    findall(C,
            ( bag(ID,_,_,_,_), bag_surcharge(ID,C) ),
            Cs),
    sumlist(Cs, SurchTot).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    base_fees_total(Base),
    surcharges_total(Surch),
    Total is Tix + Base + Surch.

/* ---------  Query --------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  RULES (statute model – only what we need for this case) --------- */

/* flight characteristics */
flight(within_us).           /* Daniel flies Washington-DC -> Las-Vegas        */
class(basic_economy).        /* Daniel’s booking class                         */

/* price of the ticket itself */
ticket_cost(110).

/* carry-on limits (in inches) */
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

/* checked-bag base fees for Basic Economy on a flight within the U.S.          */
base_checked_fee(1,40).
base_checked_fee(2,45).
base_checked_fee(3,150).
base_checked_fee(N,200) :- N>3.

/* domestic overweight fees (per bag) */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.

/* domestic oversize fees (per bag, using sum of dimensions) */
oversize_fee(D,30)  :- D>62 , D=<65.
oversize_fee(D,200) :- D>65 , D=<115.
oversize_fee(D,0)   :- D=<62.

/* higher of the two extra fees that apply to a bag                              */
extra_fee(BagId,Fee) :-
    bag(BagId,_,L,Wid,H,Weight),
    Sum is L+Wid+H,
    overweight_fee(Weight,OF),
    oversize_fee(Sum,SF),
    Fee is max(OF,SF).

/* total fee for one checked bag = base fee (by order) + extra fee               */
bag_total_fee(BagId,Total) :-
    checked_bag_ids(IDs),
    nth1(N,IDs,BagId),            /* position => 1st, 2nd, 3rd, …               */
    base_checked_fee(N,Base),
    extra_fee(BagId,Extra),
    Total is Base+Extra.

/* list of IDs of bags that are NOT free carry-ons                               */
checked_bag_ids(IDs) :-
    findall(Id,checked_bag(Id),IDs).

/* A bag is free carry-on if it fits the carry-on dimensional limits             */
carry_on(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,_,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(LC,WC,HC),
    L=<LC, W=<WC, H=<HC.

/* everything else is a checked bag                                              */
checked_bag(BagId) :- bag(BagId,_,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(BagId).

/* sum of all checked-bag fees                                                   */
total_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, (checked_bag(Id), bag_total_fee(Id,F)), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Sum).

/* Grand total = ticket + all bag charges                                        */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(T),
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

/* ----------  FACTS (Daniel’s actual pieces of luggage)  ---------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Type,Length,Width,Height,Weight).  Units: inches, pounds               */
bag(1,backpack,22,11,8,  5).
bag(2,luggage_box,41,19,12,65).
bag(3,backpack,43,25,20,52).
bag(4,backpack,35,18,11,70).
bag(5,backpack,35,15,14,51).

/* ----------  QUERY ----------------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Charles is a Premium Economy Class passenger flying from Wuhan to New Orleans with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 12 x 8 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A backpack: 41 x 26 x 22 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A backpack: 36 x 15 x 14 inches, 97 lbs; 4. A backpack: 44 x 27 x 22 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A backpack: 42 x 30 x 19 inches, 88 lbs; Charles's flight ticket is $1035.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ==========  Basic facts about the itinerary  ========== */
class(premium_economy).

% the itinerary is China  <->  U.S.
region(china_usa).

ticket_price(1035).

/* ==========  Bags:  length, width, height, weight  ========== */
bag(bag1,18,12, 8,  6).      /* personal item                        */
bag(bag2,41,26,22, 53).      /* checked                              */
bag(bag3,36,15,14, 97).      /* checked                              */
bag(bag4,44,27,22, 52).      /* checked                              */
bag(bag5,42,30,19, 88).      /* checked                              */

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ------------  helpers to classify the bag  ---------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

dim_sum(Bag,S) :- bag(Bag,L,W,H,_),  S is L+W+H.
weight(Bag,W)  :- bag(Bag,_,_,_,W).

/* personal item ≤ 18×14×8 inches                               */
personal_item(Bag) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 18, W =< 14, H =< 8.

/* all other bags that are not personal items are checked        */
checked_bag(Bag) :-
    bag(Bag,_,_,_,_),
    \+ personal_item(Bag).

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* --------  Base fee for 1st / 2nd / 3rd / 4th bag  ---------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

% list of checked bags in the order they appear in the facts
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(B, checked_bag(B), List).

/* For this itinerary (China↔USA – Premium Economy)
      1st bag : $0
      2nd bag : $0
      3rd bag : $200
      4th+    : $200 each                                       */

base_checked_fee(Index,Fee) :-
      Index =< 2,         Fee = 0 ;
      Index >= 3,         Fee = 200.

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* -------------  Oversize / Over-weight fees  ---------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

/* ---- oversize (China ↔ USA) ----
      >62 – 65 in   : $30
      >65 – 115 in  : $200                                      */
oversize_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    dim_sum(Bag,S),
    (S > 65  ->  Fee = 200
    ;S > 62  ->  Fee = 30
    ;           Fee = 0).

/* ---- overweight (China ↔ USA) ----
      >50 – 53 lb   : $30
      >53 – 70 lb   : $100
      >70 –100 lb   : $450                                      */
overweight_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    weight(Bag,W),
    (W > 70   ->  Fee = 450
    ;W > 53   ->  Fee = 100
    ;W > 50   ->  Fee = 30
    ;            Fee = 0).

/*  When both oversize and overweight apply, only the HIGHER of
    the two is charged.                                         */
extra_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Bag,O),
    overweight_fee(Bag,W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ----------------  Total checked–bag charges  --------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

bag_charge(Bag,Index,Total) :-
    base_checked_fee(Index,Base),
    extra_fee(Bag,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

total_checked_fee(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    findall(Cost,
            (nth1(I,List,Bag), bag_charge(Bag,I,Cost)),
            Costs),
    sumlist(Costs,Total).

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ---------------------  Grand total  ----------------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_checked_fee(Checked),
    Total is Ticket + Checked.

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ----------------------  Query block  ---------------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

/* bag(No, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  Dimensions in inches, weight in lbs */
bag(1, 36, 15, 13, 52).     % luggage box
bag(2, 38, 15, 11, 75).     % backpack
bag(3, 44, 23, 16, 62).     % backpack
bag(4, 38, 13, 13, 59).     % backpack

/* -------------  Region the statutes refer to ------------- */
region(japan).          % “to / from India, China, Japan … Australia, New Zealand”

/* -------------  Base checked-bag fee rules (Basic Economy, Japan) ------------- */
base_checked_fee(1, 75).      % 1st checked bag  $75
base_checked_fee(2, 100).     % 2nd checked bag $100
base_checked_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 3.   % 3rd, 4th …  $200 each

/* -------------  Over-weight fee rules (Japan) ------------- */
overweight_fee(W, 0)    :- W =< 50.                       % within allowance
overweight_fee(W, 30)   :- W > 50,  W =< 53.              % 50–53 lb
overweight_fee(W, 100)  :- W > 53, W =< 70.               % 53–70 lb
overweight_fee(W, 450)  :- W > 70, W =< 100.              % 70–100 lb

/* -------------  Over-size fee rules (Japan) ------------- */
oversize_fee(Dim, 0)    :- Dim =< 62.                     % within allowance
oversize_fee(Dim, 30)   :- Dim > 62, Dim =< 65.           % 62–65 in
oversize_fee(Dim, 200)  :- Dim > 65, Dim =< 115.          % 65–115 in

/* -------------  Fee applying when both over-weight & over-size ------------- */
/* “The higher fee between oversize and overweight applies, in addition to the checked bag fee.” */
extra_fee(Weight, DimSum, Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight, OW),
    oversize_fee(DimSum,   OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS ).

/* -------------  Helper to compute one bag’s total cost ------------- */
bag_cost(BagNo, Cost) :-
    bag(BagNo, L, W, H, Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    base_checked_fee(BagNo, Base),
    extra_fee(Weight, DimSum, Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* -------------  Sum of all checked-bag costs ------------- */
total_bag_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(C, (bag(N,_,_,_,_), bag_cost(N,C)), Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Sum).

/* -------------  Total travel cost (ticket + bags) ------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(linda, Ticket),
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* -------------  Query & printing ------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case  ---------- */

/* the itinerary we deal with is China  <->  U.S.  */
region(to_from_china).

/* complimentary allowance : Premium-Economy = first 2 checked bags free */
free_checked_bags(premium_economy, 2).

/* base fee for the 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th+ checked bag on routes
   “To / From … China …” when travelling in Premium-Economy        */
base_fee(premium_economy, to_from_china, BagNumber, 0) :-
    BagNumber =< 2.                         /* 1st & 2nd bags free */

base_fee(premium_economy, to_from_china, BagNumber, 200) :-
    BagNumber >= 3.                         /* 3rd, 4th … = $200   */


/* ---------  Oversize fees (inches = L+W+H)  --------- */
oversize_fee(to_from_china, SizeInches, 0)  :- SizeInches =< 62.
oversize_fee(to_from_china, SizeInches, 30) :- 
        SizeInches > 62, SizeInches =< 65.
oversize_fee(to_from_china, SizeInches, 200) :- 
        SizeInches > 65, SizeInches =< 115.

/* ---------  Over-weight fees (pounds)  --------- */
overweight_fee(to_from_china, W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(to_from_china, W, 30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(to_from_china, W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(to_from_china, W, 450) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* the surcharge for a bag that is both oversize and overweight is
   the higher of the two                                                     */
surcharge(Region, Size, Weight, Fee) :-
        oversize_fee(Region, Size, O),
        overweight_fee(Region, Weight, W),
        (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).


/* ----------  Facts for Linda’s trip  ---------- */

traveller(linda).
class(linda, premium_economy).
ticket_price(linda, 1141).
itinerary(linda, to_from_china).

bag(2, 49,31,23, 51).   /* luggage #2 */
bag(3, 34,16,14, 92).   /* backpack   */
bag(4, 49,26,22, 83).   /* luggage #3 */

/* ----------  Derived calculations  ---------- */

/* helper: linear dimension sum */
size_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* fee for an individual checked bag */
bag_fee(BagNo, Fee) :-
        bag(BagNo, L,W,H, Weight),
        traveller(linda),
        itinerary(linda, Region),
        class(linda, Class),
        size_sum(L,W,H,Size),
        surcharge(Region, Size, Weight, Surcharge),
        base_fee(Class, Region, BagNo, Base),
        Fee is Base + Surcharge.

/* total for all checked bags */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
        findall(F, bag_fee(_,F), List),
        sum_list(List, Total).

/* complete trip cost = ticket + bags  (+ $0 special-needs) */
total_cost(Total) :-
        ticket_price(linda, Ticket),
        total_bag_fees(Bags),
        Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ----------  Produce the answer  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: John is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from San Francisco to Panama City with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 14 x 7 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 43 x 29 x 17 inches, 80 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 46 x 31 x 24 inches, 73 lbs; 4. A backpack: 39 x 22 x 16 inches, 100 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 20 x 13 inches, 71 lbs; John's flight ticket is $197.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

% ------------  Statutory rules (only those relevant to this case) ------------
:- use_module(library(lists)).

% ticket
ticket_cost(197).

% passenger class
class(main_plus).

% --------------------------  John’s pieces of luggage ------------------------
% bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(bag1, 19, 14,  7,  8).   % carry-on (free)
bag(bag2, 43, 29, 17, 80).   % checked  1
bag(bag3, 46, 31, 24, 73).   % checked  2
bag(bag4, 39, 22, 16,100).   % checked  3
bag(bag5, 35, 20, 13, 71).   % checked  4

% --------------------------  Carry-on decision -------------------------------
carry_on(Bag) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

checked_bags(Checked) :-
    findall(B,
            (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)),
            Checked),
    Checked = [bag2,bag3,bag4,bag5].     % Preserved stated order

% ---------------- Base checked-bag fee (route: U.S. ↔ Panama) ----------------
% Main Plus = Main Cabin allowance + 1 extra free (max 2 free)
base_checked_fee(Seq, Fee) :-
    ( Seq =< 2 -> Fee = 0          % 1st & 2nd bags free
    ; Seq  =:= 3 -> Fee = 200      % 3rd bag
    ; Seq  >= 4 -> Fee = 200 ).    % 4th bag +

% --------------------------- Oversize / Overweight ---------------------------
oversize_fee(L,W,H,Fee) :-
    Dim is L+W+H,
    ( Dim =< 62  -> Fee = 0
    ; Dim =< 65  -> Fee = 30
    ; Dim =< 115 -> Fee = 150
    ; Dim  > 115 -> Fee = 999999 ).         % not accepted (not reached)

overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    ( W =< 50  -> Fee = 0
    ; W =< 53  -> Fee = 30
    ; W =< 70  -> Fee = 100
    ; W =< 100 -> Fee = 200
    ; W  > 100 -> Fee = 999999 ).           % not accepted (not reached)

extra_fee(L,W,H,Weight,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(L,W,H,OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    Fee is max(OS,OW).

% --------------------------- Fee per checked bag -----------------------------
bag_total_fee(Bag,Seq,Total) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,Weight),
    base_checked_fee(Seq,Base),
    extra_fee(L,W,H,Weight,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

% ---------------------------- Aggregate fees ---------------------------------
bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bags(List),
    bag_fees(List,1,0,Total).

bag_fees([],_,Acc,Acc).
bag_fees([B|R],Seq,Acc,Total) :-
    bag_total_fee(B,Seq,F),
    Acc1 is Acc + F,
    Seq1 is Seq + 1,
    bag_fees(R,Seq1,Acc1,Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

% ----------------------------- Final answer ----------------------------------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Karen is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Dallas to Boston with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 11 x 7 inches, 11 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 52 x 31 x 24 inches, 67 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 18 x 12 inches, 57 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 54 x 32 x 28 inches, 88 lbs; 5. A backpack: 53 x 27 x 28 inches, 59 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $242.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case ---------- */

% domestic route (Dallas – Boston)
route(domestic).

% passenger and cabin
passenger(karen).
cabin(karen, mainPlus).   % Main Plus = Main Cabin with 1st-bag fee waived

% bags to be checked: bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight)
bag(1, 52, 31, 24, 67).   % 107 in, 67 lbs
bag(2, 34, 18, 12, 57).   %  64 in, 57 lbs
bag(3, 54, 32, 28, 88).   % 114 in, 88 lbs
bag(4, 53, 27, 28, 59).   % 108 in, 59 lbs

% flight ticket price
ticket_price(242).

/* ----------  Size / weight helpers ---------- */

dimension(L,W,H,Dim) :- Dim is L+W+H.

% ----- oversize fee (domestic) -----
oversize_fee(Dim, 0)      :- Dim =< 62.
oversize_fee(Dim, 30)     :- Dim  > 62, Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(Dim, 200)    :- Dim  > 65, Dim =< 115.

% ----- overweight fee (domestic) -----
overweight_fee(W, 0)      :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)     :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100)    :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200)    :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

% choose the higher of the two special-need fees
special_fee(BagID, Fee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    dimension(L,W,H,Dim),
    oversize_fee(Dim, OverSize),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OverWt),
    max_fee(OverSize, OverWt, Fee).

max_fee(A,B,A) :- A >= B.
max_fee(A,B,B) :- B >  A.

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fees (domestic) ---------- */

% base fee numbers for Main Cabin on domestic flights
main_cabin_base_fee(1, 40).
main_cabin_base_fee(2, 45).
main_cabin_base_fee(3, 150).
main_cabin_base_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.

% Main Plus waives the 1st checked-bag base fee
base_fee(BagOrder, mainPlus, 0) :- BagOrder = 1.
base_fee(BagOrder, mainPlus, Fee) :-
    BagOrder  > 1,
    main_cabin_base_fee(BagOrder, Fee).

/* ----------  Totals ---------- */

% sum a list
sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],S) :- sum_list(T,Rest), S is H+Rest.

% total base checked-bag fees for this passenger
base_bag_total(Total) :-
    cabin(karen, mainPlus),
    findall(F,
            (bag(Order,_,_,_,_), base_fee(Order, mainPlus, F)),
            Fs),
    sum_list(Fs, Total).

% total oversize / overweight (special-need) fees
special_total(Total) :-
    findall(F, special_fee(_,F), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs, Total).

% overall cost
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    base_bag_total(Base),
    special_total(Special),
    Total is Ticket + Base + Special.

/* ----------  Query ---------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Elizabeth is a First Class passenger flying from Osaka to Houston with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 13 x 9 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 33 x 18 x 14 inches, 69 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 38 x 19 x 18 inches, 71 lbs; 4. A backpack: 37 x 14 x 12 inches, 60 lbs; 5. A backpack: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 58 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $503.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1243"]).
/* -------------  Facts for Elizabeth’s itinerary ------------------ */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(503).

/* checked bags: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,33,18,14,69).
bag(3,38,19,18,71).
bag(4,37,14,12,60).
bag(5,33,16,14,58).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).


/* -------------  Statutory rules for this route ------------------- */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – to / from Japan, U.S. */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
      (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
      ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
      ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees – to / from Japan, U.S.                         */
/* Threshold is 70 lb for complimentary bags, 50 lb for charged bags */
overweight_fee(Weight,Thresh,Fee) :-
      (  Weight =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
      ;  Weight =< 53     -> Fee = 30
      ;  Weight =< 70     -> Fee = 100
      ;  Weight =< 100    -> Fee = 450 ).

/* penalty on a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),          % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),          % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee by ordinal position (First Class) */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.                   % 4th bag and beyond


/* -------------  Helper predicates -------------------------------- */

/* choose three different elements (F1<F2<F3) from a list */
choose_three(List,F1,F2,F3) :-
      append(_,[F1|T1],List),
      append(_,[F2|T2],T1),
      member(F3,T2).

/* freebies go in positions 1-3, the rest follow */
ordered_list(F1,F2,F3,Ordered) :-
      checked_bag_ids(All),
      select(F1,All,R1),
      select(F2,R1,R2),
      select(F3,R2,Rest),
      Ordered = [F1,F2,F3|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of the 3 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,F3,Total) :-
      ordered_list(F1,F2,F3,Ordered),
      cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
      flight_cost(Flight),
      Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through bag list collecting base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
      (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
      bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
      penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
      NextIdx is Idx + 1,
      cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestFees,RestPens),
      CostSum is Fee + RestFees,
      PenSum  is Pen + RestPens.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting the 3 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
      checked_bag_ids(L),
      findall(T,(choose_three(L,F1,F2,F3),cost_for_choice(F1,F2,F3,T)),Totals),
      min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* -------------  Query and output --------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

```prolog

/* ===== Statutory rules that are relevant for this case ===== */

/* route involved in the case */
route(israel_us).

/* passenger cabin */
cabin(main_cabin).

/* ------------- Base checked-bag fees (Main Cabin, Israel <-> U.S.) ----------- */
base_bag_fee(israel_us, main_cabin, 1, 0).      /* 1st checked bag */
base_bag_fee(israel_us, main_cabin, 2, 100).    /* 2nd checked bag */
base_bag_fee(israel_us, main_cabin, 3, 200).    /* 3rd checked bag */
base_bag_fee(israel_us, main_cabin, n, 200).    /* 4th bag and every bag after */

/* ------------- Oversize fees (Israel <-> U.S.) ------------------------------- */
oversize_fee(israel_us, Size, 0)   :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(israel_us, Size, 30)  :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(israel_us, Size, 150) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/* ------------- Over-weight fees ---------------------------------------------- */
/*  > 50–53 lbs: flat USD 30 (all routes) */
overweight_fee(_,      Weight, 30)  :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.
/*  > 53–70 lbs: Israel <-> U.S. = USD 100 */
overweight_fee(israel_us, Weight, 100) :- Weight > 53, Weight =< 70.
/* ≤ 50 lbs: no fee */
overweight_fee(_,      Weight, 0)   :- Weight =< 50.

/* ------------- Take the higher of oversize vs overweight --------------------- */
extra_bag_fee(Route, Size, Weight, Extra) :-
    oversize_fee(Route, Size, OverSizeF),
    overweight_fee(Route, Weight, OverWtF),
    Extra is max(OverSizeF, OverWtF).

/* ------------- Carry-on rules ------------------------------------------------- */
carry_on_ok(L,W,H) :- L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* ===== Case facts ===== */

/* ticket price */
ticket_price(1111).

/* Bags:  bag(No,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(1,19,12,8,  9).
bag(2,53,31,28,62).
bag(3,37,24,12,52).
bag(4,37,20,11,58).
bag(5,36,23,13,53).

/* ===== Logic to compute costs ===== */

checked_bag_number(BagNo, CheckedNo) :-
    /* Bag 1 is a free carry-on; do not count it as checked
       Every other bag is counted in the order they appear */
    findall(BN,
            (bag(BN,L,W,H,_), \+ carry_on_ok(L,W,H)),
            CheckedBags),
    nth1(Index, CheckedBags, BagNo),
    ( Index =< 3 -> CheckedNo = Index
    ; CheckedNo = n ).   /* 4th or later bag => 'n' */

bag_cost(BagNo, Cost) :-
    cabin(Cab), route(Route),
    checked_bag_number(BagNo, CheckedNo),
    base_bag_fee(Route, Cab, CheckedNo, BaseFee),
    bag(BagNo,L,W,H,Wt),
    Size is L+W+H,
    extra_bag_fee(Route, Size, Wt, Extra),
    Cost is BaseFee + Extra.

total_baggage_fees(Total) :-
    findall(C,
            (bag(BN,_,_,_,_), bag_cost(BN, C)),
            Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_baggage_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* ===== Query to print the answer ===== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

flight_region(us_to_south_america).       /* Charlotte (U.S.)  -> Bogotá (Colombia) */
flight_ticket_cost(284).

/* Main-Plus includes 2 free checked bags (Main-Cabin allowance of 1 + 1 extra) */
free_checked_bags(2).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fees for this region (Main Cabin / Main Plus) -------- */
base_bag_fee(BagIndex, 0)  :- BagIndex =< 2.              /* 1st & 2nd bag – free   */
base_bag_fee(BagIndex, 200):- BagIndex  > 2, BagIndex =< 4. /* 3rd & 4th bag – $200  */
base_bag_fee(BagIndex, 200):- BagIndex  > 4.               /* 5th + bag – $200      */

/* ----------  Oversize fees (dimension = L+W+H) ------------- */
oversize_fee(Dim, us_to_south_america, 0  ) :- Dim =< 62.
oversize_fee(Dim, us_to_south_america, 30 ) :- Dim > 62, Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(Dim, us_to_south_america, 150) :- Dim > 65, Dim =< 115.

/* ----------  Over-weight fees ------------------------------ */
overweight_fee(W, _, 0)  :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, _, 30) :- W > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, Region, 100):- W > 53, W =< 70, Region \= cuba.
overweight_fee(W, us_to_south_america, 200):- W > 70, W =< 100.

/* The applicable special-charge on a bag is the HIGHER of overweight or oversize */
special_charge(Dim, W, Region, Charge):-
    oversize_fee(Dim, Region, OFee),
    overweight_fee(W, Region, WFee),
    max_list([OFee,WFee], Charge).

/* ---------------------------
   Case facts – Joseph’s bags
   --------------------------- */

/* bag(Index, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(1, 19, 11,  8,  7).    /* small backpack – carry-on */
bag(2, 39, 12, 15, 85).    /* checked */
bag(3, 54, 33, 27, 65).    /* checked */
bag(4, 41, 31, 17,100).    /* checked */
bag(5, 42, 29, 18, 94).    /* checked */

/* Carry-on test (must not exceed 22×14×9) */
carry_on(Index) :-
    bag(Index,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* Checked bags are all Joseph’s bags that are NOT carry-ons                    */
/* They retain the order 1…n after removal of carry-ons for fee computation.    */
checked_bag(NewIdx, BagId) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), List),
    nth1(NewIdx, List, BagId).

/* --------------  Cost of each checked bag ------------------ */
checked_bag_cost(NewIdx, Cost):-
    checked_bag(NewIdx, BagId),
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
    Dim is L+W+H,
    flight_region(Region),
    special_charge(Dim, Wt, Region, SpecialFee),
    base_bag_fee(NewIdx, BaseFee),
    Cost is BaseFee + SpecialFee.

/* --------------  Total cost -------------------------------- */
total_bag_cost(Total):-
    findall(C, checked_bag_cost(_,C), Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

total_cost(Total):-
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    flight_ticket_cost(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ------------------  Query & output ------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: James is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Denver to Seattle with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 12 x 8 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 37 x 17 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 15 x 10 inches, 100 lbs; 5. A backpack: 41 x 21 x 12 inches, 78 lbs; James's flight ticket is $215.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules (subset needed for this case)  ---------- */

/* flight region */
within_us(denver,seattle).

/* passenger class */
passenger_class(main_plus).

/* free-bag allowance for Main Plus */
free_checked_bags(1).

/* checked-bag base fees (within U.S.) */
base_fee(1,40).
base_fee(2,45).
base_fee(3,150).
base_fee(N,200):- N>=4.

/* overweight fees (within U.S.) */
overweight_fee(W,30):- W>50, W=<53.          /* 51-53 lbs */
overweight_fee(W,100):- W>53, W=<70.         /* 54-70 lbs – not used here */
overweight_fee(W,200):- W>70, W=<100.        /* 71-100 lbs */
overweight_fee(W,0  ):- W=<50.               /* within allowance */

/* oversize fees (within U.S.) : total dimensions */
oversize_fee(D,30 ):- D>62, D=<65.
oversize_fee(D,200):- D>65, D=<115.
oversize_fee(D,0  ):- D=<62.

/* choose the larger of the 2 special fees */
special_fee(BagID,Fee):-
    bag(BagID,_,_,_,W),
    dimension_total(BagID,D),
    overweight_fee(W,OWF),
    oversize_fee(D,OSF),
    (OWF>=OSF -> Fee=OWF ; Fee=OSF).

/* carry-on limits */
carry_on_ok(L,W,H):- L=<22, W=<14, H=<9.

/* ----------  Facts for this passenger  ---------- */

ticket_cost(215).

/* bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(1,22,12,8,8).
bag(2,37,17,9,51).
bag(3,34,20,11,53).
bag(4,38,15,10,100).
bag(5,41,21,12,78).

/* ----------  Auxiliary predicates  ---------- */

/* total outside dimensions */
dimension_total(ID,Total):-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    Total is L+W+H.

/* determine which bags must be checked and assign their position order */
checked_bag_position(ID,Pos):-
    findall(B,
            (bag(B,L,W,H,_), \+ carry_on_ok(L,W,H)),
            CheckedList),
    nth1(Pos,CheckedList,ID).

/* base fee for each checked bag taking account of free allowance */
bag_base_fee(ID,FeeDue):-
    checked_bag_position(ID,Pos),
    base_fee(Pos,Base),
    free_checked_bags(Free),
    (Pos =< Free -> FeeDue = 0 ; FeeDue = Base).

/* total of all checked-bag base fees */
total_base_fees(Sum):-
    findall(F, (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), checked_bag_position(ID,_), bag_base_fee(ID,F)), Fs),
    sumlist(Fs,Sum).

/* total of all special (oversize / overweight) fees */
total_special_fees(Sum):-
    findall(F, (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), checked_bag_position(ID,_), special_fee(ID,F)), Fs),
    sumlist(Fs,Sum).

/* ----------  Final computation  ---------- */
total_cost(Total):-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    total_base_fees(Base),
    total_special_fees(Special),
    Total is Ticket + Base + Special.

/* ----------  Query & output  ---------- */
:- total_cost(T), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[T]).
:- halt.
```

text: Mary is a Business Class passenger flying from Boston to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 13 x 9 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A backpack: 43 x 30 x 20 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 40 x 13 x 16 inches, 97 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 46 x 28 x 23 inches, 87 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 46 x 23 x 19 inches, 91 lbs; Mary's flight ticket is $36.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/*  ----------  STATUTORY RULES (excerpted / simplified for this case)  ---------- */

% route of this itinerary
route(within_us).             % Boston – Miami

% passenger commercial class
class(business).

% complimentary checked-bag allowance for Business Class on a domestic (within U.S.) itinerary
complimentary_bags(2).        % 1st & 2nd checked bags free

/* ----------  BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES  ---------- */

% base fee for bag number N on this itinerary
base_checked_fee(N, Fee) :-
    complimentary_bags(C),
    N =< C, !,                % bags within free allowance cost $0
    Fee = 0.
base_checked_fee(3, 150) :- !.          % 3rd bag
base_checked_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.     % 4th bag and any above

/* ----------  SURCHARGE FOR WEIGHT  ---------- */

% overweight_fee(WeightLbs, Fee)
overweight_fee(W, 0)  :- W =< 50, !.                % not overweight
overweight_fee(W, 30) :- W =< 53, W  > 50, !.       % 50–53 lbs
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W =< 70, W  > 53, !.      % 53–70 lbs
overweight_fee(W, 200) :- W =< 100, W > 70, !.      % 70–100 lbs (within U.S.)
overweight_fee(_, 200).                             % heavier not accepted – use 200 cap for logic here

/* ----------  SURCHARGE FOR SIZE  ---------- */

% oversize_fee(TotalLinearInches, Fee)
oversize_fee(S, 0)  :- S =< 62, !.                  % within standard size
oversize_fee(S, 30) :- S =< 65, S  > 62, !.         % 62–65 in
oversize_fee(S, 200) :- S =< 115, S > 65, !.        % 65–115 in (within U.S.)
oversize_fee(_, 200).                               % larger not accepted – use 200 cap for logic here

/* ----------  EFFECTIVE SURCHARGE FOR A BAG  ---------- */

effective_surcharge(Weight, SizeSum, Surcharge) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight, OFee),
    oversize_fee(SizeSum,  SFee),
    Surcharge is max(OFee, SFee).

/* ----------  CHECKED-BAG FACTS FOR THIS CASE  ---------- */

% checked_bag(Number, WeightLbs, [L,W,H])
checked_bag(1, 51, [43,30,20]).
checked_bag(2, 97, [40,13,16]).
checked_bag(3, 87, [46,28,23]).
checked_bag(4, 91, [46,23,19]).

/* ----------  TOTAL FOR ALL CHECKED BAGS  ---------- */

bag_cost(BagNum, Cost) :-
    checked_bag(BagNum, Weight, Dims),
    sumlist(Dims, SizeSum),
    base_checked_fee(BagNum, Base),
    effective_surcharge(Weight, SizeSum, Surch),
    Cost is Base + Surch.

total_checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bag(N,_,_), bag_cost(N,C)), Costs),
    sumlist(Costs, Total).

/* ----------  TOTAL TRAVEL COST  ---------- */

ticket_price(36).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_checked_bags_cost(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

/* ----------  QUERY  ---------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: William is a Business Class passenger flying from New Orleans to New York with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 11 x 6 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 33 x 18 x 12 inches, 65 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 33 x 19 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 66 lbs; William's flight ticket is $281.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 751"]).
/* ====================================================================
   William – Business Class – New Orleans  ➔  New York   (domestic)
   ==================================================================== */

/* ---------------  Ticket price  ------------------------------------ */
flight_cost(281).


/* ---------------  Checked bags (carry-on bag is not listed) -------- */
/*    bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)                          */
bag(2,33,18,12,65).
bag(3,33,19,11,52).
bag(4,34,20,11,52).
bag(5,33,16,14,66).


/* ---------------  Ordered universe of checked-bag IDs -------------- */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ---------------  Statutory rules for this itinerary --------------- */

/* (1) Sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* (2) Oversize fee – within / between U.S. and Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (3) Overweight fee – within / between U.S. and Canada             */
/*     Threshold is 70 lbs for the 1st-2nd complimentary bags,       */
/*     and 50 lbs for every subsequently CHARGED bag                 */
overweight_fee(W,Threshold,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Threshold  -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53         -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70         -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100        -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (4) Penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs. overweight fee      */
penalty(BagId,complimentary,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* (5) Base checked-bag fee for Business Class on this route         */
bag_fee(1,0).              /* 1st bag (complimentary)  */
bag_fee(2,0).              /* 2nd bag (complimentary)  */
bag_fee(3,150).            /* 3rd bag                  */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.    /* 4th bag and beyond       */

/* ---------------  Helper predicates  ------------------------------ */

/* Choose 2 different elements F1<F2 from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* Remove the chosen freebies & build the final ordered list          */
/* – freebies occupy positions 1 and 2                                */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* Cost for one specific choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagCost + Penalties.

/* Walk through the ordered list accumulating base fees & penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = complimentary ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* ---------------  Grand-total minimisation ------------------------ */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,(choose_two(L,F1,F2), cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* ---------------  Query & output ---------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules that apply to this case  ---------- */

/* Region and cabin class for Joseph */
region(aus_nz).               /* ‘To / from Australia and New Zealand’    */
cabin_class(basic_economy).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fees for Basic Economy to / from NZ  ---------- */
base_checked_fee(BagNo, 75)  :- cabin_class(basic_economy), BagNo =:= 1.
base_checked_fee(BagNo, 100) :- cabin_class(basic_economy), BagNo =:= 2.
base_checked_fee(BagNo, 200) :- cabin_class(basic_economy), BagNo >= 3.

/* ----------  Over-WEIGHT fees to / from NZ  ---------- */
overweight_fee(Weight, 0)     :- Weight =< 50.                /* not overweight                */
overweight_fee(Weight, 30)    :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.  /* 50–53 lbs                     */
overweight_fee(Weight, 100)   :- Weight  > 53, Weight =< 70.  /* 53–70 lbs                     */

/* ----------  Over-SIZE fees to / from NZ  ---------- */
oversize_fee(Size, 0)     :- Size =< 62.                      /* not oversize                  */
oversize_fee(Size, 30)    :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.          /* 62–65 in                      */
oversize_fee(Size, 200)   :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.         /* 65–115 in                     */

/* ----------  Surcharge (pick the higher of the two if both apply)  ---------- */
bag_surcharge(Size, Weight, Surcharge) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, O), overweight_fee(Weight, W),
    (O >= W -> Surcharge = O ; Surcharge = W).

/* ----------  Facts representing Joseph’s checked bags  ---------- */
/*    bag(CheckedBagNo, SizeSumInInches, WeightInLbs).               */

bag(1, 65, 60).   /* Backpack 36×19×10  */
bag(2, 63, 69).   /* Luggage box 37×15×11 */
bag(3, 70, 51).   /* Backpack 39×15×16  */
bag(4, 64, 59).   /* Backpack 37×14×13  */

/* ----------  Compute the cost for one checked bag  ---------- */
one_bag_cost(BagNo, Cost) :-
    bag(BagNo, Size, Weight),
    base_checked_fee(BagNo, BaseFee),
    bag_surcharge(Size, Weight, Surcharge),
    Cost is BaseFee + Surcharge.

/* ----------  Sum all checked-bag costs  ---------- */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(C, (bag(N,_,_), one_bag_cost(N, C)), List),
    sum_list(List, Total).

/* ----------  Flight ticket price  ---------- */
flight_ticket(884).

/* ----------  Grand total (ticket + bags)  ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* ----------  Produce the answer  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A luggage box: 47 x 31 x 27 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 33 x 17 x 14 inches, 51 lbs; James's flight ticket is $400.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* =====================  Statutory rules  ===================== */

/* ----- route category (used for the tariff tables) ----- */
route_category(dallas, berlin, us_europe).

/* ----- cabin carried by the passenger ----- */
cabin(premium_economy).

/* ----- limits that make a bag a free carry-on (inches) ----- */
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

/* ========== checked-bag BASE fee for Premium-Economy, U.S-Europe ========== */
base_checked_fee(premium_economy, us_europe, 1, 0).   /* 1st bag */
base_checked_fee(premium_economy, us_europe, 2, 0).   /* 2nd bag */
base_checked_fee(premium_economy, us_europe, N, 200) :- N>=3.   /* 3rd & 4th+ */

/* ========== overweight fee (any route) ========== */
overweight_fee(Weight, _RouteCat, Fee) :-
    Weight =< 50,                    Fee = 0.
overweight_fee(Weight, _RouteCat, 30) :-
    Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(Weight, us_europe, 100) :-
    Weight  > 53, Weight =< 70.

/* bags >70 lbs on U.S.–Europe flights are “not accepted”; not needed here */

/* ========== oversize fee (any route) ========== */
oversize_fee(DimSum, _RouteCat, 0) :-
    DimSum =< 62.
oversize_fee(DimSum, _RouteCat, 30) :-
    DimSum  > 62, DimSum =< 65.
oversize_fee(DimSum, _RouteCat, 150) :-
    DimSum  > 65, DimSum =< 115.

/* ========== surcharge (highest of over-weight or over-size) ========== */
surcharge(Weight, DimSum, RouteCat, Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight, RouteCat, OW),
    oversize_fee(DimSum,  RouteCat, OS),
    Fee is max(OW,OS).

/* =====================  Case facts  ===================== */

flight(james, dallas, berlin, 400).           /* ticket price */

bag(1, 20,13, 8,  6).    /* backpack – carry-on           */
bag(2, 38,17,10, 65).    /* checked                       */
bag(3, 47,31,27, 52).    /* checked                       */
bag(4, 34,20,11, 53).    /* checked                       */
bag(5, 33,17,14, 51).    /* checked                       */

/* helper: is the bag a free carry-on? */
carry_on(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

/* collect checked bags in their given order */
checked_bag_ordered(List) :-
    findall(Id, (bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)), List).

/* fee for each checked bag (base + surcharge) */
bag_total_fee(Index, BagId, Fee) :-
    cabin(Cab), bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
    route_category(dallas, berlin, RC),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    surcharge(Weight,DimSum,RC,Surch),
    base_checked_fee(Cab,RC,Index,Base),
    Fee is Base + Surch.

/* grand total for all checked bags */
checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_ordered(List),
    findall(F,
            (nth1(I,List,BagId), bag_total_fee(I,BagId,F)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Total).

/* =====================  Final total cost  ===================== */
total_cost(All) :-
    flight(james, dallas, berlin, Ticket),
    checked_bags_cost(Bags),
    All is Ticket + Bags.

/* =====================  Query & output  ===================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* --------------  Statutory rules that are relevant to this case -------------- */

/* Region of the itinerary */
region(jennifer, within_us).

/* Jennifer’s cabin */
cabin(jennifer, basic_economy).

/* Base checked-bag fee for Basic Economy, within U.S.
   1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th bag respectively                         */
base_checked_fee(basic_economy, within_us, 1, 40).
base_checked_fee(basic_economy, within_us, 2, 45).
base_checked_fee(basic_economy, within_us, 3, 150).
base_checked_fee(basic_economy, within_us, 4, 200).

/* -------------------- size / weight surcharges -------------------- */

/* Over-size fee (sum of edges = Dim) for trips within U.S.          */
oversize_fee(within_us, Dim, 30)  :- Dim > 62 , Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(within_us, Dim, 200) :- Dim > 65 , Dim =< 115.
oversize_fee(within_us, Dim, 0)   :- Dim =< 62.

/* Over-weight fee for trips within U.S. (lbs)                       */
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 0)   :- W =< 50.                 /* no surcharge  */
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 30)  :- W > 50 , W =< 53.
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 100) :- W > 53 , W =< 70.
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 200) :- W > 70 , W =< 100.

/* When both surcharges apply, only the higher one is charged        */
bag_surcharge(Reg, Dim, W, F) :-
    oversize_fee(Reg, Dim, FO),
    overweight_fee(Reg, W,  FW),
    (FO >= FW -> F = FO ; F = FW).

/* --------------------------- the case ----------------------------- */

/* Bags: bag(ID, Len, Wid, Hgt, Weight)                              */
bag(1, 21, 12,  8, 11).          /* backpack – intended carry-on     */
bag(2, 36, 14, 14, 72).
bag(3, 35, 21,  9, 82).
bag(4, 40, 19, 12, 51).
bag(5, 35, 17, 11, 51).

/* Carry-on test (max 22×14×9 in)                                    */
carry_on(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* -------------------- cost calculation ---------------------------- */

/* Checked bag in the order they are presented, skipping carry-on    */
checked_index(ID,Idx) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)),BagList),
    nth1(Idx,BagList,ID).

/* Fee of a particular checked bag                                   */
checked_bag_cost(ID,Cost) :-
    cabin(jennifer,Cabin),
    region(jennifer,Reg),
    checked_index(ID,Idx),
    base_checked_fee(Cabin,Reg,Idx,Base),
    bag(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    Dim is L+W+H,
    bag_surcharge(Reg,Dim,Weight,Surch),
    Cost is Base + Surch.

/* Sum all checked-bag fees                                          */
total_checked_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(C, (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(ID), checked_bag_cost(ID,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Sum).

/* Flight ticket price                                               */
ticket_price(245).

/* ------------------------- grand total ---------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    total_checked_fees(BagFees),
    Total is T + BagFees.

/* ----------------------------- query ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Thomas is a Business Class passenger flying from Los Angeles to Chengdu with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 14 x 9 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 42 x 18 x 18 inches, 63 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 18 x 9 inches, 55 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 46 x 36 x 22 inches, 96 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 49 x 30 x 22 inches, 54 lbs; Thomas's flight ticket is $800.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ===== Statutory rules we need for this case ===== */

/* flight details */
flight_class(business).
route(los_angeles,chengdu).           /* U.S.  --->  China  */
flight_ticket(800).

/* passenger’s items: bag(Index,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(1,22,14,9, 7).
bag(2,42,18,18,63).
bag(3,38,18,9,55).
bag(4,46,36,22,96).
bag(5,49,30,22,54).

/* -------------------------------------------------- */
/* Carry-on test (American allows 1 carry-on ≤22×14×9) */

carryon(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.         /* meets size box */

/* ---------------- Checked-bag ordering ------------ */

checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carryon(Id)),Unsorted),
    sort(Unsorted,List).              /* keep ascending index */

bag_number(BagId,N) :-                /* N = 1st,2nd… checked bag */
    checked_bag_list(List),
    nth1(N,List,BagId).

/* -------------- Base fee for checked bag ---------- */
/* Business class, U.S.–China                         */
/* 1st & 2nd free, 3rd = $200, 4th+ = $200            */

base_bag_fee(N,0)  :- N =< 2.
base_bag_fee(N,200):- N >= 3.

/* -------------- Oversize fee (U.S.↔China) --------- */

dimension_sum(BagId,S) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_), S is L+W+H.

oversize_fee(BagId,30)  :-            /* 62-65 in  */
    dimension_sum(BagId,S),
    S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(BagId,200) :-            /* 65-115 in */
    dimension_sum(BagId,S),
    S > 65, S =< 115.
oversize_fee(BagId,0)   :-            /* ≤62 in    */
    dimension_sum(BagId,S),
    S =< 62.

/* -------------- Over-weight fee (U.S.↔China) ------ */
/* Business complimentary weight limit = 70 lb        */
/* Only charge if 70–100 lb                           */

overweight_fee(BagId,450) :-
    bag(BagId,_,_,_,W),
    W > 70, W =< 100.
overweight_fee(BagId,0) :-
    bag(BagId,_,_,_,W),
    W =< 70.

/* -------------- Per-bag total cost ---------------- */

bag_cost(BagId,0) :- carryon(BagId).  /* carry-on is free */

bag_cost(BagId,Cost) :-
    \+ carryon(BagId),
    bag_number(BagId,N),
    base_bag_fee(N,Base),
    oversize_fee(BagId,OSFee),
    overweight_fee(BagId,OWFee),
    MaxExtra is max(OSFee,OWFee),     /* higher of the two applies */
    Cost is Base + MaxExtra.

/* -------------- Total cost ------------------------ */

total_bag_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (bag(Id,_,_,_,_), bag_cost(Id,C)), Costs),
    sumlist(Costs,Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    total_bag_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* ================================================== */
/*                Produce the answer                  */
/* ================================================== */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Elizabeth is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Portland to San Francisco with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 14 x 6 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 36 x 19 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 18 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 36 x 15 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 50 x 27 x 25 inches, 86 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $164.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

% ---------- Statutory rules (simplified to what the case needs) ----------

% carry_on_limit(L,W,H).
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

% personal_item_limit(L,W,H).
personal_item_limit(18,14,8).

% base_checked_fee(CheckedIndex, Fee).     % Basic-Economy, within U.S.
base_checked_fee(1,40).
base_checked_fee(2,45).
base_checked_fee(3,150).
base_checked_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

% oversize_fee(SizeInches, Fee)  (within U.S.)
oversize_fee(Size,0   ) :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30  ) :- Size > 62 , Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200 ) :- Size > 65 , Size =< 115.
oversize_fee(Size,na  ) :- Size > 115.              % not accepted – not used here

% overweight_fee(WeightLbs, Fee)  (within U.S.)
overweight_fee(W,0  ) :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30 ) :- W > 50 , W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W > 53 , W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W > 70 , W =< 100.
overweight_fee(W,na ) :- W > 100.                   % not accepted – not used here

% surcharge(Weight,Size,Fee) – higher of over-weight / over-size
surcharge(W,S,Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(W,OF),
    oversize_fee(S,OS),
    max_fee(OF,OS,Fee).

max_fee(na,na,na).
max_fee(na,X,X) :- X \= na.
max_fee(X,na,X) :- X \= na.
max_fee(X,Y,X)  :- X>=Y.
max_fee(X,Y,Y)  :- Y>X.

% ----------------------- Facts for this case -----------------------------

% bag(Id, length, width, height, weight).
bag(1,21,14, 6,  7).
bag(2,36,19, 9, 53).
bag(3,38,18, 9, 53).
bag(4,36,15,13, 51).
bag(5,50,27,25, 86).

ticket_price(164).

% --------------- Helper predicates to classify each item -----------------

dims_ok(L,W,H, MaxL,MaxW,MaxH) :-
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

qualifies_personal(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    personal_item_limit(PL,PW,PH),
    dims_ok(L,W,H,PL,PW,PH).

qualifies_carryon(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(CL,CW,CH),
    dims_ok(L,W,H,CL,CW,CH).

% choose one free carry-on (there is exactly one that fits)
free_carryon(Id) :-
    qualifies_carryon(Id),
    \+ qualifies_personal(Id).        % none of the bags is small enough for personal item

% checked(Id) : every bag that is not the free carry-on
checked(Id) :-
    bag(Id,_,_,_,_),
    \+ free_carryon(Id).

% -------------------- Fee computation for each bag -----------------------

checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(Id,checked(Id),Uns),
    sort(Uns,List).   % get deterministic order  [2,3,4,5]

checked_base_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    nth1(Index,List,Id),
    base_checked_fee(Index,Fee).

bag_size(Id,Size) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    Size is L+W+H.

bag_weight(Id,W) :-
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W).

bag_surcharge(Id,SFee) :-
    bag_weight(Id,W),
    bag_size(Id,Size),
    surcharge(W,Size,SFee).

bag_total_fee(Id,Total) :-
    checked_base_fee(Id,Base),
    bag_surcharge(Id,SFee),
    Total is Base + SFee.

% -------------------------- Grand total ----------------------------------

checked_total(T) :-
    findall(Fee, (checked(Id), bag_total_fee(Id,Fee)), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,T).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(TP),
    checked_total(CT),
    Total is TP + CT.

% ------------------------------ Query ------------------------------------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 37 x 17 x 11 inches, 97 lbs; 3. A backpack: 35 x 15 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 50 x 28 x 28 inches, 69 lbs; 5. A backpack: 53 x 30 x 26 inches, 53 lbs; Thomas's flight ticket is $208.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ------------  Rules from the statutes (abridged to what is relevant here) ------------ */

/* flight region */
within_us.   /* San Francisco – New Orleans */

/* passenger class */
class(main_plus).

/* how many free checked bags does this passenger get?              */
/* Main Plus = Main Cabin allowance (0 on purely domestic flights)   */
/*              + 1 extra free bag                                   */
free_checked_bags(1).

/* base checked-bag fees for flights wholly within the U.S.          */
/* (position in the sequence of checked bags -> fee in USD)          */
within_us_base_fee(1,40).
within_us_base_fee(2,45).
within_us_base_fee(3,150).
within_us_base_fee(4,200).
within_us_base_fee(Pos,200) :- Pos>=5.

/* oversize fee (sum of the 3 outside dimensions) – within U.S. */
oversize_fee(Size,0)                    :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)                   :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200)                  :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/* overweight fee – within U.S. (lbs) */
overweight_fee(W,0)                     :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)                    :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)                   :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200)                   :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* for any bag the applicable extra fee is the higher of oversize vs. overweight */
extra_fee(BagId,Fee) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(Size,OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    (OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS).

/* --------------------  Facts from the case  -------------------- */

/* flight ticket price */
ticket_cost(208).

/* items the passenger brings (only those that must be checked) */
bag(bag2,37,17,11,97).   /* luggage box                           */
bag(bag3,35,15,13,51).   /* backpack                              */
bag(bag4,50,28,28,69).   /* backpack                              */
bag(bag5,53,30,26,53).   /* backpack                              */

/* list of checked bags in the order they will be processed */
checked_bags([bag2,bag3,bag4,bag5]).

/* --------------------  Computations  -------------------- */

/* sum of extra (oversize / overweight) fees */
extra_fees_sum([],0).
extra_fees_sum([B|T],Sum) :-
    extra_fee(B,F1),
    extra_fees_sum(T,FRest),
    Sum is F1 + FRest.

/* sum of base checked-bag fees taking into account free allowance */
base_fees_sum(Bags,Sum) :- free_checked_bags(Free),
                           base_fees_sum(Bags,1,Free,Sum).

base_fees_sum([],_,_,0).
base_fees_sum([_|T],Pos,Free,Sum) :-
    Pos =< Free,                      /* this bag is free */
    Pos1 is Pos + 1,
    base_fees_sum(T,Pos1,Free,Sum).
base_fees_sum([_|T],Pos,Free,Sum) :-
    Pos  > Free,                      /* fee applies      */
    within_us_base_fee(Pos,Fee),
    Pos1 is Pos + 1,
    base_fees_sum(T,Pos1,Free,Rest),
    Sum is Fee + Rest.

/* total bag fees */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bags(Bags),
    base_fees_sum(Bags,Base),
    extra_fees_sum(Bags,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* overall cost (ticket + all bag related charges) */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* --------------------  Query / Output  -------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 41 x 20 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 16 x 9 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 36 x 17 x 12 inches, 59 lbs; Patricia's flight ticket is $255.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 695"]).
/* ===========================================================
   Patricia – Philadelphia (U.S.)  →  Paris (France)
   Cabin: First Class   –  Trans-Atlantic itinerary
   ===========================================================*/

/* ----------------  Ticket price  ---------------------------*/
flight_cost(255).

/* ----------------  Baggage data  ---------------------------*/
/* Bag facts: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).            */
/* Bag 1 is carry-on (22×14×9 / 12 lbs) and is therefore not */
/* included in the checked-bag list.                         */

bag(2,35,18,10,51).
bag(3,41,20,14,53).
bag(4,38,16, 9,52).
bag(5,36,17,12,59).

/* list of checked-bag Ids (all except the carry-on) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------------  Statutory rules  -------------------------*/

/* ------ size: sum of the three outside dimensions ----------*/
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ------ oversize fees (Europe ↔ U.S.) ----------------------*/
/* 0 – 62 in ⇒ $0 | 62+ – 65 in ⇒ $30 | 65+ – 115 in ⇒ $150   */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
      (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
      ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
      ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 150).

/* ------ overweight fees ------------------------------------*/
/* Thresh is weight allowance (70 lbs for complimentary bags,
   50 lbs for charged bags).                                  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
      (  W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
      ;  W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
      ;  W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
      ;  W =< 100       -> Fee = 200).

/* ------ penalty: higher of the two (size vs weight) --------*/
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),      % 70-lb limit for gratis bags
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),      % 50-lb limit for charged bags
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ------ base checked-bag fees for First Class --------------*/
/* 1st, 2nd, 3rd bags: $0   |   4th+ bags: $200               */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----------------  Helper predicates  -----------------------*/

/* choose exactly 1 bag to be the “paid” 4th bag               */
choose_paid(List,Paid,Ordered) :-
        select(Paid,List,Freebies),          % remove Paid from List
        append(Freebies,[Paid],Ordered).     % freebies first, paid last

/* compute total cost for a particular choice of paid bag      */
cost_for_choice(Paid,Total) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        choose_paid(All,Paid,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Flight),
        Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list, accumulating fees & penalties    */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        NextIdx is Idx + 1,
        cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
        CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* --------------  Grand-total (minimised)  -------------------*/
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),
        findall(T, (member(Paid,L), cost_for_choice(Paid,T)), Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------------  Query & report  --------------------------*/
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A luggage box: 49 x 30 x 23 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 37 x 18 x 9 inches, 60 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 17 x 13 inches, 53 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $1284.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?

% -------------------------------
%  Statutory rules (abridged)
% -------------------------------

% oversize_fee(RouteGroup, DimSum, Fee)
% China group
oversize_fee(china, DimSum, 0  ) :- DimSum =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(china, DimSum, 30 ) :- DimSum =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(china, DimSum, 200) :- DimSum =< 115.

% overweight_fee(RouteGroup, Weight, Fee)
% China group
overweight_fee(china, W, 0  ) :- W =< 50, !.
overweight_fee(china, W, 30 ) :- W =< 53, !.
overweight_fee(china, W, 100) :- W =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(china, W, 450) :- W =< 100.

% The charge that applies to a bag is the HIGHER of the two
bag_extra_fee(Route, DimSum, Weight, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Route, DimSum, OS),
    overweight_fee(Route, Weight, OW),
    (OS >= OW -> Fee = OS ; Fee = OW).

% -------------------------------
%  Karen’s facts
% -------------------------------

route(china).               % Wuhan (China) -> Portland (USA)

% checked_bag(Name, L, W, H, Weight)
checked_bag(bag1, 43,27,17,52).   % 87 in, 52 lbs
checked_bag(bag2, 49,30,23,52).   % 102 in, 52 lbs
checked_bag(bag3, 37,18, 9,60).   % 64 in, 60 lbs
checked_bag(bag4, 35,17,13,53).   % 65 in, 53 lbs

flight_ticket_cost(1284).

% --------------------------------
%  Base checked-bag fees for Karen
% --------------------------------
% Karen is Main Cabin, to / from China
% 1st bag $0, 2nd $100, 3rd $200, 4th $200
base_fees([0,100,200,200]).

% --------------------------------
%  Helper predicates
% --------------------------------
dim_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

bag_overcharge(Bag, Charge) :-
    checked_bag(Bag,L,W,H,Weight),
    dim_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
    route(Route),
    bag_extra_fee(Route, Sum, Weight, Charge).

all_overcharges(List) :-
    findall(C, bag_overcharge(_,C), List).

% pair the largest over-charge with the smallest base fee
pair_costs(BaseList, OverList, Costs) :-
    msort(BaseList, BAsc),
    msort(OverList, OAsc),
    reverse(OAsc, ODesc),        % now descending
    pair_costs_(BAsc, ODesc, Costs).
pair_costs_([],[],[]).
pair_costs_([B|Bs],[O|Os],[C|Cs]) :-
    C is B + O,
    pair_costs_(Bs,Os,Cs).

checked_bags_total(Total) :-
    base_fees(Base),
    all_overcharges(Over),
    pair_costs(Base,Over,Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket_cost(Tix),
    checked_bags_total(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

% -------------------------------
%  Query
% -------------------------------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case  ---------- */

:- use_module(library(lists)).      % for permutation/2 and min_list/2

/*  Base checked-bag fee for a Basic-Economy customer
    flying to / from Australia or New Zealand            */
base_fee(1, 75).          % 1st bag
base_fee(2, 100).         % 2nd bag
base_fee(N, 200) :-       % 3rd bag and all subsequent bags
    N >= 3.

/* Oversize fee (Australia / New Zealand – U.S. market)            */
oversize_fee(Size, 0   ) :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size, 30  ) :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size, 200 ) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/* Over-weight fee (all markets)                                   */
overweight_fee(W, 0  ) :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30 ) :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.

/* Surcharge for a particular bag = max(oversize, overweight)      */
bag_surcharge(Id, Fee) :-
    bag(Id, L, W, H, Weight),
    Size is L + W + H,
    oversize_fee(Size, OverSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OverWeightFee),
    Fee is max(OverSizeFee, OverWeightFee).

/* ----------  Facts for Michael’s trip  ---------- */

flight_ticket(747).

/*  Bag facts: bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)              */
bag(2, 43, 29, 23, 52).   % luggage box
bag(3, 37, 15, 11, 52).   % luggage box
bag(4, 47, 27, 26, 56).   % luggage box
bag(5, 33, 18, 13, 67).   % backpack (checked)

checked_bags([2,3,4,5]).  % 4 checked bags (carry-on bag #1 is free)

/* ----------  Cost computation  ---------- */

/* Cost for one particular ordering of the checked bags            */
checked_fees_perm(Perm, Total) :-
    checked_fees_perm(Perm, 1, 0, Total).

checked_fees_perm([], _, Total, Total).
checked_fees_perm([Id|Rest], Ord, Acc0, Total) :-
    base_fee(Ord, Base),
    bag_surcharge(Id, Surcharge),
    Acc1 is Acc0 + Base + Surcharge,
    Ord1 is Ord + 1,
    checked_fees_perm(Rest, Ord1, Acc1, Total).

/* Minimum possible total checked-bag fees over all permutations   */
min_total_checked_fee(Min) :-
    checked_bags(Bags),
    findall(Fee,
            ( permutation(Bags, Perm),
              checked_fees_perm(Perm, Fee)
            ),
            Fees),
    min_list(Fees, Min).

/* Final overall cost                                              */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Flight),
    min_total_checked_fee(BagFees),
    Total is Flight + BagFees.

/* ----------  Query & output  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```
