oversize_fee(S,0)    :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S,30)   :- S  > 62, S  =< 65.
oversize_fee(S,200)  :- S  > 65, S =< 115.

% Overweight fees for travel to / from Japan
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,450)  :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

% Checked-bag base fee (Basic Economy, US ↔ Japan)
checked_bag_fee(1,75).
checked_bag_fee(2,100).
checked_bag_fee(3,200).
checked_bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* --------------------  Bag cost calculation  -------------------- */
additional_fee(Index,Fee) :-
    bag(Index,L,W,H,Weight),
    dim_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
    oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    ( OS >= OW -> Fee = OS ; Fee = OW ).

bag_cost(Index,0) :- carry_on(Index).               % free carry-on
bag_cost(Index,Cost) :-
    checked_order(Index,Order),
    checked_bag_fee(Order,Base),
    additional_fee(Index,Add),
    Cost is Base + Add.

/* --------------------  Totals  -------------------- */
sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],S) :- sum_list(T,R), S is H+R.

baggage_total(Total) :-
    findall(C, (bag(I,_,_,_,_), bag_cost(I,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(T),
    baggage_total(B),
    Total is T + B.

/* --------------------  Query / Output  -------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Mary is a Premium Economy Class passenger flying from Portland to Phoenix with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 11 x 6 inches, 5 lbs; 2. A backpack: 48 x 36 x 24 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 33 x 21 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 35 x 16 x 12 inches, 61 lbs; 5. A backpack: 35 x 15 x 14 inches, 69 lbs; Mary's flight ticket is $118.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  Statutory rules that apply to this case --------------- */

/* region of Mary’s trip */
region(within_us).          /* Portland – Phoenix */

/* passenger data */
passenger(mary).
class(mary,premium_economy).
ticket_price(mary,118).

/* Mary’s items  (BagId, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(1,20,11, 6,  5).   /* carry-on (free)            */
bag(2,48,36,24, 53).   /* checked #1                 */
bag(3,33,21,10, 51).   /* checked #2                 */
bag(4,35,16,12, 61).   /* checked #3                 */
bag(5,35,15,14, 69).   /* checked #4                 */

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* --------------------   Auxiliary arithmetic helpers   ----------------- */
size_sum(Bag,Sum) :- bag(Bag,L,W,H,_), Sum is L+W+H.
weight(Bag,Wt)   :- bag(Bag,_,_,_,Wt).

max_fee(F1,F2,F1) :- F1>=F2, !.
max_fee(_,F2,F2).

/* ---------------- Oversize fee (domestic U.S. trips) ------------------- */
oversize_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    size_sum(Bag,Sum),
    (   Sum =< 62  -> Fee=0
    ;   Sum =< 65  -> Fee=30
    ;   Sum =<115  -> Fee=200
    ;   Fee = 999999   /* not accepted – value never chosen in this case */
    ).

/* ---------------- Overweight fee (lbs) --------------------------------- */
overweight_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    weight(Bag,W),
    (   W =< 50  -> Fee=0
    ;   W =< 53  -> Fee=30
    ;   W =< 70  -> Fee=100
    ;   Fee = 999999  /* >70 not needed here                              */
    ).

/* ------------- base checked-bag fee for Premium Economy ---------------- */
base_checked_fee(Order,Fee) :-
    (   Order =< 2 -> Fee = 0          /* 1st & 2nd checked bags free     */
    ;   Order = 3  -> Fee = 150        /* 3rd checked bag                 */
    ;   Order >= 4 -> Fee = 200        /* 4th+ checked bag                */
    ).

/* ----------------- overall fee for one checked bag --------------------- */
checked_bag_fee(Order,Bag,TotalFee) :-
    base_checked_fee(Order,Base),
    oversize_fee(Bag,OFee),
    overweight_fee(Bag,WFee),
    max_fee(OFee,WFee,Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* ----------------- list of Mary’s checked bags in order ---------------- */
checked_bag_order(1,2).
checked_bag_order(2,3).
checked_bag_order(3,4).
checked_bag_order(4,5).

/* ----------------- total of all checked-bag fees ----------------------- */
all_checked_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F,
            (checked_bag_order(Order,Bag),
             checked_bag_fee(Order,Bag,F)),
            L),
    sum_list(L,Sum).

sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],Sum) :- sum_list(T,S1), Sum is H+S1.

/* ----------------------------- grand total ----------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    passenger(mary),
    ticket_price(mary,Ticket),
    all_checked_fees(Checked),
    Total is Ticket + Checked.

/* -----------------------------  Query  --------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Sarah is a First Class passenger flying from Lima to Las Vegas with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 13 x 7 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 50 x 38 x 27 inches, 74 lbs; 3. A backpack: 37 x 16 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 43 x 25 x 18 inches, 65 lbs; 5. A backpack: 34 x 17 x 13 inches, 75 lbs; Sarah's flight ticket is $461.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Facts describing the flight and the bags ---------- */

flight_cost(461).                         % Ticket price in USD

%  bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(bag1, 21, 13,  7,  8).                % Carry-on (free)
bag(bag2, 50, 38, 27, 74).                % Checked #1
bag(bag3, 37, 16, 10, 51).                % Checked #2
bag(bag4, 43, 25, 18, 65).                % Checked #3
bag(bag5, 34, 17, 13, 75).                % Checked #4

/* ----------  Helper predicates ---------- */

% size(+BagID, -Size)   – total outside dimensions in inches
size(BagID, Size) :-
    bag(BagID, L, W, H, _),
    Size is L + W + H.

% carry_on(+BagID)      – true when bag fits the carry-on sizer
carry_on(BagID) :-
    bag(BagID, L, W, H, _),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

% The four checked bags in the order we’ll charge them
checked_bag(1, bag2).
checked_bag(2, bag3).
checked_bag(3, bag4).
checked_bag(4, bag5).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fees for First Class (Peru→USA) ---------- */

% First Class: bags 1-3 free, 4th and later $200
base_fee(Index, 0   ) :- Index =< 3, !.
base_fee(_,     200).

/* ----------  Oversize / Over-weight fees (South America → U.S.) ---------- */

% oversize_fee(+Size, -Fee)
oversize_fee(Size, 0  ) :- Size =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(Size, 30 ) :- Size =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(Size, 150) :- Size =< 115, !.
oversize_fee(_,    0  ).          % Larger than 115 in. would be “not accepted”

% overweight_fee(+Weight, -Fee)
overweight_fee(W, 0  ) :- W =< 50, !.
overweight_fee(W, 30 ) :- W =< 53, !.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(W, 200) :- W =< 100, !.
overweight_fee(_, _)  :- fail.     % >100 lb not accepted (not needed here)

/* ----------  Fee for each checked bag ---------- */

% bag_fee(+Index, +BagID, -FeeForThatBag)
% “Higher of oversize / overweight” + base checked-bag fee.
bag_fee(Index, BagID, TotalFee) :-
    bag(BagID, _, _, _, W),
    size(BagID, S),
    oversize_fee(S, OSFee),
    overweight_fee(W, OWFee),
    ( OSFee >= OWFee -> Extra is OSFee ; Extra is OWFee ),
    base_fee(Index, Base),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Total of all bag fees ---------- */

total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(F, (checked_bag(I, B), bag_fee(I, B, F)), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

/* ----------  Grand total (ticket + bags) ---------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_cost(Ticket),
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ----------  Query to display the answer ---------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Karen is a Business Class passenger flying from Miami to Montreal with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 12 x 7 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 39 x 17 x 13 inches, 67 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 22 x 9 inches, 54 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 16 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 36 x 20 x 9 inches, 95 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $181.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 991"]).
/* ================================================================== */
/*  Karen – Business Class – Miami (U.S.)  →  Montreal (Canada)       */
/*  Statutory calculation of the total trip cost                      */
/*  (2 complimentary checked bags for Business Class)                 */
/* ================================================================== */


/* -------------  Basic trip data  ---------------------------------- */

flight_cost(181).                     /* ticket price – USD */


/* list of checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)          */
/* (the small 18×12×7 in / 7-lb backpack is her free carry-on item)   */
bag(2,39,17,13,67).
bag(3,34,22, 9,54).
bag(4,38,16,10,53).
bag(5,36,20, 9,95).

checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).           /* only the bags that are checked */


/* -------------  Statutory fee schedules  -------------------------- */

/* sum of a bag’s outside dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between the U.S. and Canada                */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee                                                     */
/*  – Thresh = 70 lb for complimentary bags (1st & 2nd)               */
/*  – Thresh = 50 lb for charged bags (3rd and after)                 */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs. overweight              */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),           % complimentary threshold
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),           % charged-bag threshold
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* base checked-bag fee for Business Class on this route              */
bag_fee(1,0).          % 1st bag – free
bag_fee(2,0).          % 2nd bag – free
bag_fee(3,150).        % 3rd bag
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.% 4th bag and beyond


/* -------------  Minimisation routine ------------------------------ */

/* choose two different elements (F1 < F2) from a list                */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* place the 2 freebies first, keep remaining order for the rest      */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of the 2 complimentary bags           */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagsCost,PenCost),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + BagsCost + PenCost.

/* walk the ordered list calculating cumulative costs                 */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,Csum,Psum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       Next is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,Next,Crest,Prest),
       Csum is BaseFee + Crest,
       Psum is Pen + Prest.

/* minimal total over all possible ways to pick the 2 freebies        */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* -------------  Final query / output ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A backpack: 43 x 22 x 16 inches, 67 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 33 x 19 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 51 x 32 x 23 inches, 52 lbs; Jennifer's flight ticket is $466.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Rules derived from the statutes  ---------- */

/* base checked-bag fee (Main Cabin, U.S. ↔ South America – Ecuador) */
base_bag_fee(1, main_cabin, south_america, 0).
base_bag_fee(2, main_cabin, south_america, 100).
base_bag_fee(N, main_cabin, south_america, 200) :- N>=3.

/* overweight fees – U.S. ↔ South America (ex-Guyana, Suriname) */
overweight_fee(south_america, W, 200) :- W  > 70.
overweight_fee(south_america, W, 100) :- W =< 70, W > 53.
overweight_fee(south_america, W,  30) :- W =< 53, W > 50.
overweight_fee(_,             W,   0) :- W =< 50.

/* oversize fees – U.S. ↔ South America (ex-Guyana, Suriname) */
oversize_fee(south_america, S, 150) :- S  > 65.
oversize_fee(south_america, S,  30) :- S =< 65, S > 62.
oversize_fee(_,            S,   0) :- S =< 62.

/* dimension helper */
dim_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* choose larger of oversize / overweight */
max_fee(A,B,A) :- A>=B.
max_fee(A,B,B) :- B> A.

/* total charge for one checked bag */
bag_charge(N, L,W,H, Weight, Charge) :-
    Route = south_america,
    base_bag_fee(N, main_cabin, Route, Base),
    dim_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
    oversize_fee(Route, Sum, OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Route, Weight, OWFee),
    max_fee(OSFee, OWFee, Extra),
    Charge is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Facts describing the case  ---------- */

/* 4 checked bags (carry-on not listed here) */
bag(1, 45,19,20, 88).   /* Backpack – checked bag #1 */
bag(2, 43,22,16, 67).   /* Backpack – checked bag #2 */
bag(3, 33,19,13, 51).   /* Luggage box – checked bag #3 */
bag(4, 51,32,23, 52).   /* Luggage box – checked bag #4 */

ticket_cost(466).

/* ----------  Aggregate calculations  ---------- */

bags_total_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C,
            (bag(N,L,W,H,Weight),
             bag_charge(N,L,W,H,Weight,C)),
            Cs),
    sum_list(Cs, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(T),
    bags_total_cost(B),
    Total is T + B.

/* ----------  Query to print the answer  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Linda is a First Class passenger flying from Doha to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 11 x 8 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 34 x 21 x 10 inches, 59 lbs; 3. A backpack: 51 x 31 x 30 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 44 x 23 x 19 inches, 70 lbs; 5. A backpack: 40 x 19 x 18 inches, 62 lbs; Linda's flight ticket is $1022.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1702"]).
/*************************************************************************
*  American Airlines bag-fee calculator                                  *
*  Case – Linda : Doha (Qatar)  ➜  Miami (U.S.) – First Class            *
*************************************************************************/

                    /* ----------  Flight data  ---------- */

flight_ticket(1022).                /* ticket price (USD) */
cabin(first).                       /* First Class */

route(qatar_us).                    /* “Between Qatar and U.S.” */

                    /* ----------  All bags carried  ------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) – dimensions in inches, weight in lbs */

bag(1,22,11, 8,  7).      /* small backpack – candidate carry-on           */
bag(2,34,21,10, 59).
bag(3,51,31,30, 52).
bag(4,44,23,19, 70).
bag(5,40,19,18, 62).

                    /* ----------  Carry-on rules  ---------- */

carry_on_max(22,14,9).              /* max L x W x H for a carry-on bag */

/* a bag qualifies as carry-on if all three dimensions are within limits */
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL,  W =< MaxW,  H =< MaxH.

                    /* ----------  Checked-bag list ---------- */

/* list of the 4 checked bags (exclude the single carry-on) */
checked_bag_ids(Ids) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Ids).

                    /* ----------  Base checked-bag fees ---- */
/* ‘Between Qatar and U.S.’ – First Class
     • Bags 1-3 complimentary
     • Bag 4 and every bag after that: $200                          */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

                    /* ----------  Oversize fees ------------- */
/* all regions share the same inch-bands                            */
oversize_fee(DimSum,Fee) :-
       (   DimSum =< 62     -> Fee = 0
       ;   DimSum =< 65     -> Fee = 30
       ;   DimSum =< 115    -> Fee = 150).

                    /* ----------  Over-weight fees ---------- */
/* distinction: complimentary bags use a 70-lb limit, charged bags 50-lb */

overweight_fee(Weight,comp,Fee) :-           % complimentary bag
       (   Weight =< 70   -> Fee = 0
       ;   Weight =< 100  -> Fee = 200         % (>70–100)  – NOT accepted,
       ).                                       % but never reached in this case

overweight_fee(Weight,charged,Fee) :-        % charged bag
       (   Weight =< 50   -> Fee = 0
       ;   Weight =< 53   -> Fee = 30
       ;   Weight =< 70   -> Fee = 100
       ;   Weight =< 100  -> Fee = 200
       ).

                    /* ----------  Penalties ----------------- */
/* “The higher fee between oversize and overweight applies.”        */
penalty(Id,Type,Penalty) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
       DimSum is L+W+H,
       oversize_fee(DimSum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,Type,OW),
       Penalty is max(OS,OW).

                    /* ----------  Ordering of bags ---------- */
/* Three bags are complimentary (positions 1-3), exactly **one** bag
   goes in position 4 (and therefore attracts both the $200 base fee
   and the ‘charged’ overweight schedule).

   We enumerate every way of choosing that single charged bag and pick
   the minimum total cost.                                           */

ordered_list(ChargedId,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(ChargedId,All,Complimentary),
       append(Complimentary,[ChargedId],Ordered).   % put charged bag last

                    /* ----------  Cost for a specific choice ----- */

cost_for_choice(ChargedId,Total) :-
       ordered_list(ChargedId,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_ticket(Tix),
       Total is Tix + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk the ordered list, accumulating base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is BaseFee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

                    /* ----------  Grand total -------------------- */

total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       findall(T, (member(Bag,All), cost_for_choice(Bag,T)), Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

                    /* ----------  Query & Output ----------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1256"]).

   Susan – Business Class
   Denver (DEN)  →  Minneapolis (MSP)   –  Domestic route
   ========================================================= */

bag(2,42,28,18,63).

bag(4,35,22,11,67).

/* Sum of outside dimensions                                */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* Over-weight fee                                          */
/* Complimentary bags: limit 70 lb, Charged bags: 50 lb     */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* Penalty = higher of oversize vs overweight               */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Base checked-bag fee – Business Class, domestic          */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* -------- Helper predicates ----------------------------- */

/* choose 2 different elements (F1 < F2) from a list        */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* build ordered list with the 2 complimentary bags first   */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),

/* cost for one particular choice of complimentary bags     */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-

/* walk through list accumulating base fees and penalties   */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-

       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestCost,RestPen),
       CostSum is Fee + RestCost,
       PenSum  is Pen + RestPen.

/* minimise over all ways of selecting 2 complimentary bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

A luggage box: 49 x 31 x 24 inches, 63 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 33 x 21 x 9 inches, 61 lbs; 4. A backpack: 41 x 25 x 14 inches, 57 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 38 x 14 x 11 inches, 99 lbs; Jennifer's flight ticket is $385.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  RULES FROM THE STATUTE (only what is needed for this case) ---------- */

/* Route of the flight */
route(within_us_canada).        /* Vancouver (Canada)  ->  Portland (U.S.) */

/* ---------------- 1. BASE CHECKED-BAG FEE (Basic-Economy, within U.S./Canada)----- */
base_checked_bag_fee(1, within_us_canada, 35).      /* 1st checked bag   */
base_checked_bag_fee(2, within_us_canada, 45).      /* 2nd checked bag   */
base_checked_bag_fee(3, within_us_canada, 150).     /* 3rd checked bag   */
base_checked_bag_fee(N, within_us_canada, 200) :-   /* 4th bag and up    */
    N >= 4.

/* ---------------- 2. OVERSIZE SURCHARGE (within U.S./Canada) --------------------- */
oversize_surcharge(Size, within_us_canada, 30)  :-  % 62  < size =< 65 in
    Size > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_surcharge(Size, within_us_canada, 200) :-  % 65  < size =< 115 in
    Size > 65, Size =< 115.
oversize_surcharge(Size, _, 0) :-                   % =< 62 in  →  no surcharge
    Size =< 62.

/* ---------------- 3. OVERWEIGHT SURCHARGE (within U.S./Canada) ------------------- */
overweight_surcharge(W, within_us_canada, 0)  :- W =< 50.         % normal weight
overweight_surcharge(W, within_us_canada, 30) :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_surcharge(W, within_us_canada, 100):- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_surcharge(W, within_us_canada, 200):- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* When a bag is both oversize and overweight you pay the HIGHER (max) surcharge. */
bag_surcharge(Size, Weight, Route, Surcharge) :-
    oversize_surcharge(Size, Route, OS),
    overweight_surcharge(Weight, Route, OW),
    Surcharge is max(OS, OW).

/* ---------------- 4. DIMENSION SUM (length+width+height) ------------------------ */
dimension_sum(L, W, H, Sum) :- Sum is L + W + H.

/* ----------  FACTS ABOUT THE PASSENGER, ITEMS & TICKET -------------------------- */

/* ticket price */
ticket_price(385).

/* items:  item(ID, L, W, H, Weight).   (all measures in inches / pounds) */
item(1, 18, 12,  6,  8).     /* backpack – personal item                */
item(2, 49, 31, 24, 63).     /* luggage box                             */
item(3, 33, 21,  9, 61).     /* luggage box                             */
item(4, 41, 25, 14, 57).     /* big backpack                            */
item(5, 38, 14, 11, 99).     /* luggage box                             */

/* Identify the 1 personal item that flies free (dimensions ≤ 18×14×8). */
personal_item(ID) :-
    item(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 18, W =< 14, H =< 8,
    ID = 1.              /* in this case we know item 1 is the only one */

/* A checked bag is any item that is NOT the chosen personal item */
checked_bag(ID) :-
    item(ID,_,_,_,_),
    \+ personal_item(ID).

/* Enumerate checked bags in the order they will be charged */
checked_bag_with_position(ID, Pos) :-
    findall(I, checked_bag(I), List),
    nth1(Pos, List, ID).

/* -------------- 5. FEE FOR EACH CHECKED BAG ------------------------------------- */
checked_bag_fee(ID, Fee) :-
    checked_bag_with_position(ID, Pos),
    route(Route),
    base_checked_bag_fee(Pos, Route, Base),
    item(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    dimension_sum(L,W,H,Size),
    bag_surcharge(Size, Weight, Route, Surcharge),
    Fee is Base + Surcharge.

/* -------------- 6. TOTALS ------------------------------------------------------- */
bags_total_fee(Total) :-
    findall(F, checked_bag_fee(_,F), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    bags_total_fee(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

/* ---------------- QUERY --------------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: John is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Helsinki to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 14 x 6 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A backpack: 42 x 26 x 15 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A backpack: 49 x 37 x 26 inches, 62 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 35 x 19 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 37 x 21 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; John's flight ticket is $510.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case  ---------- */

% 1.  Base checked–bag fee for a Main-Cabin customer travelling
%     between Europe and the United States (Trans-Atlantic).
base_checked_fee(main_cabin,europe_us,1,0).
base_checked_fee(main_cabin,europe_us,2,100).
base_checked_fee(main_cabin,europe_us,3,200).
base_checked_fee(main_cabin,europe_us,N,200) :- N>=4.

% 2.  Oversize fees on Europe ↔ U.S. flights
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,150) :- Size > 65, Size =< 115.
oversize_fee(Size,na)  :- Size > 115.           % not accepted (irrelevant here)

% 3.  Over-weight fees (all cabins / all regions for the weights we need)
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,na)  :- W > 70.                % not accepted (irrelevant here)

% 4.  The higher of oversize / overweight applies (if either is ‘na’, bag rejected)
extra_fee(Size,W,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size,Of),
    overweight_fee(W,Wf),
    max_fee(Of,Wf,Fee).

max_fee(na,_,na).
max_fee(_,na,na).
max_fee(A,B,A) :- A>=B.
max_fee(A,B,B) :- B>A.





% ----------  Facts describing John’s flight and bags  ----------

cabin(main_cabin).
region(europe_us).
ticket_price(510).

% bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1,19,14, 6,12).   % carry-on (no checked fee)
bag(2,42,26,15,53).
bag(3,49,37,26,62).
bag(4,35,19,10,51).
bag(5,37,21,10,53).

% ----------  Derived bag properties  ----------

bag_size(Id,Size) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    Size is L+W+H.

bag_weight(Id,W) :-
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W).

bag_extra_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    bag_size(Id,S),
    bag_weight(Id,W),
    extra_fee(S,W,Fee).

% Only bags 2-5 are checked; bag 1 is the free carry-on
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------  Cost of a particular ordering of the checked bags ---------- */

order_cost(Order,Cost) :-
    cabin(Cab), region(Reg),
    order_cost(Order,Cab,Reg,1,0,Cost).

order_cost([],_,_,_,Acc,Acc).
order_cost([Bag|Rest],Cab,Reg,Index,Acc0,Cost) :-
    base_checked_fee(Cab,Reg,Index,Base),
    bag_extra_fee(Bag,Extra),
    Fee is Base+Extra,
    Index1 is Index+1,
    Acc1 is Acc0+Fee,
    order_cost(Rest,Cab,Reg,Index1,Acc1,Cost).

/* ----------  Helper: permutations and min_list without external libraries ---------- */

perm([],[]).
perm(List,[H|Perm]) :-
    select(H,List,Rest),
    perm(Rest,Perm).

min_list([X|Xs],Min) :-
    min_list(Xs,X,Min).
min_list([],Min,Min).
min_list([H|T],Acc,Min) :-
    ( H<Acc -> Acc1=H ; Acc1=Acc ),
    min_list(T,Acc1,Min).

/* ----------  Minimal checked-bag cost (we try every ordering) ---------- */

min_checked_fee(Min) :-
    checked_bag_ids(Bags),
    findall(C,
            ( perm(Bags,Ord),
              order_cost(Ord,C)
            ),
            Costs),
    min_list(Costs,Min).

/* ----------  Total trip cost ---------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    min_checked_fee(BagFees),
    ticket_price(Tix),
    Total is BagFees + Tix.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Elizabeth is a First Class passenger flying from Austin to Mumbai with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 14 x 6 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 33 x 23 x 9 inches, 56 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 49 x 27 x 20 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 37 x 17 x 10 inches, 58 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 50 x 35 x 30 inches, 53 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $471.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1131"]).
/* =========================================================
   Facts describing Elizabeth’s itinerary and luggage
   ========================================================= */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(471).

/* checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,33,23, 9,56).
bag(3,49,27,20,52).
bag(4,37,17,10,58).
bag(5,50,35,30,53).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* =========================================================
   Statutory rules for travel between the U.S. and India
   (First Class)
   ========================================================= */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Over-SIZE fees   (China / Japan / S. Korea / HK / India /
                     Australia / New Zealand region)
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
      (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0          % not oversize
      ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30         % 62–65 in
      ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200        % 65–115 in
      ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Over-WEIGHT fees
   Two different free allowances apply:
        • complimentary bag ⇒ 70-lb threshold
        • charged bag       ⇒ 50-lb threshold
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
      (  W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
      ;  W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
      ;  W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
      ;  W =< 100       -> Fee = 450        % 70–100 lb  (India region)
      ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Penalty for a bag = higher of its oversize vs overweight
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
      oversize_fee(S,OS),
      overweight_fee(WT,70,OW),             % complimentary
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
      oversize_fee(S,OS),
      overweight_fee(WT,50,OW),             % charged
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Base checked-bag fee (First Class, U.S.–India):
        ‑ 1st, 2nd, 3rd bags: $0
        ‑ 4th bag and beyond : $200
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
bag_base_fee(N,Fee) :-
      (  N =< 3   -> Fee = 0
      ;  N >= 4   -> Fee = 200 ).

/* =========================================================
   Helper predicates
   ========================================================= */

/* choose exactly 1 bag that will become the (charged) 4th bag */
choose_one(List,Chosen) :- member(Chosen,List).

/* build the ordered list: complimentary bags first, charged bag last */
ordered_list(Charged,Ordered) :-
      checked_bag_ids(All),
      select(Charged,All,Complimentary),
      append(Complimentary,[Charged],Ordered).

/* walk the ordered list, accumulating base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Rest],Idx,TotalCost) :-
      ( Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged ),
      bag_base_fee(Idx,Base),
      penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
      NextIdx is Idx + 1,
      cost_bags(Rest,NextIdx,RestCost),
      TotalCost is Base + Pen + RestCost.

/* total cost for a particular choice of charged bag */
cost_for_choice(Charged,Total) :-
      ordered_list(Charged,Ordered),
      cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost),
      flight_cost(Tix),
      Total is Tix + BagCost.

/* compute the minimal total cost over all possible choices */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
      checked_bag_ids(L),
      findall(T, (choose_one(L,Ch), cost_for_choice(Ch,T)), Totals),
      min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* =========================================================
   Query and output
   ========================================================= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

/* ----------  Statutory rules relevant to this case  ---------- */

/* This itinerary is between South America (Ecuador) and the U.S.         */
route(south_america_us).

/* ----------------  Facts about Robert’s bags  ---------------- */

/* bag(Index, LinearSizeInches, WeightLbs).  (Only checked bags listed) */
bag(1,112,79).              /* 52+34+26   */
bag(2,63,53).               /* 37+12+14   */
bag(3,64,52).               /* 35+15+14   */
bag(4,112,93).              /* 49+34+29   */

/* Flight ticket price                                                  */
flight_ticket(314).

/* --------------  Base checked-bag fee (Premium Economy) -------------- */
/* 1st & 2nd bag free on this route; 3rd and every bag after = $200      */
base_checked_bag_fee(Index,0)   :- Index =:= 1 ; Index =:= 2.
base_checked_bag_fee(3,200).
base_checked_bag_fee(Index,200) :- Index >= 4.

/* ---------------------  Oversize fee (inches)  ----------------------- */
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size > 62, Size =< 65.                               /* 62–65 in  */
oversize_fee(Size,150) :- Size > 65, Size =< 115, route(south_america_us).     /* 65–115 in */
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size > 115.   /* (Not relevant here) */

/* --------------------  Over-weight fee (pounds) ---------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W > 70,  W =< 100.            /* 70–100 lb */
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W > 53,  W =< 70.             /* 53–70 lb  */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W > 50,  W =< 53.             /* 50–53 lb  */
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W =< 50.

/* --------------  Total fee for one checked bag  ---------------------- */
bag_fee(Index,TotalFee) :-
    bag(Index,Size,Weight),
    base_checked_bag_fee(Index,Base),
    oversize_fee(Size,Oversize),
    overweight_fee(Weight,Overweight),
    Extra is max(Oversize,Overweight),        /* only the higher of the 2 */
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* -------------  Sum of all checked-bag fees for Robert  -------------- */
total_bag_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(F,bag_fee(_,F),List),
    sum_list(List,Sum).

/* ----------------------  Grand total owed  --------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(T),
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).

A luggage box: 36 x 18 x 11 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 44 x 29 x 24 inches, 65 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 39 x 22 x 18 inches, 52 lbs; Thomas's flight ticket is $285.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules that apply to this case  ---------- */

/* Base checked-bag fee for a Main Cabin customer travelling
   wholly within the U.S. (Houston – Miami) */
base_fee(1, 40).
base_fee(2, 45).
base_fee(3, 150).
base_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.

/* Oversize fees (U.S. / Canada / PR / USVI)                     */
oversize_fee(Size, 0)   :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size, 30)  :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size, 200) :- Size  > 65.

/* Over-weight fees (U.S. / Canada / PR / USVI)                  */
overweight_fee(W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* The surcharge for a bag is the higher of the oversize or
   overweight fee (if both are non-zero).                        */
surcharge(Size, W, S) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, OS),
    overweight_fee(W,  OW),
    (OS >= OW -> S = OS ; S = OW).

/* ----------------  Facts describing the passenger  ------------ */

ticket_price(285).          /* Flight price                          */
class(main_cabin).          /* Fare class                            */
route(within_us).           /* Houston – Miami                       */

/* Bag(id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).                          */

bag(2, 42, 26, 23, 53).
bag(3, 36, 18, 11, 51).
bag(4, 44, 29, 24, 65).
bag(5, 39, 22, 18, 52).

/* ----------  Rules to decide which bags are checked  ----------- */

/* A bag is a free carry-on if it meets the 22×14×9 limits.        */
carry_on(ID) :-
    bag(ID, L, W, H, _),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* All other bags must be checked.                                 */
checked_bag(ID) :-
    bag(ID, _, _, _, _),
    \+ carry_on(ID).

/* Produce the list of checked bags in ascending bag-ID order.     */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID, checked_bag(ID), Raw),
    sort(Raw, List).

/* -----------------  Fee calculation per bag  ------------------- */

bag_base_fee(Seq, Fee) :- base_fee(Seq, Fee).

bag_surcharge(ID, Surcharge) :-
    bag(ID, L, W, H, Weight),
    Size is L + W + H,
    surcharge(Size, Weight, Surcharge).

bag_total_fee(Seq, ID, Total) :-
    bag_base_fee(Seq, Base),
    bag_surcharge(ID, Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* -------------  Sum of all checked-bag fees  ------------------- */

total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    findall(F,
            (nth1(Seq, List, ID), bag_total_fee(Seq, ID, F)),
            Fees),
    sumlist(Fees, Total).

/* ----------------------  Grand total  -------------------------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

/* --------------------------  Query  ---------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Statutory rules we need for this case ------------- */

/*  Flight type  */
region(domestic).            /* Dallas – Salt Lake City */

/*  Passenger class and free-bag allowance                       */
free_bags(main_plus,1).      /* Main Plus gets 1 free checked bag       */

/*  Base checked-bag fees (within / between U.S., Puerto Rico, USVI, Canada)  */
base_checked_fee(1, 40).     /* would cost $40, but may be waived        */
base_checked_fee(2, 45).
base_checked_fee(3,150).
base_checked_fee(N,200) :-   /* 4th bag and every bag afterwards */
    N >= 4.

/* ---------------- Over-weight fees (domestic) -------------------- */
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight =< 50 , Fee = 0.
overweight_fee(Weight, 30) :-
    Weight  > 50 , Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(Weight, 100) :-
    Weight  > 53 , Weight =< 70.
overweight_fee(Weight, 200) :-
    Weight  > 70 , Weight =< 100.

/* ---------------- Over-size fees (domestic) ---------------------- */
oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-
    Size =< 62 , Fee = 0.
oversize_fee(Size, 30) :-
    Size  > 62 , Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size, 200) :-
    Size  > 65 , Size =< 115.

/*  For a given bag, the higher of the 2 special-need fees applies  */
special_fee(Weight, Size, Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight, F1),
    oversize_fee(Size,    F2),
    Fee is max(F1,F2).


/* -------------  Facts describing Jessica’s situation ------------- */

passenger(jessica).
class(jessica, main_plus).
ticket_cost(jessica,150).

/*  bag(Number, Weight(lbs), Length, Width, Height)  */
bag(1, 61, 36,18,11).
bag(2, 60, 34,20, 9).
bag(3, 78, 33,19,12).
bag(4, 51, 39,16,13).

/* -------------  Derived calculations ----------------------------- */

/*  Size of a bag = L+W+H  */
bag_size(N, Size) :-
    bag(N,_,L,W,H),
    Size is L+W+H.

/*  Special-need fee for bag N  */
bag_special_fee(N, Fee) :-
    bag(N,Weight,_,_,_),
    bag_size(N,Size),
    special_fee(Weight,Size,Fee).

/*  Base checked-bag fee for bag N after free-bag privilege */
bag_checked_fee(N, Fee) :-
    class(jessica,Class),
    free_bags(Class,Free),
    ( N =< Free                        % falls into free allowance
      -> Fee = 0
      ;  base_checked_fee(N,Fee) ).

/*  Total fee for a single bag = checked fee + special-need fee      */
bag_total_fee(N, Total) :-
    bag_checked_fee(N,Chk),
    bag_special_fee(N,Sp),
    Total is Chk + Sp.

/*  Sum of all bag fees  */
bags_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, (bag(N,_,_,_,_), bag_total_fee(N,F)), List),
    sum_list(List,Sum).

/* -----------------  Grand total for the trip --------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    bags_fees(Bags),
    ticket_cost(jessica,Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------------------  Query / Output  -------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

/* ----------------  Facts describing Daniel’s trip ------------------ */

/* ticket price */

bag(4,40,21,20,51).
bag(5,33,21,10,65).

/* add the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 150 ).

       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 200   % (>70 not accepted, but safe here)
       ).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),     % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),     % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* base checked-bag fees for Business Class, Europe ⇆ U.S. */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,200).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ----------------  Helper predicates -------------------------------- */

/* choose 2 distinct elements (F1<F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* place the 2 freebies in positions 1 and 2, keep relative order of the rest */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest2),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest2].

/* compute total cost for a particular choice of free bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,PenaltyCost),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagCost + PenaltyCost.

/* walk through the ordered bag list */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestCost,RestPen),
       CostSum is Fee + RestCost,
       PenSum  is Pen + RestPen.

/* find minimal total cost across all ways of picking 2 complimentary bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------------  Query and report --------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

     70 lbs for complimentary bags

overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-

       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag = max(oversize, overweight) */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-

ordered_list(Charged,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Charged,All,Free),

/* cost for a particular choice of charged bag */
cost_for_choice(Charged,Total) :-
       ordered_list(Charged,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),

/* walk through ordered list accumulating fees & penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),

       PenSum  is Pen + RestPen.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of picking the charged bag */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_charged(L,Charged),
                 cost_for_choice(Charged,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

   Query & output
   ---------------------------------------------------------- */

text: Daniel is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Shanghai to Austin with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 11 x 9 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 48 x 33 x 24 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 16 x 14 inches, 67 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 43 x 26 x 17 inches, 77 lbs; 5. A backpack: 49 x 34 x 26 inches, 74 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $579.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- Facts describing Daniel’s journey ---------- */

% ticket
ticket_cost(579).

% every bag: bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(b1,19,11, 9,  8).     % carry-on
bag(b2,48,33,24, 52).     % checked 1
bag(b3,34,16,14, 67).     % checked 2
bag(b4,43,26,17, 77).     % checked 3
bag(b5,49,34,26, 74).     % checked 4

% cabin and route (needed only to pick the right numbers; all numbers
% are hard-coded below for the China↔USA, Main-Cabin case)
cabin(main_cabin).
route(china_to_usa).

/* ---------- General limits (China ↔ U.S. flights) ---------- */

carry_on_max(22,14,9).            % ≤ 22×14×9 in

/* ---------- Helper predicates ---------- */

% is_carry_on/1  – true if BagId meets carry-on size limits
is_carry_on(Bag) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

% list of checked bags (everything that is not carry-on)
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(B, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ is_carry_on(B)), List).

% dimensional sum of a bag
dim_sum(B,Sum) :- bag(B,L,W,H,_), Sum is L+W+H.

/* ---------- Over-size / over-weight surcharges (China ↔ U.S.) ---------- */

oversize_charge(B,Charge) :-
    dim_sum(B,S),
    ( S > 115                       -> Charge = 1_000_000        % not accepted
    ; S > 65                        -> Charge = 200
    ; S > 62                        -> Charge = 30
    ;                                Charge = 0).

overweight_charge(B,Charge) :-
    bag(B,_,_,_,Wt),
    ( Wt > 100                      -> Charge = 1_000_000        % not accepted
    ; Wt > 70                       -> Charge = 450
    ; Wt > 53                       -> Charge = 100
    ; Wt > 50                       -> Charge = 30
    ;                                Charge = 0).

% final surcharge is the higher of the two
surcharge(B,Charge) :-
    oversize_charge(B,OS),
    overweight_charge(B,OW),
    ( OS >= OW -> Charge = OS ; Charge = OW).

/* ---------- Base checked-bag fees (Main Cabin, China ↔ U.S.) ---------- */

base_charge(1,0).          % first bag free
base_charge(2,100).        % second bag
base_charge(I,200) :-      % 3rd, 4th, … bags
    I >= 3.

/* ---------- Cost of every checked bag ---------- */

bag_costs([], _, []).
bag_costs([B|Rest], Index, [Cost|CRest]) :-
    base_charge(Index,Base),
    surcharge(B,Surch),
    Cost is Base + Surch,
    Next is Index + 1,
    bag_costs(Rest,Next,CRest).

total_bag_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(Checked),
    bag_costs(Checked,1,Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Total).

/* ---------- Grand total ---------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------- Query ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 45 x 27 x 23 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 36 x 20 x 9 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A backpack: 47 x 31 x 22 inches, 52 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $61.
