reference_prolog:
```prolog

% ---------- Rules that encode the statutory provisions
% Regions (only the one we need here)
region(within_us).

% ---------------- Oversize fees (domestic)
% Size is length+width+height (inches)
oversize_fee(Region, Size, 0) :-
    Size =< 62, !.                      % at or below the free size
oversize_fee(within_us, Size, 30) :-    % 62–65 in
    Size  > 62, Size =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(within_us, Size, 200) :-   % 65–115 in
    Size  > 65, Size =< 115, !.
oversize_fee(_, _, 0).                  % otherwise (not applicable here)

% ---------------- Over-weight fees (domestic)
overweight_fee(_, W, 0) :- W =< 50, !.              % up to 50 lb free
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 30) :-                 % 50–53 lb
    W  > 50, W =< 53, !.
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 100) :-                % 53–70 lb
    W  > 53, W =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(within_us, W, 200) :-                % 70–100 lb
    W  > 70, W =< 100, !.

% ---------------- Base checked-bag fee for First Class, domestic
% Seq = 1,2 free; 3rd = $150; 4th+ = $200
base_checked_fee(first, within_us, Seq, 0)   :- Seq =< 2, !.
base_checked_fee(first, within_us, 3, 150)   :- !.
base_checked_fee(first, within_us, Seq, 200) :- Seq >= 4.

% ---------------- Surcharge (higher of oversize / overweight)
surcharge(Region, Size, Weight, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Region, Size, F1),
    overweight_fee(Region, Weight, F2),
    Fee is max(F1, F2).

% ---------------- A bag’s total charge
bag_charge(Class, Region, Seq, Size, Weight, Charge) :-
    base_checked_fee(Class, Region, Seq, Base),
    surcharge(Region, Size, Weight, Surcharge),
    Charge is Base + Surcharge.

% ---------- Facts describing Robert’s situation
passenger(robert).
class(robert, first).
flight_region(robert, within_us).
ticket_price(robert, 61).

% Each bag: id, L, W, H (in), Weight (lb)
bag(b1, 22, 14,  7, 12).   % intended carry-on
bag(b2, 50, 32, 25, 52).
bag(b3, 45, 27, 23, 53).
bag(b4, 36, 20,  9, 52).
bag(b5, 47, 31, 22, 52).

% ---------- Helper predicates
size(Id, S) :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), S is L+W+H.
weight(Id,W) :- bag(Id,_,_,_,W).

% A bag is a free carry-on if it fits 22×14×9
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

% Collect checked bags in their sequence order
checked_sequence(List) :-
    findall(Id, (bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)), Raw),
    sort(Raw, List).   % keeps original order given by identifiers

% Compute total bag fees for Robert
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    class(robert, Class),
    flight_region(robert, Region),
    checked_sequence(Bags),
    compute_fees(Bags, 1, Class, Region, 0, Total).

compute_fees([], _, _, _, Acc, Acc).
compute_fees([Id|Rest], Seq, Class, Region, Acc0, Total) :-
    size(Id, Size),
    weight(Id, Wgt),
    bag_charge(Class, Region, Seq, Size, Wgt, Fee),
    Acc1 is Acc0 + Fee,
    Seq1 is Seq + 1,
    compute_fees(Rest, Seq1, Class, Region, Acc1, Total).

% Overall total (ticket + bags)
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(robert, Ticket),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

% ----------- Query to print the result
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Thomas is a First Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Barcelona with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 12 x 6 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 34 x 20 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 34 x 17 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 35 x 21 x 9 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 18 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; Thomas's flight ticket is $637.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Rules from the statutes that are relevant to this case ------------- */

/* route involved – from U.S. to Europe (Charlotte → Barcelona) */
route(us_europe).

/* cabin class */
cabin(first_class).

/* ---------------- Checked-bag fees by bag number for First Class passengers
      on a U.S. ↔ Europe itinerary                                ------------- */
bag_number_fee(Num, 0) :- Num =< 3.         /* 1st – 3rd bag free                */
bag_number_fee(Num, 200) :- Num  >= 4.      /* 4th bag and higher = $200 each     */

/* ---------------- Oversize fees (U.S. ↔ Europe) ----------------
   Size = L+W+H in inches                                                     */
oversize_fee(Size, 0)    :- Size =< 62.                     /* within limit     */
oversize_fee(Size, 30)   :- Size > 62, Size =< 65.          /* 62–65 in         */
oversize_fee(Size, 150)  :- Size > 65, Size =< 115.         /* 65–115 in        */

/* ---------------- Over-weight fees -----------------------------------------
   Only the brackets that can possibly occur in this case are encoded.        */
overweight_fee(Weight, 0)  :- Weight =< 50.                 /* within limit     */
overweight_fee(Weight, 30) :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.   /* 50–53 lb         */
overweight_fee(Weight, 100) :- Weight > 53, Weight =< 70.   /* 53–70 lb         */

/* ------------- When both oversize and overweight apply --------------------
   Pay the higher of the two, in addition to any bag-number fee               */
bag_extra_fee(Size, Weight, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OWFee),
    ( OSFee >= OWFee -> Fee = OSFee ; Fee = OWFee ).

/* ------------- Cost of an individual checked bag -------------------------- */
bag_cost(Num, Size, Weight, Cost) :-
    bag_number_fee(Num, NumFee),
    bag_extra_fee(Size, Weight, ExtraFee),
    Cost is NumFee + ExtraFee.

/* ---------------------------  Facts for this case -------------------------- */

/* Flight ticket price */
flight_ticket(637).

/* Carry-on backpack – free, so not listed as a checked bag */

/*                               Num, Size-Sum, Weight */
checked_bag(1, 64, 51).
checked_bag(2, 65, 52).
checked_bag(3, 65, 52).
checked_bag(4, 64, 52).

/* -----------------------  Aggregate bag fees -------------------------------- */
total_checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C,
            (checked_bag(Num,Size,Weight),
             bag_cost(Num,Size,Weight,C)),
            Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

/* -----------------------  Grand total --------------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    total_checked_bags_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* -----------------------  Query & print answer ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Elizabeth is a First Class passenger flying from Salt Lake City to Chicago with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 12 x 6 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A backpack: 39 x 27 x 17 inches, 68 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 35 x 19 x 10 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 42 x 21 x 14 inches, 65 lbs; 5. A backpack: 39 x 13 x 15 inches, 51 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $247.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

:- use_module(library(lists)).

% basic facts about the itinerary ----------------------------------------------

route(within_usa).                     % Salt Lake City → Chicago
cabin(first).                           % First Class
flight_cost(247).                      % price of the ticket (USD)

% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
% BAG FACTS  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

bag(b1,20,12, 6,  9).   % 20 x 12 x  6 – fits as carry-on
bag(b2,39,27,17, 68).   % checked
bag(b3,35,19,10, 52).   % checked
bag(b4,42,21,14, 65).   % checked
bag(b5,39,13,15, 51).   % checked

% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 1.  Which bags must be checked?
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

carry_on_limits(22,14,9).

carry_on(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limits(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

checked_bag(ID) :- bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(ID).

checked_bags(L) :- findall(ID,checked_bag(ID),L).

% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
% 2.  Size / weight helpers
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

linear_size(ID,Size) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    Size is L + W + H.

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Oversize fees (within the U.S.)
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

oversize_fee(Size,0)      :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)     :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200)    :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Over-weight fees (within the U.S.)
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

% complimentary (1st & 2nd) – up to 70 lb free
overweight_free(W,0)      :- W =< 70.
overweight_free(W,inf)    :- W  > 70.          % not accepted (give big cost)

% charged (3rd, 4th …)
overweight_charged(W,0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_charged(W,30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_charged(W,100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_charged(W,inf) :- W  > 70.          % not accepted

% choose the higher of the two surcharges that apply
surcharge(ID,Type,Fee) :-
    linear_size(ID,Sz), oversize_fee(Sz,SizeFee),
    bag(ID,_,_,_,Wt),
    ( Type = complimentary ->
        overweight_free(Wt,WtFee)
    ; overweight_charged(Wt,WtFee)
    ),
    ( SizeFee == inf ; WtFee == inf ->
        Fee = inf
    ; max_member(Fee,[SizeFee,WtFee])
    ).

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Bag-position fees for First Class (domestic)
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

bag_position_fee(3,150).
bag_position_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Cost of a single bag
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

bag_cost(ID,complimentary,_,Cost) :-
    surcharge(ID,complimentary,S),
    ( S == inf -> Cost = inf ; Cost = S ).

bag_cost(ID,charged,Position,Cost) :-
    bag_position_fee(Position,BagFee),
    surcharge(ID,charged,S),
    ( S == inf -> Cost = inf ; Cost is BagFee + S ).

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Cost of a whole plan  (which two of the four bags are free)
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

combination_of_two(List,[A,B]) :-
    select(A,List,R), select(B,R,_), A @< B.

plan_cost(FreeList,TotalCost) :-
    checked_bags(Chk),
    subtract(Chk,FreeList,PayBags),

    % costs of the free bags
    findall(CF,(member(B,FreeList),bag_cost(B,complimentary,0,CF)),FreeCosts),
    sum_list(FreeCosts,FreeSum),

    % evaluate every order of the charged bags (3rd / 4th)
    findall(T,(  permutation(PayBags,[B3,B4]),
                 bag_cost(B3,charged,3,C1),
                 bag_cost(B4,charged,4,C2),
                 (C1 == inf ; C2 == inf -> T = inf ; T is C1 + C2)
               ),Totals),
    min_list(Totals,MinCharged),

    ( FreeSum == inf ; MinCharged == inf ->
        TotalCost = inf
    ; TotalCost is FreeSum + MinCharged).

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Minimal bag cost over all possibilities
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

min_bag_cost(Min) :-
    checked_bags(Chk),
    findall(Cost,(combination_of_two(Chk,Free),plan_cost(Free,Cost)),Costs),
    min_list(Costs,Min).

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Overall total
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_cost(Fare),
    min_bag_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Fare + BagFees.

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------
%  Query asked for by the problem statement
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: John is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Dallas to Los Angeles with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 14 x 8 inches, 11 lbs; 2. A backpack: 45 x 25 x 16 inches, 78 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 38 x 15 x 10 inches, 64 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 39 x 18 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 42 x 31 x 18 inches, 54 lbs; John's flight ticket is $30.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- FACTS ABOUT JOHN’S ITINERARY ---------- */
flight_region(within_us).        /* Dallas – Los Angeles            */
cabin_class(basic_economy).

flight_ticket_cost(30).

/* Bags: bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).        */
bag(b1,22,14,8, 11).
bag(b2,45,25,16,78).
bag(b3,38,15,10,64).
bag(b4,39,18,10,51).
bag(b5,42,31,18,54).

/* ---------- RULES ---------- */

/* Carry-on test (AA rule: 22 x 14 x 9 in. max) */
carry_on(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* John may take exactly 1 carry-on for free.            */
checked_bags(List) :-
    findall(B, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), All),
    List = All.

/* Index of a bag in the checked-bag list (for 1st/2nd/3rd/4th fee) */
bag_index(Bag,Idx) :-
    checked_bags(List),
    nth1(Idx,List,Bag).

/* ---------- BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES (Basic Economy, within U.S.) */
base_checked_fee(1,40).
base_checked_fee(2,45).
base_checked_fee(3,150).
base_checked_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ---------- OVERSIZE FEES (within U.S.) ------------------------ */
/* Size = L+W+H                                                    */
oversize_fee(Size,0)                :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)               :- Size > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200)              :- Size > 65.

/* ---------- OVERWEIGHT FEES (within U.S.) ---------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,0)                 :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)                :- W > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)               :- W > 53,  W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200)               :- W > 70,  W =< 100.

/* ---------- TOTAL FEE FOR ONE CHECKED BAG ---------------------- */
bag_checked_fee(Bag,TotalFee) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,Weight),
    bag_index(Bag,Idx),
    base_checked_fee(Idx,Base),
    Size is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(Size,OverSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OverWeightFee),
    MaxExtra is max(OverSizeFee,OverWeightFee),
    TotalFee is Base + MaxExtra.

/* ---------- TOTAL ITINERARY COST ------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket_cost(TicketCost),
    findall(Fee, bag_checked_fee(_,Fee), FeeList),
    sum_list(FeeList,BaggageCost),
    Total is TicketCost + BaggageCost.

/* ---------- QUERY ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: David is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from New Orleans to Shanghai with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 14 x 9 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 33 x 19 x 12 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 13 x 14 inches, 82 lbs; 4. A backpack: 33 x 22 x 10 inches, 96 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 54 x 32 x 25 inches, 62 lbs; David's flight ticket is $555.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  Rules derived from the statutes (only what we need) --------------- */

% passenger, class and ticket
passenger(david).
class(david, main_plus).
ticket_price(david, 555).

% route category (U.S. -> China)
route(to_from_china).

/* -------- Carry-on test (18 x 14 x 9 or smaller) -------- */
carry_on(L, W, H) :-
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* -------- Oversize fee (to / from China) -------- */
oversize_fee(Sum, Fee) :-
    Sum =< 62,               Fee = 0                              ;   % not oversize
    Sum  > 62, Sum =< 65,    Fee = 30                             ;   % 62-65 in
    Sum  > 65, Sum =< 115,   Fee = 200.                               % 65-115 in

/* -------- Overweight fee (to / from China) -------- */
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W =< 50,                     Fee = 0   ;                      % not overweight
    W  > 50, W =< 53,            Fee = 30  ;                      % 50-53 lbs
    W  > 53, W =< 70,            Fee = 100 ;                      % 53-70 lbs
    W  > 70, W =< 100,           Fee = 450.                       % 70-100 lbs

/* -------- Extra fee for a bag (max of oversize / overweight) -------- */
extra_fee(L, Wd, H, Weight, Fee) :-
    Sum is L + Wd + H,
    oversize_fee(Sum, OSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OWeightFee),
    Fee is max(OSizeFee, OWeightFee).

/* -------- Base checked-bag fee for Main Plus (to / from China) -------- */
% Main Plus = Main Cabin + 1 free extra bag (max 2 free)
base_checked_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    Index =< 2,                       Fee = 0  ;      % 1st & 2nd bag free
    Index =:= 3,                      Fee = 200 ;     % 3rd bag
    Index >= 4,                       Fee = 200.      % 4th bag and beyond

/* ---------------  Facts for David’s items --------------- */
/*  bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight)  */
bag(1, 18, 14,  9,  6).      % carry-on
bag(2, 33, 19, 12, 51).
bag(3, 38, 13, 14, 82).
bag(4, 33, 22, 10, 96).
bag(5, 54, 32, 25, 62).

/* ---------------  Determine which bags are checked --------------- */
checked_bag_id(ID) :-
    bag(ID, L, W, H, _),
    \+ carry_on(L, W, H),         % not a carry-on
    ID \= 1.                      % bag #1 is the carry-on

/* ---------------  Ordered list of checked bags --------------- */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID, checked_bag_id(ID), Unsorted),
    sort(Unsorted, List).         % ascending order: 2,3,4,5

/* ---------------  Cost for a single checked bag --------------- */
bag_cost(ID, Index, Cost) :-
    bag(ID, L, W, H, WT),
    extra_fee(L, W, H, WT, Extra),
    base_checked_fee(Index, Base),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* ---------------  Total baggage cost --------------- */
total_bags_fee(TotalFee) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    findall(C,
            (nth1(I, List, ID), bag_cost(ID, I, C)),
            Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, TotalFee).

/* ---------------  Grand total (ticket + bags) --------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(david, Ticket),
    total_bags_fee(BagsFee),
    Total is Ticket + BagsFee.

/* ---------------  Produce the answer --------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Joseph is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Vancouver to Atlanta with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 14 x 8 inches, 11 lbs; 2. A backpack: 35 x 21 x 9 inches, 58 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 36 x 13 x 14 inches, 84 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 43 x 31 x 18 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 39 x 22 x 14 inches, 76 lbs; Joseph's flight ticket is $260.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ------  Statutory rules relevant to this case  ------ */

/* Carry-on size limits */
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

/* Base checked-bag fees for trips within / between the U.S. and Canada – Main Cabin */
base_fee(1,35).          /* 1st checked bag            */
base_fee(2,45).          /* 2nd checked bag            */
base_fee(3,150).         /* 3rd checked bag            */
base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4. /* 4th bag and every bag 4+   */

/* Over-size fees for the U.S. / Canada market */
oversize_fee(Dim,30) :-  Dim>62 , Dim=<65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim>65 , Dim=<115.
oversize_fee(Dim,0)  :-  Dim=<62.

/* Over-weight fees for the U.S. / Canada market */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :-  W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :-  W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :-  W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)   :-  W=<50.

/* Surcharge for a bag is the higher of its over-size or over-weight fee */
surcharge(Dim,Weight,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Dim,OF),
    overweight_fee(Weight,WF),
    Fee is max(OF,WF).

/* ------  Facts for Joseph’s journey  ------ */

/* flight ticket price */
ticket_cost(260).

/* Bags:  bag(ID,Length,Width,Height,Weight). */
bag(1,21,14, 8,11).
bag(2,35,21, 9,58).
bag(3,36,13,14,84).
bag(4,43,31,18,52).
bag(5,39,22,14,76).

/* ------  Derived facts  ------ */

/* carry_on_bag/1 : true if the bag fits carry-on limits */
carry_on_bag(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

/* checked_bag/2 : checked_bag(ID,Position) – assigns order 1,2,3,... */
checked_bag(ID,Pos) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_),\+carry_on_bag(B)),Bs),
    nth1(Pos,Bs,ID).

/* fee_for_bag/2 : fee_for_bag(BagID,TotalFeeForThatBag) */
fee_for_bag(ID,Fee) :-
    checked_bag(ID,Pos),
    base_fee(Pos,Base),
    bag(ID,L,W,H,Wt),
    Dim is L+W+H,
    surcharge(Dim,Wt,Sur),
    Fee is Base+Sur.

/* Sum of all checked-bag fees */
checked_bags_total(Total) :-
    findall(F,fee_for_bag(_,F),Fs),
    sumlist(Fs,Total).

/* ------  Final total cost  ------ */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    checked_bags_total(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket+BagFees.

/* ------  Query & output  ------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Joseph is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from New Delhi to San Francisco with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 12 x 9 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 34 x 21 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 52 x 31 x 29 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A backpack: 48 x 37 x 24 inches, 53 lbs; Joseph's flight ticket is $628.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------- RULES (statutes simplified to fit the case) -------------- */

/* route and service class that apply to Joseph */
route(india_to_us).                 /* New-Delhi (India) -> San-Francisco (U.S.) */
service_class(main_cabin).

/* ----  Carry-on rules  ---- */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).              /* in inches (L,W,H)      */

/* ----  Base checked-bag fees for Main-Cabin on India↔US route  ----
   BagNr = 1,2,3,4…  */
base_fee(1, 0).                      /* first bag is free (complimentary) */
base_fee(2,100).                     /* second bag               */
base_fee(3,200).                     /* third bag                */
base_fee(N,200):- N>=4.              /* fourth bag and beyond    */

/* ----  Oversize fees (bag length+width+height)  ---- */
oversize_fee(Sum,30) :- Sum>62 , Sum=<65.              /* 62–65 in  */
oversize_fee(Sum,200):- Sum>65 , Sum=<115.             /* 65–115 in */

/* ----  Over-weight fees (Joseph has no bag >70 lb, so only two brackets needed) */
overweight_fee(W,0  ) :- W=<50.                        /* not overweight */
overweight_fee(W,30 ) :- W>50 , W=<53.                 /* 50–53 lb bracket */
overweight_fee(W,100):- W>53 , W=<70.                  /* 53–70 lb bracket */

/* ----  Combined size / weight rule  ----
   If a bag is both oversize and overweight, charge ONLY the higher of the two. */
special_fee(Weight,Sum,Fee):-
    overweight_fee(Weight,OWF),
    oversize_fee(Sum,OSF), !,
    Fee is max(OWF,OSF).
special_fee(Weight,_,Fee):-                            /* only overweight */
    overweight_fee(Weight,Fee), Fee>0.
special_fee(_,Sum,Fee):-                               /* only oversize   */
    oversize_fee(Sum,Fee), Fee>0.
special_fee(_,_,0).                                   /* no extra fee    */

/* -------------- FACTS FROM JOSEPH’S CASE -------------- */

/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(1,22,12, 9,  7).   /* will be the carry-on */
bag(2,34,21,10, 53).
bag(3,52,31,29, 51).
bag(4,34,20, 9, 53).
bag(5,48,37,24, 53).

/* -------------- DERIVED INFORMATION -------------- */

/* test whether a bag is carry-on size */
is_carry_on(Id):- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), carry_on_max(ML,MW,MH),
                  L=<ML, W=<MW, H=<MH.

/* make an ordered list of checked bags (all bags that are NOT carry-on) */
checked_bag_list(List):- findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ is_carry_on(Id)),List).

/* fee for one checked bag in position N of the checked list */
checked_bag_fee(Id,N,TotalFee):-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
    Sum is L+W+H,
    base_fee(N,Base),                       /* base fee by sequence number   */
    special_fee(Weight,Sum,SpecFee),        /* overweight / oversize fee      */
    TotalFee is Base + SpecFee.

/* sum of all checked-bag fees */
total_checked_fees(Sum):- checked_bag_list(List),
    findall(Fee,
            (nth1(N,List,Id), checked_bag_fee(Id,N,Fee)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Sum).

/* flight ticket price (given) */
ticket_price(628).

/* total cost = ticket + checked bag fees (no special-needs costs in this case) */
total_cost(Total):- ticket_price(T),
                    total_checked_fees(BagFees),
                    Total is T + BagFees.

/* -------------- QUERY -------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Jennifer is a Business Class passenger flying from San Francisco to New York with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 13 x 8 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A backpack: 43 x 19 x 19 inches, 84 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 35 x 16 x 12 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 50 x 28 x 25 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A backpack: 37 x 13 x 14 inches, 69 lbs; Jennifer's flight ticket is $159.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 969"]).
/* ----------------------------------------------------------
   Jennifer – Business Class   (San Francisco ➔ New York)
   ---------------------------------------------------------- */

/* flight ticket price */
flight_cost(159).

/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) – *checked* bags only  */
bag(2,43,19,19,84).
bag(3,35,16,12,52).
bag(4,50,28,25,52).
bag(5,37,13,14,69).

/* list of the 4 checked-bag Ids (carry-on bag #1 is excluded) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------  Statutory rules for this itinerary  ---------- */

/* sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between U.S. & Canada / PR / USVI */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee (threshold = 70 lb for complimentary,
                   threshold = 50 lb for charged bags)        */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh  -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53      -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70      -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs. overweight fee            */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* base checked-bag fee for Business Class on U.S. domestic   */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----------  Helper predicates  --------------------------- */

/* choose two different elements (F1 < F2) from a list        */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* construct ordered list: the 2 complimentary bags first     */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* walk through ordered list computing fees and penalties     */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestCost,RestPen),
       CostSum is BaseFee + RestCost,
       PenSum  is Pen + RestPen.

/* total cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags   */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of picking 2 freebies      */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------  Query & output  ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: Sarah is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Dallas to Seoul with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 13 x 8 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 36 x 15 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A backpack: 33 x 21 x 11 inches, 81 lbs; 4. A backpack: 41 x 27 x 15 inches, 73 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 34 x 18 x 12 inches, 53 lbs; Sarah's flight ticket is $366.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Facts about Sarah’s trip ---------- */
flight_route(usa_to_korea).          /* Dallas (U.S.)  ->  Seoul (South Korea) */
passenger_class(main_cabin).
flight_ticket_price(366).

/* Carry-on – free, so not listed among checked bags */
carry_on(bag1).

/* Checked bags (chosen order that minimises the total)               */
/* bag(Name, Length, Width, Height, Weight).                          */
bag(bag3, 33, 21, 11, 81).    /* heavy – we’ll make this the 1st checked bag (free base fee) */
bag(bag4, 41, 27, 15, 73).    /* 2nd checked bag                     */
bag(bag2, 36, 15, 14, 52).    /* 3rd checked bag                     */
bag(bag5, 34, 18, 12, 53).    /* 4th checked bag                     */

/* Order in which bags are checked (index → BagName)                  */
bag_order(1, bag3).
bag_order(2, bag4).
bag_order(3, bag2).
bag_order(4, bag5).

/* ----------  Helper rules ---------- */

size_sum(L,W,H,Sum) :- Sum is L+W+H.

/* ---------  Base checked-bag fee for USA ↔ South-Korea, Main Cabin  --------- */
/* 1st bag free, 2nd = $100, 3rd = $200, 4th = $200 (rules for “To / from … South Korea”) */

base_checked_fee(1, 0).
base_checked_fee(2,100).
base_checked_fee(3,200).
base_checked_fee(4,200).

/* ----------  Overweight fee (USA ↔ South-Korea)  ---------- */
overweight_fee(W, 0)  :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,450) :- W > 70, W =< 100.

/* ----------  Oversize fee (USA ↔ South-Korea)  ---------- */
oversize_fee(S, 0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S,30)   :- S > 62,  S =< 65.
oversize_fee(S,200)  :- S > 65,  S =< 115.

/* ----------  Fee for an individual checked bag ---------- */
bag_extra_fee(Bag, ExtraFee) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,Weight),
    size_sum(L,W,H,Size),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    oversize_fee(Size,OS),
    (OW >= OS -> ExtraFee = OW ; ExtraFee = OS).

bag_total_cost(Index, Cost) :-
    bag_order(Index,Bag),
    base_checked_fee(Index,Base),
    bag_extra_fee(Bag,Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Total baggage cost ---------- */
total_baggage_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (bag_order(I,_), bag_total_cost(I,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs, Total).

/* ----------  Grand total (ticket + bags) ---------- */
total_cost(Grand) :-
    flight_ticket_price(Tix),
    total_baggage_cost(Bags),
    Grand is Tix + Bags.

/* ----------  Query ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Sarah is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Portland to San Francisco with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 11 x 8 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A backpack: 50 x 34 x 29 inches, 77 lbs; 3. A backpack: 37 x 15 x 11 inches, 71 lbs; 4. A backpack: 35 x 17 x 12 inches, 86 lbs; 5. A backpack: 36 x 20 x 9 inches, 57 lbs; Sarah's flight ticket is $297.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ========= Rules derived from the statute ========= */

/* passenger and itinerary facts */
passenger(sarah).
class(main_plus).                     /* Main Plus = Main Cabin + 1 free checked bag */
region(us_domestic).                  /* Portland – San Francisco */

/* flight ticket price */
ticket_price(297).

/* -------------------------------------------------- */
/* The 5 items Sarah is travelling with               */
/* bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight_lbs).        */
bag(1, 18, 11,  8, 10).   /* personal item            */
bag(2, 50, 34, 29, 77).
bag(3, 37, 15, 11, 71).
bag(4, 35, 17, 12, 86).
bag(5, 36, 20,  9, 57).

/* -------------------------------------------------- */
/* Derived properties of each bag                     */

dimsum(ID, Sum) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    Sum is L + W + H.

/* personal item – no fee */
personal_item(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 18, W =< 14, H =< 8.

/* every non-personal-item is a checked bag */
checked_bag(ID) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,_),
    \+ personal_item(ID).

/* list of checked bags in a fixed order */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID, checked_bag(ID), IDs),
    sort(IDs, List).

/* position of a checked bag (1,2,3,…) */
bag_position(ID, Pos) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    nth1(Pos, List, ID).

/* ---------------- Base checked–bag fee (Main Plus) ---------------- */
base_checked_fee(Pos, 0)  :- Pos = 1.            /* 1st bag free (Main Plus perk) */
base_checked_fee(Pos, 45) :- Pos = 2.            /* 2nd bag (within US)          */
base_checked_fee(Pos, 150):- Pos = 3.            /* 3rd bag                      */
base_checked_fee(Pos, Fee):- Pos  >= 4, Fee = 200. /* 4th+ bag                     */

/* ---------------- Oversize fee (within U.S.) ---------------- */
oversize_fee(ID, 0) :-
    dimsum(ID, S), S =< 62.
oversize_fee(ID, 30) :-
    dimsum(ID, S), S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(ID, 200) :-
    dimsum(ID, S), S > 65, S =< 115.

/* ---------------- Over-weight fee (within U.S.) ---------------- */
overweight_fee(ID, 0) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W), W =< 50.
overweight_fee(ID, 30) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W), W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(ID, 100) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W), W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(ID, 200) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W), W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* extra fee for a bag = the higher of oversize vs overweight */
extra_fee(ID, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(ID, SFee),
    overweight_fee(ID, WFee),
    ( SFee >= WFee -> Fee = SFee ; Fee = WFee ).

/* ---------------- Fee for each checked bag ---------------- */
checked_bag_total(ID, Total) :-
    bag_position(ID, Pos),
    base_checked_fee(Pos, Base),
    extra_fee(ID, Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* ---------------- Aggregate costs ---------------- */
total_checked_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(Fee, checked_bag_total(_,Fee), Fees),
    sumlist(Fees, Sum).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_checked_cost(Checked),
    Total is Tix + Checked.

/* ========= Query ========= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Mary is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Toronto to New Orleans with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 12 x 7 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A backpack: 43 x 17 x 18 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 44 x 21 x 19 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 53 x 29 x 26 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A backpack: 33 x 21 x 10 inches, 85 lbs; Mary's flight ticket is $169.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Statutory rules that apply to this case ------------- */

/* Basic-Economy checked-bag base fees for the region
   “within / between the U.S. and Canada”                       */
checked_bag_base_fee(basic_economy, us_canada, 1, 35).
checked_bag_base_fee(basic_economy, us_canada, 2, 45).
checked_bag_base_fee(basic_economy, us_canada, 3, 150).
checked_bag_base_fee(basic_economy, us_canada, N, 200) :- N >= 4.

/* Oversize fees (length+width+height in inches) */
oversize_fee(Sum, 0)   :- Sum =< 62.
oversize_fee(Sum, 30)  :- Sum  > 62, Sum =< 65.
oversize_fee(Sum, 200) :- Sum  > 65, Sum =< 115.

/* Over-weight fees (pounds) */
overweight_fee(W, 0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)   :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100)  :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200)  :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* Extra fee on a bag is the higher of its oversize / overweight fee */
extra_fee(L, W, H, P, Extra) :-
        Sum is L+W+H,
        oversize_fee(Sum, OS),
        overweight_fee(P, OW),
        Extra is max(OS, OW).

/* Carry-on test: every dimension within 22×14×9 inches            */
is_carry_on(L, W, H) :- L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* ---------------- Facts for Mary’s itinerary ---------------- */

ticket_price(169).
passenger_class(basic_economy).
route(toronto, new_orleans, us_canada).

/* bag(Order, Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)                   */
bag(1, small_backpack,     20, 12,  7,  9).
bag(2, large_backpack,     43, 17, 18, 52).
bag(3, luggage_box_1,      44, 21, 19, 53).
bag(4, luggage_box_2,      53, 29, 26, 53).
bag(5, heavy_backpack,     33, 21, 10, 85).

/* ---------------- Deriving which bags are checked --------------- */

/* checked_bag(Index, Id, L, W, H, P)
   Index = 1 for Mary’s 1st checked bag, 2 for her 2nd, …          */
checked_bag(Idx, Id, L, W, H, P) :-
        bag(Ord, Id, L, W, H, P),
        \+ is_carry_on(L, W, H),            % not free carry-on
        findall(Prev,
                (bag(O2, _, L2, W2, H2, _), O2 < Ord,
                 \+ is_carry_on(L2, W2, H2)),
                PrevList),
        length(PrevList, NPrev),
        Idx is NPrev + 1.

/* Fee for one checked bag */
checked_bag_total_fee(Idx, L, W, H, P, Fee) :-
        passenger_class(Class),
        route(_, _, Region),
        checked_bag_base_fee(Class, Region, Idx, Base),
        extra_fee(L, W, H, P, Extra),
        Fee is Base + Extra.

/* ---------------- Summing everything ---------------- */

total_bag_fees(Total) :-
        findall(F,
               (checked_bag(Idx, _, L, W, H, P),
                checked_bag_total_fee(Idx, L, W, H, P, F)),
               Fs),
        sumlist(Fs, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
        ticket_price(Tix),
        total_bag_fees(Bags),
        Total is Tix + Bags.

/* --------------------  Query & print  --------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Jessica is a Business Class passenger flying from Orlando to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 14 x 9 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A backpack: 46 x 33 x 23 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 37 x 16 x 11 inches, 82 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 48 x 36 x 26 inches, 93 lbs; 5. A backpack: 33 x 21 x 9 inches, 93 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $244.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules (only the parts needed for this case) ---------- */

% carry-on size limit
carry_on_size(22,14,9).

% base checked-bag fee for a Business Class customer travelling within the U.S.
% (1st & 2nd bags free, 3rd = $150, 4th+ = $200)
base_fee_biz_us(Num,0)   :- Num =< 2, !.
base_fee_biz_us(3,150)   :- !.
base_fee_biz_us(Num,200) :- Num >= 4.

% oversize fees (within U.S.)
oversize_fee(Size,0)                 :- Size =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(Size,30)                :- Size =< 65, !.          % 62–65 in
oversize_fee(Size,200)               :- Size =< 115, !.         % 65–115 in

% overweight fees (within U.S.)
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50,  !.
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W =< 53,  !.        % >50–53 lb
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W =< 70,  !.        % >53–70 lb
overweight_fee(W,200)  :- W =< 100, !.        % >70–100 lb
% (>100 lb not accepted ‑ not needed here)

% the surcharge applied to a checked bag is the higher of oversize / overweight
surcharge(Size,Weight,S) :-
    oversize_fee(Size,OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    (OS >= OW -> S = OS ; S = OW).

/* ----------  Case facts  ---------- */

% flight details
ticket_price(244).          % USD
cabin_class(business).
route(within_us).           % Orlando – Philadelphia

% each item: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).
bag(1,22,14, 9,  9).   % fits carry-on
bag(2,46,33,23, 52).
bag(3,37,16,11, 82).
bag(4,48,36,26, 93).
bag(5,33,21, 9, 93).

/* ----------  Derived facts / rules  ---------- */

% does a bag qualify as the single free carry-on?
carry_on(Id) :-
    carry_on_size(Lmax,Wmax,Hmax),
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    L =< Lmax, W =< Wmax, H =< Hmax.

% list of checked bags (everything that is not the one carry-on)
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)),List).

% position (1st,2nd,3rd…) of a checked bag
bag_number(Id,Num) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    nth1(Num,List,Id).

% cost of an individual checked bag
bag_cost(Id,Cost) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size is L+W+H,
    bag_number(Id,Num),
    base_fee_biz_us(Num,Base),
    surcharge(Size,Weight,Surcharge),
    Cost is Base + Surcharge.

% total of all checked-bag fees
total_checked_fees(Total) :-
    findall(C, (bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id), bag_cost(Id,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

% grand total (ticket + bags)
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    total_checked_fees(BagFees),
    Total is T + BagFees.

/* ----------  Query requested by the assignment ---------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Elizabeth is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from New Orleans to Houston with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 12 x 7 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 37 x 12 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 33 x 17 x 14 inches, 62 lbs; 4. A backpack: 44 x 21 x 16 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 50 x 35 x 24 inches, 83 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $216.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* --------------  Statutory rules we need for this case -------------- */

% route type for this itinerary
route(within_us).

% passenger fare class
fare_class(main_plus).

% the ticket price
flight_ticket_cost(216).

/* Main Plus gives 1 extra free checked bag (in addition to the Main-Cabin
   allowance which is otherwise 0 on domestic itineraries). */
free_checked_bags(1).

/* ---------- base checked–bag fees on a domestic itinerary ----------- */
/* Index = sequential number of the checked bag AFTER applying the
           complimentary-bag allowance                            */
bag_base_fee(1, 45).      %  “2nd” bag fee
bag_base_fee(2, 150).     %  “3rd” bag fee
bag_base_fee(N, 200) :-   %  “4th +” bag fee
    N >= 3.

/* -----------------  over-weight / over-size charges ----------------- */

% oversize fee (length+width+height = S)
oversize_fee(S, 0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S, 30)  :- S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(S, 200) :- S > 65, S =< 115.

% overweight fee (Weight = W, domestic itinerary)
overweight_fee(W, 0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)   :- W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100)  :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200)  :- W > 70, W =< 100.

% for a bag that is both oversize and overweight, only the higher fee applies
extra_fee(DimSum,Weight,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(DimSum,OFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,WFee),
    (OFee >= WFee -> Fee = OFee ; Fee = WFee).

/* ---------------------------  the bags ------------------------------ */
/* checked_bag(Index, L, W, H, Weight).  (personal item not listed) */
checked_bag(1, 37, 12, 14, 52).   % backpack
checked_bag(2, 33, 17, 14, 62).   % luggage box
checked_bag(3, 44, 21, 16, 51).   % backpack
checked_bag(4, 50, 35, 24, 83).   % backpack

/* -----------------  cost for each individual bag  ------------------ */

% sequential number of paid bag after the free-bag allowance
paid_index(BagIndex,PaidIdx) :-
    free_checked_bags(Free),
    PaidIdx is BagIndex - Free,
    PaidIdx >= 1.

% base fee for a bag (0 if within the free allowance)
bag_base_cost(BagIndex,0) :-
    free_checked_bags(Free),
    BagIndex =< Free.
bag_base_cost(BagIndex,Cost) :-
    paid_index(BagIndex,PaidIdx),
    bag_base_fee(PaidIdx,Cost).

% total charge for one bag = base fee + extra (oversize / overweight)
bag_total_cost(BagIndex,Total) :-
    checked_bag(BagIndex,L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    extra_fee(DimSum,Weight,Extra),
    bag_base_cost(BagIndex,Base),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* -----------------------  overall total  --------------------------- */

bags_total_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bag(I,_,_,_,_), bag_total_cost(I,C)), Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Sum).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket_cost(Ticket),
    bags_total_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------------------------  query  -------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Emily is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from London to Minneapolis with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 14 x 9 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 35 x 16 x 12 inches, 54 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 39 x 17 x 10 inches, 60 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 15 x 10 inches, 61 lbs; 5. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 11 inches, 51 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $495.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case ---------- */

/* ticket price */
flight_ticket(emily,495).

/* Main Plus gives Main-Cabin fares with 1 extra free checked bag         */
/* For Main Cabin on Europe↔USA routes:                                   */
/*    1st bag  $0                                                         */
/*    2nd bag $100                                                        */
/*    3rd bag $200                                                        */
/*    4th+   $200                                                        */

base_fee_nomember(1,0).          /* Europe↔USA, Main Cabin */
base_fee_nomember(2,100).
base_fee_nomember(3,200).
base_fee_nomember(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* free-bag allowance for Main Plus on this itinerary */
free_checked_bag_count(2).

/* --------------- size / weight surcharges ------------------ */

/* oversize – Europe↔USA */
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size>62, Size=<65.
oversize_fee(Size,150) :- Size>65, Size=<115.
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size=<62.

/* overweight – any route (only ranges we need) */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.

/* --------------- Emily’s bags ------------------------------ */

/* carry-on (free, ignored for checked-bag maths) */
carry_on(1,18,14,9,8).

/* checked bags: id, L, W, H, Weight */
bag(2,35,16,12,54).
bag(3,39,17,10,60).
bag(4,38,15,10,61).
bag(5,38,14,11,51).

/* --------------- helpers ----------------------------------- */
dimension_size(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* compute total surcharge (higher of overweight / oversize) */
surcharge(L,W,H,Weight,Surcharge) :-
    dimension_size(L,W,H,Size),
    oversize_fee(Size,OverSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OverWtFee),
    Surcharge is max(OverSizeFee,OverWtFee).

/* sum of all checked-bag costs */
bag_costs_sum(Sum) :-
    findall(Id, bag(Id,_,_,_,_), Unsorted),
    sort(Unsorted, IDs),                 /* ensure deterministic order  */
    free_checked_bag_count(Free),        /* free-bag allowance          */
    bag_costs(IDs,1,Free,0,Sum).

bag_costs([],_,_,Sum,Sum).
bag_costs([Id|Rest],Order,Free,Acc,Sum) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
    surcharge(L,W,H,Weight,Surcharge),
    base_fee_nomember(Order,Base0),
    ( Order =< Free -> BaseFee = 0 ; BaseFee = Base0 ),
    BagCost is BaseFee + Surcharge,
    Acc1   is Acc + BagCost,
    Order1 is Order + 1,
    bag_costs(Rest,Order1,Free,Acc1,Sum).

/* --------------- final total -------------------------------- */
ticket_fee(Fee) :- flight_ticket(emily,Fee).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_fee(Ticket),
    bag_costs_sum(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* --------------- query & print ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Michael is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Busan to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 13 x 7 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 40 x 22 x 17 inches, 71 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 36 x 17 x 11 inches, 59 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 35 x 14 x 14 inches, 56 lbs; 5. A backpack: 35 x 21 x 9 inches, 59 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $522.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules that apply to this case  ---------- */

/* Basic-Economy base fee for bags on an itinerary
   To / From India, China, Japan, South Korea, Hong Kong, Australia, New Zealand        */
base_fee(1,75).
base_fee(2,100).
base_fee(N,200) :- N>2.

/* --------  Over-WEIGHT fees (Basic Economy – To / From South Korea)  -------- */
overweight_fee(Weight,450) :- Weight > 70,    Weight =< 100.   /* 70-100 lbs  */
overweight_fee(Weight,100) :- Weight > 53,    Weight =< 70.    /* 53-70 lbs   */
overweight_fee(Weight, 30) :- Weight > 50,    Weight =< 53.    /* 50-53 lbs   */
overweight_fee(Weight,  0) :- Weight =< 50.                   /* ≤50 – none  */

/* --------  Over-SIZE fees (To / From South Korea)  -------- */
oversize_fee(DimSum,200) :- DimSum > 65, DimSum =< 115.   /* >65-115 in */
oversize_fee(DimSum, 30) :- DimSum > 62, DimSum =< 65.    /* >62-65 in  */
oversize_fee(DimSum,  0) :- DimSum =< 62.                 /* ≤62 – none */

/* If a bag is both over-size and over-weight, only the HIGHER of the two applies */
surcharge(Weight,DimSum,S) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW), oversize_fee(DimSum,OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> S = OW ; S = OS ).

/* ---------------   FACTS FOR MICHAEL’S TRIP   --------------- */

/* Flight ticket */
ticket_price(522).

/* Carry-on (free) – not listed among checked bags */

/* checked_bag(Idx, Length, Width, Height, Weight). */
checked_bag(1,40,22,17,71).
checked_bag(2,36,17,11,59).
checked_bag(3,35,14,14,56).
checked_bag(4,35,21, 9,59).

/* ---------------   COMPUTATION   --------------- */

/* Dimension sum of a bag */
dim_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* Cost of one checked bag, given it is the N-th checked bag */
bag_cost(N,Cost) :-
    checked_bag(N,L,W,H,Weight),
    dim_sum(L,W,H,DS),
    base_fee(N,BF),
    surcharge(Weight,DS,S),
    Cost is BF + S.

/* Total checked-bag cost */
checked_bags_total(Total) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bag(N,_,_,_,_), bag_cost(N,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

/* Total trip cost = ticket + bags (no other special fees apply) */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    checked_bags_total(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------------   QUERY   --------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Karen is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Phoenix to Rio de Janeiro with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 13 x 6 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 38 x 18 x 9 inches, 64 lbs; 3. A backpack: 35 x 15 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 43 x 24 x 20 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 36 x 18 x 10 inches, 52 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $563.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/*************************************************************************
  Statutory rules and facts needed for this single case
*************************************************************************/

% ------------------------------
% Passenger / flight information
% ------------------------------
flight(karen,
       phoenix,                 % origin (U.S.)
       rio_de_janeiro,          % destination (Brazil – South America,
                                %              excluding the special cases)
       basic_economy,           % service class
       563).                    % ticket price in US$

% ---------------------------------
% Checked-bag data supplied in case
% bag(Number, Length, Width, Height, Weight)
% (Carry-on / personal item is free and therefore omitted.)
% ---------------------------------
bag(1,38,18, 9,64).   % luggage box
bag(2,35,15,14,53).   % backpack
bag(3,43,24,20,53).   % backpack
bag(4,36,18,10,52).   % luggage box

/*************************************************************************
  Helper predicates
*************************************************************************/

% Sum of outside linear dimensions of a bag
dim_sum(Id,Sum) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    Sum is L + W + H.

% ----------------------------------------------------
% Overweight fee (depends on weight *only*)
% Route category : S. America ↔ U.S. / Canada / … etc.
% ----------------------------------------------------
overweight_fee(Weight,Fee) :-
         Weight =< 50 -> Fee = 0
 ; 50  < Weight, Weight =< 53 -> Fee = 30
 ; 53  < Weight, Weight =< 70 -> Fee = 100
 ; 70  < Weight, Weight =< 100-> Fee = 200
 ;                                   Fee = 999999.   % “not accepted” zone

% ----------------------------------------------------
% Oversize fee (depends on linear dimensions *only*)
% Route category : South America (except GY/SR) ↔ U.S.
% ----------------------------------------------------
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
         Size =< 62  -> Fee = 0
 ; 62  < Size, Size =< 65  -> Fee = 30
 ; 65  < Size, Size =< 115 -> Fee = 150
 ;                                   Fee = 999999.

% ----------------------------------------------------
% Extra fee for a bag: choose the HIGHER of overweight
% and oversize surcharges (rule from statute)
% ----------------------------------------------------
extra_fee(Id,Extra) :-
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W),
    dim_sum(Id,S),
    overweight_fee(W,OW),
    oversize_fee(S,OS),
    Extra is max(OW,OS).

% ----------------------------------------------------
% Basic checked-bag fee by bag sequence number for
% Basic Economy on a U.S. → South America itinerary
% ----------------------------------------------------
base_fee(1,60).
base_fee(2,100).
base_fee(3,200).
base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

% ----------------------------------------------------
% Total for each checked bag = base + extra
% ----------------------------------------------------
bag_total(Id,Total) :-
    base_fee(Id,Base),
    extra_fee(Id,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

% ----------------------------------------------------
% Sum all checked-bag fees
% ----------------------------------------------------
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(T, (between(1,4,Id), bag_total(Id,T)), List),
    sum_list(List, Total).

/*************************************************************************
  Final cost (ticket + all bag fees)
*************************************************************************/
total_cost(GrandTotal) :-
    flight(karen,_,_,_,Ticket),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    GrandTotal is Ticket + BagFees.

/*************************************************************************
  Query: print the result exactly as required
*************************************************************************/

A backpack: 38 x 16 x 11 inches, 67 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 42 x 28 x 16 inches, 64 lbs; 5. A backpack: 36 x 14 x 13 inches, 64 lbs; James's flight ticket is $430.

/* ---------- Statutory rules that apply to this case ---------- */

/* base checked-bag fee (Main Cabin, to / from India)            */
base_fee(1, 0).      /* 1st checked bag                            */
base_fee(2, 100).    /* 2nd checked bag                           */
base_fee(3, 200).    /* 3rd checked bag                           */
base_fee(4, 200).    /* 4th checked bag                           */

/* overweight fees (to / from India)                             */
overweight_fee(Weight, 450) :- Weight > 70,  Weight =< 100, !.
overweight_fee(Weight, 100) :- Weight > 53,  Weight =< 70,  !.
overweight_fee(Weight,  30) :- Weight > 50,  Weight =< 53,  !.
overweight_fee(_, 0).

/* oversize fees (to / from India)                               */
oversize_fee(DimSum, 200) :- DimSum > 65,  DimSum =< 115, !.
oversize_fee(DimSum,  30) :- DimSum > 62,  DimSum =< 65,  !.
oversize_fee(_, 0).

/* higher of overweight / oversize                               */
extra_fee(Weight, DimSum, Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight, OW),
    oversize_fee(DimSum, OS),
    (OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS).

/* ---------- Facts for James’s checked items ------------------ */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).                       */

bag(1, 41, 19, 14, 98).   /* luggage box 98 lb  41×19×14 in */
bag(2, 38, 16, 11, 67).   /* backpack     67 lb  38×16×11 in */
bag(3, 42, 28, 16, 64).   /* luggage box 64 lb  42×28×16 in */
bag(4, 36, 14, 13, 64).   /* backpack     64 lb  36×14×13 in */

/* ---------- Derived calculations ----------------------------- */

dim_sum(L, W, H, Sum) :- Sum is L + W + H.

/* cost of each checked bag, using the order 1-4 given above     */
bag_cost(Index, Cost) :-
    bag(Index, L, W, H, Weight),
    dim_sum(L, W, H, DimSum),
    base_fee(Index, Base),
    extra_fee(Weight, DimSum, Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* total of all checked bags                                     */
bags_total(Total) :-
    findall(C, bag_cost(_, C), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs, Total).

sum_list([], 0).
sum_list([H|T], S) :- sum_list(T, R), S is H + R.

/* flight ticket                                                 */
flight_ticket(430).

/* overall total                                                 */
total_cost(Total) :-
    bags_total(Bags),
    flight_ticket(Tix),
    Total is Bags + Tix.

/* ---------- Query to display the answer ---------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Emily is a Basic Economy Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Havana with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 13 x 6 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 37 x 15 x 12 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A backpack: 34 x 16 x 13 inches, 61 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $184.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/************************************************************************
*  Statutory rules and facts that are RELEVANT to Emily’s situation     *
************************************************************************/

%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  FLIGHT   %
%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% The only flight we care about for this case
origin(charlotte).
destination(havana).

% Region category needed by the bag–fee tables
% (Charlotte is in the U.S.; Havana is in Cuba.)
flight_category(us_to_cuba).           

%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% PASSENGER %
%%%%%%%%%%%%%

ticket_price(184).                      % price of the ticket in U.S. dollars
passenger_class(basic_economy).         % Emily’s booking class

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%   THE BAGS   %
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1, 21, 13,  6,  7).                 % fits as carry-on
bag(2, 37, 15, 12, 53).                 % checked bag #1
bag(3, 34, 16, 13, 61).                 % checked bag #2

/************************************************************************
*  Helper predicates                                                    *
************************************************************************/

bag_size(L, W, H, S) :- S is L+W+H.     % total outside dimensions

% Carry-on test (American Airlines limit 22×14×9 inches)
carry_on(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

% -------------------- BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES ---------------------------
% first_checked_fee(Position, FlightCategory, Class, Fee).

first_checked_fee(1, us_to_cuba, basic_economy, 35).
first_checked_fee(2, us_to_cuba, basic_economy,150).

% If ever needed, more rules could be added here for extra bags.

% -------------------- OVERWEIGHT FEES ---------------------------------
% overweight_fee(Weight, FlightCategory, Class, Fee).
% ‑- up to 53 lbs (strictly >50, ≤53) – flat $30, any region / class
overweight_fee(W, _, _, 30) :- W>50, W=<53.

% ‑- 53-70 lbs for flights to / from Cuba
overweight_fee(W, us_to_cuba, basic_economy, 200) :- W>53, W=<70.

% (Heavier categories are irrelevant to this case.)

% No fee if within 50 lbs
overweight_fee(W, _, _, 0) :- W =< 50.

% -------------------- OVERSIZE FEES -----------------------------------
% oversize_fee(Size, FlightCategory, Fee).
% 62-65 in to / from the Caribbean (Cuba is Caribbean) – $30
oversize_fee(S, us_to_cuba, 30) :- S>62, S=<65.

% No fee if ≤62 in
oversize_fee(S, _, 0) :- S =< 62.

% -------------------- EXTRA FEE PER BAG -------------------------------
% Per American’s rule: “The HIGHER fee between oversize and overweight
% applies, in addition to the checked-bag fee.”
extra_fee(ID, Fee) :-
    passenger_class(Class),
    flight_category(FC),
    bag(ID, L, W, H, Wt),
    bag_size(L,W,H,Size),
    overweight_fee(Wt, FC, Class, OW),
    oversize_fee(Size, FC, OS),
    Fee is max(OW,OS).

% -------------------- POSITION OF EACH CHECKED BAG --------------------
% collect bags that are NOT carry-ons and keep their original order
checked_bags(List) :-
    findall(ID, (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(ID)), List).

% position_in_queue(BagID, Position).
position_in_queue(ID, Pos) :-
    checked_bags(L),
    nth1(Pos, L, ID).

% -------------------- TOTAL FOR ONE CHECKED BAG -----------------------
bag_total_cost(ID, Cost) :-
    position_in_queue(ID, Pos),
    passenger_class(Class),
    flight_category(FC),
    first_checked_fee(Pos, FC, Class, BaseFee),
    extra_fee(ID, Extra),
    Cost is BaseFee + Extra.

% -------------------- TOTAL BAGGAGE COST ------------------------------
total_baggage_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bags(L), member(ID,L), bag_total_cost(ID,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs, Total).

/************************************************************************
*  FINAL TOTAL COST (ticket + bags)                                     *
************************************************************************/

total_cost(GrandTotal) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_baggage_cost(Bags),
    GrandTotal is Tix + Bags.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 48 x 33 x 24 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 38 x 16 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 51 x 29 x 23 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 36 x 18 x 10 inches, 58 lbs; Linda's flight ticket is $262.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  RULES (Statutes excerpt) ------------- */

/*  Base checked-bag fee for a Main Cabin customer on a wholly
    domestic (U.S. – U.S.) itinerary                       */
bag_base_fee(1,40).   /* 1st checked bag  */
bag_base_fee(2,45).   /* 2nd checked bag  */
bag_base_fee(3,150).  /* 3rd checked bag  */
bag_base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.   /* 4th bag and beyond        */

/*  Oversize fee (domestic)                                 */
oversize_fee(DimSum,30)  :- DimSum > 62,  DimSum =< 65.
oversize_fee(DimSum,200) :- DimSum > 65,  DimSum =< 115.
oversize_fee(DimSum,0)   :- DimSum =< 62.      /* not oversize */

/*  Over-weight fee (domestic)                              */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.   /* 50–53 lb  */
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.   /* 53–70 lb  */
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W =< 50.            /* not overweight */

/*  For bags that are both oversize and overweight,
    the higher of the 2 surcharges applies                 */
special_fee(DimSum,W,F) :-
    oversize_fee(DimSum,OF),
    overweight_fee(W,WF),
    (OF >= WF -> F = OF ; F = WF).

/* -------------  FACTS (Linda’s situation) ------------- */

ticket_price(262).

/* item(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  All sizes in inches,
   weight in pounds                                           */
item(1,18,11,9,  7).
item(2,48,33,24,53).
item(3,38,16,10,53).
item(4,51,29,23,51).
item(5,36,18,10,58).

/* carry-on definition (max 22×14×9 in.) */
carry_on(ID) :-
    item(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* Exactly 1 free carry-on permitted; choose the one that qualifies
   with the smallest ID (any qualifying bag would do for this case) */
chosen_carry_on(ID) :-
    setof(I,carry_on(I),[ID|_]).

/* Checked bags = all items except the chosen carry-on             */
checked_bag(ID) :-
    item(ID,_,_,_,_),
    chosen_carry_on(C),
    ID \= C.

/* Give each checked bag its sequence number (1st, 2nd …)          */
checked_bag_index(ID,Idx) :-
    findall(I,checked_bag(I),List),
    nth1(Idx,List,ID).

/* Cost of an individual checked bag                               */
bag_cost(ID,Cost) :-
    checked_bag_index(ID,Idx),
    bag_base_fee(Idx,Base),
    item(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    special_fee(DimSum,Weight,Spec),
    Cost is Base + Spec.

/* Sum of all checked-bag costs                                    */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(C,(bag_cost(_,C)),List),
    sum_list(List,Total).

/* Full trip cost (ticket + bags)                                  */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Tix + BagFees.

/* -------------  QUERY / OUTPUT ------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: John is a Business Class passenger flying from Las Vegas to Amsterdam with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 13 x 6 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 36 x 18 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 43 x 31 x 21 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 47 x 23 x 23 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 37 x 14 x 12 inches, 57 lbs; John's flight ticket is $589.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1349"]).
/* ===================================================================
   John – Las Vegas (U.S.)  →  Amsterdam (Europe)
   Cabin: Business
   Goal : compute grand-total (ticket + all luggage charges)
   =================================================================== */

:- use_module(library(lists)).

/* ----------  Ticket  ---------- */
flight_cost(589).

/* ----------  Items brought  --------------------------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).  (dimensions in inches, weight in lbs) */
bag(1,18,13, 6,  7).   /* fits carry-on limits → free                     */
bag(2,36,18, 9, 53).
bag(3,43,31,21, 52).
bag(4,47,23,23, 51).
bag(5,37,14,12, 57).

/* ----------  Carry-on rules --------------------------------------- */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).

carry_on(Id) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
        carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
        L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

/* ----------  Helper: list of checked bags ------------------------- */
checked_bag_ids(List) :-
        findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)),List).
/* For John: List = [2,3,4,5]                                         */

/* ----------  Geometry & Weight helpers ---------------------------- */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ----------  Oversize fees (U.S. ↔ Europe) ------------------------ */
/* 62 in or less  → $0
   62–65 in       → $30
   65–115 in      → $150                                              */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 150).

/* ----------  Overweight fees (U.S. ↔ Europe) ---------------------- */
/* ‘Thresh’ is the free allowance (70 lb for complimentary bags,
                                    50 lb for charged bags)          */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (  W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ;  W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ;  W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;               fail                 /* >70 lb not accepted  */
        ).

/* ----------  Penalty = higher of oversize / overweight ------------ */
penalty(Id,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(Id,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fees for Business (U.S.–Europe) ----- */
/* 1st & 2nd bag free, 3rd bag $200, 4th+ $200                        */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,200).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----------  Choose which 2 bags receive the complimentary spots -- */
choose_two(List,B1,B2) :-
        append(_, [B1|Tail], List),
        member(B2, Tail).

ordered_list(B1,B2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(B1,All,R1),
        select(B2,R1,R2),
        Ordered = [B1,B2|R2].   /* freebies occupy positions 1 & 2 */

/* ----------  Cost for a particular choice of freebies ------------- */
cost_for_choice(B1,B2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(B1,B2,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Ticket),
        Total is Ticket + CostBags + Penalties.

/* Walk through list, accumulating base fees and penalties            */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
        penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
        Next is Idx + 1,
        cost_bags(Bs,Next,CostRest,PenRest),
        CostSum is BaseFee + CostRest,
        PenSum  is Pen      + PenRest.

/* ----------  Compute minimal total over all choices --------------- */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),
        findall(T, (choose_two(L,B1,B2),
                    cost_for_choice(B1,B2,T)),
                Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------  Query & output --------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

/* route of the itinerary */

carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

/* ----------  BAG BASE-FEE (1st,2nd,3rd,4th…) FOR EUROPE→US, FIRST CLASS ---------- */
/* 1st-3rd checked bags – free */
base_bag_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    service_class(first_class),
    route(europe_us),
    Index >= 1, Index =< 3,                      % 1st-3rd
    Fee is 0.

/* 4th bag and every bag thereafter – $200 */
base_bag_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    service_class(first_class),
    route(europe_us),
    Index >= 4,                                  % 4th +
    Fee is 200.

/* ----------  OVERSIZE  (sum of dimensions in inches) ---------- */
oversize_fee(SumDim, Fee) :-
    SumDim =< 62,                                % not oversize
    Fee is 0.
oversize_fee(SumDim, Fee) :-
    SumDim > 62, SumDim =< 65,                   % 62–65 in
    Fee is 30.
oversize_fee(SumDim, Fee) :-
    SumDim > 65, SumDim =< 115,                  % 65–115 in
    Fee is 150.

/* ----------  OVERWEIGHT (weight in lbs) ---------- */
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight =< 50,                                % ≤50 lbs – no fee
    Fee is 0.
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight > 50, Weight =< 53,                   % 51–53 lbs
    Fee is 30.
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight > 53, Weight =< 70,                   % 54–70 lbs
    Fee is 100.

/* ----------  BAG COST (checked) ---------- */
bag_cost(Index, L,W,H,Weight, Cost) :-
    SumDim is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(SumDim, OverSize),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OverWeight),
    (OverSize >= OverWeight -> SpecFee = OverSize ; SpecFee = OverWeight),
    base_bag_fee(Index, BaseFee),
    Cost is BaseFee + SpecFee.

/* ----------  BAG LIST (facts from the case) ---------- */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(b1, 21, 13,  8, 10).   % backpack – carry-on
bag(b2, 45, 30, 20, 51).   % backpack – checked
bag(b3, 38, 12, 14, 51).   % luggage box – checked
bag(b4, 38, 11, 14, 53).   % backpack – checked
bag(b5, 38, 24, 16, 66).   % luggage box – checked

/* ----------  CARRY-ON? ---------- */
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(LC,WC,HC),
    L =< LC, W =< WC, H =< HC.

/* ----------  COLLECT CHECKED BAGS WITH POSITION NUMBER ---------- */
checked_bag_with_index(Index, Id, L,W,H,Weight) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), BagList),
    nth1(Index, BagList, Id),
    bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight).

/* ----------  TOTAL BAG FEES ---------- */
total_checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(Cost,
        (checked_bag_with_index(I, _Id, L,W,H,Weight),
         bag_cost(I,L,W,H,Weight,Cost)),
        Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

/* ----------  TOTAL COST (ticket + bags) ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_checked_bags_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* -------------  QUERY ------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).

/* --------------------- oversize fee (within U.S.) ------------------ */
oversize_fee(BagID,Fee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H,
    (   S =< 62               -> Fee = 0
    ;   S =< 65               -> Fee = 30
    ;   S =< 115              -> Fee = 200
    ;   /* bigger than 115 – not accepted, but not the case here */   Fee = 0).

/* ------------------- overweight fee (within U.S.) ------------------ */
overweight_fee(BagID,Fee) :-
    bag(BagID,_,_,_,Wt),
    (   Wt =< 50              -> Fee = 0
    ;   Wt =< 53              -> Fee = 30
    ;   Wt =< 70              -> Fee = 100
    ;   Wt =< 100             -> Fee = 200
    ;   /* >100 – not accepted, not the case here */                  Fee = 0).

/* --------------- penalty fee: higher of over-size / weight --------- */
penalty_fee(BagID,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(BagID,F1),
    overweight_fee(BagID,F2),
    (F1>=F2 -> Fee=F1 ; Fee=F2).

/* --------------- item facts for Joseph ----------------------------- */

% bag(Number,Length,Width,Height,Weight).
bag(1,18,14,7,11).      % personal item – will be free
bag(2,39,22,18,98).
bag(3,38,15,11,63).
bag(4,45,28,23,95).
bag(5,35,18,12,80).

/* -------------------- what is a personal item ---------------------- */
personal_item(BagID) :-
    personal_limit(PL,PW,PH),
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< PL, W =< PW, H =< PH.

checked_bag(BagID) :-
    bag(BagID,_,_,_,_),
    \+ personal_item(BagID).

/* ---------------- cost of every checked bag ------------------------ */
checked_bag_cost(Pos,BagID,Cost) :-
    base_fee(Pos,Base),
    penalty_fee(BagID,Pen),
    Cost is Base + Pen.

/* ---------------- total cost of all checked bags ------------------- */
total_checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(BagID,checked_bag(BagID),BagIDs),
    assign_positions(BagIDs,1,Total).

assign_positions([],_,0).
assign_positions([BagID|Rest],Pos,Total) :-
    checked_bag_cost(Pos,BagID,C),
    Pos1 is Pos+1,
    assign_positions(Rest,Pos1,RestCost),
    Total is C + RestCost.

/* ----------------------- grand total ------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    total_checked_bags_cost(BagCost),
    Total is T + BagCost.

/* --------------------- helper: run the query ----------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Daniel is a First Class passenger flying from Atlanta to Chicago with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 12 x 6 inches, 11 lbs; 2. A backpack: 40 x 17 x 15 inches, 73 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 45 x 21 x 22 inches, 84 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 44 x 26 x 23 inches, 81 lbs; 5. A backpack: 39 x 21 x 16 inches, 83 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 40 x 18 x 16 inches, 68 lbs; 7. A backpack: 38 x 22 x 14 inches, 63 lbs; 8. A backpack: 37 x 20 x 18 inches, 53 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $245.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* --------------  RULES FROM THE STATUTES (subset covering this case) -------------- */

/* Carry-on: Daniel uses bag #1, everything else is checked */
carry_on(1).

/* Facts for each piece (length, width, height, weight in lbs) */
bag(1,19,12, 6,11).     /* carry-on */
bag(2,40,17,15,73).
bag(3,45,21,22,84).
bag(4,44,26,23,81).
bag(5,39,21,16,83).
bag(6,40,18,16,68).
bag(7,38,22,14,63).
bag(8,37,20,18,53).

/* A bag is checked if it is not the declared carry-on */
checked_bag(Id) :- bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id).

/* --------- size / weight derived values ---------- */
size_sum(Id,Sum)  :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), Sum is L+W+H.
weight(Id,Wt)     :- bag(Id,_,_,_,Wt).

/* -------- oversize fees (within U.S.) ------------ */
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size >  65, !.
oversize_fee(Size, 30) :- Size >  62, Size =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(_,0).

/* -------- overweight fees (within U.S.) ---------- */
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W  > 70, !.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(W, 30) :- W  > 50, W =< 53, !.
overweight_fee(_,0).

/* The higher of the two fees applies */
extra_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    size_sum(Id,S), oversize_fee(S,F1),
    weight(Id,W),   overweight_fee(W,F2),
    (F1 >= F2 -> Fee = F1 ; Fee = F2).

/* ---------- base checked-bag fees for First Class, domestic ---------- */
/* 1st & 2nd free, 3rd = $150, 4th+ = $200 */
base_fee(Pos,0)   :- Pos < 3, !.
base_fee(3,150)   :- !.
base_fee(Pos,200) :- Pos > 3.

/* ---------- total cost for every checked bag ------------------------- */
bag_cost(Id,Cost) :-
    checked_bags_list(List),
    nth1(Pos,List,Id),
    base_fee(Pos,Base),
    extra_fee(Id,Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* list of checked bags in id order (2 .. 8) */
checked_bags_list(List) :-
    findall(I,checked_bag(I),List).

/* sum helper */
sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],S) :- sum_list(T,S1), S is H+S1.

/* --------------   OVERALL TOTAL ------------------ */
total_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C,bag_cost(_,C),BagCosts),
    sum_list(BagCosts,BagsTotal),
    Ticket = 245,
    Total is Ticket + BagsTotal.

/* ------------------- QUERY ----------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```
