A backpack: 36 x 20 x 9 inches, 70 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 15 x 16 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 33 x 22 x 10 inches, 52 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 38 x 14 x 12 inches, 57 lbs; 7. A backpack: 33 x 17 x 14 inches, 69 lbs; 8. A backpack: 44 x 30 x 19 inches, 91 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $1249.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 3539"]).
/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
/*  Facts describing Daniel’s itinerary and his checked bags  */
/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */

flight_cost(1249).                    /* ticket price – USD */

/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight in pounds)           */
bag(2,45,28,19,75).
bag(3,36,20, 9,70).
bag(4,38,15,16,52).
bag(5,33,22,10,52).
bag(6,38,14,12,57).
bag(7,33,17,14,69).
bag(8,44,30,19,91).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on bag #1 is excluded)  */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
/*  Statutory rules that apply to a Business-class itinerary  */
/*  between China and the United States                       */
/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */

/* sum of the three outside dimensions                        */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – China / Japan / Korea / HK / India / Aus / NZ */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees                                            */
/*  – complimentary bags ⇒ 70-lb threshold                    */
/*  – charged bags        ⇒ 50-lb threshold                    */
/*  – special band 70–100 lbs on this route costs $450        */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 450 ).

/* penalty for a particular bag: higher of oversize vs overweight */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),          % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),          % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag fees for Business class on this route          */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 3.                     % 3rd & each additional

/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
/*  Helper predicates                                          */
/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */

/* select two different elements (F1 < F2) from a list        */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* put the two free bags in positions 1 and 2, retain order   */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].                 % freebies first

/* accumulate costs for a specific ordering                   */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* total cost for a particular choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + CostBags + Penalties.

/* compute the minimal total cost over all ways of picking the 2 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
/*  Run the query and print the result                        */
/* ---------------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A backpack: 37 x 14 x 12 inches, 78 lbs; 8. A backpack: 45 x 25 x 23 inches, 62 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $572.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case  ---------- */

/*  Oversize fees for itineraries to / from South Korea (same as the
    “China-/Japan-/Korea-/India-/Hong-Kong / Australia / New-Zealand”
    column in the statute)                                            */

oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-
    Size  =< 62,                     % standard size
    Fee = 0.

oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-
    Size  > 62,
    Size =< 65,                      % 62–65 in
    Fee = 30.

oversize_fee(Size, Fee) :-
    Size  > 65,                      % 65–115 in
    Fee = 200.

/*  Over-weight fees for itineraries to / from South Korea            */

overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight =< 50,                    % standard weight
    Fee = 0.

overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight  > 50,
    Weight =< 53,                    % 50–53 lb
    Fee = 30.

overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    Weight  > 53,
    Weight =< 70,                    % 53–70 lb
    Fee = 100.

overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-       % 70–100 lb
    Weight  > 70,
    Weight =< 100,
    Fee = 450.

/*  Extra charge for a bag that is either oversize, overweight, or both.
    Statute: “The higher fee between oversize and overweight applies.”   */

bag_extra_fee(Weight, Size, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, O),
    overweight_fee(Weight, W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

/*  Base checked-bag fee for Main Plus on this route

    – First 2 checked bags are free (Main Cabin 1st is free on this
      route, Main Plus adds 1 extra free bag).
    – Bags 3 + cost $200 each (statute tables, “To / from … South Korea”)
*/

base_bag_fee(BagNo, Fee) :- BagNo =< 2, Fee = 0.         % bag 1 & 2
base_bag_fee(BagNo, Fee) :- BagNo >= 3, Fee = 200.       % bag 3+

/*  Total fee for one bag = base fee + extra (oversize / overweight) */

bag_total_fee(BagNo, Weight, Size, TotalFee) :-
    base_bag_fee(BagNo, Base),
    bag_extra_fee(Weight, Size, Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.


/* ----------  Facts for Emily’s trip  ---------- */

flight_ticket(572).                 % price of the ticket in USD

/*  Checked bags (carry-on is free and therefore omitted)              */
/*  Format: bag(Index, Weight, Length, Width, Height).                 */

bag(1, 65, 34, 21,  9).             % item 2 in the description
bag(2, 67, 33, 21, 11).             % item 3
bag(3, 65, 34, 21, 13).             % item 4
bag(4, 53, 38, 17,  9).             % item 5
bag(5, 53, 35, 17, 12).             % item 6
bag(6, 78, 37, 14, 12).             % item 7
bag(7, 62, 45, 25, 23).             % item 8


/* ----------  Aggregate computation  ---------- */

bags_total_fee(Total) :-
    findall(Fee,
        ( bag(N,W,L,Wi,H),
          Size is L + Wi + H,
          bag_total_fee(N,W,Size,Fee)
        ),
        Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    bags_total_fee(BagFees),
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.


/* ----------  Query & printing  ---------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: David is a First Class passenger flying from Minneapolis to Orlando with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 12 x 7 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 48 x 35 x 26 inches, 86 lbs; 3. A backpack: 46 x 23 x 18 inches, 68 lbs; 4. A backpack: 35 x 17 x 13 inches, 62 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 36 x 17 x 10 inches, 75 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 34 x 16 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 7. A backpack: 47 x 31 x 23 inches, 59 lbs; 8. A backpack: 51 x 25 x 26 inches, 79 lbs; David's flight ticket is $197.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  Statutory rules that apply to this case --------------- */

/* ticket price ----------------------------------------------------------- */
ticket_price(197).

/* route type – Minneapolis → Orlando is wholly within the U.S. ----------- */
route(within_us).

/* passenger class -------------------------------------------------------- */
class(first).

/* complimentary-bag allowance for a Domestic First customer -------------- */
complimentary_checked_bags(2).          /* first 2 checked bags are free   */
complimentary_weight_limit(70).         /* up to 70 lbs for free bags       */

/* checked-bag fees (after the 2 free ones) for a domestic itinerary ------ */
checked_bag_fee(3,150).                /* 3rd bag                          */
checked_bag_fee(Number,200) :-         /* 4th bag and higher               */
    Number  > 3.

/* oversize fees within the U.S. ----------------------------------------- */
oversize_fee(Dim,0)   :- Dim =< 62.
oversize_fee(Dim,30)  :- Dim > 62, Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim > 65, Dim =< 115.

/* domestic overweight fees ---------------------------------------------- */
/* Note: limit is 70 lbs for complimentary bags, 50 lbs for charged bags   */

overweight_fee(free,   W,0)   :- W =< 70.
overweight_fee(free,   W,200) :- W > 70,  W =< 100.

overweight_fee(charged,W,0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(charged,W,30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(charged,W,100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(charged,W,200) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* when a bag is both oversize and overweight, only the higher fee counts  */
bag_special_fee(Status,Dim,W,F) :-
    oversize_fee(Dim,OS),
    overweight_fee(Status,W,OW),
    (OS >= OW -> F = OS ; F = OW).

/* -----------------------  Facts of the concrete case  ------------------ */

% bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(2,48,35,26,86).
bag(3,46,23,18,68).
bag(4,35,17,13,62).
bag(5,36,17,10,75).
bag(6,34,16,13,51).
bag(7,47,31,23,59).
bag(8,51,25,26,79).

/* one backpack 22x12x7 (8 lbs) is the free carry-on – no fact required   */

/* ----------------------  Auxiliary predicates -------------------------- */

dimension_sum(Id,Sum) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    Sum is L+W+H.

weight(Id,W) :-
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W).

/* list of all checked-bag IDs */
bag_ids(Ids) :- findall(Id, bag(Id,_,_,_,_), Ids).

/* choose any 2 distinct elements from a list (order-independent) */
choose_two(List,A,B) :-
    append(_, [A|Rest], List),
    member(B, Rest).

/* count members in a list ------------------------------------------------ */
count(List,N) :- length(List,N).

/* compute all fees for a concrete choice of the 2 complimentary bags ----- */
fees_for_choice(FreeIDs, TotalSpecial, CheckedBagFee) :-
    % split bags into free vs charged
    bag_ids(All), subtract(All,FreeIDs,ChargedIDs),

    % ---------- special (oversize / overweight) fees --------------------
    % free bags
    findall(F,
        (member(Id,FreeIDs),
         dimension_sum(Id,Dim),
         weight(Id,W),
         bag_special_fee(free,Dim,W,F)),
        FreeFees),
    % charged bags
    findall(F,
        (member(Id,ChargedIDs),
         dimension_sum(Id,Dim),
         weight(Id,W),
         bag_special_fee(charged,Dim,W,F)),
        ChargedFees),
    append(FreeFees,ChargedFees,AllFees),
    sum_list(AllFees,TotalSpecial),

    % ---------- checked-bag fees (based only on how many are charged) ----
    count(ChargedIDs,NCharged),
    ( NCharged =:= 0 ->
        CheckedBagFee = 0
    ;   checked_bag_fee(3,ThirdFee),        % always one “third” bag
        Remaining is NCharged - 1,
        CheckedBagFee is ThirdFee + Remaining*200
    ).

/* compute total trip cost for a particular free-bag choice -------------- */
total_for_choice(FreeIDs,TotalCost) :-
    fees_for_choice(FreeIDs,Special,BagFees),
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    TotalCost is Ticket + Special + BagFees.

/* ---------------------------  Main goal -------------------------------- */

total_cost(MinTotal) :-
    bag_ids(Ids),
    % pick every possible pair of complimentary bags
    setof(Total,
          A^B^FreeIDs^(
              choose_two(Ids,A,B),
              FreeIDs = [A,B],
              total_for_choice(FreeIDs,Total)
          ),
          Totals),
    min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ---------------------------  Output ----------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  STATUTORY RULES (excerpt) ------------- */

/* free checked-bag entitlement for Main Plus on Europe ↔ U.S. flights   */
/* Main Cabin allowance = 1 free bag; Main Plus gives 1 extra free bag   */
free_checked_bags(main_plus, europe_us, 2).

/* base checked-bag fee (Europe ↔ U.S., Main Cabin / Main Plus)          */
base_checked_fee(BagIndex, Fee) :-
    BagIndex =< 2,                     % 1st & 2nd bag are free
    Fee  is 0.
base_checked_fee(BagIndex, Fee) :-
    BagIndex  > 2,                     % 3rd bag and beyond
    Fee is 200.

/* ---------------- SURCHARGE RULES -------------------- */

/* oversize surcharge (Europe ↔ U.S.) */
oversize_surcharge(DimSum, Fee) :-
    DimSum > 65, DimSum =< 115, Fee is 150.
oversize_surcharge(DimSum, Fee) :-
    DimSum > 62, DimSum =< 65,  Fee is 30.
oversize_surcharge(DimSum, Fee) :-
    DimSum =< 62,                     Fee is 0.

/* overweight surcharge (Europe ↔ U.S.) */
overweight_surcharge(W, Fee) :-
    W > 53,  W =< 70, Fee is 100.
overweight_surcharge(W, Fee) :-
    W > 50,  W =< 53, Fee is 30.
overweight_surcharge(W, Fee) :-
    W =< 50,           Fee is 0.

/* final surcharge for a bag = higher of the two */
bag_surcharge(DimSum, W, Fee) :-
    oversize_surcharge(DimSum, OS),
    overweight_surcharge(W,  OW),
    Fee is max(OS, OW).

/* ---------------  CASE FACTS  ------------------------ */

/* flight information */
route(europe_us).              % Athens → Charlotte
passenger_class(main_plus).
ticket_price(333).

/* carry-on (does not incur checked-bag computation) */
carry_on(1,19,14,9,10).

/* checked bags: id, L, W, H, Weight */
checked_bag(1,48,30,20,60).
checked_bag(2,37,13,14,53).
checked_bag(3,38,16,10,70).
checked_bag(4,43,28,24,65).
checked_bag(5,33,21,11,53).
checked_bag(6,39,25,19,55).
checked_bag(7,39,26,15,53).

/* ---------------  COMPUTATIONS  ---------------------- */

bag_total_fee(BagIndex, Fee) :-
    checked_bag(BagIndex, L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    bag_surcharge(DimSum, Weight, Surcharge),
    base_checked_fee(BagIndex, BaseFee),
    Fee is BaseFee + Surcharge.

all_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(F, (checked_bag(I,_,_,_,_), bag_total_fee(I,F)), List),
    sum_list(List, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    all_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is T + BagFees.

/* ---------------  QUERY  ----------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 38 x 12 x 14 inches, 97 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 42 x 24 x 16 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 49 x 35 x 27 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 33 x 22 x 10 inches, 74 lbs; 6. A backpack: 41 x 19 x 13 inches, 71 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 37 x 15 x 11 inches, 68 lbs; 8. A backpack: 51 x 32 x 31 inches, 51 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $54.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Facts about Karen’s journey ---------- */

/* flight ticket price */
ticket_price(54).

/* passenger class */
class(premium_economy).

/* every carried item: bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight). */
bag(1, 18, 12,  9,  7).    /* small backpack – will be carry-on          */
bag(2, 38, 12, 14, 97).
bag(3, 42, 24, 16, 53).
bag(4, 49, 35, 27, 53).
bag(5, 33, 22, 10, 74).
bag(6, 41, 19, 13, 71).
bag(7, 37, 15, 11, 68).
bag(8, 51, 32, 31, 51).

/* route – needed for fee tables (U.S. <--> Haiti = Caribbean)             */
route(us, haiti).

/* --------------  General helper rules  -------------- */

/* linear size of any bag */
linear_size(ID, S) :- bag(ID,L,W,H,_), S is L+W+H.

/* Karen may take 1 carry-on that does not exceed 22×14×9 in               */
is_carry_on(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* what is checked (everything that isn’t the single carry-on)             */
is_checked(ID) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ once((is_carry_on(ID))).

/* list of checked bags in ascending ID order                              */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID, is_checked(ID), L0),
    sort(L0,List).

/* position of a checked bag (1st, 2nd, 3rd …)                             */
checked_position(ID,Pos) :-
    checked_bag_list(L), nth1(Pos,L,ID).

/* ---------------  Base checked-bag fees  --------------- */
/* Premium Economy on this route gets 1st & 2nd bag free; all others $200  */
base_fee(ID,0)  :- checked_position(ID,Pos), Pos =< 2, !.
base_fee(ID,200):- checked_position(ID,Pos), Pos  > 2.

/* ---------------  Over-WEIGHT fee for this route  --------------- */
overweight_fee(Weight,Fee) :-
       Weight =< 50 -> Fee = 0
  ;    Weight =< 53 -> Fee = 30                /* 50–53 lbs  */
  ;    Weight =< 70 -> Fee = 100               /* >53–70 lbs */
  ;    Weight =<100 -> Fee = 200               /* >70–100 lbs*/
  ;    Fee = 0.                                /* (>100 not accepted – none here) */

/* ---------------  Over-SIZE fee for this route  --------------- */
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
       Size =< 62  -> Fee = 0
  ;    Size =< 65  -> Fee = 30                 /* 62–65 in   */
  ;    Size =<115  -> Fee = 200                /* >65–115 in */
  ;    Fee = 0.                                /* (>115 not accepted – none here) */

/* ---------------  Extra fee (max of overweight / oversize)  --------------- */
extra_fee(ID,Fee) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W),
    overweight_fee(W,OWF),
    linear_size(ID,S),
    oversize_fee(S,OSF),
    Fee is max(OWF,OSF).

/* ---------------  Total fee per checked bag  --------------- */
bag_total_fee(ID,Total) :-
    base_fee(ID,BF),
    extra_fee(ID,EF),
    Total is BF + EF.

/* ---------------  Sum of all checked-bag fees  --------------- */
all_bags_total(Sum) :-
    findall(F, (is_checked(ID), bag_total_fee(ID,F)), List),
    sum_list(List,Sum).

/* ---------------  Grand total (ticket + bags)  --------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(P),
    all_bags_total(Bags),
    Total is P + Bags.

/* ----------------------  Final query  ---------------------- */
:- total_cost(T), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[T]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 46 x 29 x 27 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 20 x 13 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 40 x 23 x 20 inches, 62 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 12 inches, 63 lbs; 7. A backpack: 53 x 34 x 27 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 46 x 30 x 25 inches, 65 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $1055.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 3115"]).
/* ==========================================================
   Susan – Chicago (U.S.)  --->  Hong Kong
   Business Class
   ========================================================== */

/* -------- Ticket price ----------------------------------- */
flight_cost(1055).


/* -------- Baggage description ---------------------------- */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight) –– all dimensions in inches, weight in lbs */
bag(2,37,15,12,66).
bag(3,46,29,27,51).
bag(4,38,20,13,53).
bag(5,40,23,20,62).
bag(6,33,20,12,63).
bag(7,53,34,27,53).
bag(8,46,30,25,65).


/* list of ALL checked-bag Ids (carry-on #1 is omitted)      */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ==========================================================
   Statutory rules applicable to this itinerary
   ========================================================== */

/* ---- Utilities ------------------------------------------ */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ---- Over-SIZE fees  (China / Hong Kong routes) ---------- */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* ---- Over-WEIGHT fees ----------------------------------- */
/* Threshold is 70 lbs for COMPLIMENTARY bags, 50 lbs for CHARGED bags */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (  W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
        ;  W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
        ;  W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
        ;  W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* ---- Penalty  (max of oversize vs overweight) ----------- */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),        % complimentary → 70-lb limit
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),        % charged bag → 50-lb limit
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ---- Base checked-bag fee  (Business class, US↔Hong Kong) */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.                     % 3rd bag and every bag after

/* ==========================================================
   Cost engine
   ========================================================== */

/* choose two different elements (Free1<Free2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
        append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
        member(F2,Tail).

/* re-order list so the 2 freebies occupy positions #1 and #2 */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,R1),
        select(F2,R1,Remainder),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|Remainder].

/* compute cost for one specific choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
choice_cost(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
        bags_cost(Ordered,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Tix),
        Total is Tix + BaseFees + Penalties.

/* walk through bags accumulating base fees + penalties      */
bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Bs],Idx,BaseSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
        penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
        Next is Idx+1,
        bags_cost(Bs,Next,BaseRest,PenRest),
        BaseSum is Fee + BaseRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* overall minimum total across all ways of selecting freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),
        findall(T, (choose_two(L,B1,B2), choice_cost(B1,B2,T)), Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ==========================================================
   Query & output
   ========================================================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A backpack: 40 x 19 x 15 inches, 69 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 43 x 20 x 20 inches, 51 lbs; Mary's flight ticket is $340.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ------------  FACTS  ------------ */
% price of the ticket
ticket_price(340).

% cabin and itinerary (Portland, U.S.  ->  Nagoya, Japan)
cabin(main_cabin).
route(portland, nagoya).                  % U.S.  to / from Japan

% Mary’s pieces (No, Length, Width, Height, Weight)
bag(1,21,13, 6,  9).      % will be carry-on
bag(2,37,18, 9, 83).
bag(3,38,18,12, 64).
bag(4,36,18,16, 55).
bag(5,50,34,23, 70).
bag(6,47,33,22, 57).
bag(7,40,19,15, 69).
bag(8,43,20,20, 51).

/* ------------  RULES  ------------ */
% carry-on (fits 22×14×9)
carryon(N) :- bag(N,L,W,H,_), L=<22, W=<14, H=<9.

% list of checked bags in the order of their bag numbers
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(N, (bag(N,_,_,_,_), \+ carryon(N)), List).

/* Base checked-bag fee for U.S.<->Japan, Main Cabin         */
base_bag_fee(1,0).
base_bag_fee(2,100).
base_bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.

/* Oversize fee : U.S.<->Japan                               */
oversize_fee(Size,0 ) :- Size=<62.
oversize_fee(Size,30) :- Size>62, Size=<65.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size>65, Size=<115.

/* Over-weight fee : U.S.<->Japan                            */
overweight_fee(W, 0  ) :- W=<50.
overweight_fee(W, 30 ) :- W>50, W=<53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W>53, W=<70.
overweight_fee(W, 450) :- W>70, W=<100.

/* Extra fee for an individual bag                           */
bag_extra_fee(N,Extra) :-
    bag(N,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size  is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(Size,SizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,WeightFee),
    Extra is max(SizeFee,WeightFee).

/* Total fee for a particular checked bag (base+extra)       */
bag_total_fee(Index, BagNo, Fee) :-
    base_bag_fee(Index,Base),
    bag_extra_fee(BagNo,Extra),
    Fee is Base+Extra.

/* Sum of all checked-bag fees                               */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    findall(F,
            (nth1(Index,List,BagNo),
             bag_total_fee(Index,BagNo,F)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Total).

/* ----------------  FINAL ANSWER  -------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- Facts describing the passenger, flight and bags ---------- */

% flight(origin, destination, cabin_class, ticket_price).
flight(orlando, port_au_prince, premium_economy, 59).

% Checked bag order (the first 2 bags are the “free-allowance” bags)
checked_bag_order([bag3, bag4, bag2, bag5, bag6, bag7, bag8]).

% bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(bag1, 18, 12,  9,  7).      % carry-on – will not be checked
bag(bag2, 37, 19,  9, 51).
bag(bag3, 37, 14, 13, 100).
bag(bag4, 45, 22, 17, 51).
bag(bag5, 37, 16, 10, 51).
bag(bag6, 33, 17, 13, 78).
bag(bag7, 34, 21,  9, 51).
bag(bag8, 35, 16, 12, 53).

/* ---------- Helpers ---------- */

dimensions_sum(Id, Sum) :-
    bag(Id, L, W, H, _),
    Sum is L + W + H.

weight(Id, W) :-
    bag(Id, _, _, _, W).

/* ---------- Base checked-bag fees for Premium Economy on a U.S. ↔ Haiti flight ---------- */
/* 1st & 2nd bags free, every bag from the 3rd onward costs $200           */

base_checked_fee(Position, 0)  :- Position =< 2.      % first 2 bags free
base_checked_fee(Position,200) :- Position  > 2.      % 3rd+ = $200

/* ---------- Oversize fee (Caribbean route) ---------- */
/* Over 62"–65": $30 ; 65"–115": $200 ; ≤62": $0        */

oversize_fee(Id, Fee) :-
    dimensions_sum(Id, Sum),
    ( Sum =< 62 -> Fee = 0
    ; Sum =< 65 -> Fee = 30
    ; Sum =<115 -> Fee = 200
    ;                Fail = true, fail               % larger not accepted
    ).

/* ---------- Overweight fee (Caribbean route) ---------- */
/* >50–53 lb: $30 ; >53–70 lb: $100 ; >70–100 lb: $200   */

overweight_fee(Id, Fee) :-
    weight(Id, W),
    ( W =< 50     -> Fee = 0
    ; W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
    ; W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
    ; W =< 100    -> Fee = 200
    ;                 Fail = true, fail               % heavier not accepted
    ).

/* ---------- Total cost per checked bag ---------- */

bag_cost(Position, Id, Cost) :-
    base_checked_fee(Position, Base),
    oversize_fee(Id, OSize),
    overweight_fee(Id, OWeight),
    MaxExtra is max(OSize, OWeight),
    Cost is Base + MaxExtra.

/* ---------- Sum all checked-bag costs ---------- */

all_bags_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_order(Ids),
    findall(Cost,
        (nth1(Pos, Ids, Id), bag_cost(Pos, Id, Cost)),
        Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

/* ---------- Grand total: ticket + bags ---------- */

total_cost(GrandTotal) :-
    flight(_, _, _, Ticket),
    all_bags_cost(Bags),
    GrandTotal is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------- Query ---------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2375"]).
/* ================================================================
   American Airlines baggage-fee calculator
   Case:  Jessica – Premium Economy, Boston (U.S.) → Sydney (Australia)
   ================================================================ */

/* ----------------  Basic trip facts  --------------------------- */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(825).

/* list of checked bags
      bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).                        */
bag(2,47,26,20,66).
bag(3,34,20, 9,64).
bag(4,34,19,11,53).
bag(5,50,32,25,66).
bag(6,35,16,14,62).
bag(7,33,21, 9,51).
bag(8,36,20, 9,52).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on bag #1 excluded) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------------  Statutory rules (U.S. ↔ Australia) ---------- */

/* algebraic sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/*  Oversize fee:   China / Japan / Korea / HK / India / AUS / NZ  */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/*  Over-weight fee (all regions) – ‘Thresh’ = gratis weight limit */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/*  Penalty = higher of oversize vs overweight                    */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wgt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wgt,70,OW),          % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wgt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wgt,50,OW),          % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/*  Base checked-bag fee for Premium Economy on U.S.–Australia     */
bag_fee(1,0).             % 1st bag free
bag_fee(2,0).             % 2nd bag free
bag_fee(3,200).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ----------------  Helper predicates  -------------------------- */

/* choose 2 distinct freebies (F1<F2) from the bag list            */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* place freebies first, preserve order of the remainder           */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Remainder),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Remainder].

/* cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags              */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,PenCost),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagCost + PenCost.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees + penalties    */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,BagSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,Next,BRest,PRest),
       BagSum is Fee + BRest,
       PenSum is Pen + PRest.

/*  Minimum total over all ways of selecting 2 complimentary bags  */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------------  Query & output ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

checked_item(4,38,20,10,53).       % luggage box
checked_item(5,44,22,20,53).       % luggage box
checked_item(6,35,17,13,98).       % backpack
checked_item(7,36,17,11,64).       % backpack

num_checked_bags(N) :- aggregate_all(count, checked_item(_,_,_,_,_), N).

/* ----------  Bag-number fees (First Class, domestic) ---------- */

bag_number_fee(Index,0)   :- Index =< 2.               % 1st & 2nd bags free
bag_number_fee(3,150).
bag_number_fee(Index,200) :- Index >= 4.

/* ----------  Oversize fees (domestic)  ---------- */

oversize_fee(Size,0)                       :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)                      :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200)                     :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/* ----------  Over-weight fees (domestic) ---------- */
/* For First-Class complimentary bags (1st & 2nd) the weight allowance is 70 lb   */
/* For all paid bags the standard 50-lb limit applies                             */

overweight_fee(Weight,free,200) :- Weight >  70, Weight =< 100.
overweight_fee(Weight,free,0)   :- Weight =< 70.

overweight_fee(Weight,paid,200) :- Weight >  70, Weight =< 100.
overweight_fee(Weight,paid,100) :- Weight >  50, Weight =< 70.
overweight_fee(Weight,paid,0)   :- Weight =< 50.

/* ----------  Utility predicates ---------- */

size(L,W,H, S) :- S is L+W+H.

max(X,Y,X) :- X >= Y.
max(X,Y,Y) :- Y >  X.

/* charge_for_bag(ID,Status,Charge)
      Status = free | paid   (with respect to the 1st / 2nd free allowance)
      Charge  = max(oversize, overweight) for that bag                       */

charge_for_bag(ID,Status,Charge) :-
    checked_item(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    size(L,W,H,Size),
    oversize_fee(Size, OFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,Status, WFee),
    max(OFee,WFee,Charge).

/* ----------  Choose which 2 bags are "free" so that charges are minimal ------- */

% pick/3  – combination helper  (pick N elements from a list)
pick(0,_,[]) :- !.
pick(N,[X|Xs],[X|Ys]) :- N>0, N1 is N-1, pick(N1,Xs,Ys).
pick(N,[_|Xs],Ys)     :- N>0, pick(N,Xs,Ys).

% list of all bag IDs
bag_ids(IDs) :- findall(ID, checked_item(ID,_,_,_,_), IDs).

% total oversize/over-weight cost for a specific choice of FreeIDs
combo_cost(FreeIDs,Cost) :-
    bag_ids(AllIDs),
    % charges for the 2 complimentary bags
    findall(C, (member(ID,FreeIDs), charge_for_bag(ID,free,C)),  FreeCs),
    % charges for the remaining paid bags
    findall(C, (member(ID,AllIDs), \+ member(ID,FreeIDs),
                charge_for_bag(ID,paid,C)),                     PaidCs),
    sum_list(FreeCs,FreeSum),
    sum_list(PaidCs,PaidSum),
    Cost is FreeSum + PaidSum.

% find the minimum possible over/oversize cost
min_extra_cost(MinCost) :-
    bag_ids(IDs),
    setof(Cost, FreeIDs^(
            pick(2,IDs,FreeIDs),
            combo_cost(FreeIDs,Cost)
          ), [MinCost|_]).

/* ----------  Bag-number fee for ALL checked bags (7 of them) ------------------ */

bag_number_total(Total) :-
    num_checked_bags(N),
    findall(F, (between(1,N,I), bag_number_fee(I,F)), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs,Total).

/* ----------  Grand total ------------------------------------------------------ */

total_cost(Total) :-
    min_extra_cost(ExtraFees),
    bag_number_total(BagCountFees),
    ticket_price(Tix),
    Total is Tix + BagCountFees + ExtraFees.

/* ----------  Query to print the answer --------------------------------------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

/* ------------  RULES  ------------ */

% flight information ----------------------------------------------------
flight_region(south_america_to_us).
flight_class(main_cabin).
flight_ticket_price(560).

% ------------- basic checked-bag fee (depends only on bag sequence) ----
base_bag_fee(1,0).
base_bag_fee(2,100).
base_bag_fee(N,200):- N>=3.

% ------------- oversize fee --------------------------------------------
% South America (except Guyana / Suriname) → U.S. region
oversize_fee(DimSum, south_america_to_us, 0)   :- DimSum =< 62.
oversize_fee(DimSum, south_america_to_us, 30)  :- DimSum  > 62, DimSum =< 65.
oversize_fee(DimSum, south_america_to_us, 150) :- DimSum  > 65, DimSum =< 115.

% ------------- overweight fee ------------------------------------------

overweight_fee(W, south_america_to_us, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, south_america_to_us, 30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, south_america_to_us, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, south_america_to_us, 200) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

% ------------- fee per checked bag -------------------------------------
bag_total_fee(Seq, DimSum, Weight, Fee) :-
    flight_region(Region),
    base_bag_fee(Seq, BaseFee),
    oversize_fee(DimSum, Region, OverSize),
    overweight_fee(Weight, Region, OverWt),
    MaxExtra is max(OverSize, OverWt),
    Fee is BaseFee + MaxExtra.

% ------------- list of William’s checked bags --------------------------
% Bag sequence numbers (1-7) are assigned in the order we’ll check them.
%  Seq,  L,  Wd,  H,  Weight
checked_bag(1, 41,21,19, 51).
checked_bag(2, 36,17,12, 65).
checked_bag(3, 37,20,11, 85).
checked_bag(4, 51,25,27, 52).
checked_bag(5, 38,17,13, 63).
checked_bag(6, 35,21,15, 52).
checked_bag(7, 33,22, 9, 90).

% helper to compute dimension sum
dim_sum(L,W,H,Sum):- Sum is L+W+H.

% ------------- aggregate all bag costs ---------------------------------
bags_cost(Total):-
    findall(Fee,
        ( checked_bag(Seq,L,W,H,Weight),
          dim_sum(L,W,H,Dim),
          bag_total_fee(Seq,Dim,Weight,Fee)
        ),
        Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Total).

% ------------- grand total ---------------------------------------------
total_cost(Grand):-
    bags_cost(BagCost),
    flight_ticket_price(Ticket),
    Grand is Ticket + BagCost.

/* ---------- Statutory rules (domestic U.S. trip, Main Cabin) ---------- */

% Oversize fees (in inches – sum of L+W+H)
oversize_fee(Size, 0)    :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size, 30)   :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size, 200)  :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.          % upper limit for acceptance

% Over-weight fees (in pounds)
overweight_fee(W, 0)     :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)    :- W  > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100)   :- W  > 53,  W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200)   :- W  > 70,  W =< 100.               % >100 lbs not accepted

% The higher of the 2 surcharges applies (in addition to the checked-bag base fee)
surcharge(Size, Wt, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, O),
    overweight_fee(Wt,  W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

/* ---------- Checked-bag base fees (domestic Main Cabin) ---------- */
base_fee(1, 40).
base_fee(2, 45).
base_fee(3, 150).
base_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.

/* ---------- Robert’s checked items (carry-on already free) ---------- */
/* bag(Index, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(1, 43, 22, 18, 67).
bag(2, 42, 20, 17, 99).
bag(3, 33, 20, 10, 52).
bag(4, 51, 28, 27, 57).
bag(5, 37, 15, 11, 85).
bag(6, 37, 17, 16, 53).
bag(7, 44, 21, 17, 53).

/* ---------- Cost calculation for a single bag ---------- */
bag_cost(Id, Cost) :-
    bag(Id, L, W, H, Weight),
    Size is L + W + H,
    surcharge(Size, Weight, Sur),
    base_fee(Id, Base),
    Cost is Base + Sur.

/* ---------- Utility: sum of a list ---------- */
sumlist([], 0).
sumlist([H|T], Sum) :-
    sumlist(T, Rest),
    Sum is H + Rest.

/* ---------- Aggregate costs ---------- */
checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, bag_cost(_, C), Costs),
    sumlist(Costs, Total).

flight_ticket(94).

total_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bags_cost(BagFees),
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* ---------- Query & output ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Michael is a Business Class passenger flying from Orlando to Lima with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 13 x 7 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 13 inches, 95 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 37 x 14 x 12 inches, 67 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 43 x 22 x 19 inches, 53 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 63 lbs; 7. A backpack: 34 x 21 x 10 inches, 72 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 12 inches, 53 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $557.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* === Statutory rules that matter for this case === */

/*  The itinerary is Business Class, U.S. → Peru (South America, except Panama).
    • 1st-2nd checked bags: $0 (complimentary)
    • 3rd checked bag:      $200
    • Each bag 4+ :         $200
    Weight limits
       – Complimentary bags : 70 lb
       – Charged bags       : 50 lb
    Over-weight surcharges
       50< W ≤53 lb  → $30
       53< W ≤70 lb  → $100
       70< W ≤100 lb → $200
    Over-size surcharges (South America rules)
       62< Σdim ≤65 in  → $30
       65< Σdim ≤115 in → $150
    If a bag is both over-weight and over-size, charge only the higher of the two.
*/

complimentary_bags(2).

/* base fee for the N-th checked bag */
bag_base_fee(N,0 ) :- N =< 2, !.
bag_base_fee(_,200).

/* weight limit depends on whether the bag is complimentary */
weight_limit(N,70) :- N =< 2, !.
weight_limit(_,50).

/* over-weight surcharge */
overweight_fee(N,W,0) :- weight_limit(N,L), W =< L, !.
overweight_fee(_,W,30) :- W  =< 53, W  > 50, !.
overweight_fee(_,W,100):- W  =< 70, W  > 53, !.
overweight_fee(_,W,200):- W  =<100, W  > 70.

/* over-size surcharge */
oversize_fee(D,0)   :- D =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(D,30)  :- D =< 65, D > 62, !.
oversize_fee(D,150) :- D =<115, D > 65.

/* choose the higher of the 2 surcharges */
surcharge(N,W,D,S) :-
    overweight_fee(N,W,OW),
    oversize_fee(D,OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> S = OW ; S = OS ).

/* total fee for one bag */
bag_cost(N,W,D,C) :-
    bag_base_fee(N,BF),
    surcharge(N,W,D,S),
    C is BF + S.

/* === Facts for Michael’s trip === */

/* bag(ID,Weight(lb),Sum_of_dimensions(in)) */
bag(bag2,51,65).
bag(bag3,95,67).
bag(bag4,67,63).
bag(bag5,53,84).
bag(bag6,63,63).
bag(bag7,72,65).
bag(bag8,53,65).

/* We order the bags so as to minimise charges:
   the 2 heaviest (but ≤70 lb) become the complimentary bags. */
bag_order(1,bag4).
bag_order(2,bag6).
bag_order(3,bag3).
bag_order(4,bag5).
bag_order(5,bag7).
bag_order(6,bag2).
bag_order(7,bag8).

/* convenience predicate */
bag_position(ID,N) :- bag_order(N,ID).

/* cost per bag in that position */
bag_total_cost(N,C) :-
    bag_order(N,ID),
    bag(ID,W,D),
    bag_cost(N,W,D,C).

/* sum all bag costs */
bags_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, bag_total_cost(_,C), L),
    sum_list(L,Total).

/* Flight ticket price */
ticket_cost(557).

/* === Overall total === */
total_cost(Total) :-
    bags_cost(Bags),
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    Total is Bags + Ticket.

/* === Query === */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Mary is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Boston to Xiamen with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 14 x 8 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A backpack: 43 x 22 x 19 inches, 60 lbs; 3. A backpack: 43 x 31 x 19 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 44 x 19 x 18 inches, 63 lbs; Mary's flight ticket is $1375.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* =========  Statutory rules used in this case  ========= */

/* passenger, itinerary and ticket */
passenger(mary).
itinerary(mary, boston, xiamen).              % U.S. -> China
class(mary, main_cabin).
ticket_price(mary, 1375).

/* ----------------  Mary’s items  ----------------
   bag(ID , Length, Width, Height, Weight). */
bag(1, 20, 14,  8,  9).      % qualifies as carry-on
bag(2, 43, 22, 19, 60).
bag(3, 47, 26, 18, 57).
bag(4, 36, 15, 12, 51).
bag(5, 41, 25, 16, 60).
bag(6, 45, 34, 22, 53).
bag(7, 43, 31, 19, 52).
bag(8, 44, 19, 18, 63).

/* =========  Carry-on rules (1 personal item + 1 carry-on)  ========= */
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).   % 22 x 14 x 9 in.

is_carry_on(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(CL,CW,CH),
    L =< CL, W =< CW, H =< CH.

/* All bags that are NOT carry-on are checked */
checked_bag(ID) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,_),
    \+ is_carry_on(ID).

/* =========  Dimension helpers  ========= */
dim_sum(ID,Sum) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    Sum is L+W+H.

/* =========  Overweight surcharges (U.S. ↔ China)  ========= */
overweight_fee(ID,Fee) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,Wt),
    ( Wt > 50, Wt =< 53 -> Fee = 30
    ; Wt > 53, Wt =< 70 -> Fee = 100
    ; Wt > 70, Wt =< 100 -> Fee = 450
    ;                            Fee = 0 ).

/* =========  Oversize surcharges (U.S. ↔ China)  ========= */
oversize_fee(ID,Fee) :-
    dim_sum(ID,S),
    ( S > 62, S =< 65  -> Fee = 30
    ; S > 65, S =< 115 -> Fee = 200
    ;                         Fee = 0 ).

/* =========  Total surcharge for a bag  =========
   If both overweight and oversize apply, only the HIGHER one is charged. */
bag_surcharge(ID,S) :-
    oversize_fee(ID,OS),
    overweight_fee(ID,OW),
    ( OS >= OW -> S = OS ; S = OW ).

/* =========  Base checked-bag fees (U.S. ↔ China, Main Cabin)  ========= */
base_checked_fee(Order,Fee) :-       % Order starts at 1
    class(mary, main_cabin),
    ( Order =:= 1 -> Fee = 0
    ; Order =:= 2 -> Fee = 100
    ; Order >= 3  -> Fee = 200 ).

/* =========  Cost of all checked bags  ========= */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID, checked_bag(ID), List).

checked_bags_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    checked_bags_cost(List, 1, 0, Total).

checked_bags_cost([], _, Acc, Acc).
checked_bags_cost([ID|Rest], Ord, Acc0, Total) :-
    base_checked_fee(Ord, Base),
    bag_surcharge(ID, Surch),
    Acc1 is Acc0 + Base + Surch,
    Ord1 is Ord + 1,
    checked_bags_cost(Rest, Ord1, Acc1, Total).

/* =========  Grand total (ticket + all bag fees)  ========= */
total_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bags_cost(Bags),
    ticket_price(mary, Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* =========  Query and output  ========= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 37 x 19 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 35 x 16 x 12 inches, 67 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 49 x 23 x 24 inches, 73 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 40 x 23 x 21 inches, 63 lbs; 7. A backpack: 47 x 29 x 19 inches, 58 lbs; 8. A backpack: 52 x 30 x 28 inches, 52 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $241.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2421"]).
/* =========================================================
   Susan – Business Class
   Los Angeles (U.S.)  →  Ottawa (Canada)
   Route type: Within / between U.S. and Canada
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------------  Ticket  ------------------------------ */
flight_cost(241).


/* ----------------  Bags --------------------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)                       */
bag(2,43,20,21,76).      /* luggage box */
bag(3,37,19,14,53).      /* backpack    */
bag(4,35,16,12,67).      /* luggage box */
bag(5,49,23,24,73).      /* luggage box */
bag(6,40,23,21,63).      /* luggage box */
bag(7,47,29,19,58).      /* backpack    */
bag(8,52,30,28,52).      /* backpack    */

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on excluded)          */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------------  Statutory rules ---------------------- */

/* Sum of outside dimensions                                */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Oversize fees  –  within / between U.S. and Canada
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Overweight fees
   Thresh = 70 lbs for complimentary bags
            50 lbs for charged (fee-bearing) bags
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Penalty for a bag  =  higher of (oversize vs overweight)
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),           % complimentary
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),           % charged
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Checked-bag base fees – Business Class
   (within / between U.S. and Canada)
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
bag_fee(1,0).        % 1st bag  free
bag_fee(2,0).        % 2nd bag  free
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----------------  Helper predicates -------------------- */

/* choose two different elements (F1<F2) from a list         */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* build ordered list with the 2 complimentary bags first    */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags        */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       bags_cost(Ordered,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BaseFees + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list, accumulating fees and penalties*/
bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Bs],Idx,BaseSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       bags_cost(Bs,NextIdx,BaseRest,PenRest),
       BaseSum is Fee + BaseRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* ----------------  Grand-total (minimal) ----------------- */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------------  Query & Output ------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Facts that describe the flight and the passenger
--------------------------------------------------*/

% ticket price
ticket_price(363).

% passenger class
passenger_class(main_plus).

% itinerary – only one origin / destination is needed for this case
origin(vancouver).
destination(atlanta).

% bags carried by the passenger
% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1, 18,12, 8,  8).      % small back-pack  → personal item
bag(2, 54,32,27, 95).      % checked
bag(3, 50,25,24, 55).      % checked
bag(4, 34,17,13, 59).      % checked
bag(5, 33,22, 9, 55).      % checked
bag(6, 35,15,14, 52).      % checked
bag(7, 33,20,12, 52).      % checked
bag(8, 36,17,14, 62).      % checked


/*-------------------------------------------------
   Helpers
--------------------------------------------------*/

% sum of the 3 dimensions of a bag
size(ID, S) :-
    bag(ID, L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H.

% route category relevant for this case
route(us_canada).           % Vancouver – Atlanta

% max(A,B,Max)
max(A,B,A) :- A>=B.
max(A,B,B) :- B>A.


/*-------------------------------------------------
   Carry-on / personal item rules
--------------------------------------------------*/

% bag 1 is the only personal item, all others (ID>1) are checked
personal_item(ID) :- ID =:= 1.
checked_bag(ID)   :- bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ personal_item(ID).


/*-------------------------------------------------
   Main-Plus base checked-bag fees (Vancouver ⇄ Atlanta)
--------------------------------------------------*/

% order of a checked bag (1st, 2nd, 3rd …) after
% removing the personal item from the sequence ID ascending
checked_bags_ordered(OrderedIDs) :-
    findall(ID, checked_bag(ID), IDs),
    sort(IDs, OrderedIDs).

bag_order(ID, N) :-
    checked_bags_ordered(List),
    nth1(N, List, ID).

% base fee that depends only on the bag order
base_fee(1, 0).           % Main-Plus gives the 1st bag free (extra allowance)
base_fee(2, 45).
base_fee(3, 150).
base_fee(N, 200) :- N>=4.


/*-------------------------------------------------
   Overweight fees  (route us_canada)
--------------------------------------------------*/
overweight_fee(W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)  :- W > 50,  W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200) :- W > 70, W =< 100.

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Oversize fees  (route us_canada)
--------------------------------------------------*/
oversize_fee(S, 0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S, 30)  :- S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(S, 200) :- S > 65, S =< 115.

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Extra fee for a bag = max(oversize, overweight)
--------------------------------------------------*/
extra_fee(ID, Fee) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W),
    size(ID,S),
    overweight_fee(W, OW),
    oversize_fee(S,   OS),
    max(OW,OS, Fee).

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Total fee for each checked bag = base + extra
--------------------------------------------------*/
bag_fee(ID, Total) :-
    bag_order(ID, N),
    base_fee(N, Base),
    extra_fee(ID, Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Sum up all checked-bag fees
--------------------------------------------------*/
total_checked_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, (checked_bag(ID), bag_fee(ID,F)), List),
    sum_list(List, Sum).

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Grand total = ticket + all bag fees
--------------------------------------------------*/
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_checked_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/*-------------------------------------------------
   Produce the answer requested
--------------------------------------------------*/
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 36 x 16 x 13 inches, 65 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 40 x 17 x 17 inches, 65 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $630.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules (relevant excerpts) ---------- */

% Route and service class for the itinerary
route(europe_us).
service_class(basic_economy).

% Fare of the ticket itself
ticket_cost(630).

/* ----------  Baggage brought by the passenger ------------- */

% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1, 19, 14,  9,  7).   % intended carry-on
bag(2, 36, 17, 10, 51).
bag(3, 33, 22,  9, 52).
bag(4, 44, 31, 23, 68).
bag(5, 36, 19,  9, 52).
bag(6, 34, 19, 11, 57).
bag(7, 36, 16, 13, 65).
bag(8, 40, 17, 17, 65).

/* ----------  Helper predicates ---------------------------- */

% total outside dimensions of a bag
size(BagID, Size) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    Size is L + W + H.

% weight of a bag
weight(BagID, W) :- bag(BagID,_,_,_,W).

/* ----------  Free carry-on test --------------------------- */

carry_on(BagID) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* ----------  Checked-bag list in ordinal order ------------ */

checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID,
            (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(ID)),
            IDs),
    sort(IDs, List).              % ascending order 2 … 8

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fee by ordinal -------------- */

base_fee(1,  75).   % 1st bag, Basic Econ, Europe ↔ US
base_fee(2, 100).   % 2nd bag
base_fee(3, 200).   % 3rd bag
base_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.   % 4th bag and beyond

/* ----------  Over-weight surcharges ----------------------- */

weight_surcharge(BagID, 30) :-         % 50 < w ≤ 53 lb
    weight(BagID,W), W  > 50, W =< 53.
weight_surcharge(BagID,100) :-         % 53 < w ≤ 70 lb, Europe ↔ US
    weight(BagID,W), W  > 53, W =< 70, route(europe_us).
weight_surcharge(BagID,0)  :-          % at or below 50 lb
    weight(BagID,W), W =< 50.

/* ----------  Over-size surcharges ------------------------- */

oversize_surcharge(BagID,30) :-        % 62 < s ≤ 65 in
    size(BagID,S), S  > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_surcharge(BagID,150) :-       % 65 < s ≤ 115 in, Europe ↔ US
    size(BagID,S), S  > 65, S =< 115, route(europe_us).
oversize_surcharge(BagID,0) :-         % within 62-in limit
    size(BagID,S), S =< 62.

/* ----------  Highest applicable surcharge ----------------- */

bag_surcharge(BagID, S) :-
    weight_surcharge(BagID, WFee),
    oversize_surcharge(BagID, OFee),
    ( WFee >= OFee -> S = WFee ; S = OFee ).

/* ----------  Cost of each checked bag --------------------- */

bag_cost(BagID, Ordinal, Cost) :-
    base_fee(Ordinal, Base),
    bag_surcharge(BagID, Surch),
    Cost is Base + Surch.

/* ----------  Aggregate baggage cost ----------------------- */

total_bags_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(Checked),
    bag_costs(Checked, 1, Total).

bag_costs([], _, 0).
bag_costs([B|Rest], Ord, Total) :-
    bag_cost(B, Ord, C1),
    Next is Ord + 1,
    bag_costs(Rest, Next, CRest),
    Total is C1 + CRest.

/* ----------  Overall total cost --------------------------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    total_bags_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 34 x 18 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 49 x 27 x 26 inches, 58 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $543.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  Facts --------------- */

% itinerary facts
origin(tokyo).
destination(portland).
class(business).
ticket_price(543).

% every bag is described as  bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1, 19, 14,  7, 12).
bag(2, 38, 15, 10, 51).
bag(3, 34, 18, 12, 59).
bag(4, 44, 30, 19, 94).
bag(5, 35, 18, 12, 91).
bag(6, 49, 26, 22, 97).
bag(7, 34, 18, 13, 52).
bag(8, 49, 27, 26, 58).

/* ---------------  Helper predicates --------------- */

% sum of outside dimensions
size_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

% A bag qualifies as the single carry-on item if every dimension is within the carry-on
% limits: 22 x 14 x 9 in.
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22 , W =< 14 , H =< 9.

% which bags are checked (all bags that are not the carry-on)
checked_bag_ids(CheckedIds) :-
    findall(Id, (bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)), CheckedIds0),
    sort(CheckedIds0, CheckedIds).           % keep ascending order (1,2,3 …)

% the N-th checked bag gets its 0-based index (Idx 0 is 1st checked, Idx 1 is 2nd …)
checked_bag_index(BagId,Idx) :-
    checked_bag_ids(Ids),
    nth0(Idx,Ids,BagId).

/* ---------------  Base checked-bag fees (Business, Tokyo↔USA) --------------- */

% first two checked bags are free, every further bag costs 200 USD
base_checked_fee(Idx,0)  :- Idx =< 1.           % Idx 0 or 1  -> 1st / 2nd checked
base_checked_fee(Idx,200) :- Idx  > 1.          % 3rd + bags

/* ---------------  Oversize fee (Tokyo↔USA) --------------- */

oversize_fee(BagId,Fee) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    size_sum(L,W,H,S),
    (   S =< 62                     -> Fee = 0
    ;   S =< 65                     -> Fee = 30
    ;   S =< 115                    -> Fee = 200
    ;   S  > 115                    -> Fee = 99999      % not relevant here
    ).

/* ---------------  Overweight fee (Tokyo↔USA) --------------- */

% Allowed weight limit: 70 lb for the first two (free) checked bags, otherwise 50 lb
weight_limit(Idx,70) :- Idx =< 1.
weight_limit(Idx,50) :- Idx  > 1.

overweight_fee(BagId,Idx,Fee) :-
    bag(BagId,_,_,_,W),
    weight_limit(Idx,Lim),
    (   W =< Lim                    -> Fee = 0
    ;   W  >  70                    -> Fee = 450   % 70-100 lb band
    ;   W  >  53                    -> Fee = 100   % 53-70
    ;   W  >  50                    -> Fee = 30    % 50-53
    ).

/* ---------------  Final bag cost --------------- */

bag_cost(BagId,Cost) :-
    checked_bag_index(BagId,Idx),
    base_checked_fee(Idx,Base),
    oversize_fee(BagId,OS),
    overweight_fee(BagId,Idx,OW),
    MaxExtra is max(OS,OW),           % only the higher of the two applies
    Cost    is Base + MaxExtra.

total_baggage_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_ids(Ids),
    findall(C, (member(Id,Ids), bag_cost(Id,C)), Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Total).

/* ---------------  Grand total (ticket + bags) --------------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Fare),
    total_baggage_cost(Bags),
    Total is Fare + Bags.

/* ---------------  Query --------------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

% ---------- STATUTORY RULES (relevant subset) ----------
% Base checked-bag fee for Business Class on flights within the U.S.
% Bag #1 and #2: free | Bag #3: $150 | Bag #4+: $200
bag_base_fee(Num,Fee) :-
    ( Num =< 2 -> Fee = 0
    ; Num =:= 3 -> Fee = 150
    ; Num >= 4  -> Fee = 200).

% Oversize surcharge (length+width+height)
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,S) :-
    ( DimSum > 65 -> S = 200          % >65 –115 in
    ; DimSum > 62 -> S = 30           % >62 –65 in
    ;                    S = 0).

% Overweight surcharge (within U.S. region)
overweight_surcharge(Weight,S) :-
    ( Weight > 70  -> S = 200         % 70–100 lbs
    ; Weight > 53  -> S = 100         % >53–70 lbs
    ; Weight > 50  -> S = 30          % >50–53 lbs
    ;                     S = 0).

% Total surcharge on a bag is the higher of oversize / overweight
surcharge(BagId,Sur) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    oversize_surcharge(DimSum,S1),
    overweight_surcharge(Weight,S2),
    (S1 >= S2 -> Sur = S1 ; Sur = S2).

% Bag fee = base fee (by sequence) + surcharge
bag_fee(BagId,SeqNum,Fee) :-
    bag_base_fee(SeqNum,Base),
    surcharge(BagId,Sur),
    Fee is Base + Sur.

% ---------- CASE FACTS ----------
ticket_price(286).

% Bag facts: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).
% (Carry-on item #1 is omitted – it’s free.)
bag(2,44,23,19,96).
bag(3,38,13,14,52).
bag(4,38,15,12,53).
bag(5,35,20,10,95).
bag(6,38,13,13,78).
bag(7,40,26,18,57).
bag(8,50,33,25,79).

% Ordered list of checked bags (after the free carry-on)
bag_list([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

% Sum all bag fees
total_bags_fee(Total) :-
    bag_list(L),
    findall(F,
            (nth1(N,L,BagId), bag_fee(BagId,N,F)),
            Fees),
    sumlist(Fees,Total).

% Grand total (ticket + bags)
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    total_bags_fee(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

% ---------- QUERY ----------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A backpack: 46 x 27 x 23 inches, 69 lbs; 8. A backpack: 40 x 18 x 16 inches, 52 lbs; Charles's flight ticket is $550.

```prolog

/*  ------------  RULES (statute encoding – only what is relevant to this case)  ------------ */

/* free checked-bag allowance for the given cabin / route */
free_bags(main_plus, europe_us, 2).     /* Main Plus = Main Cabin +1 extra (max 2) */

/* base checked-bag fees (after free allowance)  ─ Europe ↔ U.S. */
base_bag_fee(_, Index, Class, europe_us, 0) :-
    free_bags(Class, europe_us, Free),
    Index =< Free.
base_bag_fee(_, Index, Class, europe_us, 200) :-
    free_bags(Class, europe_us, Free),
    Index  > Free.

/* oversize fees – Europe table */
oversize_fee(SumDim, Fee) :-
    (   SumDim =< 62 -> Fee = 0
    ;   SumDim =< 65 -> Fee = 30
    ;   SumDim =< 115 -> Fee = 150
    ).

/* overweight fees – Europe table (values valid while weight ≤ 70 lbs) */
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    (   Weight =< 50 ->  Fee = 0
    ;   Weight =< 53 ->  Fee = 30
    ;   Weight =< 70 ->  Fee = 100
    ).

/* the extra charge that applies when both oversize and overweight */
extra_fee(SumDim, Weight, Extra) :-
    oversize_fee(SumDim, O),
    overweight_fee(Weight, W),
    (O >= W -> Extra = O ; Extra = W).

/* complete fee for one checked bag */
bag_total_fee(Index, L,W,H,Weight, Class, Route, Total) :-
    SumDim is L+W+H,
    base_bag_fee(Index, Index, Class, Route, Base),
    extra_fee(SumDim, Weight, Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* -----------------------  FACTS (the present case)  ----------------------- */

passenger_class(main_plus).
route(europe_us).             /* Los Angeles ↔ Paris */
flight_ticket_cost(550).

/* checked bags (carry-on item is not listed here)            */
/* bag(Index, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */
bag(1, 37,17,10,55).
bag(2, 41,23,13,52).
bag(3, 39,16,13,53).
bag(4, 34,21,10,56).
bag(5, 34,18,13,51).
bag(6, 46,27,23,69).
bag(7, 40,18,16,52).

/* -----------------------  COMPUTATION  ----------------------- */

bags_total_cost(TotalBagsCost) :-
    passenger_class(Class),
    route(Route),
    findall(Fee,
            ( bag(Index,L,W,H,Weight),
              bag_total_fee(Index,L,W,H,Weight,Class,Route,Fee)
            ),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, TotalBagsCost).

total_cost(Total) :-
    bags_total_cost(Bags),
    flight_ticket_cost(Tix),
    Total is Bags + Tix.

/* -----------------------  QUERY (print result)  ----------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 35 x 17 x 13 inches, 86 lbs; 4. A backpack: 33 x 22 x 10 inches, 62 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 41 x 21 x 18 inches, 52 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 45 x 29 x 20 inches, 95 lbs; 7. A backpack: 36 x 15 x 13 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A backpack: 36 x 17 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $571.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2961"]).
/* =========================================================
   Jessica – Business Class        Charlotte  →  Xiamen
   Statutory luggage cost program
   ========================================================= */

/* -------------  Flight information  --------------------- */

flight_cost(571).                       /* ticket price $ */

/* checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)        */
bag(2,49,28,22,52).
bag(3,35,17,13,86).
bag(4,33,22,10,62).
bag(5,41,21,18,52).
bag(6,45,29,20,95).
bag(7,36,15,13,53).
bag(8,36,17,11,52).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on not listed)        */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* -------------  Statutory rules  ------------------------ */

/* total of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/*  Oversize fees : U.S. ↔ China (same scale as “Asia” rows)
      – over 62"–65"  : $30
      – over 65"–115" : $200                                 */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
          (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
          ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
          ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/*  Overweight fees : U.S. ↔ China
      For CHARGED bags   -> 50-lb free limit
      For COMPLIMENTARY  -> 70-lb free limit                */
overweight_fee(W,FreeLimit,Fee) :-
          (   W =< FreeLimit -> Fee = 0               % within allowance
          ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
          ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
          ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 450 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs overweight               */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
          bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
          dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
          oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
          overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),        % complimentary bag
          Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
          bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
          dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
          oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
          overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),        % charged bag
          Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Checked-bag base fees for Business Class on this route   */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 3.

/* -------------  Helper predicates  ---------------------- */

/* pick two different list elements (F1 < F2 in order)      */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
          append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
          member(F2,Tail).

/* place the 2 freebies first, keep relative order for rest */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
          checked_bag_ids(All),
          select(F1,All,R1),
          select(F2,R1,R2),
          Ordered = [F1,F2 | R2].

/* cost for a specific choice of the 2 complimentary bags   */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
          ordered_list(F1,F2,OL),
          bag_costs(OL,1,BagsTotal),
          flight_cost(Flight),
          Total is Flight + BagsTotal.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating costs             */
bag_costs([],_,0).
bag_costs([Bag|Bs],Idx,Total) :-
          (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
          bag_fee(Idx,BFee),
          penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
          Next is Idx+1,
          bag_costs(Bs,Next,Rest),
          Total is BFee + Pen + Rest.

/* minimal total over every possible set of 2 free bags     */
total_cost(Min) :-
          checked_bag_ids(L),
          findall(T,
                  (choose_two(L,B1,B2), cost_for_choice(B1,B2,T)),
                  Totals),
          min_list(Totals,Min).

/* -------------  Produce the answer  --------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* --------------  Statutory rules -------------- */

% passenger information
class(main_plus).
route(us_canada).                      % Minneapolis – Ottawa
ticket_price(123).

% how many checked bags are free with the fare
free_checked_bags(main_plus,1).

/* ---- base checked-bag fee for the route (within / between U.S. & Canada) ---- */
base_checked_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
    class(Class),
    free_checked_bags(Class, Free),
    BagNumber =< Free,                         % the complimentary bag(s)
    Fee = 0.

base_checked_fee(BagNumber, 45)  :- BagNumber > 1, BagNumber = 2.
base_checked_fee(BagNumber,150)  :- BagNumber = 3.
base_checked_fee(BagNumber,200)  :- BagNumber >= 4.

/* ---- overweight fee (within / between U.S. & Canada) ---- */
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    W > 70 ,               Fee = 200 , !.
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    W > 53 ,               Fee = 100 , !.
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    W > 50 ,               Fee = 30  , !.
overweight_fee(_,0).

/* ---- oversize fee (within / between U.S. & Canada) ---- */
oversize_fee(DimSum,Fee) :-
    DimSum > 65,           Fee = 200 , !.
oversize_fee(DimSum,Fee) :-
    DimSum > 62,           Fee = 30  ,  !.
oversize_fee(_,0).

/* ---- checked-bag total fee (base + max(overweight,oversize)) ---- */
bag_total_fee(BagNumber, DimSum, Weight, TotalFee) :-
    base_checked_fee(BagNumber, Base),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OFee),
    oversize_fee(DimSum, SFee),
    MaxExtra is max(OFee, SFee),
    TotalFee is Base + MaxExtra.

/* --------------  Case facts -------------- */

% carry-on item (counts as the 1 free carry-on, so not checked, no fee)
carry_on(bag1,21,11,9,9).

% checked items: bag(ID,Length,Width,Height,Weight).
bag(bag2,35,21, 9, 86).
bag(bag3,41,26,22, 65).
bag(bag4,41,18,15, 57).
bag(bag5,35,20,10, 93).
bag(bag6,53,30,31, 68).
bag(bag7,33,19,12, 52).
bag(bag8,41,24,15, 69).

/* --------------  Computing the answer -------------- */

% produce an ordered list of the 7 checked bags
checked_bag_list([bag2,bag3,bag4,bag5,bag6,bag7,bag8]).

% compute fees for every checked bag in order 1..N
checked_bag_fee_list([],_,[]).
checked_bag_fee_list([BagID|Rest],Num,[Fee|Fees]) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    bag_total_fee(Num,DimSum,Weight,Fee),
    NextNum is Num+1,
    checked_bag_fee_list(Rest,NextNum,Fees).

% total of all checked-bag fees
total_checked_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(Bags),
    checked_bag_fee_list(Bags,1,Fees),
    sumlist(Fees,Total).

% grand total = ticket + checked-bag fees
total_cost(Grand) :-
    ticket_price(P),
    total_checked_fees(BagFees),
    Grand is P + BagFees.

/* --------------  Query -------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 50 x 30 x 25 inches, 54 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 40 x 15 x 17 inches, 51 lbs; 6. A backpack: 45 x 32 x 24 inches, 52 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 34 x 16 x 14 inches, 51 lbs; 8. A backpack: 52 x 31 x 30 inches, 53 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $800.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------------  Statutory rules that apply to this case --------------- */

/*  Base checked–bag fees for a Main Cabin passenger on itineraries
    to / from Australia-New Zealand (amounts in U.S. dollars)           */
base_checked_bag_fee(1,0).          /* 1st bag – complimentary          */
base_checked_bag_fee(2,100).        /* 2nd bag                          */
base_checked_bag_fee(N,200) :-      /* 3rd bag and every bag thereafter */
    N >= 3.

/*  Oversize fees (to / from Australia–New Zealand)                     */
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.      /* 62-65 in  */
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.     /* 65-115 in */
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size =< 62.                  /* within limit */

/*  Over-weight fees (to / from Australia–New Zealand)                  */
overweight_fee(Weight,30)  :- Weight > 50, Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(Weight,100) :- Weight > 53, Weight =< 70.
overweight_fee(Weight,0)   :- Weight =< 50.

/*  For bags that are both oversize and overweight, only the
    higher of the two surcharges is collected.                          */
extra_fee(Weight,Size,Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight,WFee),
    oversize_fee(Size,SFee),
    (   WFee >= SFee -> Fee = WFee
    ;   Fee = SFee).

/* ---------------  Facts for Michael’s journey --------------- */

/*  Flight ticket price                                                  */
flight_ticket_price(800).

/*  Checked bags (index, length, width, height, weight in pounds)        */
bag(1,46,22,19,51).
bag(2,50,30,25,54).
bag(3,33,20,11,52).
bag(4,40,15,17,51).
bag(5,45,32,24,52).
bag(6,34,16,14,51).
bag(7,52,31,30,53).

/*  Helper: compute total outside dimension of a bag                     */
bag_size(Index,Size) :-
    bag(Index,L,W,H,_),
    Size is L + W + H.

/*  Helper: compute cost of an individual bag                            */
bag_cost(Index,Cost) :-
    bag(Index,_,_,_,Weight),
    bag_size(Index,Size),
    base_checked_bag_fee(Index,BaseFee),
    extra_fee(Weight,Size,ExtraFee),
    Cost is BaseFee + ExtraFee.

/*  Sum of all checked–bag costs                                         */
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(C,bag_cost(_,C),Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

/*  Overall cost (ticket + all bag fees)                                 */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Ticket + BagFees.

/* ---------------  Query to display the answer --------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```
