A backpack: 39 x 19 x 11 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 34 x 19 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $577.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/************************************************************************
*  Statutory rules needed for the present case (simplified to the       *
*  Europe ↔ U.S. market, Main-Plus cabin, and the weight / size bands   *
*  that actually occur in Robert’s bags).                               *
************************************************************************/

% ----------------------------  ROUTE  ---------------------------------
route(europe_us).           % Roma  → Atlanta  (Trans-Atlantic)

% ----------------------  FREE-BAG ALLOWANCE  --------------------------
% Main Plus = Main-Cabin + 1 extra free checked bag   (max 2 free bags)
free_checked_bags(main_plus, 2).

% -------------------------  BAG FEES  ---------------------------------
% Checked-bag fee by ordinal number on the Europe ↔ U.S. market
checked_bag_fee(Idx, 0)  :- Idx =< 2.         % 1st & 2nd are free
checked_bag_fee(3,   200).
checked_bag_fee(Idx, 200) :- Idx >= 4.        % 4th and higher

% ------------------  OVER-WEIGHT / OVER-SIZE FEES  --------------------
% oversize_fee(Route, SizeSumInInches, Fee).
oversize_fee(europe_us, S, 0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(europe_us, S, 30)  :- S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(europe_us, S, 150) :- S > 65, S =< 115.

% overweight_fee(Route, WeightLbs, Fee).
overweight_fee(_, W, 0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(_, W, 30)   :- W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(_, W, 100)  :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(_, W, 200)  :- W > 70, W =< 100.

% For every bag, the “special-handling” charge is the HIGHER of the
% oversize and overweight fee bands that apply.
special_fee(Route, Size, Wt, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Route, Size, OSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Route, Wt, OWtFee),
    Fee is max(OSizeFee, OWtFee).

% -----------------------------  CASE  ---------------------------------
% Bag facts: checked_bag(Ordinal, SizeSumInInches, WeightLbs).
checked_bag(1, 65, 70).
checked_bag(2, 64, 52).
checked_bag(3, 64, 56).
checked_bag(4, 63, 52).
checked_bag(5,100, 58).
checked_bag(6, 69, 53).
checked_bag(7, 64, 52).

% -----------------------  TOTAL COST RULES  ---------------------------
flight_ticket(577).

bag_cost(BagIdx, Cost) :-
    route(Route),
    checked_bag(BagIdx, Size, Wt),
    checked_bag_fee(BagIdx, BaseFee),
    special_fee(Route, Size, Wt, Special),
    Cost is BaseFee + Special.

total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bag(Idx,_,_), bag_cost(Idx,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Price),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Price + BagFees.

% ---------------------------  QUERY  ----------------------------------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Susan is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Zurich to Sacramento with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 13 x 6 inches, 11 lbs; 2. A backpack: 54 x 33 x 28 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 35 x 16 x 12 inches, 63 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 24 x 10 inches, 58 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 21 x 9 inches, 66 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 37 x 17 x 9 inches, 61 lbs; 7. A backpack: 39 x 26 x 16 inches, 51 lbs; 8. A backpack: 36 x 16 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $612.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

% ---------- Facts describing the itinerary ----------
route(europe_us).                        % Zurich (Europe) -> Sacramento (U.S.)
passenger_class(main_cabin).
ticket_cost(612).

% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1,18,13, 6,11).
bag(2,54,33,28,51).
bag(3,35,16,12,63).
bag(4,34,24,10,58).
bag(5,35,21, 9,66).
bag(6,37,17, 9,61).
bag(7,39,26,16,51).
bag(8,36,16,13,52).

% ---------- Rules for free carry-on / personal item ----------
is_personal(B) :-
    bag(B,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 18, W =< 14, H =< 8.

is_carry_on(B) :-
    bag(B,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9,
    \+ is_personal(B).                 % don’t double-count the personal item

% ---------- Checked–bag identification ----------
checked_bag(B) :-
    bag(B,_,_,_,_),
    \+ is_personal(B),
    \+ is_carry_on(B).

checked_bags(List) :-
    findall(B,checked_bag(B),L0),
    msort(L0,List).

bag_ordinal(Bag,Ord) :-
    checked_bags(List),
    nth1(Ord,List,Bag).

% ---------- Base fee for 1st, 2nd, 3rd… checked bags (Main Cabin, Europe↔US) ----------
base_fee(1,0).                 % 1st bag free (trans-atlantic benefit)
base_fee(2,100).
base_fee(Ord,200) :- Ord>=3.

bag_base_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    bag_ordinal(Bag,Ord),
    base_fee(Ord,Fee).

% ---------- Oversize / overweight surcharges (Europe↔US) ----------
size(B,S) :-
    bag(B,L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H.

oversize_fee(B,0) :-
    size(B,S), S =< 62.
oversize_fee(B,30) :-
    size(B,S), S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(B,150) :-
    size(B,S), S > 65, S =< 115.

overweight_fee(B,0) :-
    bag(B,_,_,_,W), W =< 50.
overweight_fee(B,30) :-
    bag(B,_,_,_,W), W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(B,100) :-
    bag(B,_,_,_,W), W > 53, W =< 70.

surcharge(B,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(B,O),
    overweight_fee(B,W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

% ---------- Total luggage cost ----------
bag_cost(B,Total) :-
    bag_base_fee(B,Base),
    surcharge(B,Surch),
    Total is Base + Surch.

total_bag_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(C,(checked_bag(B),bag_cost(B,C)),Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Sum).

% ---------- Grand total ----------
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(T),
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

% ---------- Query ----------
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 38 x 12 x 13 inches, 80 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 16 x 9 inches, 71 lbs; 5. A backpack: 37 x 15 x 11 inches, 61 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 40 x 23 x 21 inches, 56 lbs; 7. A backpack: 45 x 24 x 19 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A backpack: 33 x 19 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $293.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ------------  Statutory rules (subset needed for this case) ------------ */

/* base checked–bag fee for a Basic-Economy passenger on a wholly-domestic
   (U.S.) itinerary                                                  */
base_fee(1,40).
base_fee(2,45).
base_fee(3,150).
base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* overweight fees (within / between U.S., P.R., U.S.V.I., Canada) */
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W  > 70.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W =< 70, W  > 53.
overweight_fee(W, 30) :- W =< 53, W  > 50.
overweight_fee(W, 0)  :- W =< 50.

/* oversize fees (between points in the U.S. / Canada / P.R. / U.S.V.I.)   */
oversize_fee(D,200) :- D  > 65, D =< 115.
oversize_fee(D, 30) :- D =< 65, D  > 62.
oversize_fee(D, 0)  :- D =< 62.

/* choose the higher of the two */
extra_fee(W,D,F) :- overweight_fee(W,OF), oversize_fee(D,SF),
                    (OF >= SF -> F = OF ; F = SF).

/* ------------  Case facts  ---------------------------------------------- */

flight_ticket(293).

/* bag(ID,Length,Width,Height,Weight). */
bag(1,18,11, 6,  9).
bag(2,37,16,10, 58).
bag(3,38,12,13, 80).
bag(4,38,16, 9, 71).
bag(5,37,15,11, 61).
bag(6,40,23,21, 56).
bag(7,45,24,19, 52).
bag(8,33,19,11, 52).

/* ------------  Bag classification --------------------------------------- */

/* linear dimension */
linear_dim(L,W,H,D) :- D is L+W+H.

/* personal item : 18 x 14 x 8 inches or smaller                           */
personal_item(ID) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 18, W =< 14, H =< 8.

/* everything that is not a personal item is treated as a checked bag
   (none of the remaining bags qualifies as carry-on given their size)      */
checked_bag(ID) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,_),
    \+ personal_item(ID).

/* list of checked-bag IDs in ascending order                               */
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID,checked_bag(ID),L),
    sort(L,List).

/* position (1 = first checked bag, 2 = second, …)                          */
bag_position(ID,Pos) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    nth1(Pos,List,ID).

/* cost for one checked bag                                                 */
bag_cost(ID,Cost) :-
    bag_position(ID,Pos),
    base_fee(Pos,Base),
    bag(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    linear_dim(L,W,H,Dim),
    extra_fee(Weight,Dim,Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* ------------  Totals ---------------------------------------------------- */

bags_total_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bag(ID), bag_cost(ID,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    bags_total_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ------------  Query ----------------------------------------------------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 34 x 17 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 37 x 14 x 14 inches, 60 lbs; Joseph's flight ticket is $50.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* -------------  Statutory rules (simplified to what we need) ------------- */

/* carry-on / personal-item limits */
personal_item_dims(18,14,8).
carry_on_dims(22,14,9).

/* premium-economy free checked-bag allowances (domestic) */
free_checked_bags(2).

/* Checked-bag base fees for a domestic Premium-Economy customer       */
/* (index = the chronological number of the checked bag)               */
checked_bag_base_fee(Index,0)  :- Index =< 2.     /* 1st & 2nd are free  */
checked_bag_base_fee(3,150).
checked_bag_base_fee(Index,200):- Index >= 4.

/* -------- overweight fees (domestic, in U.S. dollars) --------------- */
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W > 50 , W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W > 53 , W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W > 70 , W =< 100.

/* -------- oversize fees (domestic, in U.S. dollars) ----------------- */
oversize_fee(S,0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S,30)  :- S > 62 , S =< 65.
oversize_fee(S,200) :- S > 65 , S =< 115.

/* ------------- helper: select the higher of two fees ---------------- */
higher_fee(A,B,A) :- A>=B, !.
higher_fee(_,B,B).

/* ---------------------- CASE FACTS ---------------------------------- */

ticket_price(50).          /* Joseph’s airfare */

/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight in lbs) */
bag(1,19,13,9, 11).
bag(2,41,30,17,91).
bag(3,38,15,11,52).
bag(4,43,24,18,92).
bag(5,38,23,19,98).
bag(6,42,16,17,52).
bag(7,34,17,13,52).
bag(8,37,14,14,60).

/* ---------- derive whether a bag is carry-on or needs to be checked -- */
carry_on(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_dims(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

checked_bag(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carry_on(BagId).

/* ---------------- fee for ONE checked bag --------------------------- */
one_checked_bag_fee(BagId,Index,TotalFee) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
    DimSum is L+W+H,

    /* base checked-bag fee by index */
    checked_bag_base_fee(Index,BaseFee),

    /* overweight & oversize part (take the higher one) */
    overweight_fee(Wt,OWtFee),
    oversize_fee(DimSum,OSizeFee),
    higher_fee(OWtFee,OSizeFee,ExtraFee),

    TotalFee is BaseFee + ExtraFee.

/* ------------- accumulate fees for all checked bags ----------------- */
all_checked_bags_fee(Total) :-
    /* collect checked bags preserving a deterministic order */
    findall(Id, checked_bag(Id), BagList),
    all_checked_bags_fee(BagList,1,0,Total).

all_checked_bags_fee([],_,Acc,Acc).
all_checked_bags_fee([Bag|Rest],Index,Acc,Total) :-
    one_checked_bag_fee(Bag,Index,F),
    Acc1 is Acc + F,
    Index1 is Index + 1,
    all_checked_bags_fee(Rest,Index1,Acc1,Total).

/* ---------------------- TOTAL COST ---------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    all_checked_bags_fee(BagFees),
    Total is Tix + BagFees.

/* ---------------------- QUERY --------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog

/* ---------- FACTS ---------- */

% ticket
ticket_cost(335).

% William’s checked bags (Index, Length, Width, Height, Weight)
bag(1,40,14,16,93).
bag(2,49,27,27,54).
bag(3,37,17,9,60).
bag(4,33,19,11,51).
bag(5,43,27,22,72).
bag(6,38,18,10,59).
bag(7,33,17,14,53).

% William’s cabin
class(main_plus).

/* ---------- RULES ---------- */

% free-bag allowance for Main Plus (Main Cabin + 1 extra)
free_bags(2).

/* ---- base bag fee (to / from India, Main Cabin) ---- */
nominal_base_fee(1,0).        % 1st bag
nominal_base_fee(2,100).      % 2nd bag
nominal_base_fee(N,200) :-    % 3rd, 4th, … bags
    N>=3.

base_fee(Index,0) :-                 % waived if within free allowance
    free_bags(FB), Index =< FB, !.
base_fee(Index,Fee) :-               % otherwise nominal fee applies
    nominal_base_fee(Index,Fee).

/* ---- oversize fee (to / from India) ---- */
oversize_fee(Size,0)    :- Size =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(Size,30)   :- Size =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(Size,200)  :- Size =< 115, !.

/* ---- overweight fee (to / from India) ---- */
overweight_fee(W,0)     :- W =< 50, !.
overweight_fee(W,30)    :- W =< 53, !.
overweight_fee(W,100)   :- W =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(W,450)   :- W =< 100, !.

/* ---- charge for a single bag ---- */
bag_total(Index,L,W,H,Weight,Total) :-
    Size is L+W+H,
    base_fee(Index,Base),
    oversize_fee(Size,OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    ( OS >= OW -> Extra = OS ; Extra = OW ),   % higher of the 2
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* ---- list summation helper ---- */
sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],Sum) :-
    sum_list(T,Rest),
    Sum is Rest + H.

/* ---- overall total ---- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    findall(F, (bag(I,L,W,H,WT), bag_total(I,L,W,H,WT,F)), Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,BagSum),
    ticket_cost(Tkt),
    Total is BagSum + Tkt.

/* ---------- QUERY ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Michael is a First Class passenger flying from Philadelphia to Mexico City with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 12 x 6 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A backpack: 33 x 18 x 12 inches, 76 lbs; 3. A backpack: 34 x 19 x 13 inches, 61 lbs; 4. A backpack: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 79 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 38 x 14 x 13 inches, 72 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 37 x 16 x 15 inches, 71 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $165.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules (extracted and simplified) ---------- */

/* passenger, route and ticket facts */
passenger(michael).
class(michael, first_class).
route(michael, us_to_mexico).
ticket_price(michael, 165).

/* bag( Id, L, W, H, WeightLbs ).                                   */
bag(michael, 1, 21, 12,  6,  6).
bag(michael, 2, 33, 18, 12, 76).
bag(michael, 3, 34, 19, 13, 61).
bag(michael, 4, 33, 16, 14, 79).
bag(michael, 5, 38, 14, 13, 72).
bag(michael, 6, 37, 16, 15, 71).

/* ------------------ carry-on / checked split -------------------- */

/* carry-on: fits 22×14×9 inches                                    */
carry_on(P,Id) :-
    bag(P,Id,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

checked_bag(P,Id) :-
    bag(P,Id,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carry_on(P,Id).

/* ------------------ base checked-bag fee ------------------------ */

% First-class, US <-> Mexico / Caribbean / C.A.
% 1st-3rd bag free, 4th+ = $200 each
base_fee(P,N,0) :- class(P,first_class), route(P,us_to_mexico), N =< 3.
base_fee(P,N,200) :- class(P,first_class), route(P,us_to_mexico), N >= 4.

/* ------------------ overweight fee ------------------------------ */

overweight_fee(_,W,0)      :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(_,W,30)     :- W > 50 , W =< 53.
overweight_fee(us_to_mexico,W,100) :- W > 53 , W =< 70.
overweight_fee(us_to_mexico,W,200) :- W > 70 , W =< 100.

/* ------------------ oversize fee -------------------------------- */

oversize_fee(_,S,0)    :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(_,S,30)   :- S > 62 , S =< 65.
oversize_fee(_,S,200)  :- S > 65 , S =< 115.

/* ------------------ per-bag total extra (over-/oversize) -------- */

extra_fee(P,Id,Fee) :-
    route(P,Rt),
    bag(P,Id,L,W,H,Weight),
    S is L+W+H,                        % size in inches
    overweight_fee(Rt,Weight,OW),
    oversize_fee(Rt,S,OS),
    Fee is max(OW,OS).

/* ------------------ aggregate all bag fees ---------------------- */

bag_total_fee(P,Id,N,Total) :-
    base_fee(P,N,Base),
    extra_fee(P,Id,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* Produce ordered list of checked bags to assign 1st,2nd...        */
checked_bags_ordered(P,List) :-
    findall(Id, checked_bag(P,Id), Raw),
    sort(Raw,List).                     % ascending id order

/* Sum of all luggage charges                                       */
luggage_cost(P,Sum) :-
    checked_bags_ordered(P,List),
    findall(F,
        (
          nth1(N,List,Id),
          bag_total_fee(P,Id,N,F)
        ),
        Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Sum).

/* ------------------ grand total --------------------------------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    passenger(P),
    ticket_price(P,Ticket),
    luggage_cost(P,Lug),
    Total is Ticket + Lug.

/* ------------------ query & print ------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
/* ----------  Statutory rules (relevant excerpt) ---------- */

/* Oversize fee for the route Australia <-> U.S.                */
oversize_fee(L, W, H, Fee) :-
    S is L + W + H,
    ( S =< 62  -> Fee = 0          % within included size
    ; S =< 65  -> Fee = 30         % 62–65 in
    ; S =< 115 -> Fee = 200        % 65–115 in
    ).

/* Over-weight fee for the route Australia <-> U.S.             */
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    ( Weight =< 50 -> Fee = 0
    ; Weight =< 53 -> Fee = 30     % 50–53 lbs
    ; Weight =< 70 -> Fee = 100    % 53–70 lbs
    ; Weight =< 100 -> Fee = 200   % 70–100 lbs (not used here)
    ; Weight  > 100 -> Fee = 450   % >100 lbs  (not used here)
    ).

/* Main-Plus checked-bag base fees on this route                */
base_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    ( Index =< 2 -> Fee = 0        % 2 free bags with Main Plus
    ; Index = 3  -> Fee = 200      % 3rd bag
    ; Index  > 3 -> Fee = 200      % 4th+ bags
    ).

/* Highest of oversize / overweight, then add base fee          */
bag_fee(Index, TotalFee) :-
    bag(Index,L,W,H,Weight),
    oversize_fee(L,W,H,OverSize),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OverWt),
    Extra is max(OverSize, OverWt),
    base_fee(Index, Base),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* Sum all checked-bag fees                                     */
total_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, bag_fee(_,F), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs, Sum).

/* ----------  Facts for Mary’s itinerary  ---------- */

/* Seven checked pieces (carry-on not listed)                    */
bag(1, 51,28,28, 60).   % size 107", 60 lbs
bag(2, 37,19,11, 60).   % size  67", 60 lbs
bag(3, 46,28,25, 57).   % size  99", 57 lbs

bag(5, 51,34,28, 66).   % size 113", 66 lbs
bag(6, 46,34,21, 66).   % size 101", 66 lbs
bag(7, 40,23,17, 51).   % size  80", 51 lbs

/* Flight ticket price                                           */
flight_cost(918).

/* ----------  Total trip cost  ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    flight_cost(Ticket),
    Total is BagFees + Ticket.

/* ----------  Query & output  ---------- */
:- total_cost(T), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[T]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
/* ----------  Statutory rules that apply to this case  ---------- */

/*  Base checked–bag fee for a Basic-Economy customer travelling
    to / from Japan (Austin → Kyoto)                           */

base_bag_fee(1,75).          % 1st checked bag
base_bag_fee(2,100).         % 2nd
base_bag_fee(3,200).         % 3rd
base_bag_fee(N,200):-        % 4th and every bag thereafter
    N >= 4.

/*  Oversize fee (to / from Japan)                              */
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size =< 62.            % within the limit
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/*  Over-weight fee (to / from Japan)                           */
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50.               % ≤50 lbs – no fee
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W  > 50, W =< 53.      % 50-53 lbs
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W  > 53, W =< 70.      % 53-70 lbs
overweight_fee(W,450)  :- W  > 70, W =< 100.     % 70-100 lbs

/*  For a bag that is both over-weight and over-size,
    only the HIGHER of the two fees is charged                */
extra_fee(W,Size,Fee):-
    overweight_fee(W,OWF),
    oversize_fee(Size,OSF),
    (OWF >= OSF -> Fee = OWF ; Fee = OSF).

/*  Total charge for one checked bag                           */
bag_total_fee(Index,Size,W,Total):-
    base_bag_fee(Index,Base),
    extra_fee(W,Size,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Facts describing Jennifer’s baggage  ---------- */

/*  checked_bag(Index, Size-inches, Weight-lbs)                */
checked_bag(1,  65, 92).
checked_bag(2, 106, 52).
checked_bag(3,  65, 52).
checked_bag(4,  64, 94).
checked_bag(5,  63, 74).
checked_bag(6,  64, 64).
checked_bag(7, 110, 97).

/* ----------  Aggregations  ---------- */

sumlist([],0).
sumlist([H|T],Sum):- sumlist(T,S0), Sum is H+S0.

/*  Total of all checked-bag charges                           */
total_checked_bag_cost(Total):-
    findall(Cost,
            (checked_bag(Index,Size,W),
             bag_total_fee(Index,Size,W,Cost)),
            Costs),
    sumlist(Costs,Total).

/*  Overall cost = ticket + baggage charges                    */
total_cost(Total):-
    Ticket = 426,                          % given in the case
    total_checked_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ----------  Query to produce the answer  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
/* ---------  Statutory rules that are relevant to this case  --------- */

/*  Carry-on is free – no rule needed (one of the bags will be flagged
    as carry-on in the case–facts section).                             */

/*  Base checked-bag fees on a Basic-Economy itinerary
    Japan (Asia list)   --->    U.S.                                     */
base_fee(BagNum, 75) :- BagNum =:= 1.
base_fee(BagNum, 100) :- BagNum =:= 2.
base_fee(BagNum, 200) :- BagNum >= 3.

/*  Oversize fees (Japan ↔ U.S.)
    size = L+W+H                                                         */
size_fee(DimSum, 0)               :- DimSum =< 62.
size_fee(DimSum, 30)              :- DimSum  > 62, DimSum =< 65.
size_fee(DimSum, 200)             :- DimSum  > 65, DimSum =< 115.

/*  Over-weight fees (Japan ↔ U.S.)                                      */
weight_fee(W, 0)                  :- W =< 50.
weight_fee(W, 30)                 :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
weight_fee(W, 100)                :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
weight_fee(W, 450)                :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/*  The statute says “the higher fee between oversize and overweight
    applies (in addition to the base checked-bag fee)”                   */
extra_fee(BagIndex, Extra) :-
    bag(BagIndex, L, Wd, H, Weight),
    DimSum is L + Wd + H,
    size_fee(DimSum, SF),
    weight_fee(Weight, WF),
    Extra is max(SF, WF).

/* ---------  Facts describing Elizabeth’s situation  --------- */

/* bag(Index, Length, Width, Height, Weight)                             */
bag(1,21,12, 8, 10).   /* carry-on   */
bag(2,34,18,12, 56).
bag(3,36,19, 9, 76).
bag(4,34,17,13, 73).
bag(5,41,26,17, 90).
bag(6,35,19,16, 86).
bag(7,33,23, 9, 53).
bag(8,34,21,10, 58).

/* Bag #1 is used as the free carry-on; the rest are checked.            */
carry_on(1).

/* checked_bag(Index, SequenceNumber) – order after the carry-on         */
checked_bag(2,1).
checked_bag(3,2).
checked_bag(4,3).
checked_bag(5,4).
checked_bag(6,5).
checked_bag(7,6).
checked_bag(8,7).

/* ---------  Cost calculations  --------- */

checked_bag_total_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    checked_bag(Index, Seq),
    base_fee(Seq, Base),
    extra_fee(Index, Extra),
    Fee is Base + Extra.

sum_checked_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, checked_bag_total_fee(_,F), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs, Sum).

ticket_price(395).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    sum_checked_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

/* ---------  Query requested by the assignment  --------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2425"]).
/* =========================================================
   Patricia – Austin (U.S.)  →  Quito (Ecuador / S. America)
   Cabin: Business
   Itinerary region: Between U.S. and South America
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------------  Cost of the flight ticket  ------------ */
flight_cost(535).

/* ----------------  Bags brought on the trip -------------- */
/* Format: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).               */
/* Bag 1 fits the carry-on limits and is therefore excluded  */
/* from the checked-bag calculations.                       */
bag(2,40,23,19,78).
bag(3,36,14,13,52).
bag(4,38,15,12,61).
bag(5,50,34,25,77).
bag(6,34,20,10,75).
bag(7,35,17,13,52).
bag(8,54,29,31,79).

/* All checked-bag Ids in a fixed order (smallest Id …)      */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ---------------- Statutory Rules (region-specific) ------- */

/* Sum of the 3 outside dimensions of a bag */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* Oversize fees – Panama / South America (except Guyana / Suriname) */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30            % 62–65 in / 158–165 cm
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 150 ).        % 65–115 in / 165–292 cm

/* Overweight fees (all regions except Cuba)                 */
/* Threshold 70 lbs for complimentary Business bags          */
/* Threshold 50 lbs for all charged bags                     */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* Penalty = higher of the two (oversize vs overweight)      */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),        % 70-lb limit for complimentary bags
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),        % 50-lb limit for charged bags
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Checked-bag fees (Business class, U.S. ↔ South America)   */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.

/* ---------------  Helper predicates  --------------------- */

/* Choose 2 different elements (F1 before F2) from a list    */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* Place the 2 free bags at positions 1 and 2                */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* Cost produced by a particular choice of complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       bags_cost(Ordered,1,BagsFee,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + BagsFee + Penalties.

/* Traverse ordered list, accumulating bag fees & penalties  */
bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BFee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       bags_cost(Bs,Next,FRest,PRest),
       FeeSum is BFee + FRest,
       PenSum is Pen + PRest.

/* Overall minimal total cost (best choice of freebies)      */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(Ids),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(Ids,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* --------------------  Query  ----------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

   Route category : Within / between U.S. and Canada

/* sum of outside dimensions */

/* oversize fee within / between U.S. & Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (   Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ;   Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ;   Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee given the weight limit Thresh            */
/* (Thresh = 70 lb for complimentary, 50 lb for charged)   */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),

        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),

        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),

        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),      % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fees for Business Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ------------  Helper predicates ------------------------ */

/* pick two distinct elements (F1 < F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-

/* build ordered list where the 2 freebies go first */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,Rest1),
        select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* accumulate fees and penalties over an ordered list */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),

        NextIdx is Idx + 1,
        cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,FeeRest,PenRest),
        FeeSum is BaseFee + FeeRest,
        PenSum is Pen + PenRest.

/* total for a particular choice of complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Ticket),

/* minimal total over all ways of selecting the 2 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(Bags),

                ( choose_two(Bags,F1,F2),
                  cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T) ),
                Totals),

```prolog
/* ----------  GENERAL RULES  ---------- */

% maximum of 2 numbers
max(A,B,A) :- A>=B, !.
max(_,B,B).

/* ---- checked-bag base fee (Premium Economy, domestic flight) ----
   1st-2nd bag : $0
   3rd bag     : $150
   4th+ bag    : $200
*/
base_fee(Ordinal,0)   :- Ordinal =< 2, !.
base_fee(3,150)       :- !.
base_fee(Ordinal,200) :- Ordinal >= 4.

/* ---- overweight fees (domestic) ---- */
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W>70,  W=<100, !.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53,  W=<70,  !.
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50,  W=<53,  !.
overweight_fee(_,0).

/* ---- oversize fees (domestic) ---- */
oversize_fee(S,200) :- S>65,  S=<115, !.
oversize_fee(S,30)  :- S>62,  S=<65,  !.
oversize_fee(_,0).

/* ---- total fee for a single checked bag ---- */
bag_total_fee(Ord,W,S,Total) :-
    base_fee(Ord,Base),
    overweight_fee(W,OW),
    oversize_fee(S,OS),
    max(OW,OS,Extra),          % only the higher of the 2 applies
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  CASE FACTS  ---------- */

ticket_cost(43).

/* checked bags in the order they’ll be processed                */
/* bag(Ordinal, Weight(lbs), Size(in = L+W+H))                    */
bag(1,69,95).
bag(2,74,65).
bag(3,86,65).
bag(4,64,63).
bag(5,60,89).
bag(6,98,107).
bag(7,96,93).

/* ----------  AGGREGATION  ---------- */

sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],Sum) :- sum_list(T,R), Sum is H+R.

total_bag_cost(Total) :-
    findall(Fee,(bag(O,W,S),bag_total_fee(O,W,S,Fee)),Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ----------  QUERY  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
```

```prolog
overweight_fee(W, 0)                                         :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)                                        :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100)                                       :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
%  (>70 lbs not present in Linda’s case)

% ---------------------
%  ACTUAL EXTRA FEE PER BAG
%  (only the HIGHER of over-size vs over-weight applies)
% ---------------------
extra_fee(Size, Weight, Fee) :-
        oversize_fee(Size, SFee),
        overweight_fee(Weight, WFee),
        ( SFee >= WFee -> Fee = SFee ; Fee = WFee ).


%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Facts describing Linda’s items   (only checked bags listed)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% checked_bag(SequentialNumber, SizeInInches, WeightInLbs).

checked_bag(1, 64, 52).
checked_bag(2,108, 52).
checked_bag(3, 64, 68).
checked_bag(4, 74, 62).
checked_bag(5, 71, 51).
checked_bag(6, 87, 51).
checked_bag(7,102, 59).

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Cost of each checked bag
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
checked_bag_cost(BagNumber, TotalFee) :-
        checked_bag(BagNumber, Size, Weight),
        base_checked_fee(BagNumber, Base),
        extra_fee(Size, Weight, Extra),
        TotalFee is Base + Extra.

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Sum up all bag fees
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
total_bags_fee(Sum) :-
        findall(F, checked_bag_cost(_,F), L),
        sum_list(L, Sum).

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Flight ticket
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
flight_ticket_cost(655).

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Grand total
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
total_cost(Total) :-
        flight_ticket_cost(T),
        total_bags_fee(B),
        Total is T + B.

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Query & output
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 35 x 20 x 9 inches, 86 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 15 x 12 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 34 x 18 x 13 inches, 65 lbs; 5. A backpack: 34 x 17 x 12 inches, 78 lbs; 6. A backpack: 35 x 16 x 12 inches, 93 lbs; 7. A backpack: 35 x 15 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 36 x 17 x 11 inches, 84 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $59.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- Rules derived from the statutes ---------- */

% carry-on size limit
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

% a bag is a carry-on if it does not exceed the carry-on limits
carry_on(Bag) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(LC,WC,HC),
    L =< LC, W =< WC, H =< HC.

% size (length+width+height) of a bag
bag_size(Bag,S) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H.

% oversize fee (Charlotte ⇄ Haiti counts as U.S. ⇄ Caribbean)
oversize_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    bag_size(Bag,S),
    (  S =< 62 -> Fee = 0
    ;  S =< 65 -> Fee = 30           % 62–65 in
    ;  S =< 115 -> Fee = 200         % 65–115 in
    ).

% overweight fee
overweight_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    bag(Bag,_,_,_,W),
    (  W =< 50  -> Fee = 0
    ;  W =< 53  -> Fee = 30
    ;  W =< 70  -> Fee = 100
    ;  W =< 100 -> Fee = 200
    ).

% for a bag that is both oversize and overweight, charge ONLY the higher
extra_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Bag,OverSize),
    overweight_fee(Bag,OverWeight),
    (OverSize >= OverWeight -> Fee = OverSize ; Fee = OverWeight).

/* ---------- Facts for this case ---------- */

% bag(Name,Length,Width,Height,Weight)
bag(bag1,21,12, 9,11).
bag(bag2,35,20, 9,86).
bag(bag3,38,15,12,51).
bag(bag4,34,18,13,65).
bag(bag5,34,17,12,78).
bag(bag6,35,16,12,93).
bag(bag7,35,15,13,51).
bag(bag8,36,17,11,84).

% ticket price
ticket_price(59).

/* ---------- Checked-bag numbering ---------- */

% list of bags that are NOT carry-ons → become checked bags
checked_bag_list(Checked) :-
    findall(B, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Checked).

% index of each checked bag (1-based)
checked_index(Bag,Idx) :-
    checked_bag_list(L), nth1(Idx,L,Bag).

/* ---------- Base checked-bag fee for Premium Economy (CLT ⇄ Haiti) ---------- */

% Premium Economy gets 1st & 2nd checked bags free; every bag from #3 on costs $200
base_checked_fee(Bag,Fee) :-
    checked_index(Bag,Idx),
    (Idx =< 2 -> Fee = 0 ; Fee = 200).

/* ---------- Total fee for each checked bag ---------- */

bag_total_fee(Bag,Total) :-
    base_checked_fee(Bag,Base),
    extra_fee(Bag,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* ---------- Sum of all checked-bag fees ---------- */

checked_bags_total(Cost) :-
    findall(F, (checked_index(Bag,_), bag_total_fee(Bag,F)), L),
    sum_list(L,Cost).

/* ---------- Grand total (ticket + bags) ---------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    checked_bags_total(Bags),
    Total is T + Bags.

/* ---------- Query & output ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 43 x 29 x 17 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 21 x 19 inches, 88 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 47 x 27 x 24 inches, 51 lbs; 6. A backpack: 38 x 11 x 14 inches, 73 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 39 x 16 x 11 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 38 x 16 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; John's flight ticket is $131.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  ROUTE / CABIN RULES NEEDED FOR THIS CASE  ---------- */

/* main_cabin_base_fee(+BagNumber, -Fee)
   BagNumber begins at 1 for the first CHECKED bag                                   */

main_cabin_base_fee(1,35).        /* Canada <--> U.S. first bag                 */
main_cabin_base_fee(2,45).        /* second bag                                 */
main_cabin_base_fee(3,150).       /* third bag                                  */
main_cabin_base_fee(N,200):-      /* 4th-plus bags                              */
    N>=4.

/* overweight_fee(+Weight, -Fee) – route: U.S./Canada (see statutes)               */
overweight_fee(W,0)  :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30) :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100):- W > 53 , W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200):- W > 70 , W =< 100.
/* (weights above 100 lb are “not accepted”, not needed here)                       */

/* oversize_fee(+DimSum, -Fee) – route: U.S./Canada (see statutes)                 */
oversize_fee(D,0)   :- D =< 62.
oversize_fee(D,30)  :- D > 62, D =< 65.
oversize_fee(D,200) :- D > 65, D =< 115.
/* (bags above 115 in are “not accepted”, not needed here)                          */

/* choose the higher of the two surcharges                                          */
surcharge(Weight,DimSum,Fee):-
    overweight_fee(Weight,WFee),
    oversize_fee(DimSum,OFee),
    (WFee >= OFee -> Fee = WFee ; Fee = OFee).


/* ----------  FACTS FOR JOHN’S TRIP  ---------- */

ticket_price(131).

/* item(Index, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  (in inches / pounds)                */
item(1,21,12, 6, 11).
item(2,36,18,10, 69).
item(3,43,29,17, 52).
item(4,38,21,19, 88).
item(5,47,27,24, 51).
item(6,38,11,14, 73).
item(7,39,16,11, 53).
item(8,38,16,10, 53).

/* carry-on test (1 personal item allowed but none of the bags fits;
   1 carry-on allowed if ≤22×14×9 in)                                                 */
carryon_candidate(I):-
    item(I,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* take the first candidate (smallest index) as the free carry-on                   */
carryon(I):-
    carryon_candidate(I),
    \+ (carryon_candidate(J), J < I).

/* every other item is a checked bag                                                */
checked(I):-
    item(I,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carryon(I).

/* position of each checked bag in the sequence (to know 1st, 2nd, …)               */
bag_number(I,N):-
    findall(X,checked(X),List),
    nth1(N,List,I).


/* ----------  COST CALCULATIONS  ---------- */

bag_cost(I,Cost):-
    item(I,L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    bag_number(I,N),
    main_cabin_base_fee(N,Base),
    surcharge(Weight,DimSum,Surch),
    Cost is Base + Surch.

/* total for all checked bags                                                       */
total_bags_cost(Total):-
    findall(C,(checked(I),bag_cost(I,C)),List),
    sum_list(List,Total).

/* overall total                                                                    */
total_cost(Total):-
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    total_bags_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.


/* ----------  ANSWER  ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 54 lbs; 8. A backpack: 35 x 14 x 14 inches, 54 lbs; James's flight ticket is $306.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1826"]).
/* -------------  Facts describing James’s trip ------------------- */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(306).

/* checked bags: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,35,17,13,53).
bag(3,36,15,14,52).
bag(4,36,15,12,59).
bag(5,47,34,23,61).
bag(6,44,29,22,66).
bag(7,33,16,14,54).
bag(8,35,14,14,54).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on #1 is not listed) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ---------------- Statutory rules for this itinerary ------------ */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – Europe ↔ U.S. */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (   Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ;   Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ;   Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 150 ).

/* overweight fees (Thresh = 70 lb for complimentary, 50 lb for charged) */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for 1 bag = higher of oversize vs overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee for Business Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 3.

/* -------------  Helper predicates ------------------------------- */

/* choose 2 distinct elements (F1 precedes F2 in the list) */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
        append(_, [F1|Tail], List),
        member(F2, Tail).

/* put the 2 complimentary bags first in the ordered list */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1, All, R1),
        select(F2, R1, Rest),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        Next is Idx+1,
        cost_bags(Bs,Next,CostRest,PenRest),
        CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* total cost for one specific choice of the 2 freebies */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ord),
        cost_bags(Ord,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Tix),
        Total is Tix + BaseFees + Penalties.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting the 2 freebies */
total_cost(Min) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),
        findall(T,
                ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                  cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
                Totals),
        min_list(Totals,Min).

/* ----------------  Query & output ------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

```prolog

/* ---------------  General rules coming from the statutes --------------- */

/* Base fee for each successive checked bag on a Premium Economy ticket
   for travel wholly within the U.S. (Austin – San Francisco)            */
base_fee(1,0).
base_fee(2,0).
base_fee(3,150).
base_fee(N,200):- N>=4.

/* ---------------- Over-WEIGHT surcharge (within U.S.) ------------------ */
overweight_surcharge(Weight,Fee):-               % ≤ 50 lb – no surcharge
    Weight =< 50,             Fee is 0.
overweight_surcharge(Weight,30):-                % 50  < W ≤ 53 lb – $30
    Weight  > 50,  Weight =< 53.
overweight_surcharge(Weight,100):-               % 53  < W ≤ 70 lb – $100
    Weight  > 53,  Weight =< 70.
overweight_surcharge(Weight,200):-               % 70  < W ≤100 lb – $200
    Weight  > 70,  Weight =< 100.

/* ---------------- Over-SIZE surcharge (within U.S.) -------------------- */
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,0):-                   % ≤ 62 in  – no surcharge
    DimSum =< 62.
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,30):-                  % 62 < D ≤ 65 in – $30
    DimSum  > 62, DimSum =< 65.
oversize_surcharge(DimSum,200):-                 % 65 < D ≤115 in – $200
    DimSum  > 65, DimSum =< 115.

/* --------------  For a given bag, determine its surcharge -------------- */
bag_surcharge(Weight,DimSum,Surcharge):-
    overweight_surcharge(Weight,OW),
    oversize_surcharge(DimSum,OS),
    Surcharge is max(OW,OS).

/* -----------------  Cost of an individual checked bag ------------------ */
bag_cost(Order,Weight,DimSum,Cost):-
    base_fee(Order,Base),
    bag_surcharge(Weight,DimSum,Surcharge),
    Cost is Base + Surcharge.

/* -----------------------------  Facts  --------------------------------- */

/* Carry-on (meets 22×14×9, no fee, omitted from cost calculation) */
carry_on(1).

/* Checked bags:  id,  L,  W,  H,  Weight (lb) */
bag_data(2,35,19, 9, 54).
bag_data(3,35,21, 9, 89).
bag_data(4,37,13,14, 73).
bag_data(5,51,28,29, 70).
bag_data(6,45,27,20, 97).
bag_data(7,35,17,12, 58).
bag_data(8,36,17,10, 57).

/* List of checked-bag IDs in the order they are presented */
bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* --------------------  Summation utilities  ---------------------------- */
sumlist([],0).
sumlist([H|T],S):- sumlist(T,S1), S is H+S1.

/* --------------------  Compute total bag fees  ------------------------- */
bag_costs([],_,[]).
bag_costs([Id|Rest],Idx,[Cost|Cs]):-
    bag_data(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
    DimSum is L+W+H,
    bag_cost(Idx,Weight,DimSum,Cost),
    Idx1 is Idx+1,
    bag_costs(Rest,Idx1,Cs).

bag_total(Total):-
    bag_ids(Ids),
    bag_costs(Ids,1,CostList),
    sumlist(CostList,Total).

/* ----------------------  Flight ticket price  -------------------------- */
flight_cost(157).

/* -------------------------  Grand total  ------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total):-
    bag_total(Bags),
    flight_cost(Flight),
    Total is Bags + Flight.

/* ---------------------  Produce the answer  ---------------------------- */
:- total_cost(T), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [T]).
```

```prolog
/* route(jessica, Route) – Jessica is travelling between the U.S. and Europe */
route(jessica, us_europe).

/* travel_class(jessica, Class) – Jessica is a First-class passenger */
travel_class(jessica, first).

/* Ticket price */
ticket_price(jessica, 498).

   checked_bag(Idx, Len, W, Hgt, Weight).
   Idx = order in which the bags are checked.
*/

checked_bag(4, 52,35,26,51).
checked_bag(5, 34,16,14,51).
checked_bag(6, 36,21,12,60).
checked_bag(7, 49,36,24,51).

/* ----------  BASE FEE rules for First-class, U.S.↔Europe ---------- */
base_fee(first, us_europe, Order, 0)  :- Order =< 3.      % 1st-3rd bags
base_fee(first, us_europe, Order, 200):- Order >  3.      % 4th bag onward

/* ----------  OVERSIZE fees to / from Europe ---------- */
oversize_fee(us_europe, Dim, 0)   :- Dim =< 62.
oversize_fee(us_europe, Dim, 30)  :- Dim > 62, Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(us_europe, Dim, 150) :- Dim > 65, Dim =< 115.

/* ----------  OVERWEIGHT fees, U.S.↔Europe ---------- */
overweight_fee(_,    W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(_,    W, 30)  :- W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(_,    W, 100) :- W > 53, W =< 70.

/* ----------  Choose the applicable extra fee (higher of the two) ---------- */
extra_fee(Route, Dim, W, Extra) :-
    oversize_fee(Route, Dim, OSize),
    overweight_fee(Route, W, OWeight),
    (OSize >= OWeight -> Extra = OSize ; Extra = OWeight).

/* ----------  Dimension helper (length+width+height) ---------- */
dimension(L, W, H, Dim) :- Dim is L+W+H.

/* ----------  Cost of one checked bag ---------- */
bag_cost(Order, L, Wd, H, Wt, Cost) :-
    dimension(L, Wd, H, Dim),
    route(jessica, Route),
    travel_class(jessica, Class),
    base_fee(Class, Route, Order, Base),
    extra_fee(Route, Dim, Wt, Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Sum the cost of all checked bags ---------- */
all_bags_cost(Sum) :-
    findall(C,
            (checked_bag(N,L,W,H,WT), bag_cost(N,L,W,H,WT,C)),
            Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Sum).

/* ----------  Total cost = ticket + bags ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(jessica, Ticket),
    all_bags_cost(BagCost),
    Total is Ticket + BagCost.

/* ----------  Show result ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
/* -------------  Statutory rules ------------- */

/* flight region : Beijing (China) <-> Sacramento (U.S.)               */
region(china_usa).

/* William’s booking class                                              */
class(main_plus).

/* Main-Plus allowance – first 2 checked bags are free (0 fee)          */
checked_bag_fee(Pos, 0) :-
    class(main_plus),
    Pos =< 2, !.
checked_bag_fee(Pos, 200) :-                % 3rd bag and onwards (to / from China)
    class(main_plus),
    Pos  > 2,
    region(china_usa).

/* ------------  Weight surcharges (to / from China) ------------------ */
overweight_fee(W, 0)  :- W =< 50, !.
overweight_fee(W, 30) :- W  > 50, W =< 53, !.
overweight_fee(W, 100):- W > 53, W =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(W, 450):- W > 70, W =< 100, !.

/* -------------  Size surcharges (to / from China) ------------------- */
oversize_fee(S, 0)   :- S =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(S, 30)  :- S  > 62, S =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(S, 200) :- S  > 65, S =< 115, !.

/* higher of oversize vs overweight applies (in addition to bag fee)   */
extra_fee(BagId, Extra) :-
    bag(BagId, L, W, H, Weight, yes),        % checked bag only
    S is L + W + H,
    oversize_fee(S, OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OW),
    ( OS >= OW -> Extra = OS ; Extra = OW ).

/* -------------  Facts from William’s case --------------------------- */

/* carry-on (not checked) */
bag(b1,22,14,9, 9,  no).   % fits carry-on limits, no fee

/* checked bags (order in which they’ll be processed) */
bag(b2,33,18,14,90, yes).  % #1
bag(b3,38,15,12,72, yes).  % #2
bag(b4,38,13,14,93, yes).  % #3
bag(b5,46,30,19,83, yes).  % #4
bag(b6,34,16,13,53, yes).  % #5
bag(b7,38,17, 9,52, yes).  % #6
bag(b8,42,22,19,53, yes).  % #7

/* position of each checked bag                                        */
bag_order(b2,1).
bag_order(b3,2).
bag_order(b4,3).
bag_order(b5,4).
bag_order(b6,5).
bag_order(b7,6).
bag_order(b8,7).

/* ------------  Total bag cost --------------------------------------- */
bag_total_fee(BagId, Total) :-
    bag_order(BagId, Pos),
    checked_bag_fee(Pos, BagFee),
    extra_fee(BagId, Extra),
    Total is BagFee + Extra.

total_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, bag_total_fee(_,F), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs, Sum).

/* ------------  Ticket price ----------------------------------------- */
ticket_price(585).

/* ------------  Grand total ------------------------------------------ */
total_cost(Total) :-
    total_bag_fees(BagSum),
    ticket_price(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagSum.

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(T), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [T]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 36 x 15 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 38 x 12 x 14 inches, 62 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 50 x 33 x 26 inches, 70 lbs; Jennifer's flight ticket is $236.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules (extracted subset) ---------- */

% Passenger and itinerary
class(main_plus).                        % Main Plus (Main Cabin^)
route(philadelphia, barcelona).          % U.S.  -> Europe
ticket_cost(236).

/* ----------  Passenger’s bags (after removing 1 free carry-on) ---------- */
/* checked_bag(Index, Weight(lbs), Length, Width, Height). */

checked_bag(1, 53, 51, 32, 27).   % 1st checked (oversize & overweight)
checked_bag(2, 57, 37, 15, 12).   % 2nd checked (overweight)
checked_bag(3, 55, 33, 19, 11).   % 3rd checked (overweight)
checked_bag(4, 52, 36, 16, 13).   % 4th checked (light oversize & overweight-1)
checked_bag(5, 52, 36, 15, 14).   % 5th checked (light oversize & overweight-1)
checked_bag(6, 62, 38, 12, 14).   % 6th checked (overweight)
checked_bag(7, 70, 50, 33, 26).   % 7th checked (big oversize & overweight)

/* ----------  Helper predicates ---------- */

linear_dim(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

% Oversize fees for U.S. <-> Europe
oversize_fee(Linear, Fee) :-
    ( Linear > 65 -> Fee = 150
    ; Linear > 62 -> Fee = 30
    ;                    Fee = 0).

% Overweight fees for U.S. <-> Europe
overweight_fee(Weight, Fee) :-
    ( Weight > 70 -> fail        % not accepted – not needed here
    ; Weight > 53 -> Fee = 100
    ; Weight > 50 -> Fee = 30
    ;                   Fee = 0).

% Choose the higher of overweight vs. oversize
extra_fee(Weight, Linear, Fee) :-
    overweight_fee(Weight, OW),
    oversize_fee(Linear, OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS).

/* Base checked-bag fees (Main Plus gives 2 free) */
base_checked_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    class(main_plus),
    ( Index = 1 ; Index = 2 ),   Fee = 0.
base_checked_fee(3, 200).        % 3rd bag
base_checked_fee(I, 200) :- I >= 4.   % 4th bag and beyond

/* ----------  Per-bag total fee ---------- */
bag_fee(Index, TotalFee) :-
    checked_bag(Index, W, L, B, H),
    linear_dim(L,B,H,Linear),
    base_checked_fee(Index, Base),
    extra_fee(W, Linear, Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Sum of all bag fees ---------- */
bags_total(Sum) :-
    findall(F, bag_fee(_,F), List),
    sum_list(List, Sum).

/* ----------  Grand total ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    bags_total(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Patricia is a Premium Economy Class passenger flying from Portland to New Orleans with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 11 x 7 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A backpack: 38 x 20 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 38 x 12 x 13 inches, 56 lbs; 4. A backpack: 34 x 16 x 14 inches, 63 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 37 x 13 x 14 inches, 51 lbs; 6. A backpack: 33 x 22 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 51 x 32 x 31 inches, 65 lbs; 8. A backpack: 53 x 30 x 25 inches, 56 lbs; Patricia's flight ticket is $119.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules that matter for this case --------------- */

% route for this itinerary
route(within_us).

% carry-on / personal-item size limits
carryon_dims(22,14,9).
personal_dims(18,14,8).

% checked-bag fees (Premium Economy, within U.S.)
bag_fee(Index,0)  :- Index =< 2.           % 1st & 2nd bag free
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(Index,200):- Index >= 4.

% oversize fees, within U.S.
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

% overweight fees, within U.S.
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W  > 53, W =< 70.

% choose the higher of overweight / oversize
extra_fee(Size,Weight,Fee):-
    oversize_fee(Size,O),
    overweight_fee(Weight,W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

/* --------------------  The case facts  ------------------------------ */

% item(ID, length, width, height, weight).
item(1,22,11, 7,12).
item(2,38,20,13,52).
item(3,38,12,13,56).
item(4,34,16,14,63).
item(5,37,13,14,51).
item(6,33,22, 9,51).
item(7,51,32,31,65).
item(8,53,30,25,56).

/* ----------------  Helper predicates  -------------------------------- */

size_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

is_carryon(ID) :-
    item(ID,L,W,H,_),
    carryon_dims(LC,WC,HC),
    L =< LC, W =< WC, H =< HC.

is_personal(ID) :-
    item(ID,L,W,H,_),
    personal_dims(LP,WP,HP),
    L =< LP, W =< WP, H =< HP.

/* --------------  Determine which items are checked ------------------- */

carryon_item(ID) :- is_carryon(ID), !.      % take the first that fits
checked_item(ID) :-
    item(ID,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carryon_item(ID).

checked_items(List) :-
    findall(ID,checked_item(ID),Unsorted),
    sort(Unsorted,List).                    % ascending order (2..8)

/* -------------  Cost of each checked bag ----------------------------- */

bag_cost(Index,ID,Cost) :-
    item(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    size_sum(L,W,H,Size),
    bag_fee(Index,BFee),
    extra_fee(Size,Weight,EFee),
    Cost is BFee + EFee.

/* -------------  Total baggage cost ----------------------------------- */

total_baggage_cost(Total) :-
    checked_items(IDs),
    bag_costs(1,IDs,Total).

bag_costs(_,[],0).
bag_costs(N,[ID|Rest],Total) :-
    bag_cost(N,ID,Cost1),
    N1 is N+1,
    bag_costs(N1,Rest,CostRest),
    Total is Cost1 + CostRest.

/* -------------  Overall trip cost ------------------------------------ */

flight_cost(119).

total_cost(Total) :-
    total_baggage_cost(BagCost),
    flight_cost(Flight),
    Total is BagCost + Flight.

/* --------------------  Query / output  ------------------------------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Daniel is a Premium Economy Class passenger flying from Minneapolis to Chicago with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 11 x 8 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 38 x 17 x 10 inches, 100 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 49 x 31 x 22 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 15 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 37 x 22 x 17 inches, 70 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 38 x 17 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 7. A backpack: 42 x 26 x 21 inches, 84 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 40 x 18 x 16 inches, 58 lbs; Daniel's flight ticket is $79.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- Facts (the case) ---------- */

% passenger and itinerary
class(premium_economy).
route(within_us).          % Minneapolis – Chicago (domestic)

% flight ticket price
flight_ticket(79).

% the 8 pieces Daniel wants to take
%  bag(#, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1,22,11, 8,  6).   % backpack – will be the carry-on
bag(2,38,17,10,100).
bag(3,49,31,22, 53).
bag(4,38,15,10, 51).
bag(5,37,22,17, 70).
bag(6,38,17, 9, 51).
bag(7,42,26,21, 84).
bag(8,40,18,16, 58).

/* ---------- Statutory thresholds ---------- */

% carry-on size limits
carry_on_limit(22,14,9).

% size fee rules  (within U.S.)
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
    Size =< 62, Fee = 0.
oversize_fee(Size,30) :-
    Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :-
    Size  > 65, Size =< 115.
oversize_fee(Size,not_accepted) :-
    Size  > 115.

% weight fee rules (within U.S.)
overweight_fee(W,0)  :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30) :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100):- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200):- W  > 70, W =< 100.
overweight_fee(W,not_accepted):- W  > 100.

% checked-bag base fee rules (within U.S., Premium Economy)
base_checked_fee(Index,0)   :- class(premium_economy), Index =< 2.  % 1st–2nd free
base_checked_fee(3,150)     :- class(premium_economy).
base_checked_fee(Index,200) :- class(premium_economy), Index >= 4.

% helper – max of two numbers
max_two(A,B,A) :- A>=B.
max_two(A,B,B) :- B>A.

/* ---------- Derivations ---------- */

% is a piece a carry-on?
is_carry_on(BagID) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_limit(CL,CW,CH),
    L =< CL, W =< CW, H =< CH.

% enumerate checked pieces in the original order
checked_bag_index(Index,BagID) :-
    findall(ID,(bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ is_carry_on(ID)),IDs),
    nth1(Index,IDs,BagID).

% fee for one checked bag
bag_fee(Index,BagID,TotalFee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(Size,OverSizeFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OverWeightFee),
    % check acceptance
    OverSizeFee \= not_accepted,
    OverWeightFee \= not_accepted,
    max_two(OverSizeFee,OverWeightFee,ExtraFee),
    base_checked_fee(Index,BaseFee),
    TotalFee is BaseFee + ExtraFee.

% sum of all checked-bag fees
total_checked_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(Fee,
            (checked_bag_index(I,BID), bag_fee(I,BID,Fee)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees,Sum).

% grand total (bags + ticket)
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(T),
    total_checked_fees(BagSum),
    Total is T + BagSum.

/* ---------- Query ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Jessica is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Sydney to Seattle with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 11 x 6 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 54 x 30 x 30 inches, 63 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 10 inches, 61 lbs; 4. A backpack: 44 x 23 x 20 inches, 59 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 15 x 14 inches, 66 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 48 x 30 x 23 inches, 53 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 37 x 13 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 36 x 13 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $485.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2375"]).
/* =========================================================
   Jessica – Sydney (Australia)  ->  Seattle (U.S.A.)
   Main Cabin

   Goal:  Compute the minimum total trip cost (ticket +
          all checked-bag base fees + oversize / overweight
          penalties), applying American Airlines’ published
          bag-fee rules for travel to / from Australia.
   ========================================================= */


/* ------------  BASIC FACTS  -------------------------------- */

flight_cost(485).                  /* price of passenger ticket  */
cabin(main_cabin).

/*     bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)                   */
bag(1,20,11, 6,  7).      /* carry-on backpack                 */
bag(2,54,30,30, 63).
bag(3,33,20,10, 61).
bag(4,44,23,20, 59).
bag(5,35,15,14, 66).
bag(6,48,30,23, 53).
bag(7,37,13,14, 52).
bag(8,36,13,14, 53).


/* ------------  CARRY-ON LIMITS  ----------------------------- */

carry_on_max(22,14,9).

carry_on(Id) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
       carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
       L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.


/* ------------  CHECKED-BAG LIST  ---------------------------- */

checked_bag_ids(Ids) :-
       findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)), Ids).



/* ------------  SIZE  /  WEIGHT HELPERS  -------------------- */

dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.



/* ------------  OVERSIZE FEES  (Australia <-> U.S.)  -------- */

oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (  Sum =< 62           -> Fee = 0
       ;  Sum =< 65           -> Fee = 30
       ;  Sum =< 115          -> Fee = 200).



/* ------------  OVERWEIGHT FEES  (Australia <-> U.S.)  ------- */
/* Thresh = allowed weight (70 lb for complimentary, 50 lb charged) */

overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (  W =< Thresh         -> Fee = 0
       ;  W =< 53             -> Fee = 30
       ;  W =< 70             -> Fee = 100
       ;  W =< 100            -> Fee = 200 ).     % (>70 not accepted; never reached here)



/* ------------  PENALTY (oversize / overweight)  ------------- */

penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-        /* complimentary bag → 70-lb limit */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-     /* charged bag → 50-lb limit       */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).



/* ------------  BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES  (Main Cabin) ---------- */
/*   to / from Australia / New Zealand                          */

bag_fee(1,0).          /* 1st checked bag complimentary       */
bag_fee(2,100).        /* 2nd                                */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.



/* ------------  CHOOSING THE COMPLIMENTARY BAG  -------------- */

choose_free(Free,Rest) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Free,All,Rest).

ordered_list(Free,Ordered) :-
       choose_free(Free,Rest),
       Ordered = [Free|Rest].      /* free bag is placed first */



/* ------------  COST FOR A PARTICULAR ORDERING  -------------- */

cost_for_order(List,Total) :-
       cost_bags(List,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(F),
       Total is F + BaseFees + Penalties.

cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,BaseSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =:= 1 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BFee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,Next,BaseRest,PenRest),
       BaseSum is BFee + BaseRest,
       PenSum  is Pen  + PenRest.



/* ------------  MINIMUM TOTAL COST  -------------------------- */

total_cost(MinCost) :-
       setof(Cost,
             Free^List^(ordered_list(Free,List), cost_for_order(List,Cost)),
             Costs),
       min_list(Costs,MinCost).



/* ------------  QUERY & OUTPUT  ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: Mary is a Business Class passenger flying from Orlando to Los Angeles with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 13 x 7 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 41 x 24 x 22 inches, 85 lbs; 3. A backpack: 47 x 33 x 22 inches, 63 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 12 x 14 inches, 57 lbs; 5. A backpack: 35 x 19 x 9 inches, 87 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 33 x 19 x 13 inches, 63 lbs; 7. A backpack: 35 x 19 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 50 x 32 x 29 inches, 75 lbs; Mary's flight ticket is $291.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2131"]).
/* ===================================================================
   Mary – Business Class – Orlando (MCO) → Los Angeles (LAX)
   Domestic itinerary (U.S. – U.S.)

   Goal:  Compute the total amount Mary owes (ticket + all luggage
          charges) under the American Airlines bag-fee statutes.
   ===================================================================*/

/* --------  Ticket price  ------------------------------------------ */
flight_cost(291).


/* --------  Bags  ---------------------------------------------------
   bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)
   Bag 1 (22×13×7, 7 lb) fits the carry-on limits and is free,   so it
   is NOT listed below.  The remaining items must be checked.       */
bag(2,41,24,22,85).
bag(3,47,33,22,63).
bag(4,38,12,14,57).
bag(5,35,19, 9,87).
bag(6,33,19,13,63).
bag(7,35,19, 9,53).
bag(8,50,32,29,75).

/* ordered list of all checked-bag Ids in the sequence they were
   given (needed to preserve “natural” order after removing freebies)*/
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* --------  Statutory parameters for this route / cabin ----------- */

/* dimensional sum */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between U.S. & Canada                     */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62          -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65          -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115         -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee – threshold differs for complimentary vs charged  */
overweight_fee(W,Threshold,Fee) :-
        (  W =< Threshold     -> Fee = 0
        ;  W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
        ;  W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
        ;  W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs overweight ---------------------- */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),    % 70-lb allowance for free bags
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),    % 50-lb allowance for paid bags
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee – Business Class, domestic ----------------- */
bag_fee(Idx,0)      :- Idx =< 2.          % 1st / 2nd free
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(Idx,200)    :- Idx >= 4.

/* --------  Helper predicates  ------------------------------------ */

/* pick any 2 distinct elements F1<F2 from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
        append(_, [F1|Tail], List),
        member(F2, Tail).

/* build overall checked-bag order putting the 2 freebies first      */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,Rest1),
        select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* walk through ordered list, accumulating base fees + penalties     */
cost_bags([], _, 0, 0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs], Idx, CostSum, PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Base),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        Next is Idx + 1,
        cost_bags(Bs,Next,RestCost,RestPen),
        CostSum is Base + RestCost,
        PenSum  is Pen  + RestPen.

/* compute total for one particular choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Tix),
        Total is Tix + BaseFees + Penalties.

/* minimal total over all ways of selecting the 2 free checked bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(List),
        findall(T,
                ( choose_two(List,F1,F2),
                  cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T) ),
                Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* --------  Produce the answer  ----------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Statutory rules – (subset needed for this case only)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% ----------------  Carry-on allowance --------------------
carry_on_size_limit(22,14,9).           % inches (L,W,H)

% A bag is a carry-on if it does not exceed the carry-on limits
carry_on(BagID) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_size_limit(Lm,Wm,Hm),
    L =< Lm, W =< Wm, H =< Hm.

% ----------------  Base checked-bag fees -----------------
% For Premium-Economy on purely domestic U.S. itineraries
% BagNo = 1,2 : free
% BagNo = 3    : $150
% BagNo >=4    : $200
base_checked_fee(1,0).
base_checked_fee(2,0).
base_checked_fee(3,150).
base_checked_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

% ----------------  Oversize fees (domestic) --------------
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
    Size > 62, Size =< 65,  Fee = 30.
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
    Size > 65, Size =< 115, Fee = 200.
oversize_fee(Size,0) :-
    Size =< 62.

% ----------------  Over-weight fees (domestic) -----------
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    W > 50,  W =< 53,  Fee = 30.
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    W > 53,  W =< 70,  Fee = 100.
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    W > 70,  W =< 100, Fee = 200.
overweight_fee(W,0) :-
    W =< 50.

% ----------------  Higher of over-size / over-weight -----
extra_fee(BagID,Fee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(Size,OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OWFee),
    Fee is max(OSFee,OWFee).

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Case facts – Michael’s itinerary
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

ticket_price(182).

% bag(ID,Length,Width,Height,Weight).
bag(1,20,13,6,  9).
bag(2,35,19,11,66).
bag(3,35,16,12,75).
bag(4,38,15,12,56).
bag(5,45,31,20,51).
bag(6,50,33,31,51).
bag(7,40,23,16,98).
bag(8,35,17,11,77).

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Computations
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% Produce list of checked bags (those that are NOT carry-ons)
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(ID,(bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(ID)),List).

% Annotate each checked bag with its sequence number (1-based)
checked_bag_with_index(IndexIDList) :-
    checked_bag_list(Bags),
    findall(N-ID,(nth1(N,Bags,ID)),IndexIDList).

% Cost of a single checked bag = base fee + max(over-size,over-weight)
checked_bag_cost(Seq-ID,Cost) :-
    base_checked_fee(Seq,Base),
    extra_fee(ID,Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

% Sum of all checked-bag costs
total_checked_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bag_with_index(L),
    findall(Cost, (member(Pair,L), checked_bag_cost(Pair,Cost)), Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Total).

% Grand total = ticket + checked-bag charges
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(T),
    total_checked_cost(CB),
    Total is T + CB.

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%  Produce answer
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
%  Statutory rules that apply to Thomas’ itinerary
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% route category that applies to every checked bag in this case

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Oversize fees

% fee(SizeSum, Fee) – SizeSum is L+W+H in inches
oversize_fee(Sum, 0)   :- Sum =< 62.

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

%   • Main Plus gets 1 extra free bag (max 2 free)
%   • 3rd bag  = $200, 4th+ = $200 each
base_checked_fee(Index, 0)   :- Index =< 2.      % 1st & 2nd free
base_checked_fee(Index, 200) :- Index >= 3.      % 3rd, 4th … $200

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Helper predicates
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

%                        (oversize fee, overweight fee)
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
bag_total_fee(Index, TotalFee) :-
    bag(Index, L, W, H, Weight),
    dimension_sum(L, W, H, Sum),
    oversize_fee(Sum, Oversize),
    overweight_fee(Weight, Overweight),
```

```prolog
/* ---------- Statutory rules (subset relevant to this case) ---------- */

/* carry-on limits */
carry_on_limits(22,14,9).

/* base checked–bag fees for Business Class – domestic (within U.S.) */
base_fee(Index,0)   :- Index =< 2.          /* 1st & 2nd bags free   */
base_fee(3,150).                         /* 3rd bag               */
base_fee(Index,200) :- Index >= 4.         /* 4th bag and onwards   */

/* oversize fees – domestic */
oversize_fee(Size,0)                    :- Size =< 62.
oversize_fee(Size,30)                   :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.
oversize_fee(Size,200)                  :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.

/* overweight fees – domestic */
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200)  :- W > 70, W =< 100.

/* if both oversize and overweight apply, charge only the higher one */
surcharge(Oversize,Overweight,Over) :-
    (Oversize >= Overweight -> Over = Oversize ; Over = Overweight).

/* ---------- Facts for Thomas’ trip ---------- */

flight_ticket(200).

/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight). */
bag(1,19,13, 9,  5).
bag(2,41,28,19, 53).
bag(3,34,22, 9, 97).
bag(4,42,22,14,100).
bag(5,50,34,30, 81).
bag(6,37,16,15, 51).
bag(7,34,20, 9, 95).
bag(8,37,12,14, 53).

/* ---------- Derived facts and rules ---------- */

/* identify the (single) carry-on – first bag that fits the limits */
carry_on_id(ID) :-
    carry_on_limits(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH, !.

/* checked bags are all others */
checked_bag(ID) :- bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on_id(ID).

/* list of checked-bag IDs in ascending order */
checked_ids(IDs) :- findall(ID,checked_bag(ID),List), sort(List,IDs).

/* position (1-based) of each checked bag */
bag_index(ID,Idx) :-
    checked_ids(IDs),
    nth1(Idx,IDs,ID).

/* linear size of a bag */
size(ID,S) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee for a bag */
bag_oversize_fee(ID,Fee) :-
    size(ID,S),
    oversize_fee(S,Fee).

/* overweight fee for a bag */
bag_overweight_fee(ID,Fee) :-
    bag(ID,_,_,_,W),
    overweight_fee(W,Fee).

/* surcharge (max of oversize / overweight) */
bag_surcharge(ID,SFee) :-
    bag_oversize_fee(ID,O1),
    bag_overweight_fee(ID,O2),
    surcharge(O1,O2,SFee).

/* total cost for an individual checked bag */
bag_cost(ID,Cost) :-
    bag_index(ID,Idx),
    base_fee(Idx,BF),
    bag_surcharge(ID,SF),
    Cost is BF + SF.

/* total of all checked-bag costs */
total_bag_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (checked_bag(ID), bag_cost(ID,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

/* grand total: ticket + bags */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    total_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------- Query ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```
