```prolog
/* ------------  Statutory rules that apply to this itinerary ------------- */

/*  The trip is Premium-Economy, India  ->  U.S.
    • First 2 checked bags:            $0 each
    • 3rd bag and every bag thereafter $200 each                (base fee)
    • Over-weight fees (lbs) applicable world-wide on this route
          0-50           : $0
          >50-53          : $30
          >53-70          : $100
          >70-100         : $450
    • Over-size fees (linear inches) applicable India-route
          >62-65          : $30
          >65-115         : $200
    • When both over-size and over-weight apply, charge ONLY the higher one
*/

/* ------------------------------- Facts ---------------------------------- */

/*  bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).   Dimensions in inches, weight in lbs */
bag(1, 20, 13,  6,  6).      /* carry-on – will be ignored for checked-bag fees */
bag(2, 37, 15, 13, 84).
bag(3, 35, 18, 10, 59).
bag(4, 36, 18, 10, 56).
bag(5, 50, 31, 24, 56).
bag(6, 38, 12, 14, 83).
bag(7, 35, 18, 12, 52).
bag(8, 33, 16, 14, 90).

flight_ticket(316).          /* $316 fare */

/* --------------------------- Helper rules ------------------------------- */

/* total size of a bag (linear inches) */
bag_size(L, W, H, S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ---------- over-size fee for India ↔ US flights ---------- */
oversize_fee(S, Fee) :-
    (  S > 65            -> Fee = 200          %  >65 –115 in
    ;  S > 62            -> Fee = 30           %  >62 –65 in
    ;                       Fee = 0
    ).

/* ---------- over-weight fee (global table for this route) -------------- */
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    (  W > 100           -> fail              % not accepted – impossible here
    ;  W > 70            -> Fee = 450
    ;  W > 53            -> Fee = 100
    ;  W > 50            -> Fee = 30
    ;                       Fee = 0
    ).

/* choose the higher of overweight / oversize (statute wording) */
surcharge(L, W, H, Weight, Fee) :-
    bag_size(L,W,H,S),
    oversize_fee(S, OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OW),
    ( OW >= OS -> Fee = OW ; Fee = OS ).

/* --------------------- base checked-bag fee ---------------------------- */
/* 1st & 2nd bag free; every bag afterwards $200                           */
base_bag_fee(Index, Fee) :-
    ( Index =< 2 -> Fee = 0
    ;               Fee = 200
    ).

/* ---------------- cost of each checked bag ----------------------------- */
bag_cost(Index, ID, Cost) :-
    bag(ID,L,W,H,Weight),
    ID \= 1,                                % ignore the carry-on
    base_bag_fee(Index, Base),
    surcharge(L,W,H,Weight, Surcharge),
    Cost is Base + Surcharge.

/* ---------------------------- bag list --------------------------------- */
/* Checked bags are all bags except #1, numbered in ascending ID order     */
checked_bag_index(1,2).
checked_bag_index(2,3).
checked_bag_index(3,4).
checked_bag_index(4,5).
checked_bag_index(5,6).
checked_bag_index(6,7).
checked_bag_index(7,8).

/* ------------------------ total for all bags --------------------------- */
total_bag_cost(Total) :-
    findall(Cost,
            (checked_bag_index(Index,ID), bag_cost(Index,ID,Cost)),
            Costs),
    sumlist(Costs, Total).

/* ------------------------- grand total --------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    total_bag_cost(BagTotal),
    flight_ticket(Fare),
    Total is Fare + BagTotal.

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 34 x 17 x 12 inches, 51 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 51 x 33 x 29 inches, 57 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $277.

```prolog
/* ----------  RULES (encoded statutes relevant to this case)  ---------- */

% --------------------  flight / passenger facts  -----------------------
route(within_us).               % Houston – Denver
class(main_cabin).              % ticketed service class
ticket_price(277).              % USD

% --------------------  bag facts  --------------------------------------
% bag(ID, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  (dimensions in inches, weight in lbs)
bag(1, 18, 14, 7,  5).   % personal-item candidate
bag(2, 42, 20, 19, 81).
bag(3, 33, 21, 10, 86).
bag(4, 38, 21, 15, 89).
bag(5, 35, 17, 13, 53).
bag(6, 37, 19, 15, 65).
bag(7, 34, 17, 12, 51).
bag(8, 51, 33, 29, 57).

% --------------------  allowances  -------------------------------------
personal_item_max(18,14,8).

% personal_item(+BagId)  – true if bag qualifies as free personal item
personal_item(B) :-
    bag(B,L,W,H,_),
    personal_item_max(PL,PW,PH),
    L =< PL, W =< PW, H =< PH.

% --------------------  checked-bag base fee by ordinal ------------------
% checked_base_fee(+BagNumber, -Fee)
checked_base_fee(1,40).
checked_base_fee(2,45).
checked_base_fee(3,150).
checked_base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

% --------------------  oversize fee -------------------------------------
% oversize_fee(+BagId,-Fee)
oversize_fee(B,Fee) :-
    bag(B,L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H,
    (  S > 65  -> Fee = 200
    ;  S > 62  -> Fee = 30
    ;  Fee = 0 ).

% --------------------  overweight fee -----------------------------------
% overweight_fee(+BagId,-Fee)
overweight_fee(B,Fee) :-
    bag(B,_,_,_,Wt),
    (  Wt > 70         -> Fee = 200
    ;  Wt > 53         -> Fee = 100
    ;  Wt > 50         -> Fee = 30
    ;  Fee = 0 ).

% --------------------  extra fee (higher of over-size/weight)------------
extra_fee(B,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(B,F1), overweight_fee(B,F2),
    Fee is max(F1,F2).

% --------------------  derive list of chargeable checked bags -----------
checked_bag_list(List) :-
    findall(B, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ personal_item(B)), List).

% --------------------  total checked-bag charges ------------------------
checked_bags_cost(Cost) :-
    checked_bag_list(Bags),
    findall(BagCost,
        ( nth1(Idx,Bags,B),
          checked_base_fee(Idx,Base),
          extra_fee(B,Extra),
          BagCost is Base+Extra ),
        Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Cost).

% --------------------  grand total  -------------------------------------
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    checked_bags_cost(BagFees),
    Total is Tix + BagFees.

                            /* ----------  QUERY ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 12 inches, 64 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 37 x 15 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; Charles's flight ticket is $200.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1870"]).
/* ===================================================================== */
/*  Statutory reasoning – Charles (Business Class, Dallas ➝ Ottawa)      */
/* ===================================================================== */

/* --------------  Carry–on limits ------------------------------------- */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).

/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) – ALL the customer’s items         */
bag(1,22,13, 6,  6).     /* qualifies as the single carry-on            */
bag(2,41,17,14, 60).
bag(3,37,18,16, 65).
bag(4,38,15,12, 54).
bag(5,33,21, 9, 53).
bag(6,38,13,12, 96).
bag(7,33,20,12, 64).
bag(8,37,15,13, 52).

/* list of those items that will (must) be checked                       */
checked_bag_ids(Checked) :-
       findall(Id,
               ( bag(Id,_,_,_,_),
                 \+ carry_on(Id) ),
               Checked).

/* does an item qualify as the lone carry-on?                            */
carry_on(Id) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
       carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
       L=<MaxL, W=<MaxW, H=<MaxH.

/* --------------  Checked-bag fees for Business on this route --------- */
/* Between / within U.S. and Canada                                      */
bag_fee(1,0).                 /* 1st checked bag – complimentary        */
bag_fee(2,0).                 /* 2nd checked bag – complimentary        */
bag_fee(3,150).               /* 3rd bag                                */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.       /* 4th and beyond                         */

/* --------------  Oversize fees (U.S. / Canada) ----------------------- */
oversize_fee(Dim,0)   :- Dim =< 62.
oversize_fee(Dim,30)  :- Dim > 62, Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim > 65, Dim =< 115.

/* --------------  Over-weight fees (U.S. / Canada) -------------------- */
/* Thresh is 70 lbs for complimentary bags, 50 lbs for charged bags      */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,0)   :- W =< Thresh.
overweight_fee(W,_,30)       :- W  =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,_,100)      :- W > 53,  W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,_,200)      :- W > 70,  W =< 100.

/* --------------  Penalty: higher of oversize vs overweight ----------- */
penalty(Id,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
       DimSum is L+W+H,
       oversize_fee(DimSum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),        % complimentary => 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(Id,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
       DimSum is L+W+H,
       oversize_fee(DimSum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),        % charged bag   => 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* --------------  Helper predicates ----------------------------------- */

/* pick 2 different freebies (F1<F2) from the checked list               */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* move the 2 chosen freebies to the front, keep original order for rest */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* compute cost for a specific choice of two complimentary bags          */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through the ordered list accumulating fees and penalties         */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BFee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestCost,RestPen),
       CostSum is BFee + RestCost,
       PenSum  is Pen   + RestPen.

/* minimal total cost over all possible choices of 2 freebies            */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T) ),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* --------------  Flight ticket --------------------------------------- */
flight_cost(200).

/* ===================================================================== */
/*  Query: output the total amount due                                   */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

```prolog
    Pos >= 4.

/* --------------------  Oversize fees (inches = L+W+H)  -------------------- */
oversize_fee(L,W,H,Fee) :-
    S is L+W+H,
    (   S =< 62  -> Fee = 0
    ;   S =< 65  -> Fee = 30
    ;   S =< 115 -> Fee = 200
    ;   Fee = 99999        /* not accepted – not reached in this case */
    ).

/* --------------------  Overweight fees (pounds)  -------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,Fee) :-
    (   W =< 50  -> Fee = 0
    ;   W =< 53  -> Fee = 30
    ;   W =< 70  -> Fee = 100
    ;   W =< 100 -> Fee = 200
    ;   Fee = 99999        /* not accepted – not reached in this case */
    ).

/* --------------------  Checked-bag list (order preserved)  -------------------- */
checked_bag_ids(List) :-
    findall(ID, (bag(ID,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(ID)), List).

/* --------------------  Fee for one checked bag  -------------------- */
bag_total_fee(Index, BagID, TotalFee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    oversize_fee(L,W,H,OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OWFee),
    ExtraFee is max(OSFee,OWFee),          /* only the higher of the two applies */
    base_fee(Index,Base),
    TotalFee is Base + ExtraFee.

/* --------------------  All luggage fees  -------------------- */
bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bag_ids(IDs),
    findall(Fee,
            (nth1(Index, IDs, BagID),
             bag_total_fee(Index, BagID, Fee)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

/* --------------------  Grand total  -------------------- */
total_cost(GrandTotal) :-
    bag_fees(Bags),
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    GrandTotal is Bags + Ticket.

/* --------------------  Query & output  -------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 40 x 18 x 15 inches, 59 lbs; 3. A backpack: 35 x 21 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A backpack: 36 x 22 x 12 inches, 72 lbs; 5. A backpack: 35 x 18 x 11 inches, 86 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 37 x 22 x 17 inches, 64 lbs; 7. A backpack: 35 x 17 x 12 inches, 51 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 34 x 17 x 12 inches, 67 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $47.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Rules from the statutes (restricted to this case) ---------- */

:- use_module(library(lists)).

/* item(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).  */
item(1,22,14, 6,  8).
item(2,40,18,15, 59).
item(3,35,21, 9, 51).
item(4,36,22,12, 72).
item(5,35,18,11, 86).
item(6,37,22,17, 64).
item(7,35,17,12, 51).
item(8,34,17,12, 67).

/* ----------------  Free carry-on allowance  ---------------- */

carry_on_item(1).            % exactly 1 bag fits the 22×14×9 in. limit

checked_item(Id) :-           % every other item will be checked
    item(Id,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carry_on_item(Id).

/* --------------  size / weight surcharges  ----------------- */

dimension_sum(Id,S) :-
    item(Id,L,W,H,_),
    S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees (within U.S.) */
oversize_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    dimension_sum(Id,S),
    (   S > 65          -> Fee = 200         % over 65 in – 115 in
    ;   S > 62          -> Fee = 30          % over 62 in – 65 in
    ;                       Fee = 0).

/* overweight fees (within U.S.) */
overweight_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    item(Id,_,_,_,Wt),
    (   Wt >  70        -> Fee = 200         % 70-100 lb
    ;   Wt >  53        -> Fee = 100         % 53-70  lb
    ;   Wt >  50        -> Fee = 30          % 50-53  lb
    ;                       Fee = 0).

/* choose the higher of the two surcharges */
extra_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Id,O),
    overweight_fee(Id,W),
    (O >= W -> Fee = O ; Fee = W).

/* --------------  basic checked-bag fees (Basic Econ., domestic) ---------- */

bag_base_fee(Idx,Fee) :-      % Idx starts at 1 for the 1st checked bag
    (   Idx =:= 1 -> Fee = 40
    ;   Idx =:= 2 -> Fee = 45
    ;   Idx =:= 3 -> Fee = 150
    ;                 Fee = 200).

/* total base fees for all checked bags */
base_total(Total) :-
    findall(Id,checked_item(Id),Ids),
    length(Ids,N),
    base_total_acc(1,N,0,Total).

base_total_acc(I,N,Acc,Total) :-
    (   I > N
    ->  Total = Acc
    ;   bag_base_fee(I,FeeI),
        Acc1 is Acc + FeeI,
        I1 is I + 1,
        base_total_acc(I1,N,Acc1,Total)
    ).

/* total surcharges for all checked bags */
extra_total(Total) :-
    findall(F,(checked_item(Id),extra_fee(Id,F)),Fs),
    sum_list(Fs,Total).

/* -----------------------  grand total ----------------------- */

flight_ticket(47).

total_cost(Total) :-
    base_total(Base),
    extra_total(Extra),
    flight_ticket(Tix),
    Total is Base + Extra + Tix.

/* --------------------  produce the answer ------------------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- Facts describing the passenger, flight and bags ---------- */
flight_region(within_us).            /* Seattle – Salt Lake City          */
passenger_class(premium_economy).    /* Premium Economy                   */
ticket_price(102).                   /* Flight ticket                     */

% bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1,21,11, 8,  9).   /* free carry-on                               */
bag(2,37,16,10, 63).
bag(3,38,15,10, 64).
bag(4,48,27,25, 66).
bag(5,37,16,11, 53).
bag(6,34,21,10, 61).
bag(7,36,15,14, 53).
bag(8,37,20,12, 83).

/* ---------- Helper predicates ---------- */

% a single free carry-on is allowed if it fits the sizer (22×14×9 in.)
carry_on(BagId) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

% Per-bag oversize fee for the within-US region
oversize_fee(BagId,Fee) :-
    bag(BagId,L,W,H,_),
    Dim is L+W+H,
    ( Dim =< 62 -> Fee=0
    ; Dim =< 65 -> Fee=30
    ; Dim =<115 -> Fee=200
    ;               Fee=999999   % not accepted (won’t occur here)
    ).

% Per-bag overweight fee for the within-US region
overweight_fee(BagId,Fee) :-
    bag(BagId,_,_,_,Wt),
    ( Wt =< 50 -> Fee=0
    ; Wt =< 53 -> Fee=30
    ; Wt =< 70 -> Fee=100
    ; Wt =<100 -> Fee=200
    ;              Fee=999999    % not accepted (won’t occur here)
    ).

% The additional fee is the higher of oversize/overweight (policy text)
additional_fee(BagId,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(BagId,OFee),
    overweight_fee(BagId,WFee),
    ( OFee >= WFee -> Fee=OFee ; Fee=WFee ).

/* Base checked-bag fees for Premium Economy within the U.S. */
base_fee(Order,Fee) :-
    ( Order =:= 1 -> Fee = 0
    ; Order =:= 2 -> Fee = 0
    ; Order =:= 3 -> Fee = 150
    ; Order  >= 4 -> Fee = 200).

/* ---------- Aggregate bag-fee calculation ---------- */
checked_bag_ids(List) :-
    findall(B, (bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), List).

bags_total_fee(Total) :-
    checked_bag_ids(Bags),
    sort(Bags,Ordered),         % keep ascending order of IDs
    bags_total_fee(Ordered,1,0,Total).

bags_total_fee([],_,Acc,Acc).
bags_total_fee([B|Rest],Order,Acc,Total) :-
    base_fee(Order,Base),
    additional_fee(B,Add),
    Cost is Base + Add,
    Acc1 is Acc + Cost,
    Order1 is Order + 1,
    bags_total_fee(Rest,Order1,Acc1,Total).

/* ---------- Grand total (ticket + bags) ---------- */
total_cost(GrandTotal) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    bags_total_fee(BagFees),
    GrandTotal is Tix + BagFees.

/* ---------- Query requested by the grader ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules that apply to this case ---------- */

/* ticket price */
flight_ticket(1333).

/* --------- base checked-bag fee for Basic Economy
              (route: To / From Hong Kong, i.e. “India / China /
              Japan / South Korea / Hong Kong / Australia / NZ”)  ----- */

base_fee(1,75).            /* 1st checked bag   */
base_fee(2,100).           /* 2nd checked bag   */
base_fee(N,200) :-         /* 3rd bag and every bag after that */
    integer(N), N>2.

/* --------------  oversize fees (in inches, L+W+H) --------------- */
oversize_fee(Size,30)  :- Size>62 , Size=<65.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size>65 , Size=<115.
oversize_fee(Size,0)   :- Size=<62.

/* --------------  overweight fees (in pounds) -------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,450) :- W>70 , W=<100.         /* 70 – 100 lbs */
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53 , W=<70.          /* 53 – 70  lbs */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50 , W=<53.          /* 50 – 53  lbs */
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.

/* For any bag, the extra charge is the higher of over-size vs over-weight */
extra_fee(Size,Weight,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size,O),
    overweight_fee(Weight,W),
    (O>W -> Fee=O ; Fee=W).

/* ---------------- The bags Linda is checking ------------------- */
/* bag(Number, Length, Width, Height, Weight) */

bag(1,35,16,12,98).
bag(2,36,15,12,63).
bag(3,35,21,9, 99).
bag(4,42,22,17,53).
bag(5,34,21,11,52).
bag(6,45,24,16,77).
bag(7,36,13,14,97).

/* --------------  Cost of every individual checked bag ---------- */
bag_cost(Num,Cost) :-
    bag(Num,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size is L+W+H,
    extra_fee(Size,Weight,Extra),
    base_fee(Num,Base),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

/* -------------- Sum helpers ------------------------------------ */
sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],S) :- sum_list(T,S1), S is H+S1.

/* -------------- Total of all checked bags ---------------------- */
bag_total(Total) :-
    findall(C,bag_cost(_,C),Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

/* -------------------- Grand total ------------------------------ */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Tkt),

/* -------------------  Output query ----------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total),
```

text: Joseph is a First Class passenger flying from Minneapolis to Phoenix with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 11 x 7 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 34 x 18 x 11 inches, 70 lbs; 3. A backpack: 48 x 35 x 24 inches, 63 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 11 inches, 81 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 44 x 20 x 19 inches, 68 lbs; 6. A backpack: 41 x 30 x 17 inches, 97 lbs; 7. A backpack: 54 x 32 x 27 inches, 60 lbs; 8. A backpack: 46 x 31 x 20 inches, 52 lbs; Joseph's flight ticket is $77.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2257"]).
/* -------------  Facts describing Joseph’s trip  ------------------ */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(77).

/* checked bags: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)                */
bag(2,34,18,11,70).
bag(3,48,35,24,63).
bag(4,33,20,11,81).
bag(5,44,20,19,68).
bag(6,41,30,17,97).
bag(7,54,32,27,60).
bag(8,46,31,20,52).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids                                      */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* -----------------  Statutory rules / predicates  ---------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

/* sum of the three dimensions of a bag                              */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between U.S. and Canada                   */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee. ‘Thresh’ is the free allowance in lbs.            */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for 1 bag = higher of oversize vs overweight              */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-                     /* complimentary bag  */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),           % 70-lb allowance
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-                  /* fee-paying bag     */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),           % 50-lb allowance
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee for First Class on domestic / Canada route   */
bag_fee(1,0).      % 1st checked bag free
bag_fee(2,0).      % 2nd checked bag free
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ----------------------  Helper predicates  ---------------------- */
/* ----------------------------------------------------------------- */

/* choose 2 different elements (F1 < F2) from a list                 */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* put the 2 complimentary bags first, keep the rest in given order  */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* compute cost for one particular selection of complimentary bags   */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk through the ordered list accumulating fees and penalties     */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of picking 2 complimentary bags  */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ------------------------  Final answer  ------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules that apply to this case  ---------- */

/* size in inches, weight in lbs                                            */
/* Jessica’s itinerary is San Juan (Puerto Rico) → Boston (U.S.),           */
/* Basic Economy.  The relevant region is “within / between U.S.,           */
/* Puerto Rico and U.S. Virgin Islands”.                                    */

flight_cost(292).          /* price of the ticket */

/* ----------------  Checked-bag facts (ID, L, W, H, Weight)  -------------- */
bag(2,33,22, 9, 52).
bag(3,35,17,11, 88).
bag(4,40,24,20, 51).
bag(5,47,33,22, 77).
bag(6,46,25,23, 95).
bag(7,38,14,12, 61).
bag(8,51,34,30, 55).

/* order in which the bags are counted (1st-checked, 2nd-checked …) */
bag_order([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* --------------  Generic rules derived from the statutes  ---------------- */

/* outside dimension */
size(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee (within U.S./P.R./USVI) */
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
    (   Size > 65              -> Fee = 200          % 65–115 in
    ;   Size > 62              -> Fee = 30           % 62–65  in
    ;                            Fee = 0).

/* overweight fee (within U.S./P.R./USVI, Basic Economy) */
overweight_fee(Wt,Fee) :-
    (   Wt > 70                -> Fee = 200          % 70–100 lbs
    ;   Wt > 53                -> Fee = 100          % 53–70  lbs
    ;   Wt > 50                -> Fee = 30           % 50–53  lbs
    ;                            Fee = 0).

/* When both oversize and overweight apply, the higher one is charged */
extra_fee(Size,Weight,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size,OF),
    overweight_fee(Weight,WF),
    (OF >= WF -> Fee = OF ; Fee = WF).

/* position of a bag in the checked-bag sequence */
bag_position(BagID,Pos) :-
    bag_order(List), nth1(Pos,List,BagID).

/* base checked-bag fee for Basic Economy, within U.S./P.R./USVI */
base_fee(Pos,Fee) :-
    (   Pos =:= 1 -> Fee =  40
    ;   Pos =:= 2 -> Fee =  45
    ;   Pos =:= 3 -> Fee = 150
    ;               Fee = 200 ).      % 4th bag and beyond

/* total fee for one bag = base fee + (max oversize/overweight) */
bag_fee(BagID,Fee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    size(L,W,H,Size),
    extra_fee(Size,Weight,Extra),
    bag_position(BagID,Pos),
    base_fee(Pos,Base),
    Fee is Base + Extra.

/* sum of all checked-bag fees */
total_checked_cost(Total) :-
    bag_order(Order),
    maplist(bag_fee,Order,Fees),
    sumlist(Fees,Total).

/* grand total = ticket + checked-bag charges (no other special costs) */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_cost(Ticket),
    total_checked_cost(Bags),
    Total is Ticket + Bags.

/* ---------------------------  Query  ------------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 33 x 19 x 13 inches, 56 lbs; 8. A backpack: 37 x 13 x 13 inches, 53 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $343.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Statutory rules needed for this case ---------- */

% the passenger and itinerary
class(premium_economy).
region(to_from_japan).          % Houston – Nagoya
flight_fare(343).

% bag facts:  bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
bag(1, 21,12, 8, 11).
bag(2, 38,13,14, 90).
bag(3, 38,14,11, 59).
bag(4, 43,22,21, 52).
bag(5, 35,23,13, 70).
bag(6, 45,20,22, 93).
bag(7, 33,19,13, 56).
bag(8, 37,13,13, 53).

/* ----------  Carry-on test ---------- */
carryon_size_limit(22,14,9).

is_carryon(BagID) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,_),
    carryon_size_limit(ML,MW,MH),
    L =< ML, W =< MW, H =< MH.

checked_bag(BagID) :- bag(BagID,_,_,_,_), \+ is_carryon(BagID).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fee (Premium Economy, Japan) ---------- */
% 1st & 2nd checked bags are free, 3rd = $200, 4th+ = $200
base_fee(Index, 0)  :- Index =< 2.        % free allowance
base_fee(Index,200) :- Index >= 3.

/* ----------  Oversize / overweight extra fees ---------- */
dimsum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

oversize_fee(L,W,H, 0)  :- dimsum(L,W,H,S), S =< 62.
oversize_fee(L,W,H,30)  :- dimsum(L,W,H,S), S > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(L,W,H,200) :- dimsum(L,W,H,S), S > 65, S =< 115.

overweight_fee(Weight, 0)   :- Weight =< 50.
overweight_fee(Weight, 30)  :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(Weight,100)  :- Weight  > 53, Weight =< 70.
overweight_fee(Weight,450)  :- Weight  > 70, Weight =< 100.

/* choose the higher of the two extras */
extra_fee(L,W,H,Weight,F) :-
    oversize_fee(L,W,H,OS), overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    F is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------  Fee for each checked bag ---------- */
bag_fee(BagID,Index,TotalFee) :-
    bag(BagID,L,W,H,Weight),
    base_fee(Index,Base),
    extra_fee(L,W,H,Weight,Extra),
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Sum of all checked-bag fees ---------- */
checked_bag_list(List) :- findall(ID, checked_bag(ID), List).

total_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    bag_fees(List,1,Sum).

bag_fees([],_,0).
bag_fees([BagID|Rest],Index,Sum) :-
    bag_fee(BagID,Index,F1),
    NextIndex is Index + 1,
    bag_fees(Rest,NextIndex,RestSum),
    Sum is F1 + RestSum.

/* ----------  Grand total ---------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_fare(Fare),
    total_bag_fees(BagSum),
    Total is Fare + BagSum.

/* ----------  Query and output ---------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

bag(3,37,16,12,84).
bag(4,35,17,12,72).
bag(5,37,17,10,69).
bag(6,37,16,11,53).
bag(7,33,21,11,62).
bag(8,52,29,25,87).

/* list of all checked–bag IDs (carry-on is not listed) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ======================  Statutory rules  ====================== */

/* (1) Bag-size sum */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* (2) Oversize fees – to / from China, Japan, S. Korea, Hong Kong, India,
       Australia, New Zealand                                            */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (3) Over-weight fees – same region
       Thresh = 70 lb for complimentary bags, 50 lb for charged bags      */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 450 ).

/* (4) Penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight              */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* (5) Checked-bag base fees – Business Class on this route              */
bag_fee(1,0).          /* 1st checked bag               */
bag_fee(2,0).          /* 2nd checked bag               */
bag_fee(3,200).        /* 3rd checked bag               */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.   /* 4th and beyond             */

/* ======================  Cost engine  ====================== */

/* pick 2 different IDs (F1<F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* put the 2 freebies in positions 1-2, keep the rest in original order */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* total cost for one particular choice of freebies */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       bags_cost(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating fees / penalties */
bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeTot,PenTot) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       bags_cost(Bs,Next,RestFee,RestPen),
       FeeTot is BaseFee + RestFee,
       PenTot is Pen + RestPen.

/* compute minimal total cost over all ways of choosing the 2 freebies */
total_cost(Min) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(C,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,C)),
               Costs),
       min_list(Costs,Min).

/* ======================  Query  ====================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Karen is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Washington D.C. to Paris with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 12 x 8 inches, 11 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 33 x 22 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A backpack: 34 x 15 x 14 inches, 57 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 18 x 9 inches, 70 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 42 x 31 x 18 inches, 62 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 42 x 23 x 19 inches, 57 lbs; 8. A backpack: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 62 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $494.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  RULES (statutes distilled for this itinerary) ---------- */

/* this itinerary: Washington-D.C. (US) ↔ Paris (Europe) */
route(europe_us).

/* passenger booking */
passenger_class(main_plus).                /* Main Plus (Main Cabin with 1 extra free bag) */

/* free checked-bag allowance -----------------------------------------
   – Trans-Atlantic (US-Europe) Main-Cabin customers get the 1st bag free
   – Main Plus adds 1 extra free bag (max 2)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------*/
free_checked_bags(2).

/* checked-bag fee table for this route (after free allowance) */
checked_bag_fee(BagIndex, 0)  :- free_checked_bags(F), BagIndex =< F.
checked_bag_fee(BagIndex, 200):- free_checked_bags(F), BagIndex > F.

/* oversize fees: Europe <-> US ---------------------------------------*/
oversize_fee(DimSum, 0)    :- DimSum =< 62.
oversize_fee(DimSum, 30)   :- DimSum > 62, DimSum =< 65.
oversize_fee(DimSum, 150)  :- DimSum > 65, DimSum =< 115.

/* overweight fees: Europe <-> US -------------------------------------*/
overweight_fee(Weight, 0)   :- Weight =< 50.
overweight_fee(Weight, 30)  :- Weight  > 50, Weight =< 53.
overweight_fee(Weight, 100) :- Weight  > 53, Weight =< 70.

/* special-handling fee for a bag is the higher of the 2 */
special_fee(DimSum, Weight, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(DimSum, OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight, OW),
    (OS >= OW -> Fee = OS ; Fee = OW).

/* -----------------------  THE CASE FACTS  ---------------------------*/

/* flight ticket price */
flight_ticket(494).

/* the 7 checked bags (index, dimension-sum inches, weight lbs) */
bag(1, 65, 53).   /* luggage box 33×22×10        */
bag(2, 63, 57).   /* backpack   34×15×14        */
bag(3, 65, 70).   /* luggage box 38×18×9         */
bag(4, 91, 62).   /* luggage box 42×31×18        */
bag(5, 63, 52).   /* luggage box 33×16×14        */
bag(6, 84, 57).   /* luggage box 42×23×19        */
bag(7, 63, 62).   /* backpack   33×16×14        */

/* total fee for one bag = checked-bag fee + special fee */
bag_total_fee(Index, Total) :-
    bag(Index, Dim, Wt),
    checked_bag_fee(Index, CBFee),
    special_fee(Dim, Wt, SpFee),
    Total is CBFee + SpFee.

/* sum a list */
sum_list([],0).
sum_list([H|T],S) :- sum_list(T,R), S is R+H.

/* -------------------  COMPUTING THE FINAL COST  ---------------------*/
total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    findall(Fee,
            (bag(Index,_,_), bag_total_fee(Index, Fee)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Tk),
    total_bag_fees(BagTotal),
    Total is Tk + BagTotal.

/* ---------------------------  QUERY  --------------------------------*/
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Jessica is a Business Class passenger flying from Xiamen to Chicago with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 13 x 9 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A backpack: 38 x 21 x 18 inches, 60 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 47 x 32 x 24 inches, 57 lbs; 4. A backpack: 39 x 19 x 18 inches, 96 lbs; 5. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 12 inches, 100 lbs; 6. A backpack: 34 x 17 x 14 inches, 54 lbs; 7. A backpack: 44 x 23 x 17 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 37 x 26 x 13 inches, 91 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $880.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ---------- Facts (case data) ---------- */
ticket_cost(880).          /* price of the flight itself */

/* Each checked piece: bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).            */
/* (Carry-on item is omitted – it’s free and doesn’t affect the total.)   */
bag(bag2,38,21,18,60).
bag(bag3,47,32,24,57).
bag(bag4,39,19,18,96).
bag(bag5,38,14,12,100).
bag(bag6,34,17,14,54).
bag(bag7,44,23,17,52).
bag(bag8,37,26,13,91).

/* List of all checked bags */
bag_ids([bag2,bag3,bag4,bag5,bag6,bag7,bag8]).

/* ---------- Statutory rules (to / from China in Business class) ------- */

/* Oversize fee to / from China (US bound):
      0  if ≤ 62 in
     30  if 62 < size ≤ 65 in
    200  if 65 < size ≤ 115 in      */
oversize_fee(Size,0  ) :- Size =< 62, !.
oversize_fee(Size,30 ) :- Size =< 65, !.
oversize_fee(Size,200) :- Size =< 115, !.
oversize_fee(_,999999).                 /* Not accepted – huge value   */

/* Over-weight fee to / from China (Business):
   Limits differ for complimentary vs. excess-charge bags            */
overweight_fee(Weight,Limit,0 ) :- Weight =< Limit, !.
overweight_fee(Weight,_,30 )  :- Weight =< 53, !.   % >Limit (50/70)–53
overweight_fee(Weight,_,100)  :- Weight =< 70, !.
overweight_fee(Weight,_,450)  :- Weight =< 100, !.
overweight_fee(_,_,999999).                /* Not accepted            */

/* Cost for a single bag given whether it’s 1 of the 2 complimentary ones */
bag_cost(IsFree,Bag,Cost) :-
    bag(Bag,L,W,H,Weight),
    Size is L+W+H,
    ( IsFree = true  -> CheckedFee = 0 , Limit = 70   % complimentary
    ; IsFree = false -> CheckedFee = 200, Limit = 50  % 3rd bag onward
    ),
    oversize_fee(Size,OSFee),
    overweight_fee(Weight,Limit,OWFee),
    ExtraFee is max(OSFee,OWFee),            % higher of the 2 applies
    Cost is CheckedFee + ExtraFee.

/* ---------- Choose the 2 complimentary bags so total cost is minimum -- */
select_two_free([A,B]) :-
    bag_ids(Bags),
    select(A,Bags,Rest),
    select(B,Rest,_),
    A @< B.                                  % avoid duplicate pairs

total_bag_cost(FreeList,Total) :-
    findall(Cost,
            ( bag_ids(Ids),
              member(Bag,Ids),
              ( member(Bag,FreeList) -> IsFree=true ; IsFree=false ),
              bag_cost(IsFree,Bag,Cost)
            ),
            Costs),
    sum_list(Costs,Total).

min_bag_cost(Min) :-
    findall(Total,
            ( select_two_free(Free),
              total_bag_cost(Free,Total)
            ),
            Totals),
    min_list(Totals,Min).

/* ---------- Overall charge -------------------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_cost(Tix),
    min_bag_cost(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.

/* ---------- Output ---------------------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2918"]).
/* =========================================================
   Daniel – Business Class  |  Incheon (ICN) → Los Angeles (LAX)
   Goal: compute total out-of-pocket cost (ticket + baggage)
   ========================================================= */

flight_cost(358).

bag(2,37,15,11,98).
bag(3,35,14,14,65).
bag(4,35,18,11,91).
bag(5,36,14,13,56).

bag(7,42,20,17,53).
bag(8,44,24,18,53).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on #1 is omitted)      */

/* ------------  STATUTORY SCHEDULES  ---------------------- */

/* (A) oversize – To / from Korea, Japan, China …            */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        ( Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ; Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ; Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (B) overweight – To / from Korea, Japan, China …          */
/* Thresh = 70 lbs for complimentary bags, 50 lbs otherwise  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
        ( W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ; W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ; W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ; W =< 100    -> Fee = 450 ).

/* (C) checked-bag base fee for Business class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 3.

/* ------------  HELPER PREDICATES  ------------------------ */

/* sum of the three dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum) :- Sum is L+W+H.

/* choose any 2 different elements (F1<F2) from a list       */
choose_two(List,A,B) :-
        append(_,[A|Tail],List),
        member(B,Tail).

/* reorder master list so the 2 freebies take positions 1–2  */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,R1),
        select(F2,R1,R2),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|R2].

/* penalty for one bag (higher of overweight vs oversize)    */
penalty(BagId,Type,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        (Type = comp -> Limit = 70 ; Limit = 50),

bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Rest],Idx,BaseTot,PenTot) :-

cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-

        bags_cost(Ord,1,Base,Pen),
        flight_cost(Tix),

/* --------  OVERALL MINIMUM TOTAL (best free-bag choice) --- */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),
        findall(T,

text: Susan is a First Class passenger flying from Philadelphia to Dallas with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 11 x 9 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 45 x 20 x 20 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 52 x 34 x 25 inches, 86 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 35 x 18 x 11 inches, 54 lbs; 5. A backpack: 41 x 21 x 16 inches, 51 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 38 x 13 x 14 inches, 67 lbs; 7. A backpack: 37 x 13 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A backpack: 33 x 18 x 14 inches, 51 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $187.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  Rules from the statutes that we need for this case ---------- */

:- use_module(library(lists)).

/* flight information */
flight_ticket(187).
passenger_class(first).          /* Susan is First Class           */
free_checked_bags(2).            /* Domestic First → 1st & 2nd bag */

/* ---------------  Data describing Susan’s pieces of luggage ------------- */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  Dimensions in inches, weight in lbs */

bag(b2, 45,20,20, 52).
bag(b3, 52,34,25, 86).
bag(b4, 35,18,11, 54).
bag(b5, 41,21,16, 51).
bag(b6, 38,13,14, 67).
bag(b7, 37,13,13, 52).
bag(b8, 33,18,14, 51).

/* ----------------------  Helper predicates  ----------------------------- */

/* linear_dimension(+Id, -TotalInches) */
linear_dimension(Id, Dim) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_), Dim is L+W+H.

/* oversize_fee(+Dim, -Fee)  – within / between U.S. */
oversize_fee(Dim, Fee) :-
    (Dim =< 62 -> Fee = 0
    ;Dim =< 65 -> Fee = 30
    ;Dim =< 115 -> Fee = 200).

/* overweight_fee(+Weight, +FreeFlag, -Fee) */
overweight_fee(W, free, Fee) :-
    (W =< 70 -> Fee = 0           % free bags can weigh up to 70 lb
    ;W =< 100 -> Fee = 200).      % 70–100 lb
overweight_fee(W, charged, Fee) :-
    (   W =< 50 -> Fee = 0
    ;   W =< 53 -> Fee = 30
    ;   W =< 70 -> Fee = 100
    ;   W =< 100 -> Fee = 200).

/* bag_base_fee(+IndexAmongCharged, -Fee)   – domestic First class */
bag_base_fee(1,150).        % 3rd checked bag overall
bag_base_fee(N,200) :- N>=2.% 4th, 5th … checked bags

/* cost_of_bag(+Id,+FreeFlag,+ChargedIndex,-Cost) */
cost_of_bag(Id, FreeFlag, _, Cost) :-
    FreeFlag = free,
    linear_dimension(Id,Dim),
    oversize_fee(Dim,OFee),
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W),
    overweight_fee(W,free,WFee),
    MaxFee is max(OFee,WFee),
    Cost is MaxFee.

cost_of_bag(Id, charged, Index, Cost) :-
    bag_base_fee(Index,BagFee),
    linear_dimension(Id,Dim),
    oversize_fee(Dim,OFee),
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W),
    overweight_fee(W,charged,WFee),
    MaxFee is max(OFee,WFee),
    Cost is BagFee + MaxFee.

/* -----------------  Selecting the complimentary bags  ------------------- */

/* combination of 2 distinct elements */
two_bags(List, A, B, Rest) :-
    select(A,List,R1),
    select(B,R1,Rest),
    A @< B.               /* avoid duplicates (order doesn’t matter) */

/* cost_for_choice(+FreeList,-Cost) */
cost_for_choice(FreeList, Cost) :-
    bags(AllBags),
    subtract(AllBags,FreeList,ChargedBags),
    % costs of the two complimentary bags
    findall(C1,(member(B,FreeList),
                cost_of_bag(B,free,_,C1)),FreeCosts),
    sumlist(FreeCosts,CostFree),
    % costs of the remaining (charged) bags
    findall(C2,
            (nth1(Index,ChargedBags,B),
             cost_of_bag(B,charged,Index,C2)), ChargedCosts),
    sumlist(ChargedCosts,CostCharged),
    Cost is CostFree + CostCharged.

/* list of all checked bags (carry-on is not included here) */
bags([b2,b3,b4,b5,b6,b7,b8]).

/* total_cost(-Total)  –  minimal possible total the passenger must pay */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Ticket),
    bags(BagList),
    findall(Cost,
            (two_bags(BagList,Free1,Free2,_),
             cost_for_choice([Free1,Free2],BagCost),
             Cost is Ticket + BagCost),
            Costs),
    min_list(Costs, Total).

/* ---------------------------  Query  ------------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
% base_fee(BagNumber, Fee).
base_fee(1, 40).
base_fee(2, 45).
base_fee(3, 150).
base_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.          % bags 4,5,6,7 …

/* ---------------- Oversize fees (within U.S.) ---------------- */

% oversize_fee(DimSum, Fee)
% 0-62 in  → no oversize fee
% 62<Dim<=65 → $30
% 65<Dim<=115 → $200
oversize_fee(Dim, 0)   :- Dim =< 62.
oversize_fee(Dim, 30)  :- Dim  > 62, Dim =< 65.
oversize_fee(Dim, 200) :- Dim  > 65, Dim =< 115.

/* ---------------- Over-weight fees (within U.S.) -------------- */

% overweight_fee(WeightLbs, Fee)
overweight_fee(W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 200) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* When both oversize and overweight apply, charge the higher one */
extra_fee(Dim, W, Fee) :-
        oversize_fee(Dim, F1),
        overweight_fee(W,  F2),
        (F1 >= F2 -> Fee = F1 ; Fee = F2).

/********************************************************************
  Facts for Elizabeth’s items
********************************************************************/

% item(ID, L, W, H, Weight).
item(1, 19, 14,  7,  6).    % backpack – will be carry-on
item(2, 38, 14, 13, 51).
item(3, 46, 33, 24, 80).
item(4, 33, 23,  9, 51).
item(5, 36, 14, 13, 53).
item(6, 38, 12, 14, 51).
item(7, 44, 23, 23, 81).
item(8, 44, 28, 22, 84).

/* ---------------  Derived facts  ---------------------------------*/

% carry_on(ItemID) – exactly one item may be carried on
carry_on(1).

% checked(ItemID, Ordinal) – gives the running order of checked bags
checked(ID, N) :-
        item(ID,_,_,_,_),
        \+ carry_on(ID),
        findall(I,(item(I,_,_,_,_),\+ carry_on(I)),L),
        nth1(N,L,ID).

% dimension_sum(ID, SumInches)
dimension_sum(ID, Sum) :-
        item(ID,L,W,H,_),
        Sum is L+W+H.

/********************************************************************
  Cost calculation
********************************************************************/

% cost_of_bag(ItemID, Cost)  (Cost = base fee + extra fee)
cost_of_bag(ID, Cost) :-
        checked(ID, Ord),
        base_fee(Ord, Base),
        dimension_sum(ID, Dim),
        item(ID,_,_,_,Wt),
        extra_fee(Dim, Wt, Extra),
        Cost is Base + Extra.

% total for all checked bags
total_checked_cost(Total) :-
        findall(C, (checked(ID,_), cost_of_bag(ID,C)), Cs),
        sum_list(Cs, Total).

% grand total (ticket + bags)
total_cost(Grand) :-
        ticket_cost(T),
        total_checked_cost(Bags),
        Grand is T + Bags.

/********************************************************************
  Query: print the total cost
********************************************************************/
:- total_cost(Total),
   format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Robert is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Beijing to Phoenix with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 12 x 8 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A backpack: 36 x 16 x 12 inches, 92 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 15 x 10 inches, 97 lbs; 4. A backpack: 41 x 21 x 12 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 41 x 16 x 18 inches, 53 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 36 x 13 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 50 x 36 x 26 inches, 85 lbs; 8. A backpack: 37 x 20 x 15 inches, 65 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $1290.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ------------  Statutory rules that are relevant to this case ------------ */

% route of interest
route(beijing, phoenix, china_usa).

% passenger class
class(main_cabin).

% ticket price
ticket_price(1290).

% ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% Bag facts  bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).
% ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
bag(1, 20, 12,  8, 12).
bag(2, 36, 16, 12, 92).
bag(3, 38, 15, 10, 97).
bag(4, 41, 21, 12, 51).
bag(5, 41, 16, 18, 53).
bag(6, 36, 13, 14, 52).
bag(7, 50, 36, 26, 85).
bag(8, 37, 20, 15, 65).

/* ------------  DIMENSION-BASED PREDICATES --------------------------------- */

size_total(Id, Total) :-
    bag(Id, L, W, H, _),
    Total is L + W + H.

carry_on(Id) :-            % qualifies as a carry-on
    bag(Id, L, W, H, _),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* ------------  BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES  ------------------------------------- */
/*  Beijing ↔ USA, Main Cabin
    – 1st checked bag:   $0   (complimentary – “to/from China” rule)
    – 2nd checked bag:  $100
    – 3rd & later :     $200                                   */

base_checked_fee(Pos, 0)   :- Pos =:= 1.      % first checked bag
base_checked_fee(Pos, 100) :- Pos =:= 2.      % second checked bag
base_checked_fee(Pos, 200) :- Pos >= 3.       % third or later

/* ------------  SURCHARGES (oversize / overweight)  ------------------------ */

/* overweight fees (Beijing ↔ USA) */
overweight_fee(W, 0)   :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W, 30)  :- W  > 50, W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W, 100) :- W  > 53, W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W, 450) :- W  > 70, W =< 100.

/* oversize fees (Beijing ↔ USA) */
oversize_fee(S, 0)   :- S =< 62.
oversize_fee(S, 30)  :- S  > 62, S =< 65.
oversize_fee(S, 200) :- S  > 65, S =< 115.

/* Highest of the two applies (never add both) */
surcharge(Id, Charge) :-
    bag(Id, _, _, _, W),
    size_total(Id, S),
    overweight_fee(W, OW),
    oversize_fee(S,  OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> Charge = OW ; Charge = OS ).

/* ------------  WHICH BAGS ARE CHECKED? ------------------------------------ */

checked_bag_list(Checked) :-
    findall(Id, (bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)), Checked).

/* ------------  COST PER CHECKED BAG --------------------------------------- */

checked_bag_cost(Id, Pos, Cost) :-
    base_checked_fee(Pos, Base),
    surcharge(Id, Surch),
    Cost is Base + Surch.

/* ------------  TOTAL BAG FEES --------------------------------------------- */

total_bag_fees(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(Checked),
    findall(Cost,
            ( nth1(Pos, Checked, Id),
              checked_bag_cost(Id, Pos, Cost)
            ),
            Costs),
    sum_list(Costs, Total).

/* ------------  OVERALL TOTAL ---------------------------------------------- */

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tix),
    total_bag_fees(BagFees),
    Total is Tix + BagFees.

/* ------------  QUERY ------------------------------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 36 x 15 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 46 x 27 x 26 inches, 69 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $178.

reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* =========  Statutory rules (extracted subset)  ========= */

/* Ticket */
ticket_price(178).

/* Checked-bag allowance for Main Plus on the route Panama → U.S.
   – 1st and 2nd checked bags are free (Main Cabin gets 1st free on this route,
     Main Plus adds 1 extra free = 2 free in total).                 */
free_bag(2).
free_bag(3).

/* ----------  Over-weight fees (Panama⇄U.S.)  ---------- */
overweight_fee(Weight,Fee) :-
    ( Weight > 70  -> Fee = 200         % 70–100 lb
    ; Weight > 53 -> Fee = 100         % >53–70 lb
    ; Weight > 50 -> Fee = 30          % >50–53 lb
    ; Fee = 0).

/* ----------  Over-size fees (Panama⇄U.S.)  ---------- */
oversize_fee(Size,Fee) :-
    ( Size > 65 -> Fee = 150           % >65–115 in
    ; Size > 62 -> Fee = 30            % >62–65 in
    ; Fee = 0).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fee (after free allowance)  ---------- */
base_bag_fee(Id,Fee) :-
    ( free_bag(Id) -> Fee = 0          % free allowance
    ; Fee = 200).                      % 3rd bag and beyond on this route

/* =========  Case facts  ========= */

/* bag(Id, Weight (lb), Size = L+W+H (in)) */
bag(2, 58, 63).
bag(3, 60, 64).
bag(4, 78, 83).
bag(5, 64, 69).
bag(6, 75,105).
bag(7, 53, 65).
bag(8, 69, 99).

/* =========  Cost calculations  ========= */

bag_extra_fee(Id,Extra) :-                     % higher of overweight / oversize
    bag(Id,Wt,Sz),
    overweight_fee(Wt,OW),
    oversize_fee(Sz,OS),
    ( OW >= OS -> Extra = OW ; Extra = OS).

bag_total_cost(Id,Cost) :-
    base_bag_fee(Id,Base),
    bag_extra_fee(Id,Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

bags_total_cost(Total) :-
    findall(C, (bag(Id,_,_), bag_total_cost(Id,C)), Cs),
    sum_list(Cs,Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    ticket_price(Tkt),
    bags_total_cost(BagCost),
    Total is Tkt + BagCost.

/* =========  Query ========= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A luggage box: 38 x 14 x 12 inches, 79 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 12 inches, 87 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 37 x 21 x 11 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 45 x 31 x 19 inches, 51 lbs; 6. A backpack: 38 x 21 x 12 inches, 74 lbs; 7. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 9 inches, 93 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 37 x 13 x 13 inches, 65 lbs; William's flight ticket is $122.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
```prolog

/* ----------  RULES FROM THE STATUTE (only what is needed for this case)  -------- */
% base checked–bag fee (Basic-Economy, within U.S.)
base_fee(1,40).
base_fee(2,45).
base_fee(3,150).
base_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

% oversize fee (within U.S.)
oversize_fee(Sum,0)   :- Sum =< 62.
oversize_fee(Sum,30)  :- Sum > 62 , Sum =< 65.
oversize_fee(Sum,200) :- Sum > 65 , Sum =< 115.

% overweight fee (within U.S.)
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W =< 50.
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W > 50 , W =< 53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W > 53 , W =< 70.
overweight_fee(W,200)  :- W > 70 , W =< 100.

% extra fee for a bag is the higher of its oversize / overweight surcharges
extra_fee(Id,Extra) :-
    item(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
    Sum is L+W+H,
    oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,OW),
    Extra is max(OS,OW).

% A carry-on must not exceed 22×14×9 in.
carry_on(Id) :-
    item(Id,L,W,H,_),
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

% a checked bag is any bag that is not the single free carry-on
checked_bag(Id) :-
    item(Id,_,_,_,_),
    \+ carry_on(Id).

/* -------------------------------  CASE FACTS  ---------------------------------- */
ticket_cost(122).

item(bag1,22,14,7,9).      % backpack – free carry-on
item(bag2,38,14,12,79).
item(bag3,38,14,12,87).
item(bag4,37,21,11,53).
item(bag5,45,31,19,51).
item(bag6,38,21,12,74).
item(bag7,34,20,9,93).
item(bag8,37,13,13,65).

/* -------------------  CALCULATE COST OF CHECKED BAGS  ------------------------- */
bag_cost(Id,Index,Cost) :-
    base_fee(Index,Base),
    extra_fee(Id,Extra),
    Cost is Base + Extra.

checked_bags_ids(IDs) :-
    findall(Id,checked_bag(Id),IDs).

checked_bags_total_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bags_ids(IDs),
    checked_bags_total_cost(IDs,1,Total).

checked_bags_total_cost([],_,0).
checked_bags_total_cost([Id|Rest],Index,Total) :-
    bag_cost(Id,Index,Cost1),
    NextIndex is Index+1,
    checked_bags_total_cost(Rest,NextIndex,CostRest),
    Total is Cost1 + CostRest.

/* ---------------------------  OVERALL TOTAL  ----------------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
    checked_bags_total_cost(BagsCost),
    ticket_cost(Ticket),
    Total is Ticket + BagsCost.

/* ----------------------------  QUERY & OUTPUT  -------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.
```

text: Elizabeth is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Dallas to Sydney with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 13 x 6 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 40 x 22 x 16 inches, 64 lbs; 3. A backpack: 33 x 18 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 46 x 28 x 22 inches, 63 lbs; 5. A backpack: 34 x 22 x 9 inches, 52 lbs; 6. A backpack: 34 x 18 x 13 inches, 69 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 47 x 23 x 23 inches, 53 lbs; 8. A backpack: 34 x 23 x 11 inches, 51 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $675.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2665"]).
/* =========================================================
   Statutory computation for Elizabeth – Dallas ➔ Sydney
   Main Cabin – issued 2024 rules
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------------  Trip facts  --------------------------- */

flight_cost(675).

/* checked pieces only  (bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)) */
bag(2,40,22,16,64).
bag(3,33,18,13,51).
bag(4,46,28,22,63).
bag(5,34,22, 9,52).
bag(6,34,18,13,69).
bag(7,47,23,23,53).
bag(8,34,23,11,51).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------------  Statutory rules  ---------------------- */

/* dimension sum */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – to / from Australia / New Zealand */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees
   – complimentary bag: 70-lb limit
   – charged bag      : 50-lb limit                                  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs overweight                      */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Main Cabin bag fees – U.S. ↔ Australia                           */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,100).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 3.

/* ----------------  Helper predicates  -------------------- */

/* choose a complimentary (1st-bag) candidate */
choose_one(List,Bag) :- member(Bag,List).

/* put that bag first, keep the rest in original order */
ordered_list(First,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(First,All,Rest),
       Ordered = [First|Rest].

/* cost for a particular placement of the complimentary bag */
cost_for_choice(FreeBag,Total) :-
       ordered_list(FreeBag,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,FeeSum,PenSum),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + FeeSum + PenSum.

/* walk the list, adding base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeTot,PenTot) :-
       (Idx =:= 1 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,FeeRest,PenRest),
       FeeTot is Fee + FeeRest,
       PenTot is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total over all ways of picking the free bag */
total_cost(Min) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,(choose_one(L,B),cost_for_choice(B,T)),Totals),
       min_list(Totals,Min).

/* ----------------  Query & output  ----------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A backpack: 35 x 17 x 11 inches, 64 lbs; 8. A backpack: 33 x 20 x 12 inches, 53 lbs; William's flight ticket is $1413.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 3183"]).
/* ===================================================================
   Case:  William – First Class   Hong Kong  ➜  Las Vegas
   Goal:  compute total trip cost (ticket + all luggage charges)
   =================================================================== */

/* ----------------------  Trip-specific facts  ---------------------- */

/* published ticket price */
flight_cost(1413).

/* passenger’s pieces – bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)            */
/* (bag #1 is his carry-on and is therefore NOT in the checked list)  */
bag(1,20,11, 8,  8).       /* carry-on, ignored for charges */
bag(2,38,14,13, 51).
bag(3,49,27,25, 70).
bag(4,45,30,22, 83).
bag(5,37,13,13, 53).
bag(6,47,28,22, 56).
bag(7,35,17,11, 64).
bag(8,33,20,12, 53).

/* Ids of the bags that must be checked */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------------------  Statutory parameters  --------------------- */

/* bag fees for this route (‘to / from … Hong Kong …’) – First Class   */
bag_fee(Idx,0)   :- Idx =< 3.           /* 1st–3rd bags complimentary  */
bag_fee(Idx,200) :- Idx >= 4.           /* 4th bag and beyond          */

/* size surcharge – Hong Kong / China region                           */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
          ( Sum =< 62          -> Fee = 0
          ; Sum =< 65          -> Fee = 30
          ; Sum =< 115         -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight surcharge – Hong Kong / China region                    */
/* ‘Thresh’ is 70 lb for a complimentary bag, 50 lb for a charged bag  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
          ( W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
          ; W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
          ; W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
          ; W =< 100           -> Fee = 450 ).

/* penalty that applies to a bag: higher of over-size vs over-weight   */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
          bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
          Sum is L+W+H,
          oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
          overweight_fee(WT,70,OW),
          Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
          bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
          Sum is L+W+H,
          oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
          overweight_fee(WT,50,OW),
          Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------------------  Helper predicates  ------------------------ */

/* choose three different elements (A < B < C) from a list            */
choose_three(List,A,B,C) :-
          append(_, [A|Tail1], List),
          append(_, [B|Tail2], Tail1),
          member(C, Tail2),
          A < B, B < C.

/* build ordered list: complimentary bags first, the rest afterwards  */
ordered_list(A,B,C,Ordered) :-
          checked_bag_ids(All),
          select(A,All,R1),
          select(B,R1,R2),
          select(C,R2,R3),
          Ordered = [A,B,C|R3].

/* ----------------------  Cost computation -------------------------- */

cost_for_choice(A,B,C,Total) :-
          ordered_list(A,B,C,Ord),
          cost_bags(Ord,1,BagCost,PenCost),
          flight_cost(Tix),
          Total is Tix + BagCost + PenCost.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees and penalties      */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeTot,PenTot) :-
          (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
          bag_fee(Idx,Base),
          penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
          Next is Idx + 1,
          cost_bags(Bs,Next,FeeRest,PenRest),
          FeeTot is Base + FeeRest,
          PenTot is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total over all ways of selecting the 3 complimentary bags   */
total_cost(Min) :-
          checked_bag_ids(L),
          findall(T,
                  ( choose_three(L,A,B,C),
                    cost_for_choice(A,B,C,T) ),
                  Totals),
          min_list(Totals,Min).

/* ----------------------  Query & output  --------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2798"]).
/* =========================================================
   Joseph – Auckland (NZ)  ->  San Francisco (U.S.)
   Business Class
   Goal: compute total trip cost (ticket + all bag charges)
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------  Flight ticket  ----------------------------- */
flight_cost(908).

/* ----------  Checked bags  ------------------------------ */
/*   bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight).               */
bag(2,46,23,18,69).
bag(3,42,23,18,70).
bag(4,39,17,14,53).
bag(5,34,20,10,51).
bag(6,41,26,20,57).
bag(7,37,13,14,60).
bag(8,35,16,13,53).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids, in original order           */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------  Statutory charges for this itinerary  ------ */

/* (1) Base checked-bag fees: Business Class, to / from
      Australia or New Zealand                               */
bag_fee(1,0).               /* 1st bag complimentary  */
bag_fee(2,0).               /* 2nd bag complimentary  */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.     /* 3rd + bags             */

/* (2) Oversize fees: Australia / New Zealand region        */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (3) Overweight fees                                       */
/*     – complimentary bags: 70-lb allowance
       – charged   bags: 50-lb allowance                     */
overweight_fee(W,Allow,Fee) :-
        (  W =< Allow     -> Fee = 0
        ;  W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
        ;  W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
        ;  W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (4) Penalty for one bag = higher of oversize vs overweight*/
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
        Sum is L+W+H,
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
        Sum is L+W+H,
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------  Helper predicates  ------------------------- */

/* choose 2 distinct elements (F1 occurs before F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
        append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
        member(F2,Tail).

/* place the 2 chosen freebies first, preserve order of the rest */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,Rest1),
        select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* compute full cost for one particular choice of freebies */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BaseSum,PenSum),
        flight_cost(Flight),
        Total is Flight + BaseSum + PenSum.

/* walk through the ordered list, accumulating costs */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,BaseSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        Next is Idx+1,
        cost_bags(Bs,Next,BaseRest,PenRest),
        BaseSum is BaseFee + BaseRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* compute minimal total over all possible selections of 2 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(List),
        findall(T,
                (choose_two(List,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
                Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------  Query & output  ---------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

```prolog

/* -------------  RULES (statutes) ------------- */

/* oversize fee – Canada <-> U.S. (same as general U.S./Canada rules)   */
oversize_fee(Size, 0)   :- Size =< 62.                    /* not oversize            */
oversize_fee(Size, 30)  :- Size  > 62, Size =< 65.        /* 62-65 in                */
oversize_fee(Size, 200) :- Size  > 65, Size =< 115.       /* 65-115 in               */

/* overweight fee – Canada <-> U.S. (Basic Economy rules)               */
overweight_fee(W, 0)    :- W =< 50.                       /* not overweight          */
overweight_fee(W, 30)   :- W  > 50, W =< 53.              /* 50-53 lb                */
overweight_fee(W, 100)  :- W  > 53, W =< 70.              /* 53-70 lb                */
overweight_fee(W, 200)  :- W  > 70, W =< 100.             /* 70-100 lb               */

/* surcharge for a bag that is either oversize, overweight or both      */
surcharge(Size, W, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Size, F1),
    overweight_fee(W,  F2),
    Fee is max(F1,F2).

/* base checked-bag fee for Basic Economy Canada <-> U.S.               */
base_fee(1,  35).
base_fee(2,  45).
base_fee(3, 150).
base_fee(N, 200) :- N >= 4.

/* total fee for a given checked bag number                              */
bag_total_fee(N, Size, W, Total) :-
    base_fee(N, B),
    surcharge(Size, W, S),
    Total is B + S.

/* -------------  FACTS (case data) ------------- */

/* carry-on (free) – not listed among checked bags                       */
/* checked bags: numbered in the order they will be processed            */
/* bag(No, SizeInInches, WeightInPounds).                                */
bag(1, 112, 53).   /* luggage box 54×30×28 */
bag(2,  79, 53).   /* backpack 41×24×14   */
bag(3, 106, 51).   /* backpack 47×34×25   */
bag(4,  64, 73).   /* backpack 33×18×13   */
bag(5,  63, 93).   /* luggage box 37×17×9 */
bag(6,  63, 51).   /* luggage box 34×18×11*/
bag(7,  73, 52).   /* backpack 38×23×12   */

flight_cost(211).

/* -------------  AGGREGATION ------------- */

bags_fee(Total) :-
    findall(Fee,
            (bag(N,SZ,W), bag_total_fee(N,SZ,W,Fee)),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_cost(FC),
    bags_fee(BF),
    Total is FC + BF.

/* -------------  QUERY ------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

```prolog
/* -------------  Statutory rules that matter for this case ------------- */

/* route type – Susan is travelling China → U.S. */
route(china_to_us).

/* Checked-bag base fees for Basic-Economy China ↔ U.S.             */
checked_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
    route(china_to_us),
    BagNumber =:= 1, Fee is 75.
checked_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
    route(china_to_us),
    BagNumber =:= 2, Fee is 100.
checked_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
    route(china_to_us),
    BagNumber =:= 3, Fee is 200.
checked_fee(BagNumber, Fee) :-
    route(china_to_us),
    BagNumber  >= 4,
    Fee is 200.

/* ----------  oversize / overweight fees (China ↔ U.S.) ------------- */

/* oversize : size = L+W+H */
oversize_fee(Sum, Fee) :-
    Sum =< 62,                  Fee is 0.
oversize_fee(Sum, Fee) :-
    Sum  > 62,  Sum =< 65,      Fee is 30.
oversize_fee(Sum, Fee) :-
    Sum  > 65,  Sum =< 115,     Fee is 200.

/* overweight : weight in pounds */
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W =< 50,                    Fee is 0.
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W  > 50, W =< 53,           Fee is 30.
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W  > 53, W =< 70,           Fee is 100.
overweight_fee(W, Fee) :-
    W  > 70, W =< 100,          Fee is 450.

/* When both size & weight are out of limits, only the higher fee applies */
extra_fee(SumDim, Weight, Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(SumDim, OS),
    overweight_fee(Weight,  OW),
    ( OS >= OW -> Fee = OS ; Fee = OW ).

/* -------------     Cabin-baggage rules (1 carry-on free) ------------- */

carry_on_ok(L,W,H) :-
    L =< 22, W =< 14, H =< 9.

/* -----------------------  Susan’s bags  ------------------------------ */
/* bag(No, Length, Width, Height, Weight).  */

bag(1, 20, 11,  7,  10).
bag(2, 38, 15, 11,  53).
bag(3, 46, 24, 23,  94).
bag(4, 38, 16, 11,  58).
bag(5, 34, 16, 14,  51).
bag(6, 41, 24, 14,  52).
bag(7, 43, 24, 15,  99).
bag(8, 34, 18, 13,  56).

/* ------------  Identify the single free carry-on item ---------------- */

free_carry_on(BagNo) :-
    bag(BagNo,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_ok(L,W,H),
    !.      /* take the first (bag 1 in this data set) */

/* -----------------  Assemble list of checked bags -------------------- */

checked_bag_list(Checked) :-
    findall(N, (bag(N,_,_,_,_), \+ free_carry_on(N)), Checked).

/* -----------  Fee for one particular checked bag  -------------------- */

one_checked_bag_fee(BagNo, BagNumberInSequence, TotalFee) :-
    bag(BagNo, L, W, H, Weight),
    Sum is L+W+H,
    checked_fee(BagNumberInSequence, Base),      % base checked-bag fee
    extra_fee(Sum, Weight, Extra),               % oversize / overweight
    TotalFee is Base + Extra.

/* ----------  Total of ALL checked bags  ------------------------------ */

checked_bags_total(Total) :-
    checked_bag_list(List),
    findall(Fee,
            ( nth1(Index, List, BagNo),
              one_checked_bag_fee(BagNo, Index, Fee)
            ),
            Fees),
    sum_list(Fees, Total).

/* -----------------  Overall travel cost ------------------------------ */

flight_ticket(731).

total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Tk),
    checked_bags_total(Ck),
    % no other special-needs costs in this case
    Total is Tk + Ck.

/* --------------------------  Query  ---------------------------------- */

:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
```

A backpack: 33 x 21 x 9 inches, 51 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 37 x 17 x 14 inches, 70 lbs; James's flight ticket is $696.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2266"]).
/* -------------  Facts describing James’ trip -------------------- */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(696).

/* list of checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).       */
bag(2,35,18,12,67).
bag(3,38,15,12,70).
bag(4,51,36,27,51).
bag(5,36,15,12,52).
bag(6,48,29,27,52).
bag(7,33,21, 9,51).
bag(8,37,17,14,70).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on bag #1 is excluded)        */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* -------------  Statutory rules for this itinerary -------------- */

/* sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – between Europe and U.S.                            */
/*   ≤62 in       : $0                                               */
/*   62–65 in     : $30                                              */
/*   65–115 in    : $150                                             */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (  Sum =< 62       -> Fee = 0
       ;  Sum =< 65       -> Fee = 30
       ;  Sum =< 115      -> Fee = 150 ).

/* overweight fee (all regions)                                     */
/* Thresh = max weight (lbs) allowed before a fee is charged         */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (  W =< Thresh     -> Fee = 0
       ;  W =< 53         -> Fee = 30
       ;  W =< 70         -> Fee = 100
       ;  W =< 100        -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs. overweight                      */
/* Complimentary bags use Thresh 70; charged bags use Thresh 50     */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag fees for Business Class, Europe↔U.S. route            */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.

/* -------------  Helper predicates --------------------------------*/

/* choose two different elements (F1<F2) from a list                 */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* create ordered list: the 2 freebies occupy positions 1 and 2      */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags                */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating bag fees and penalties     */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,Next,Cs,Ps),
       CostSum is Fee + Cs,
       PenSum  is Pen + Ps.

/* minimal total cost over all possible selections of 2 free bags    */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* -------------  Query and output --------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.
